你管我！你先下棋，我要看你能嘴硬到什么时候！
What's it to you? Make your chess move! We'll see how long your mouth stays smart!
I don't have time to play with you right now
你会回来找我的，因为你想和我下棋！
You'll be back! Because I KNOW you want to face me in chess!
Silence. Spare me your words and show me your skill.
还没下完呢，记得回来找我。
This isn't finished. Remember to return so we can see this truly settled.
Wait, don't leave. Another round please...
Go, then. I must think some more...
Being a master truly is a lonesome experience...
嗯，你的水平勉强还可以。当然了，比我差远了。
Hm. Your skill is acceptable. Nothing comparable to mine, of course.
嘿，夸你一句你还得瑟上了。
Oh. Turned cocky from a single bit of praise, have we?
不错不错，这才是学习的态度。
Hm. Good, good, good. This is the attitude one should take when learning.
下次可就没有这么简单了。
It will not be so easy next time.
把奖励拿了吧，反正我也用不上。
Take the reward. I can't use it anyway.
Can we play chess again, master?
I don't have time to play with you right now
你会回来找我的，因为你想和我下棋！
You'll be back! Because I KNOW you want to face me in chess!
上次只是入门级别的测试，这次的棋局可非同一般。
The last one was only a beginner's test. This game will be much harder.
Are you just pulling my leg?
废话少说，试试你就知道了。
Shut your mouth and face me to find out.
You really know how to dawdle.
不对不对，怎么会这么快就解开了。
No, no, wait. How could you have figured that out so quickly?
Isn't it still kind of easy?
不愧是我看上的对手，我承认你有些水平。
I expected no less from someone I've deemed as my opponent. You have some skill, I'll give you that.
这次的棋局可非同一般，你准备好了吗？
This round of chess will be quite extraordinary. Are you ready?
我准备好了，你准备好了吗？
哼，下棋可不看嘴皮子功夫。快点开始吧。
Hmph. Chess is not a game of words. Hurry up and start!
你解开了？一定是哪里出了问题！
You figured it out? Something must have gone wrong!
Does this really confuse you so much?
有没有可能是你的问题。
Could the problem be with you?
别高兴得太早。以前都是我故意让着你，现在我要发挥真实水平了！
Don't celebrate too soon. I was going soft with you before. Now, I will unleash my true potential!
准备好迎接这次的挑战了吗？
Are you prepared for this time's challenge?
下次可以不用问，直接开始。
You don't need to ask next time. Just start.
哼哼，这次我倒要看看你如何解开。
Haha. I want to see how you figure this one out.
你不是准备好了吗…真磨叽。
Didn't you say you were ready...? Stop wasting time.
不可能…绝对不可能！绝对是你运气好！
No... no! Impossible! Absolutely impossible! You... you must be lucky!
我要是抽卡不出货你赔我啊？
Really, I'm lucky? So, if I go pull for characters in a game right now, are you going to make it up to me if I don't get a 5-star?
...I won't be able to afford it.
运气真是万能的解释呢…
Ah. "Luck" really can be blamed for anything...
我就不信下次你的运气还能这么好。
I don't believe you'll be this fortunate next time.
你的套路我已经摸清了，还敢来挑战吗？
I have figured out your ways. Dare you begin another challenge?
Oh yeah? I don't believe you.
Here I come. I'm not scared.
我已经习惯了，说真的，我已经不想放狠话了。
I'm used to it already. Seriously, I don't even want to say anything tough anymore.
…你是不是觉得你每次说完，我都要问你一下，你会很烦躁？
...Do you get annoyed that I need to banter with you every time you finish a line?
还行吧，你总得要狡辩一下。
It's okay. You need to talk back anyways.
下次我要输了，我绝不废话！你记住了啊！
If I lose next time, I will not prattle! Remember this!
你知道我要说什么，我也知道你要说什么，来吧？
You know what I'm going to say. I also know what you're going to say. Should we start?
说实话，我们交手这么多次，你有没有一次觉得「棋逢对手」？
Seriously, after facing me so many times, have you ever felt like you "met your match"?
我们继续吧，我出题，你接题！
Let's continue. I'll provide the puzzles, and you'll answer them!
哇哦，真不愧是我命中注定的对手。
Whoa. I know you were my fated nemesis for a reason.
我亲手设计的谜题，只有你能解开！你真是太棒了！
Only you can solve the puzzles I personally designed! You're awesome!
这次怎么是这种风格的？
What's with the style this time?
...Well, I got to shake up my mood, right?
当然，我知道自己很棒棒。
Of course. I know I'm awesome.
你知道吗？其实我也很棒棒。
You know what? I'm pretty awesome too.
我真的不错，我真的很不错。我的朋友，我想骄傲地告诉你……
I'm really awesome. I'm really awesome. My friend, I'd like to proudly tell you that...
我真的真的真的很不错！
下一题，下一题我一定会难倒你。
Next time! The next puzzle will be your end.
我们商量个事情，为了不让我在岁阳朋友面前抬不起头来，你可不可以假装输给我？
Hey, can we discuss something? Can you pretend to throw a match so I can get keep my dignity before my heliobi friends?
...You lost. Why should I give you a reward for losing?
少得意忘形了，解出这个棋局的人可是寥寥无几！
Stop gloating. Very few people can solve this chess puzzle!
I get it. I really do.
你一定是在扮猪吃老虎！既然如此，那我也就不藏着掖着了，准备迎接最后的挑战吧！
You're pretending to be weak so I lower my guard! In that case, I will no longer conceal my own potential. Prepare to face the ultimate, final challenge!
前所未有的复杂棋局，从未公开的独家设计！
A chess match of never-before-seen complexity, an exclusive design previously unrevealed!
Another bitter defeat is coming, just like it always has.
Then enough talk. Have at you!
都最后一题了，你还要打断一下吗？快点回来。
It's the last puzzle, and you still need to interrupt me? Hurry and come back soon.
我败了…我彻彻底底地败了。我的人生…哦不，我的岁阳生活已经失去了意义。
I've been defeated... I've been completely and utterly defeated. My life... No, my existence as a heliobus has lost all meaning.
你出的棋局也蛮有挑战的。
Your chess puzzles are pretty challenging, actually.
败了就是败了，说再多也没有用。
Losing is losing. Words can't change that.
So, are you ready for another round?
再也不会了。作为棋手，请你让我保持基本的风度。
No. Never again. As a fellow chess player, please leave me with some basic dignity.
让棋鬼一个岁阳独自静静。
Let the Chess Ghost have some alone time for a bit.
哼哼，别想讨好我！我要回去闭关修炼，下次我可不会手软！
Hmph. Don't try to butter me up! I must seclude myself and improve. I will not be so merciful next time!
你可以附身在聪明人身上。
不对！我不是被十王司镇伏了吗？我怎么附身到聪明人身上。
Wait, no! I've been suppressed by the Ten-Lords Commission. How am I supposed to possess someone smart?
不对不对不对！你是在说我不够聪明？
Wait, no, no, no! Are you saying I'm not smart enough?
你走吧，我要回去生闷气了，要是再有下次，我可不会手软！
Leave. I wish to head back and sulk. If there is a next time, I will not be merciful!
哎呦，盼星星盼月亮，总算把您给盼来了。那你看，咱们什么时候开始？
You're finally here! Oh, you don't know how long I've been waiting for this! So, when shall we start?
我？一个默默无闻的「寻径指津」爱好者罢了。而您就不一样了，您可是我们「寻圈」的传奇人物。
Me? I'm just your average "Pathfinder" enthusiast. My name won't ring a bell with most people. You, on the other hand, are a legend in the community!
您是我们「寻圈」的大名人，哪一个玩「寻径指津」的认不得您的脸？
You're a big name in the community. Everyone that plays "Pathfinder" recognizes you.
{NICKNAME}大人说笑了，当然是「寻径指津」啦，整个仙舟还有比您更会玩这个游戏的人么？
Oh, you're such a jokester, {NICKNAME}. I'm talking about "Pathfinder," of course! Nobody else in the Xianzhou plays it better than you, after all.
等等，太卜司那个家伙…不会还没跟您说过咱们的活动吧？
Wait... Don't tell me that guy from the Divination Commission didn't tell you about our event?
这家伙，棋艺稀烂也就算了，一点小事都办不好，回头把他从「寻圈」开除。
Sheesh, I gave him a pass for being bad at chess, but he can't even do this simple task, right? I'm kicking him from the community when I get back.
He told me, but I forgot about it.
你们这个圈子还搞霸凌呢。
You folks bully people in your community?
让您看笑话了，我再重新给您介绍下这次活动好了。
My apologies for the mix-up. As amends, why don't I introduce the event to you again?
虽然咱们圈内人都认为「寻径指津」天下第一，但放眼整个游戏市场，「寻径指津」还是小众游戏，您知道为什么吗？

Those of us in the community may think the world of "Pathfinder" as a game, but if you look at the gaming market as a whole, you'll find that "Pathfinder" ultimately remains a niche game. Why do you think that is?
不可能！难道「枘凿六合」难度高了？玩家照样比咱们多。
Impossible! Did Hexanexus raise their difficulty? They're attracting more players than us.
Because the community atmosphere is poor.
咱这是益智游戏。人不都说吗——「智商高的人情商都低」。我们是高智商游戏圈子，素质当然差了。
This is a mind-training game. People always say, "Those with high IQs have low EQs." We are a high-IQ gaming community, so of course the atmosphere would suck.
The players suck at the game.
这话可不敢乱说！还是要多在自己身上找原因，不能做不出好游戏就怪玩家！
You shouldn't make such a bold claim! It's important to reflect on ourselves more and not blame players when we aren't making good games!
关键是咱们「寻圈」缺乏意见领袖啊。你看看「帝垣琼玉」，人家有青雀——打工人的学习榜样。
But the crux of the problem is that the community lacks an opinion leader. If you look at Celestial Jade, you'll see that Qingque is their role model for the average person working a wage.
再看看「以太战线」，人家有银狼。那可是上了公司通缉令的人物，全银河无人不知无人不晓，虽然不是啥好名声。
What about Aetherium Wars? Well, they have Silver Wolf. As someone wanted by the IPC, her name is known across the cosmos — even if it's in infamy.
咱们「寻径指津」呢，一个拿得出手的知名玩家都没有，除了……
But "Pathfinder"? We don't even have a single prominent player to our name, except for...
岁阳就算了吧！再把十王司的铁拳给引来……
Heliobi? Just forget about 'em! Don't let the iron fist of the Ten-Lords Commission chew us out again...
我？哈哈，我连个正式名字都不配有。
Me? Haha, I'm not even important enough to have an actual name.
就喜欢您这样有自知之明的天才。
I like geniuses with self-awareness like you.
就是您啊！勇往直前的开拓者、做好事不留名的无名客、名震银河的球棒侠、城市卫生的清道夫！
It's you! The fearless Trailblazer, the fame-forgoing altruistic Nameless, the batter who shakes the cosmos, and the custodian of urban cleanliness!
总之您就是咱们破圈的希望，只要您能在车水马龙的竞锋舰玩「寻径指津」，一定能引起很多人对这款游戏的关注。
In short, you're the "Pathfinder" community's only hope. If you play Pathfinder in a busy place like the Skysplitter, you're sure to draw attention to the game.
对不起，我比赛要开始了。
Sorry, but my match is about to start.
It's too embarrassing to play in front of so many people.
Wait, don't be so hasty. Now, if you'll look over here...
一点心意不成敬意，事成之后这些都是您的。
It isn't much, but they're all yours once the deed is done.
What are we waiting for? Let's get started.
好歹毒的招数，我玩还不行么。
What a ruthless gambit. I can't say no now, can I?
你准备好了就跟我说一声，我帮你摆棋盘。
Let me know when you're ready. I'll set up the chessboard for you.
I need a moment to get ready.
I'll be waiting for you here with the chest.
Welcome back, {NICKNAME}. Would you like another game of "Pathfinder"?
I need a moment to get ready.
I'll be waiting for you here with the chest.
我的玉兆在猛烈震动，这周围一定有「寻径指津」的高手！
My jade abacus is vibrating violently! A "Pathfinder" pro must be nearby!
Your jade abacus might be broken.
您一定是{NICKNAME}大人吧？我患有眼疾，看不见您，还请见谅。
You must be {NICKNAME}. My apologies, but I unfortunately can't see you because of an eye affliction.
不过我能从玉兆的震动中感受到您磅礴的棋力，不愧是我们「寻径指津」的最强棋手之一。
Through the vibrations of my jade abacus, however, I can tell that you must be a prodigious chess master. It's no wonder you're one of the best "Pathfinder" players.
How do you play if you can't see?
帝弓为你关上一扇门，就会为你打开一扇窗。我虽然眼睛不好，但我耳朵特别灵，靠「听声辨位」也能下棋。
When the Reignbow closes a door, THEY open a window. My eyes may have failed, but my ears are particularly sharp. I can play simply by discerning the pieces' locations by sound.
What's going on with your jade abacus?
这是一块植入了棋力检测程序的玉兆，说话的人棋力越强，它就震动的越厉害。您还是少说两句吧，我怕它震坏了。

This jade abacus is embedded with a program that can detect a person's chess proficiency when they speak. The higher the speaker's chess proficiency, the more violent its vibrations. That being so, I'd be grateful if you could hold your tongue a little — I'm afraid you'll break it.
这次还有一个从朱明来的棋手，实力与你难分高下。不过我相信只要您能解开我布置的棋局，那个「之一」就可以去掉了。

Regrettably, a player from the Zhuming whose skills are comparable to yours will also be participating this time. However, I'm confident that you'll take the top spot once you can solve this game I've set up.
我的话是不是有些太多了，要不我们直接开始下棋吧。
Ah, but I digress. Shall we start the game?
I need a moment to get ready.
最强棋手的称号随时等待您摘取。
Sure. The title of Grandmaster will always be here for the taking.
准备好了么，我们继续下棋吧。
Are you ready? Let's resume playing.
I need a moment to get ready.
最强棋手的称号随时等待您摘取。
Sure. The title of Grandmaster will always be here for the taking.
{NICKNAME}哪里走！快来与我大战八百回合，看谁真正有资格做「寻径指津」的意见领袖。
{NICKNAME}! Where do you think you're going? Come and face me! We'll see which one of us is more qualified to lead the "Pathfinder" community.
你们圈子的人都喜欢一惊一乍？
Is everyone in the community this high-strung?
想我纵横「寻圈」三百年，打败的对手比掉落的头发还多，到头来却被你个小年轻抢了风头。
For three centuries have I dominated the Pathfinder community, trouncing more opponents than hairs have fallen off my scalp. Yet here you are, a young upstart trying to steal my thunder!
你以为侥幸赢了几盘棋，就有资格做我们「寻圈」的意见领袖？
Do you truly believe yourself qualified to lead the community just because you lucked out and won a few chess games?
哼！你给我记住，今天输给我以后，我不准你再玩「寻径指津」。
Hmph! You'd best remember this: If you lose to me today, you're forbidden from ever playing "Pathfinder" again.
哈哈，这种事不可能发生。
I don't even want to play.
岂有此理，竟敢亵渎我们神圣的、伟大的、其乐无穷的「寻径指津」，今天我必让你输得彻彻底底。
Why, you little... You'd blaspheme against our greatest, most sacred, and most delightful "Pathfinder"!? Mark my words: I shall see you utterly defeated today!
I'll win this game. I want that chest!
你居然为了这种庸俗的理由而下棋，你果然不配做我们的意见领袖。
You're playing for such a contemptible reason? I knew you weren't worthy of being our thought leader!
废话不多说，准备接受我的审判吧。
Alright, let's cut the chatter. Prepare yourself for judgment!
I need a moment to get ready.
你再怎么准备也不可能赢。
Hah, prepare all you want, but you'll never win.
这…怎么可能？这几盘棋凝聚了我三百年的棋力，竟然被你轻松化解了？
I—Impossible! Everything I've learned over three hundred years of chess playing, I've put into these puzzles, yet you solved them so easily!
Three hundred years, and that's the best you could do?
呵，你就嘲笑我吧！让我闭关修炼一番，咱们下个三百年再战！
Haha, go ahead and mock me! I'll go into seclusion for training. Let's battle again after three hundred years!
其实你的棋局设计的不错。
不用安慰我！让我闭关修炼一番，咱们下个三百年再战！
No need to comfort me! I'll go into seclusion for training. Let's battle again after three hundred years!
拿着你的宝箱走吧。但你记住，三百年河东、三百年河西，莫欺少年穷！
Take your treasure chest and leave. But remember, fortunes change over three centuries, so don't underestimate the youth!
准备好了么，我们继续下棋吧。
Are you ready? Let's resume playing.
宝箱您先拿好，后面还有更多挑战等着您。
Here. Take this treasure for now. More challenges await.
宝箱归您了。相信以您的实力，下关挑战也不是问题。
The chest is yours. With your capabilities, the next challenge will likely pose no issue either.
你赖在这里是想羞辱我么？快拿着你的宝箱走开。
Are you trying to humiliate me by loitering around here? Take your chest and get out of here.
你有所不知，像我这样的还有四个。只有把我们四位都召集起来，「老大」才会出来。平时没什么事，它老人家不会轻易露面的。

You might not be aware, but there are four of us who look alike. Only when all four of us come together does the Boss deign to grace us with their presence. Otherwise, normally nobody gets to see them.
我们老大是个了不得的大人物，你想见见它吗？前提是…得通过我们四个的「考验」。
Our Boss is a real big shot. Would you like to meet them? But first, you'll need to pass the test posed by the four of us.
…跟你说一个秘密，在这艘空艇上我还有三个好兄弟。你要是能找齐我们四个，我会把你引荐给我们的头儿。
...Just between you and me, I have three buddies on this airship. If you can find all four of us, I'll introduce you to our Boss.
贵客，是你啊，谢谢你救了我。作为交换，有个秘密你要不要听？滴答！我和三个好朋友支撑起了空艇的半边天。你要是能把我们四个都修好，那你将见到剩下的那「半边天」。

Ah, it's you, our esteemed guest! Thank you for saving me! As a token of my gratitude, would you like to hear a secret? Tick-tock! My three buddies and I make half the contribution that keeps this airship running. If you can repair all four of us, you'll meet the one who contributes the other half.
哎，是你啊，尊敬的客人。你来得正好，我和我的几位同僚交流了一下——
Ah, it's you, our honored guest. You came at the right time. I've been speaking with my colleagues an—
什么同僚？咱们是空艇上「四大天王」，行不改名坐不改姓，名号可不能乱来。
Colleagues? We're the Formidable Four of the airship! Titles are not to be changed lightly!
去去去，都什么时候了，老大都成什么样了，还在纠结这些事，不像话！
Oh, hush now! Have you any inkling the gravity of our situation? With the Boss in their current state, now's no time to be fussing over titles!
我们四个加起来顶起了空艇的半片天，懂？我们是老大的手下，它老人家照看着整个空艇，还会抽空校准下我们。

We four make half the contribution that keeps this airship running, got it? We work for the Boss, who not only oversees the whole airship but also finds time to tweak our calibration while they're at it.
嗯嗯，等我们能自行运转起来后，就各自照看一个部门，共同维系空艇的秩序。
Uh-huh, once we're fully operational on our own, each of us will head a department and work together to keep the airship running smoothly.
Enough chatter. Can we get to the point?
就是，没有老大哪有我们「四大天王」，赶紧说正事吧，以老大的安危为重！
Exactly! Without the Boss, there is no Formidable Four! The Boss's safety has to be our top priority!
简单来说，我们的老大受到不明重创倒下了，所以…之前我们几个就跟没了指针一样失魂落魄。
Long story short, for reasons unknown, our Boss became severely injured, and now they're down for the count. That's why we were so out of it earlier, as if we'd lost our hands.
我见你修好了我们四个…我就在想你能不能帮帮老大？我平时能处理刮刮碰碰，但这种大伤，我也只能看着干着急。
Now that you've fixed us four, do you think you could help our Boss as well? I can patch up scrapes and scratches, but I'm simply out of my depth with serious injuries like this.
是啊，虽然不知道客人你是怎么做到的，但我们想请你帮帮忙！
Yeah, we're not sure how exactly you pulled it off, but we really need your help!
Alright. I'll give it a shot.
你的能力真是神奇，居然能把我救回来！
Your skills are like magic! You actually fixed me!
其实我之前就注意到了，这种事时有发生，我去调查过，是一种奇怪的积木引起的。
Truth be told, I've noticed this issue — which happens from time to time — for a while now. When I looked into it, my findings revealed that it's caused by a strange type of building block.
这种积木散发着不祥的气息，时间长了，会干扰我们的心神，害我们故障频出……
These blocks emit an ominous aura, and over time, they interfere with our minds, causing us to malfunction...
只可惜…我还没找到积木就倒下了。不过，吃一堑长一智…现在我做足了全套防护工作，我不会再被它们影响了。
Unfortunately, I collapsed before I could find them. But we all live and learn, don't we? I've now taken full precautions to ensure that they won't affect me again.
就是不知道它们都藏在哪儿了…以我的能力，完全没有头绪。如果您手头有这种积木的话，可以交给我，把它们销毁掉是我的职责！

There's just a small problem: I don't know where they are anymore. With my limited abilities, I'm completely at a loss. If you happen to have any of these building blocks, please hand them over to me. It's my duty to destroy them!
很抱歉…根据我的推论，积木的数量应该不止这些…如果你手头还有积木，可以继续交到我这里。
I apologize, but my calculations indicate that there should be more building blocks than these. If you find any more, please bring them to me.
等我处理完，我会给你准备一份惊喜的，到时候记得来找我喔，好心人！
Once I've finished, I'll have a surprise for you. Be sure to come and see me, kind one!
真的太感谢了，你真是个好人！虽然报酬不多…不过这是大家的心意，还请你收下。
Thank you so much! You are too kind! It isn't much, but please take this. It's a token of our gratitude.
…谢谢你，我感觉心里暖暖的，你之前送过来的积木，我已经处理完了，不会再对我的伙伴们产生负面影响了。
...Thank you! I feel all warm and fuzzy inside now. I've already taken care of all the blocks you gave me. They won't harm my companions anymore.
我感觉心里有只鸟儿要飞出来了——飞翔…歌唱！
I feel like my inner bird is about to take flight and sing anytime!
There is indeed a bird on the dial.
Your mind's not playing tricks on you.
我感觉我的齿轮有些不一样了…表盘里有一种东西在萌芽…我好想去这个世界看看。
I feel my gears transforming... Something is starting to sprout on the dial... I can't wait to see the world!
…或许这和你的慷慨有关，我要开启我的旅途了，保重！
...Perhaps your kindness is what set all this in motion. It's time for my journey to start. Stay well!
Would you like to meet our boss?
...I'm sure it's not too late for the boss.
A favor if I may, dear esteemed guest...
怪梦积木请交到我这里来！
Please hand over Eerie Building Blocks to me!
你好，我是「枘凿六合」秘密结社的「主智囊」。
Hello, I am the "Main Think-Tank" for the Hexanexus secret society.
既然都被关起来了，这里也不必遵守隐秘组织的要求，以代号称呼彼此…我这名字也告诉您无妨，我叫西桥，被抓之前一直是工造司的匠人。

Since I'm already locked up, there's hardly any reason to adhere to the secret society's requirements and address one another by our aliases... I see no harm in divulging my name. I'm Seymour, formerly a craftsman within the Artisanship Commission before my arrest.
我知道你有很多问题想问我，你问吧，问完我还有事得拜托你……
I understand you have lots of questions for me. Go ahead, and I'll have a favor to ask in return...
要怎样做游戏才会被抓进牢里？
How do you get arrested and sent to jail for developing games?
「枘凿六合」出了些事情…要我自己来讲实在是有些难以启齿啊……
Something happened to Hexanexus... It's a little hard for me to explain it on my own...
Do you know what's a private server?
In that case, it simplifies the explanation.
不是师傅，是私服。就是说，私自架设服务器，是对知识产权危害最大的犯罪行为之一。
Not that kind of server. I meant a computer that shares information with other computers. In other words, setting up a server privately ranks among the gravest offenses against intellectual property.
So, you set up a private server...
不不不，您误会了！我把架设私服的人找了出来，然后以暴制暴……
No, don't just jump the gun! I found the culprits responsible for making the private server and punished them through violent means...
然后他们地衡司说我的威胁程度比较大，还是关幽囚狱比较好，就联系了判官。
Later, the Realm-Keeping Commission declared that my threat level was high and it would be safer to lock me up in The Shackling Prison, so they contacted the judges.
所以，就像您看到的一样，我也被抓起来了…不过你放心，那个架设私服的判得更重！十王司对私服绝不姑息！
In the end, as you can see, I was apprehended too... But don't worry, that private server people were punished even harder! The Ten-Lords Commission will never tolerate private servers!
你在牢里也能进行游戏开发？
Can you also develop games behind bars?
在哪里开发不是开发呢？在工造司的工位上，在丹鼎司的病房里，在十王司的牢房里，其实开发环境都差不多的。
Why not? Whether in the workplace of the Artisanship Commission, the hospital ward of the Alchemy Commission, or the cell of the Ten-Lords Commission, the environment for game development is similar.
在牢里开发不需要和别人开那些没完没了的会，也不用加班，自己想做就做，想休息就休息，也没有什么死线压力，真是太美妙了。

In fact, it's oddly liberating to develop games in prison. No more endless meetings or overtime. I have the freedom to develop at my own pace, taking breaks whenever necessary, and being free from the relentless pressure of meeting deadlines.
当然缺点也是显而易见的——我快要自闭了。
Of course, the downside is evident — I'm on the verge of becoming socially withdrawn.
以「造型优美的魔方」为契机，最近有许多玩家对「枘凿六合」系列产生了兴趣。
Taking the allure of the "beautifully shaped cube" as an opportunity, many gamers have recently become interested in Hexanexus.
为了让不熟悉「枘凿六合」的玩家了解到本系列之原点，作为系列一周年重要作品之一，我们选择了对「枘凿六合」进行重制。
To acquaint gamers unfamiliar with Hexanexus with the series' origin, we decided to remake and release the game as a cornerstone of the series' first anniversary celebrations.
有成为系列作品的打算，目前只有一作。
There are plans to make it a series. We have only one game so far.
真的有很多玩家感兴趣吗？
Are there really that many gamers interested in it?
有的有的，我身边的人都玩。
Yes, of course. Everyone around me is playing it.
重做之后，我们考虑过副标题要用「Remake」、「Rebirth」、「Remastered」还是「Return」、「Recall」……
After the remake, we considered whether to use the terms "Remake," "Rebirth," "Remastered," "Return," or "Recall" in our subheading...
甚至还有激进一些的方案，叫作「Re凿六合」。
There was even a more radical option called "Re-xanexus."
我们看市面上流行的作品都是这样的。
All the popular game titles on the market adopt the same strategy.
最后我们还是决定使用了简单易懂的「Remake」。
Finally, we decided to take the simplest approach and chose "Remake."
Let's cut the chase. What do you need?
多亏了你，「枘凿六合•Remake」的前6题测试完成了。过些天，我会委托十王司的冥差们帮我把幽囚狱谜题刷新一遍，会有一些新的谜题。

Thanks to you, the first six tests of the "Hexanexus: Remake" are completed. In a few days, I'll assign the spiritfarers in the Ten-Lords Commission to refresh The Shackling Prison puzzles, and new puzzles will be available.
不过你知道吗，除了你以外，真的没有人在玩……
But let's be frank, aside from yourself, there's hardly anyone playing it...
这很合理，因为这里是幽囚狱…
Fair enough. After all, this is The Shackling Prison...
这很合理，因为魔方不太好玩…
Fair enough. After all, Hexanexus isn't that fun...
我想，除了你也没有人会玩新的一轮谜题了。所以，请你一定要把测试版的内容玩完啊！
Thus, I doubt anyone besides yourself will be playing the new round of puzzles. So, please make sure you complete the beta!
你放心，你解开谜题后都会得到「魔方战令」，这是我们新推出一项「阶段性奖励服务」，你带着它来找我，我就可以给你奖励，简单吧？
Don't worry. Upon completing the puzzles, you will obtain Hex Passes. This is a new type of Segmented Reward Service. Bring the Hex Passes to me, and I'll reward you. Simple?
I purchased every version of it.
我哪也去不了，就在这里等你的好消息了。
I'm not going anywhere. I'll wait here for your good news.
你好，这里是「枘凿六合•Remake」第四开发部。请问有什么事？
Hi, this is Department IV of the "Hexanexus: Remake" Developers. How may I help you?
我带着新鲜的战令来啦。
I'm here with new Hex Passes.
恭喜您在「枘凿六合•Remake」测试活动中获得以下奖励，请注意查收。
Congratulations! You've obtained the following rewards from the "Hexanexus: Remake" beta. You may check them in your inventory.
I'm here to have a chat with you...
What do you want to talk about?
要怎样做游戏才会被抓进牢里？
How do you get arrested and sent to jail for developing games?
「枘凿六合」出了些事情…要我自己来讲实在是有些难以启齿啊……
Something happened to Hexanexus... It's a little hard for me to explain it on my own...
我把架设「枘凿六合」私服的人找了出来，然后以暴制暴。
I found the culprits responsible for the Hexanexus private server and punished them through violent means.
你在牢里也能进行游戏开发？
Can you also develop games behind bars?
在哪里开发不是开发呢？在工造司的工位上，在丹鼎司的病房里，在十王司的牢房里，其实开发环境都差不多的。
Why not? Whether in the workplace of the Artisanship Commission, the hospital ward of the Alchemy Commission, or the cell of the Ten-Lords Commission, the environment for game development is similar.
在牢里开发不需要和别人开那些没完没了的会，也不用加班，自己想做就想休息就休息，也没有什么死线压力，真是太美妙了。

In fact, it's oddly liberating to develop games in prison. No more endless meetings or overtime. I have the freedom to develop at my own pace, taking breaks whenever necessary, and being free from the relentless pressure of meeting deadlines.
当然缺点也是显而易见的——我快要自闭了。
Of course, the downside is evident — I'm on the verge of becoming socially withdrawn.
以「造型优美的魔方」为契机，最近有许多玩家对「枘凿六合」系列产生了兴趣。
Taking the allure of the "beautifully shaped cube" as an opportunity, many gamers have recently become interested in Hexanexus.
为了让不熟悉「枘凿六合」的玩家了解到本系列之原点，作为系列一周年重要作品之一，我们选择了对「枘凿六合」进行重制。
To acquaint gamers unfamiliar with Hexanexus with the series' origin, we decided to remake and release the game as a cornerstone of the series' first anniversary celebrations.
重做之后，我们考虑过副标题要用「Remake」、「Rebirth」、「Remastered」还是「Return」、「Recall」……
After the remake, we considered whether to use the terms "Remake," "Rebirth," "Remastered," "Return," or "Recall" in our subheading...
最后还是决定使用了简单易懂的「Remake」。
Finally, we decided to take the simplest approach and chose "Remake."
十王司同意你随处乱放魔方？
Did the Ten-Lords Commission approve of you leaving Hexanexus lying around?
说起来我也感觉到很意外，毕竟这里是幽囚狱嘛。
I'm also surprised. After all, it's The Shackling Prison.
但是雪衣判官说，只要把这个魔方放在路边，就能硬控逃犯半个小时，降低了幽囚狱的出逃成功率，是一个可以尝试的方案。

However, Judge Xueyi suggested that strategically placing this Hexanexus on the side of the road could temporarily incapacitate the fugitive for up to half an hour, significantly lowering the chances of successful escape from The Shackling Prison. It's certainly worth a try.
于是我们达成了一致。我提供魔方的谜题，他们可以帮我摆放在幽囚狱里。
So we came to a consensus. I would provide the puzzles for the Hexanexus, and they could place them in The Shackling Prison for me.
I don't have any other questions.
请记住「枘凿六合•Remake」天下第一！我先去忙去了。
Just remember that "Hexanexus: Remake" is the world's number one game! I should get to work now.
I don't have any other questions.
请记住「枘凿六合•Remake」天下第一！我先去忙去了。
Just remember that Hexanexus: Remake is the world's number one game! I should get to work now.
怎么幽囚狱里面也有「枘凿六合」？
Why is Hexanexus also available in The Shackling Prison?
推广游戏都推广到监狱里了…魔方秘社的人这么狂的吗？
To think they even promote their game in the prison... Are the members of the Hex Club obsessed with it?
这里应该就是「魔方秘社」所在的囚室了……
This must be the cell where the Hex Club is...
哦哦哦哦！新的谜题你都完成了，我这里暂时没有什么新的谜题了。
Ohhhh! You've completed all the new puzzles! I don't have any more new puzzles at the moment.
…您这是不是算玩得挺投入的？
...Can I consider you as a hardcore fan of this game?
The game is pretty fun, and I would like to play it again.
The game is fine. At least it's better than doing nothing in jail.
您放心，我已经给秘密结社的其他成员通过气了。我们「枘凿六合•Remake」即将登录竞锋舰平台，成为跨平台开发游戏！保证是全新的版本，全新的体验。

Fret not. I've discussed this with the other members of the Hex Club. Our "Hexanexus: Remake" will soon be accessible on the Skysplitter platform as a cross-platform game! It's set to be a completely revamped version, promising gamers an entirely fresh experience.
You people truly have connections everywhere.
只能说您不想玩，可千万不能说您玩不到。
Unless you're not keen to play, there's simply no reason you can't play it.
还我一个干净的竞锋舰。
I'd rather have a clean Skysplitter.
我们的魔方都是经过灭菌杀毒处理过的，请不必担心。
Our Hexanexus are sterilized and treated with anti-virus, so please do not worry.
滴、答…游客，我有一个问题。
Tick, tock... Guest, I have a question.
假设，只是假设…你接下来要玩个游戏，一个使用视差错觉来设置难题的解谜游戏。
Hypothetically, just hypothetically... if you were playing a game straight after this, a puzzle game designed using parallax illusions.
你觉得，什么难度能给你带来最大的乐趣？
What level of difficulty do you think would bring you the most enjoyment?
Is there a difference in reward?
都说是假设…算了，确实能选难度。你随便说。
I already said it was hypothetical... Forget it. Yes, you can choose your difficulty level. Just say whatever you want.
The level where you can clear the stage with a quick press!
当然，最为稳妥的选项。我欣赏你，因为我也会选一样的路。
Of course, that is the optimal choice. I admire you, because I would make the same choice.
大部分情况，人们往往倾向于更加极端的选择，你很…与众不同。
In most situations, people typically lean towards the more extreme choice. You are... different.
让我见识下真正的谜题！
滴答…对，没错…理应如此…我会满足你的要求，游客。我会全力以赴。
Tick-tock... Yes, that's right... So it shall be... I will fulfill your request, guest. I will do my best.
你想要的难度设置好了。上吧。
The difficulty you asked for has been configured. Go forth.
别忘了，如果不满意，在完成前再来找我就行，我会在这等着。
Don't forget. If you are dissatisfied, you can just talk to me before completing it. I will be here waiting.
滴、答…游客，我们又见面了。
Tick, tock... We meet again, guest.
我猜是因为好奇心？你明明可以立刻通过，但却没有选择这么做。
I'm guessing because of curiosity? You could have cleared it with ease, but yet did not choose to do so.
无论如何，很高兴能再见到你，试试其他难度吗？
No matter what, I am happy to see you again. Care to try other difficulties?
Just the previous one will do.
I'd like to change to *Normal Difficulty*.
I'd like to change to *Challenging Difficulty*.
滴、答…游客，我们又见面了。
Tick, tock... We meet again, guest.
哈哈，是不是有点普通？但能与你相遇，我和你就都已经不再平凡了。
Haha, was it a little too normal? But you and I are no longer normal, for I have met you.
总之，欢迎回来。试试其他难度吗？
In any case, welcome back. Care to try other difficulties?
Just the previous one will do.
I'd like to change to *Easy Difficulty*.
I'd like to change to *Challenging Difficulty*.
滴、答…游客，我们又见面了。
Tick, tock... We meet again, guest.
我努力过了，感觉如何？如果这个难度能得到你的认可，我会很开心。
I tried my best. How was it? If this difficulty has earned your acknowledgement, I would be more than glad.
当然，没必要勉强自己来迎合我的想法。试试其他难度吗？
Of course, there is no need to force yourself to accept my perspective. Care to try other difficulties?
Just the previous one will do.
I'd like to change to *Easy Difficulty*.
I'd like to change to *Normal Difficulty*.
Straight to the point. Take your reward.
其实不管选择什么，只要它能给你带来乐趣，那就再好不过。这也是我们共同的……

…滴答，说得有点多了。我打算去派对逛逛…等我那两个朋友都到齐了，就来舞池找我们吧。
...Tick-tock, I have said too much. I intend to go wander around in the party... When both my friends are here, come to the dance floor and look for us.

I love this place, and wish to stay here forever. When my two friends arrive, look for us on the dance floor.

Even your language module is broken?
滴、答…哈哈，我只是懒得说话。
Tick, tock... Haha, I was just too lazy to speak.
我的内心确实存在故障，我能清楚感受到…它在我的脑中留下了一道裂痕，一道刻印，无时无刻不在提醒着我，去思考那个动摇我们存在意义的问题——

There is indeed a fault in my inner world, and I can feel that clearly... It has left a scar in my mind, a mark, constantly reminding me to consider the problem that makes us question the meaning of our existence...
"Is the guest really willing to fix us?"
而你，游客，你现在站在我的面前，即将为我解开这个死结。
And you, my guest, you now stand before me, about to untangle this knot for me.
告诉我，你要亲自修好我？还是由我自己修复自己？
Tell me, you will personally fix me? Or will I be repairing myself?

哎呀，不好意思，突然搭话是不是把你吓了一跳？放心，我是志愿者！

不瞒你说，这两天来大学参观的人实在是太多，负责引导的同学一个个都忙不过来，于是我就站这了。
To be honest, there have been too many visitors at the college these few days. The student guides have been overwhelmed, which is why I'm standing here.
哈哈，你可真会开玩笑，坏掉什么的…说得就好像我是个迷钟一样。
Haha, you've got jokes. What's this about being broken... You make it sound like I'm a Ticker.
奖励？校庆有这种活动吗…不好意思，交班的同学没讲，具体我也不太了解……
Prize? Does the school celebration have such an event... Sorry, the student who handed over to me didn't brief me, so I'm not too sure on the details...
对啊？咦…难道看着不像？我有那么与众不同吗？
Yeah? Err... Do I not look like one? Am I really that different?
话说回来…都到这个点了，交班的人哪去了？还得等多久啊，真遭不住。
Anyway... Just look at the time. Where's my replacement gone to? How long is it going to take? I really can't take much more of this.
游客，要不…我来给你占个卜？
How about... I do some divination on you?
You don't have to look for work where there's none.
不用和我客气的，游客！保证不收取任何费用！
No need to be polite! I won't charge a single penny!
好啦好啦，来，欢迎光临「心静空间」——
All right, all right. Come, welcome to the Calmscape...
Did you get a word wrong?
Seems a little different from before?
有吗？我的占卜室从来都叫这个名字…啊，你该不会还以为我是个迷钟吧？
Did I? I've always called my divination room by this name... Ah, you didn't still think I was a Ticker, did you?
再来一次，欢迎光临「心静空间」——
Once more, welcome to the Calmscape...
如何，游客？对占卜流程还满意吗？
How about it? Were you satisfied with the divination experience?
根据你的选择，我能解读出你未来的运势。总之，让我瞧瞧…这种预兆代表着——
According to your choice, I can read your future fortune. Anyway, let's see... This omen means...
让我瞧瞧…这种预兆代表着——
「努力固然重要，但若是精神紧绷，不妨休息一下」
"Working hard is important, but if your nerves are tense, how about taking a break?"
…道理谁都懂，但哪有人真敢休息啊。希望能帮上你的忙，游客！
...This is common sense, but who really dares take a break? I hope this helps, guest!
「美好的愿望会实现，只需要努力到自己认可的程度，再加上一个小小的契机。」
"Wonderful wishes will be realized, as long as you work hard to a degree that you can accept, along with a little opportunity."
看起来不错哦！游客！能实现就好啦！
Doesn't sound too bad! It's fine as long as you realize it!
哇，是个不错的结果！上次有学生占卜出这个，两三天就把毕业设计做出来了！
Woah, a decent result! A student got this result previously, and then knocked out his graduation design within days!
不知道能不能帮上你的忙，游客！
I wonder if this will help you, guest!
——所有事都会顺利诶！恭喜你，这是非常好的结果！游客！笑一个笑一个！
...Everything will go smoothly! Congrats, this is an excellent result, guest! Smile!
它说「好耶」…不管怎么样，总之…好耶！
It said: "Yay." ... Whatever the case... Yay!
不是，别用这种眼神看我！释义手册上就是这么写的！
Wait, don't look at me with those eyes! That's what's written in the manual!
希…希望你能满意，游客…啊哈哈……
I... I hope you are satisfied, guest... Ahaha...
…你的占卜结果就是这样了，对运势不满意的话，还有重来的机会哦？
...That's it for your divination result. If you're not happy with your fortune, would you like another chance?
嗯，你开心就好！顺便，刚才占卜的时候，交班的人发消息说他掉进喷泉里了。
Sure, as long as you're happy! Also, during the divination, the replacement student sent a message saying that he fell into the fountain.
这借口听着挺安全的，所以就不等他了。谢谢你陪我打发时间！
This excuse sounds pretty safe, so I won't be waiting for him. Thank you for spending time with me!
我就…先去舞池里找我的那两个朋友！等大家聚齐了，记得来和我们玩！
I will... head to the dance floor and look for my two friends! When everyone's gathered, don't forget to hang out with us!
很独特的「修复」方式…不是吗？
It's a unique method of "repair"... Don't you think?
你见过许多出故障的迷钟。对，我们是有些不对劲，被古怪的积木影响了心智。但我们同样拥有自主意识，在无止境的梦中活着，并不断适应。

You have met many malfunctioning Tickers in your time. Indeed, we may be a little off, our minds have been affected by strange building blocks. But, we still have our own consciousness. We live inside the endless dream and constantly adapt.
Tick-tock, which one should I pick?
所以…会不会哪天，我们不再有「故障」，甚至都不再是「迷钟」？
So... Maybe one day, we will no longer be "malfunctioning." Perhaps, there will come a time when we are not even "Tickers"?
我在说些什么？肯定是哪搞错了…狠狠敲两下…这次对了！正确的释义应该是——
What am I talking about? There must be something wrong... I'll just give this a good whack... There we go! The correct interpretation should be—
游客！这里好热闹啊！我都看不到自己的脚了！
Guest! It's so crowded here! I can't even see my own feet!
好多人，我的两个朋友在哪呢…等大家都到齐了，记得要来找我们玩啊！
So many people, where are my friends... When everyone's gathered, don't forget to hang out with us!
游客！这里好热闹啊！我都看不到自己的脚了！
Guest! It's so crowded here! I can't even see my own feet!
我可以想象，把我们三个都找齐的过程一定无比艰辛。
I can imagine the ordeal it must be to gather the three of us together.
有好好享受派对吗？要不要喝点苏乐达？
Are you enjoying the party? Want some SoulGlad?
你们是我见过的最怪的迷钟。
You're all the weirdest Tickers I've seen in my life.
I'm not a Ticker. Don't get it confused.
听说，在我们之前，也有许多迷钟被修复，得以继续完成他们的使命。
I hear that before us, there were also many Tickers that were fixed, so that they could continue to fulfill their duties.
而这毫无疑问是游客的功绩！值得被用力称赞！
And it was no doubt completely thanks to your effort! You must be profusely lauded!
所以咱们就商量了一下，得给游客你送点东西当做纪念，这可是特意拜托谐乐学院的教授设计的，非常有收藏价值！
So after we discussed it, we just had to give you a little something as a souvenir. We specially asked a Charmony Academy professor to design this. It makes for a great collectible!
多亏你的努力，以后出故障的迷钟想必会越来越少吧。希望游客你不会觉得寂寞！
All thanks to your hard work, I'm sure there will be fewer faulty Tickers in the future. I hope you won't feel too lonely then!
滴答，无谓的伤感罢了，反正我们还要在这跳很久的舞，很久…很久！
Tick-tock, just feeling unnecessarily sad, is all. In any case, we're still going to keep dancing here for a long time, a very... very long time!
咱们不是钟表小子，没法施展动画里的「钟表戏法」，就只能用这种方式来传达啦！
We're not Clockie, nor can we perform any of his Clockwork tricks in the cartoons, so we can only express our feelings through this method!
I hope you have lots of fun, guest!
有缘再见！别忘了和我们共同相处的快乐——这，就是，「梦境迷钟」！
May we meet again! Don't forget the great times we spent together — this, is, the Dream Ticker!
Hang on, I already said I'm not one!
I'm awesome at doing the robot!
嘀、答…*又*见面了，宾客。这是我与你的第几百次相遇了呢？
Tick... tock... We meet again, dear guest. How many times have we danced this dance? Hundreds?
每一次，为了修好我，你都会回拨我的表针，将表盘处理得光亮如新。
Every time, you would turn back my clock hands and polish the dial until it shone to fix me.
而每一次表针被回拨，我都将跌下时间的螺旋，让你修好过我的事实被抹去，让我再度损毁。
And every time the clock hands are rewound, I would tumble down time's spiral, undoing and erasing your deed, and becoming undone once more.
来吧，被命运选中的匠人，请再一次修好我！
Come then, fate's chosen tinkerer. Please fix me one more time!
你还没有觉悟吗…我知道你会这么说，毕竟我已经历过无数次。
Don't you understand?... I knew you'd say that, because I've been through this too many times.
See you next time. One day, one day...
嘀答，希望宾客不要介意迷钟正值青春期时的胡言乱语…真丢人，好想找个地方钻进去。
Tick-tock. I hope you don't mind the self-indulgent nonsense of a teenage Ticker... This is so embarrassing. I want to crawl into a hole and disappear.
不过，我们其实没办法证明，被抹去的存在是真是假，不是吗？这些给你，忘了我吧。
But we can't exactly prove that something erased ever existed in the first place, can we? Here, take these, and forget me.
嘀、答…我知道，你是来处理残党的…呵，当初加入「业务组」的时候，我就想象过这个瞬间，却没想到它来得如此突兀。
Tick... tock... I know the drill. You're here for the clean-up, heh... I knew this day would come the moment I signed up to be a part of the "Business Team." I just didn't expect it to come so soon.
动手吧，我还没有落魄到因为区区损毁，就背叛迷钟「老大」的程度。
Just do it then. I've enough integrity left in me not to be a snitch to Boss Ticker over some petty damage.
嘀答，这是…我的身体回到了全盛期？
Tick tock. Is this... my body returning to its prime?
受、受您照顾了，这份恩情，阿钟会永远记得。
Th-Thank you for taking care of me. I, Ticky, will never forget your kindness.
迷钟「老大」，看来我还能再为您效力一阵，我这就回去打卡上班。
Looks like this Ticker hasn't run outta time yet, Boss. I'm heading back and clocking in for work.
嘀、答…宾客，你可一定要帮帮我，我的表盘里被塞进了一块可憎的积木！
Tick... tock... Oh dear guest, please, you must help me. Some wretched block is stuck inside my dial!
迷钟会被积木操纵，连思想都会被改变，多么可怕啊！不行，快帮我，我连一秒都忍受不了了！
The block manipulates the Ticker, even altering our thoughts! Oh, what a terrible fate! Please, you must save me, I won't suffer this a second longer!
嘀答，我怎么会忘掉呢？我其实最喜欢积木了！被积木改变的状态真让人流连忘返啊！
Tick tock, how did I forget? I actually love blocks the most! I yearn and chase after that altered state...
但毕竟是我自己要求的，所以这些给你作为报酬！现在我要再去找一块积木塞回去啦！
...But I did ask for this, didn't I? So here's your reward! And now I'm off to find another block to fill that void!
这座人台表面布满了暗淡的纹路。或许在某个时刻，它会焕发出流光——但不是现在。
The surface of this dummy is covered in dark wrinkles. Perhaps there will come a time when it shines brightly... But that time is not now.
这座人台表面布满了暗淡的纹路。或许在某个时刻，它会焕发出流光。
This dummy is covered in dark patterns. Perhaps it will shine with light at some moment.
你想起自己在奥赫玛也见到过这样的人台，说不定它现在发生了变化？你应该再去看看。
You remember seeing such a dummy in Okhema. Maybe it has changed now? You should go check it out again.
仿佛受到某种引导般，褔坛自顾自地播放着泰坦的符号。
As though guided by something, the Altar of Blessings plays the Titan's symbol on its own.
触碰这座人台时，阿格莱雅的声音从里面传出，让你不自觉哆嗦了一下。
As you touch the mannequin, Aglaea's voice emanates from within, causing you to shudder involuntarily.
无需惊慌，贵客，这座人台是我的「衣匠」。我将一部分神性赐给了它，使其能够如活物般行动。
No need to panic, my distinguished guest. This mannequin is my "Garmentmaker." I have granted it a portion of my divinity so that it can take action like a living being.
有时我会以它为裁衣的模特。若有必要，它也可以代行公务或上阵御敌。
Sometimes I use it as a model for tailoring clothes. If necessary, it can also carry out official duties or engage in battle.
I see. It's like the miniature Hertas!
虽然不知你所指的是什么，但这种操使傀儡的手段确实算不上独特。你能理解就好。
Though I'm not sure what you mean, I agree this method of controlling puppets isn't exactly unique. As long as you understand, that's enough.
是的，衣匠可代我在各个场合传递言语，如此也省去了与人争吵的麻烦。
Yes, the Garmentmaker can convey my words in various situations, which saves me the trouble of arguing with others.
The army of Garmentmakers will trample Okhema!
呵呵，可惜我的神性并不能分成那么多份，而且我也没理由毁掉自己守护的城邦。
Hehe, unfortunately, my divinity cannot be divided into so many pieces, and I have no reason to destroy the city I protect.
人台并没有对你的打扰表示不满——它根本没有能做出表情的脸。但突然降临的沉默告诉你，或许是时候离开了。
The mannequin doesn't express displeasure at your interruption — it doesn't have a face capable of making expressions. But the sudden silence tells you that perhaps it's time to leave.
贵客，请先别着急离开，我还有话要说。
My distinguished guest, please don't rush to leave yet. I still have something to say.
仅限我们被金丝相连时。你早就亲自体验过了，不是吗？
Only when we are connected by the golden thread. You've experienced it personally before, haven't you?
实际上，最近我正为一件事而苦恼。如果你愿意伸出援手，我会非常感激。这是真话。
In fact, I've been troubled by something recently. If you are willing to lend a hand, I would be very grateful. This is the truth.
我不是故意碰这东西的！
I didn't mean to touch this thing!
我没有怪罪你的意思，只是有件事要请你帮忙…即使现在我们没有被金丝相连，我也想向你传达我的真诚。
I'm not blaming you. I just have something to ask for your help with... Even though we're not currently connected by the golden thread, I want to convey my sincerity to you.
Why didn't you say this before?
我有件事需要你帮忙，刚才在斟酌如何开口是好。即使现在我们没有被金丝相连，我也想向你传达我的真诚。
There's something I need your help with. I was just pondering how to start. Even though we're not currently connected by the golden thread, I want to convey my sincerity to you.
就在奥赫玛遭受入侵前不久，我得到了一些预言。可惜那会儿诸事缠身，一直没空关注它。
Not long before Okhema was invaded, I received some prophecies. Unfortunately, I was too busy to pay attention to them at the time.
最近，我试图解读这些预言，发现它被一股未知的力量遮蔽了起来，仅凭我自己无法解开。所以，我需要你的协助……
I've tried to interpret these prophecies recently and discovered they were obscured by an unknown force, which I can't unravel alone. Therefore, I need your assistance...
Do you need me to generate electricity?
虽然你确实得到了欧洛尼斯的祝福，不过在这件事上，恐怕我们得求助于其他泰坦的眷属。
While you indeed received Oronyx's blessing, I'm afraid we must seek the help of the other Titans' kin in this matter.
别担心，我会全程协助你，并把解读后的内容与你分享。
Don't worry. I will assist you throughout the process and share the interpreted content with you.
谢谢，这对我和奥赫玛都意义重大——别担心，我会全程协助你，并把解读后的内容与你分享。
Thank you. This is very important for me and Okhema. Don't worry. I'll help you throughout the process and share what I interpret.
你手下没有其他能找的人吗？
Don't you have anyone else you can ask?
诚如你所说，我确实有些可靠的帮手，但他们大都身负元老院的公务——在这个节骨眼上，我必须避免节外生枝。
As you said, I do have some reliable helpers, but most are burdened with duties from the Council of Elders — at this critical moment, I must avoid unnecessary complications.
别担心，我会全程协助你，并把解读后的内容与你分享。
Don't worry. I will assist you throughout the process and share the interpreted content with you.
简单来说，我需要你帮忙搜集一种名叫「创生若虫」的生物。它们怀有泰坦的赐福，可以帮助我解读这些预言。
In simple terms, I need you to help collect a type of creatures called "Creation Nymphs." They possess the Titans' blessings and can aid me in interpreting these prophecies.
于纷争世，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}因意外失去了神体。{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}无法接受爱人负伤的事实，便搜集瑟希斯四散的身躯，意图用丝线将其收拢、令它回归。

In the Era Bellica, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} accidentally lost their divine form. {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}, unable to accept the fact that their lover was injured, collected Cerces' scattered bodies, intending to weave them together with threads to bring the other Titan back.
二人曾经的眷属们也自发加入了这场苦旅，它们便是创生若虫。其中美丽且脆弱的属于墨涅塔，勇武且刚强的属于瑟希斯。

The former followers of the two also voluntarily joined this arduous journey, and they are the Creation Nymphs. The beautiful and fragile belong to Mnestia, while the brave and strong belong to Cerces.
拼凑神的躯体并非易事。若虫们必须体察万物，从众人的言语中搜集智慧与爱，供墨涅塔编织金丝。它们因而拥有一个别称：「织者」。

Reassembling a divine body is no easy task. The nymph must perceive all things, gathering wisdom and love from the words of others to provide for Mnestia's weaving of the golden threads. Thus, they have an alternate name: "Weavers."
只是这种行为…注定徒劳无获。
But this act... is destined to be futile.
你只需要把见到的若虫带回来，剩下的交给我就好，贵客。
All you need to do is bring back any nymphs you encounter, and I'll handle the rest, distinguished guest.
在捕捉它们的过程中，你可能会看到一些难以理解的现象。不用担心，那只是它们留下的残影而已。
During the process of capturing them, you may witness some phenomena that are hard to comprehend. Don't worry. Those are merely the remnants they leave behind.
在奥赫玛，若虫们以蝴蝶的样貌存在。它们身上的「浪漫」气息非比寻常，应该不难分辨。
In Okhema, the nymphs exist in the form of butterflies. The aura of "Romance" oozing from them is unusual, and should not be difficult to distinguish.
我拜托某只熟识的若虫设下了一个练手小谜题，贵客不妨先试着解开它——这对解读预言也有好处。
I've asked my trusted nymph to prepare a small puzzle for practice. Why not give it a try, my esteemed guest? It may prove useful in unraveling future prophecies.
那么，请听好：<color=#dbc291ff>「明明是瑟希斯的造物，却将浪漫的线相连。若你触碰它的根须，便能打下缘分的结。」</color>
So, listen carefully. <color=#dbc291ff>"Created by Cerces, yet bound by the string of romance. If you touch its roots, you can create a knot of destiny."</color>
去寻找它的藏身之处吧，我在那里为你准备了一份礼物。
Seek out its hidden place — I've left a gift there, just for you.
<color=#dbc291ff>「明明是瑟希斯的造物，却将浪漫的线相连。若你触碰它的根须，便能打下缘分的结。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Created by Cerces, yet bound by the string of romance. If you touch its roots, you can create a knot of destiny."</color>
去寻找那位织者的藏身之处吧，我在那里为你准备了一份礼物。
Seek out that weaver's hidden place — I've left a gift there, just for you.
交互行为已确认，即将播放预置语音……
Interaction confirmed. Pre-set voice lines are playing...
不错嘛，贵客，你比我想象中更擅长这项活动。
Not bad, my distinguished guest. You're more skilled at this than I imagined.
为方便你搜集，我提前在若虫可能出没的区域布设了多台「衣匠」。很贴心，不是吗？现在你也有访问它们的权限了。
To facilitate your collection, I've set up multiple Garmentmakers in areas where the larvae are likely to appear. Pretty thoughtful, right? Now you have access to them as well.
期待你的好消息，贵客。再次感谢你的协助。
I'm looking forward to your good news, my distinguished guest. Thanks again for your assistance.
在奥赫玛，若虫们以蝴蝶的样貌存在。它们身上的「浪漫」气息非比寻常，应该不难分辨。
In Okhema, the nymphs exist in the form of butterflies. The aura of "Romance" oozing from them is unusual, and should not be difficult to distinguish.
等搜集到足够的若虫后，再回来找我吧，贵客。
Esteemed guest, return to me once you have gathered enough nymphs.
你触碰这棵树的根须，一只落有蝴蝶的宝箱随之显形。
You touch the roots of the tree, where a treasure chest upon which a butterfly had landed appears.
好棒嗡！根本难不倒你嗡…难道你是天才嗡？
Excellent like a butterfly! This puzzle isn't a walk in the park... Are you a genius?
这是阿格莱雅女士留给你的奖励，我要回到她身边去了嗡。
Here's the reward from Lady Aglaea! I'm going back to her now.
说起来，之前在浴场见到过一个奇怪的人台，不知道它还在不在……
Speaking of which, I saw a strange mannequin at the baths. I wonder if it's still there...
这座人台表面满是暗淡的纹路，显然已经被弃置于此许久了。在你触碰它的一瞬，阵阵流光重新焕发而出。
This mannequin is covered in dimmed patterns. It has obviously been left here for a long while. At the moment you touched it, streams of light radiated once more.
失去了金丝牵引的人台吐出不成词句的话语。那声音好似阿格莱雅，却又有着细微的区别，仿佛经过多次转录的《钟表小子第一季》。

Without the pull of the golden thread, the mannequin sputters incomprehensible phrases. The voice sounds a bit like Aglaea, but there is also a subtle difference, as if an over-copied version of Clockie Season 1.
人台重新陷入了沉寂，但体表的光芒并没有消散。也许它意外地被你修好了？
The mannequin fell silent once more. However, the radiance on its surface didn't dissipate. Perhaps you managed to fix it.
我从预言中得到了提示…但好像并不完整？
I got a hint from the prophecy... But it seems incomplete?
其他部分会在哪里呢？这里已经没有更多预言了…
Where are the other parts? There aren't any more prophecies here...
风儿顺着金丝捎来了你的消息。贵客，可有什么进展吗？
The winds riding on golden threads bring tidings of your situation. Esteemed guest, has there been any progress?
哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
衣匠能顺着金丝找到它们的踪迹，但这需要消耗<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>才能做到。
The Garmentmaker can follow the golden thread to ascertain their whereabouts, but consumes <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color> in order to do so.
衣匠一把抓住记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.
嗯…有位织者对泰坦之间的秘密颇具兴趣。金丝带来消息，它把自己藏在了<color=#dbc291ff>壁画中的卷轴上</color>，去那里找找看吧。

Hmm... a weaver is rather interested in the secrets between Titans. The golden thread brings tidings: It has hidden itself <color=#dbc291ff>in a scroll within a wall painting</color>. Go look for it there.
嗯…有位织者热衷于修复旧日的残垣。金丝带来消息，它正趴在一根<color=#dbc291ff>断裂的石柱上</color>，去那里找找看吧。
Hmm... a weaver is passionately restoring the remnants of the past. The golden thread brings tidings: It is lying on a <color=#dbc291ff>broken stone pillar</color>. Go look for it there.
嗯…有位织者无畏亦或无知，竟主动向黑潮发起了挑战。金丝带来消息，它正在一座<color=#dbc291ff>残留着黑潮影响的桥上</color>，去那里找找看吧。

Hmm... a weaver, undaunted and unwitting, has issued a challenge to the black tide. The golden thread brings tidings: It is located <color=#dbc291ff>on a bridge mired in black tide remnants</color>. Go look for it there.
嗯…有位织者试图窥见泰坦的真容。金丝带来消息，它正潜伏在<color=#dbc291ff>一座神像的头部</color>，去那里找找看吧。
Hmm... a weaver is attempting to spy on the Titans' true form. The golden thread brings tidings: It has infiltrated <color=#dbc291ff>the head of a divine statue</color>. Go look for it there.
嗯…有位织者十分虔诚，仍试图倾听众神的指引。金丝带来消息，它正位于一座<color=#dbc291ff>神龛前…的石柱下</color>，去那里找找看吧。

Hmm... a weaver is devout, still attempting to heed the gods' guidance. The golden thread brings tidings: It is located at a <color=#dbc291ff>column... in front of a shrine</color>. Go look for it there.
嗯…比起未来，有位织者更注重当下的生活。金丝带来消息，它正<color=#dbc291ff>趴在一面墙上</color>悠闲地打发时间呢，去那里找找看吧。
Hmm... a weaver is more concerned with their present than future. The golden thread brings tidings: It is <color=#dbc291ff>lying on a wall</color>, leisurely whiling time away. Go look for it there.
嗯…有位织者格外称职，执意要完成被托付的任务。金丝带来消息，它正在努力<color=#dbc291ff>支撑一座天平</color>，去那里找找看吧。

Hmm... a weaver is upholding their utmost duty, insistent on completing the mission entrusted to them. The golden thread brings tidings: It is hard at work <color=#dbc291ff>propping up a scale</color>. Go look for it there.
嗯…有位织者不够小心，爬到了远超自身能力的高度。金丝带来消息，它正吊在<color=#dbc291ff>天平一侧的托盘底下</color>呢，去那里找找看吧。

Hmm... a weaver accidentally climbed to a height beyond its own ken. The golden thread brings tidings: It is hanging from <color=#dbc291ff>a plate on one side of a scale</color>. Go look for it there.
嗯…有位织者童心未泯，喜欢扮演勇士的引导者。金丝带来消息，它正<color=#dbc291ff>藏在房间角落</color>、等待着勇士打开宝箱呢，去那里找找看吧。

Hmm... a weaver is young at heart, pretend-playing at being a warrior's guide. The golden thread brings tidings: It is <color=#dbc291ff>hiding in the corner of a room</color>, waiting for a brave adventurer to open the chest. Go look for it there.
嗯…有位织者文采斐然，又对过往颇为留恋。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>荒野的枯树下</color>吟诗，去那里找找看吧。

Hmm... a weaver conjures magic in its writing, nostalgic for the past. The golden thread brings tidings: It is reciting poetry <color=#dbc291ff>beneath a withered tree in the wilds</color>. Go look for it there.
我找齐了这里的全部若虫。
I have gathered all the nymphs here.
多谢你了，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.
金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
The golden thread solidifies around the mannequin, creating a cocoon that envelops it.
当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
When the cocoon falls away, only a piece of brocade woven by golden threads is left floating in the air. With a wave of the Garmentmaker's hand, it splits in two, one half flying into your hand...
让我看看…「在夜之瑕玷，光所不能触碰的地方，长龙击碎了神殿，只留下不熄的火光」。
Let's see... "In the blemish of the night, wherein reach not the dawnlight, the Makrodrakon struck the temple, leaving flames untemperable."
果然是预言的晦涩行文，恐怕要花些时间才能将其解明…如果你有兴趣的话，不妨也试着解读看看。
As expected, an obscure scribble of a prophecy that may yet take time to decipher... If you are interested, you might be inclined to interpret it.
再次感谢你的协助，贵客。
Thank you once again for your aid, esteemed guest.
能复述下预言的内容吗？
「在夜之瑕玷，光所不能触碰的地方，长龙击碎了神殿，只留下不熄的火光」。
"In the blemish of the night, wherein reach not the dawnlight, the Makrodrakon struck the temple, leaving flames untemperable."
依我看，这应该是对某个地点的暗示。那里或许存在什么值得注意的东西……
The way I see it, this should be a clue about a certain location. There may be something worth paying attention to there...
I'll get back to my duties.
Goodbye, I await good news from you.
嗯…如果没有记忆残晶，衣匠是无法提供协助的——就连大地兽都不会饿着肚子工作。之后再来吧，贵客。
Hmm... The Garmentmaker cannot provide their services if you have no Memory Crystal Shards... Not even a dromas will work if they are left hungry. Come again another time, dear customer.
多谢你了，贵客。但曾有贤者说过这样一句话：「人的思维无法同时解读两条预言。」
Thank you, dear customer. However, a wise sage once said: "A human mind cannot solve two prophecies at once."
眼下我们手头已经有一则预言了。在处理完它之前，其他预言的解读就暂且搁置吧。
We are already working on one prophecy. We must put any other prophecies to the side for now while we work on this one.
风儿顺着金丝捎来了你的消息。贵客，可有什么进展吗？
The winds riding on golden threads bring tidings of your situation. Esteemed guest, has there been any progress?
I want to know more details.
于纷争世，{RUBY_B#「理性」之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}因意外失去了神体。{RUBY_B#「浪漫」之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}无法接受爱人负伤的事实，便搜集瑟希斯四散的身躯，意图用丝线将其收拢、令它回归。

In the Era Bellica, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} accidentally lost their divine form. {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}, unable to accept the fact that their lover was injured, collected Cerces' scattered bodies, intending to weave them together with threads to bring them back.
二人曾经的眷属们也自发加入了这场苦旅，它们便是创生若虫。其中美丽且脆弱的属于墨涅塔，勇武且刚强的属于瑟希斯。

The former followers of the two also voluntarily joined this arduous journey, and they are the Creation Nymphs. The beautiful and fragile belong to Mnestia, while the brave and strong belong to Cerces.
拼凑神的躯体并非易事。若虫们必须体察万物，从众人的言语中搜集智慧与爱，供墨涅塔编织金丝。它们因而拥有一个别称：「织者」。

Reassembling a divine body is no easy task. The nymph must perceive all things, gathering wisdom and love from the words of others to provide for Mnestia's weaving of the golden threads. Thus, they have an alternate name: "Weavers."
只是这种行为…注定徒劳无获。
But this act... is destined to be futile.
How does a nymph assist you?
说来话长，若虫们本质上…都曾是生活在黄金世的人类。
That's a little complicated. In short, nymphs were essentially... human beings who had lived in the Era Chrysea.
在传说中，「浪漫」的信徒会在死后被塞纳托斯送入残茧，蜕生为蝶，继续伴于泰坦们左右。
Legend has it that Thanatos sent disciples of Romance to defective cocoons, where they were reborn as butterflies, destined to continue their lives as loyal aides to the Titan.
虽然心智犹如孩童，但若虫们确实拥有灵智。也正因墨涅塔与瑟希斯两位泰坦的仁慈，在那个时代，死亡曾经柔软且温暖。

Though nymphs possess a naive and childlike innocence, they remain sentient and intelligent. In those days, thanks to the benevolence of the two Titans Mnestia and Cerces, death was a gentle and comforting experience.
在业已破碎的当下，若虫们拥有的赐福相当珍贵。倘若将它积沙成塔，将会是一股可观的力量，定能解开最牢固的封印。

As karma has been severed in the current era, the benediction bestowed upon the nymph becomes incredibly precious. If gathered to form a mountain, these benedictions would hold enough power to break even the most unyielding seal.
我们都与墨涅塔有着千丝万缕的联系。只要晓之以情，相信它们会愿意出一份力的。毕竟这份预言也和泰坦们有关。
We are all connected to Mnestia in one way or another. Once the reasons are articulated, I believe many will be eager to contribute. After all, this prophecy concerns the Titans themselves.
征得同意后，我会妥善安置它们的记忆与灵魂，并用金丝将它们的赐福缝补为一…希望这行得通。
Once I have their approval, I'll arrange for their memories and souls, binding their benedictions together with the golden thread... Let's hope this truly succeeds.
哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
衣匠能顺着金丝找到它们的踪迹，但这需要消耗<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>才能做到。
The Garmentmaker can follow the golden thread to ascertain their whereabouts, but consumes <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color> in order to do so.
衣匠一把抓住记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.
嗯…有位织者重视情谊，不愿与旧友们分离。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>大地兽站点的铃铛上</color>，跟每位过路人道别呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who values connections deeply and cannot bear to say goodbye to friends. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>on the bell of Dromas Station</color>, offering farewells to every passerby.
嗯…有位织者不满于美的凋零，总想为人们添加一分亮色。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>某位卫兵的头上</color>，把自己扮成饰品呢。去欣赏一下吧。

Hmm... There is a weaver, unsatisfied with the fading of beauty, who wishes only to add a touch of brightness to others. The golden thread brings tidings: It now resides <color=#dbc291ff>on the head of a certain guard</color>, pretending to be an ornament. Seek it out and admire its glow.
嗯…有位织者第一次接触到水，各外兴奋。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>浴场的中央水池</color>里泡澡。贵客可以在沐浴之余顺便去看看。

Hmm... There is a weaver who is exhilarated to touch water for the first time. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>in the central pool of the baths</color>, reveling in the warmth. My esteemed guest, feel free to take a look when you visit.
嗯…有位织者醉心于黄金血的甜美，就像悬锋战士沉迷于蜜酿。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>褔坛的金池中央</color>，似乎有些神志不清了。

Hmm... There is a weaver who is mesmerized by the sweetness of Golden Blood, like a Kremnos Warrior addicted to honey brew. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>in the center of the Golden Pond at the Altar of Blessings</color>, seemingly disoriented.
嗯…有位织者想要把自己锤炼得像山之民一样坚韧。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>铁匠的火炉上</color>锻炼耐性呢。快让它知难而退吧。

Hmm... There is a weaver who aspires to be as resilient as the Mountain Dwellers. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>on the blacksmith's forge</color>, honing their endurance and patience. Hurry and retrieve them before they get in the way.
嗯…有位织者想要让世人品尝甜美。金丝带来消息，它正把自己伪装成一块喂食大地兽的红土，你可以在<color=#dbc291ff>大地兽工坊</color>附近找到它。

Hmm... There is a weaver who wishes for all lives to experience a touch of sweetness. The golden thread brings tidings: They now disguise themselves as a piece of red clay that nourishes the dromas. You may find them near the <color=#dbc291ff>Dromas Workshop</color>.
嗯…有位织者通晓各种偏门知识。金丝带来消息，它正藏在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的升降梯井</color>，把自己伪装成了墙壁的一部分。要抓住时机才能见到它。

Hmm... There is a weaver who possesses knowledge of all unorthodox sorts. The golden thread brings tidings: They now secretly reside <color=#dbc291ff>in the Marmoreal Palace's elevator shaft</color>, disguising themselves as part of the wall. You need to catch the right opportunity to see them.
嗯…有位织者跃跃欲试、渴望证明自己的速度。金丝带来消息，它正停在<color=#dbc291ff>一张桌子上</color>，等待着挑战者上门呢。
Hmm... There is a weaver who jumps at the chance and is eager to prove its speed. The golden thread brings tidings: They now rest <color=#dbc291ff>on a table</color>, waiting for new challengers.
嗯…有位织者总想成为法吉娜的圣兽。金丝带来消息，它把自己藏在了<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的圣兽摊位</color>，去那里找找看吧。

Hmm... There is a weaver who dreams of becoming the sacred beast of Phagousa. The golden thread brings tidings: They now hide <color=#dbc291ff>within the Sacred Beast Stall in Marmoreal Palace</color>. Seek them there.
嗯…有位织者向往传说、渴望和英雄们一起冒险。金丝带来消息，它正伏在<color=#dbc291ff>一幅壁画上</color>，把自己想象成画中蝶呢。你得擦亮眼睛才能发现它。

Hmm... There is a weaver who yearns for legends and adventures alongside heroes. The golden thread brings tidings: They now linger <color=#dbc291ff>within a mural</color>, imagining themselves as the butterfly depicted there. Look closely to find them.
嗯…有位织者向往高处、希望像纷争世的帝王那样手握权力。金丝带来消息，它正站在<color=#dbc291ff>俯瞰浴场的高处</color>，发表豪言壮语呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who aspires to great heights, longing to wield power like an emperor of Era Bellica. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>at the peak overlooking the baths</color>, making a bold and watchful statement.
嗯…有位织者想要成为雅努斯的祭司，为此潜心修炼。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>看台的环形装饰边上</color>，练习穿墙呢。不知道它能否成功。

Hmm... There is a weaver who aspires to become a priest of Janus and trains diligently for the role. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>by the ring decorations in the bleachers</color>, practicing the art of wall penetration. I wonder if they have succeeded.
嗯…有位织者自诩博古通今。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的休息室内</color>锐评一位学者的演讲，你可以去指教一二。

Hmm... There is a weaver who prides itself on being knowledgeable and insightful. The golden thread brings tidings: They now offer critiques on a scholar's speech <color=#dbc291ff>in the lounge of Marmoreal Palace</color>. Perhaps you could pick up a few pointers there.
嗯…有位织者喜好乐理。金丝带来消息，它正和伙伴们于<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的水漫琴旁</color>倾听演奏，或许你也可以去听上一曲。

Hmm... There is a weaver who has a deep love for music theory. The golden thread brings tidings: They now listen intently to a performance <color=#dbc291ff>beside the water harp of Marmoreal Palace</color>. Perhaps you might join them as well.
嗯…有位织者渴望完美。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>走廊的某根柱子上</color>，把自己伪装成一盏灯，说是要「追求极致」。

Hmm... There is a weaver who strives for perfection. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lean <color=#dbc291ff>against a certain pillar along the corridor</color>, pretending to be a lamp. They seek to "reach the pinnacle of their aspirations."
嗯…有位织者非常嗜睡。金丝带来消息，它正躺在<color=#dbc291ff>你的私人浴宫</color>内，睡得正香呢。可以试着叫醒它。

Hmm... There is a weaver who is always quite lethargic. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie <color=#dbc291ff>within your private bath chamber</color>, sleeping soundly like a rock. Feel free to try waking them up.
嗯…有位织者迎难而上，逆风飞翔。金丝带来消息，它正在挑战<color=#dbc291ff>热水池上空的蒸汽</color>。请让它暂歇兴致吧。

Hmm... There is a weaver who rises to the occasion and flies against the wind. The golden thread brings tidings: They now challenge <color=#dbc291ff>the steam above the hot pool</color>. Please ask them to take a break.
嗯…有位织者怀念过去，感时伤悲。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>对面不远的花丛中</color>，藏匿于花丛中。

Hmm... There is a weaver who grows wistful with memories of the past, often touched by quiet sorrow. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie hidden <color=#dbc291ff>within the flower bush opposite, not far from here</color>.
嗯…有位织者说要当上雅努斯的祭司。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>悬崖边的护栏上</color>练习穿墙术，可以去检验下它的成果。

Hmm... There is a weaver who wishes to become Janus' priest. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>on the railing at the edge of the cliff</color>, honing their skill in wall penetration. Feel free to go and test the fruits of their practice.
嗯…有位织者渴望揭开世界的真相，正在寻找聪明的伙伴。金丝带来消息，它藏身于<color=#dbc291ff>一个隐秘的竹篮内</color>，得擦亮眼睛才能找到。

Hmm... There is a weaver who dreams of unveiling the world's hidden truths and is searching for a clever companion. The golden thread brings tidings: They now conceal themselves <color=#dbc291ff>within a secret woven basket</color>. Look closely, and you may discover them.
I'm not giving it to you.
嗯…如果没有记忆残晶，衣匠是无法提供协助的——就连大地兽都不会饿着肚子工作。之后再来吧，贵客。
Hmm... The Garmentmaker cannot provide their services if you have no Memory Crystal Shards... Not even a dromas will work if they are left hungry. Come again another time, dear customer.
多谢你了，贵客。但曾有贤者说过这样一句话：「人无法同时阅读两本书。」
Thank you, my esteemed guest. But a wise man once said, "No man can read two books at the same time."
眼下衣匠已经为你揭露了一只若虫的位置。在找到它之前，其他若虫的信息就暂且保密吧。
The Garmentmaker has already revealed the location of one nymph to you. Until you find it, the whereabouts of the other nymphs will remain a secret.
我找齐了这里的全部若虫。
I have gathered all the nymphs here.
多谢你了，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.
金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
The golden thread solidifies around the mannequin, creating a cocoon that envelops it.
当茧褪去时，一句金色文字组成的话在空中转瞬即逝：「蝴蝶知道一切」。
As the cocoon falls away, a phrase in shimmering golden letters briefly appears in the air before fading: "Butterflies know everything."
看来织者们是受到了预言的指引…这异样应该就是解开预言的关键。
It appears the weavers are guided by the prophecies... This unusual phenomenon may well hold the key to unlocking their secrets.
或许它是某种图案？又或者对某个地点的暗示…如果你有兴趣的话，不妨也试着解读看看。
Could it be an image? Or perhaps a clue to a specific location... If you're intrigued, you can try solving it.
再次感谢你的协助，贵客。
Thank you once again for your aid, esteemed guest.
这就是那则预言所指向的目标？倒是稀奇。
So this is what the prophecy was pointing to? How unexpected.
