桀桀。不愧是你，一眼就能看穿老巴特鲁斯的演技！
Heh-heh. I knew it, nothing gets past you! Saw right through my act, didn't you?
——那么！接下来要发生什么，你想必也心中有数了吧？
Which means... you already know what's coming next, don't you?
光明正大的偷袭，桀桀桀桀！
哎呀哎呀，相隔了上千年，还是和您交手来得带劲啊！
Well, well, even after a thousand years, nothing gets my blood pumping like a good brawl with you!
也不知道世界能够延续多久…我是挺希望把你们奋战过的场地都{RUBY_B#塞进肚子}收藏起来{RUBY_E#}，以后卖给…啊不是，以后放在纪念胜利的博物馆里，也算是不枉所有人为此付出的{RUBY_B#时间}一切{RUBY_E#}？

Who knows how much longer this world's got left in it... But I, for one, would love to collect every battlefield you've fought on and {RUBY_B#swallow them up}preserve them{RUBY_E#}. Later... no no, not to sell, of course, to display them in a victory museum someday! A worthy tribute to all the {RUBY_B#time}sacrifices{RUBY_E#} everyone made, right?
你肚子里还塞得下这个？
Your stomach's got room for that?
Well, there's only one way to find out.
Taking "time is money" quite literally, huh?
桀桀，那当然了，老巴特鲁斯的宝贝，件件都是开门见山的老！
Naturally! Every treasure in my collection is as precious as you can imagine!
我不喜欢回忆过去的事。
I don't like talking about the past.
「过去的事情，就让它留在过去」？桀桀桀桀，那如果「过去」和「未来」竟然是同一件事，你又要怎么取舍呢？
"Let the past stay in the past"? Hehehe. But what if the past and the future turn out to be the same thing? Then what'll you choose?
不过，咱在这里特意埋伏你，倒也不只是为了贫嘴。你是不是有个水盆不小心忘在过去了？贴心的巴特鲁斯这就把它还你，桀桀桀桀……
But I didn't lie in wait just to run my mouth. Did you happen to leave behind a basin in the past? Lucky for you, Bartholos is as thoughtful to return it, hehehehe...
Let me just... dig a bit... dig a bit more...
锵锵！巴特鲁斯向您伸出圆手——古董水盆一件，敬请收好~
Ta-daa! Behold, Bartholos extends his perfectly round hands and presents you: One antique basin. Please handle with care~
哎呀，救世的大盗，你可要加油啊…我和这盆里的醉鬼，都已经是前世的亡灵，帮不到你什么忙……
Ah, great thief of Deliverance, best of luck out there... Me and the drunkard in this basin are but spirits of the previous era. We can't help much now...
但你一定能从无趣的命运手中，偷来更有趣的未来，对吧？
But I know you'll snatch a more thrilling future right out of fate's boring little hands, won't you?
咳咳咳咳，这下咱俩能说上话了。什么？你说为什么不直接搭话？发生了这么多事情，还有人真的在意路边的一串紫葡萄？
Ahem ahem, now we can finally talk. What? Why didn't I say anything earlier? After everything that's happened, who would care about a bunch of purple grapes on the roadside?
Uh... you really lost me there.
Purple grapes? Where are the purple grapes?
那只是比喻，你就关心吃的了……
It was just a metaphor, and all you care about is food...
你看，要想引人注意，那只能多多表演啦。
Look, if you wanna get noticed, you'd have to put on a show.
咳咳…不管怎么说，我现在赢得了你的注意，那自然要充分利用这样的机会。时间的指针即将跨越终点和原初…啊，不用在意这个。
Ahem... Anyway, now that I have your attention, I should make good use of it. The hands of time are about to cross the end and the beginning... Ah, don't mind that part.
桀桀！走过路过不要错过——这个神秘的房间里有个神秘的宝藏，你唯有借助巴特鲁斯大人的力量才能将它入手！
Hehehe! Come closer, don't miss your chance. A mysterious treasure lies hidden in this enigmatic room, and only with Lord Bartholos's power can you claim it!
既然我们的友情始于漫长时光之前的一次偶然合作，那么在最终的分别之前…让你体验一下脑控巴特鲁斯是种怎样的感受，应该是一种不错的报偿吧？
Since our friendship began with a chance collaboration long ago, before we go our separate ways... letting you feel what it's like to mind-control Bartholos sounds like a fair reward, doesn't it?
哦哦，没有别的意思，这是我们意念合一的意思——咳咳，总之不是玩游戏之类的意思，我仍是一个需要尊重次元壁的角色。
Oh, no, no, don't get me wrong. It just means we were mentally in sync. Ahem, definitely not anything game-related. I'm still a character who respects the fourth wall.
别想借机从我这里偷东西。
Don't even think about trying to steal from me.
唉呀，瞧您这误会的，这哪能啊…巴特鲁斯对朋友从来都真心相待，遇事更是甘愿为朋友两肋插刀！等等…我好像没有肋条？

Oh dear, you misunderstood me, big time! How could I ever... Bartholos has always been genuine with friends, ready to take a knife to the ribs for them without hesitation. Wait... do I even have ribs?
好啦好啦，俏皮话咱也不适合说太多…您要是有兴趣，就和咱一起去夺取宝藏吧！
Alright, alright, enough with the jokes... If you're interested, why not come treasure hunting with me?
桀桀桀…我一直怀疑这东西跟天外世界存在某种联系，既然是您的话，想必一定能够明白我说的是什么意思…其实我自己也不太明白。
Hehe... I've always suspected this thing has some link to a world beyond the sky. And since it's you, I figured you'd get what I meant... To be honest, I don't really get it myself.
总而言之——走过路过不要错过！这个神秘的房间里有个神秘的宝藏，你唯有借助巴特鲁斯大人的力量才能将它入手！
Anyway, don't miss your chance! A mysterious treasure lies hidden in this enigmatic room, and only with Lord Bartholos's power can you claim it!
Then let's not waste any time...
说到底，你为什么不独吞它呢？
Why didn't you just keep it for yourself in the end?
您真的想知道？长话短说，还是短话长说？
You really wanna know? Should I give you the long story or cut to the chase?
桀桀…既然你问出了这个问题，那么巴特鲁斯就用一个小故事来说明吧。
Hehehe... Since you asked that question, let Bartholos explain it with a little story.
在很久很久以前——啊，也可能就在上个轮回里——有一支来自哈图西里的雇佣兵被困在了奥赫玛城外。
A long, long time ago... Ah, or maybe it was just the last cycle... a group of mercenaries from Hattusili found themselves stranded outside the city of Okhema.
他们原本被元老院的某些人骗来和刻律德菈阁下作对；但由于那几个元老已然被抓住处刑，这些人突然之间成了一群无家可归的流浪者。

They had been tricked by a few members of the Council of Elders into going up against Lady Cerydra. But those elders were captured and executed, and the mercenaries suddenly became lost homeless people with nowhere to go.
他们无法继续进军，因为那将是与整个奥赫玛为敌；他们也无法自行回乡，因为轻信了元老的许诺，这些人根本没有携带足够回乡的盘缠。
They couldn't march ahead, because doing so would make them enemies of all Okhema. They couldn't return home either. They had trusted the elders too easily and brought no money for the journey back.
后来，多亏他们中有个名叫色诺芬的家伙头脑灵活，说「我们各个身强力壮。如果沿途的人们需要体力，我们可以出卖体力；如果沿途的人需要欢乐，我们也可以表演杂技。」
Later, thanks to a sharp-minded one among them named Xenophon, who said, "We're all strong and fit. If people along the way need labor, we can work. If they want joy, we can perform acrobatics."
据说，世界上的第一个旅行杂技团就这样诞生了；他们从奥赫玛一路表演回了遥远的哈图西里，从此再也没有从事雇佣兵的工作。
And just like that, the world's first traveling acrobatic troupe was born. They performed their way from Okhema to far-off Hattusili and never went back to mercenary life.
咳咳…故事有点长，不过呢——巴特鲁斯为什么也有和朋友分享战利品的时候？其实就是类似的原因啦。
Ahem... That story ran a bit long. So why did Bartholos share their treasures with friends? Well, it's for pretty much the same reason.
人们都说世界很大…咱也不能把路走窄了不是？
People say the world is vast... So why box ourselves in, right?
一个似曾相识的卷轴矗立在你面前。恍惚间，你仿佛置身于希斯拉达恩部落的荒原…不，没有那种事情。这里是翁法罗斯！
A familiar scroll stands before you. For a split second, you feel like you are standing in the wilds of the Hithradahn tribe... no, that's not right. This is Amphoreus!
但不知为何，你闻到了小猪的气息。不是一只。是三只。
But somehow, you caught the scent of piggies. Not just one. But three.
你打算进入「小猪」的房间。小心，别让它们溜走了。
You're about to enter the "piggies" room. Be careful not to let them escape.
你决定不和假冒的小猪一般见识。
You decide not to stoop to the level of that fake piggy.
桀桀，桀桀。咱就知道你无法抗拒这种诱惑。肥美而不会抵抗的猎物，手到擒来的财宝——正是一切大盗都不会放过的机会！
Hehehe, hehehe. I knew you couldn't resist such temptation. Plump, helpless prey. Treasure just waiting to be claimed... No thief in their right mind would walk away from that!
没错没错！这正是江洋大盗最重要的精神。
That's right! This is the true spirit of being a master thief!
Oh please. I've been bored of this for ages.
话虽如此，但我们还是放不下那些无人发掘的财宝，对吧？
Still, we can't help chasing after unclaimed treasures, can we?
巴特鲁斯听说，有位城邦哲学家曾得出结论——世界的本质就是「吃」！植物贪婪地吮吸阳光，动物更是不放过一切自己能消化的东西。至于人或者泰坦——

I heard about this city-state philosopher who figured out that the nature of the world is basically just "eating"! Plants soak up sunlight like they're starving, animals gobble up anything they can digest. As for humans or Titans...
「于万物主宰有大信心者，可以吃一切存在之事物！」桀桀…暴食的形骸是可鄙的，暴食的灵魂却是高贵的！
"Those who truly believe in the ruler of all things may feast upon whatever exists!" Hehehe... The physical act of gluttony might seem disgusting, but the spirit behind it is absolutely noble!
记得拿走你遇到的每一份财宝，让我们无愧于大盗之名！
Grab every treasure you spot. We've got our reputation as infamous thieves to maintain!
天凉了，该把所有的记忆付之一炬了。
It's getting colder now. Time to burn all memories to ash.
从名字到台词，这只桶充满了盗用创意的气息。在一个盗贼亦可成为泰坦的世界，模因被偷盗似乎也是迟早的事情。
This trashcan's entire identity, from name to dialogue, screams plagiarism. In a world where thieves can become Titans, stealing memetic entities was just a matter of time.
现在的宝箱，真是一个比一个无趣了。三秒钟就能开锁，这怎么够本大爷拯救财宝的仪式感呢？
Chests these days are so boring. Three seconds to unlock? How's that supposed to satisfy my sense of ceremony of rescuing treasures?
没错没错！包括你的背包！
桀桀，您说得对，咱还就是这个味儿！
Hehehe, you're right! That's just how I roll!
You got kicked by the trashcan.
桀桀，桀桀。你的记忆当中还真是能偷出些相当有趣的东西。
Hehe. Your memories hold some absolutely fascinating things worth stealing.
这咱倒是想…但可惜做不到。
I certainly wish I could... but unfortunately, I can't.
师父，快教我怎么偷记忆！
Master, quick! Teach me how to steal memories!
嗐，这还真不简单！咱也做不到。
Ha, it's actually quite complicated! Even I can't do it.
说到底，咱只是一个普通的盗贼，可以偷你「一直拥有」的记忆要素，但对你「一瞬拥有」的真正记忆就无可奈何了。

Let's be honest. I'm just a regular thief who can steal elements of the memory fragments you "always carry," but those authentic memories you "hold for just an instant" are completely beyond my reach.
啊——咱不是说你的记忆有什么问题。每个人的记忆都是这样…过去并非一帧不差地留在了你们的心里。
But I'm not saying there's anything wrong with how you remember things. Everyone's memory works the same way... The past doesn't just sit there in your mind like some perfect recording.
你们所保留的，是类似我们的世界这种，由形形色色的模因交织而成的虚拟现实。
What you keep is really just a virtual reality crafted from various memetic entities, much like our world.
无论拍摄留影，还是动笔记录，人类并非泰坦，不可能保有绝对真实的过去。消逝的细节就像沙粒一样从指缝之间失去……
You see, humans aren't Titans. No amount of photography or record-keeping can capture the absolute truth of what happened. All those tiny details just slip through your fingers like sand...
不过可别担心！只有把浮土全部吹去，真金才会被我们握在手心。
But don't you worry! We only find the gems after we've blown away all the worthless dust.
嗯？所以到底什么是真金？那当然是巴特鲁斯也没法从你心里偷走的「真正的记忆」啦！
What gems, you ask? Those "authentic memories" that even I, Bartholos, can't possibly steal from your heart!
这种记忆不存在于过去，不存在于记录，只存在于你回忆起它的一瞬，存在于你心头涌起的特殊感情——桀桀，这种东西即便是泰坦那也偷不走啦！

These precious memories don't exist in the past or in records. They only exist in the exact moment you recall them, in those special feelings that flood your heart... Hehehe, such things are beyond anyone's reach, even Titans!
锵锵，是紫色的小猪，有毒的小猪！
Ta-da! Meet the purple pig, the poisonous little piggy!
Surprised you there, didn't I? Hehehehe—
桀桀…古有王下一桶，今有盗下一圣！
Hehehe... History had its Lordly Trashcan, and now it has the Thievishly Saintcan!
桀桀，看这边，看这边。我听说，从这里出去就能离开翁法罗斯…这事儿是真是假？
Hehehe, look this way, over here. I heard you can get out of Amphoreus through here... is that true?
嗐，你可骗不过「诡计」的祖师爷！也就是说，或许你们能从这里出去，但巴特鲁斯就绝无可能？
Hah, you can't fool the legend of "Trickery"! So you're saying that while you folks might make it out, Bartholos has absolutely no chance?
哎呀，那真好啊。可惜，巴特鲁斯不是天外来客，你们的黑客后门，对我来说毫无用处。
Oh my, that sounds nice. Too bad ol' Bartholos isn't from beyond the sky, your hacker backdoor is useless to me.
切，小气。不过想也知道，巴特鲁斯不是天外来客，你们的黑客后门，对我来说毫无用处。
Tch, stingy. But obviously, ol' Bartholos isn't from beyond the sky, so your hacker backdoor is useless to me.
你别说…咱有时候就想，对于更外面的世界来说，翁法罗斯是不是就像一个大大的宝箱？要是这样，和咱们作对的铁墓，大概就相当于一只讨厌的宝箱怪吧！
Y'know what... Sometimes I wonder if Amphoreus is like one big treasure chest to the outside world? If that's the case, then Irontomb, our enemy, would be nothing but an annoying mimic!
不过这么说来，能被一只小小的宝箱怪威胁…外面的宇宙还真是病入膏肓了呀。你要走的道路还真是艰难呢，来自天外的朋友！
Come to think of it, being threatened by a tiny mimic... The universe out there must really be in dire straits. You've got your work cut out for you, my friend from beyond the sky!
你好啊，帅气的银河飞行员！您的老朋友巴特鲁斯也在参与飞行员培训课程——
Well, hello there, dashing cosmic pilot! Your old friend Bartholos here is also taking the pilot training course...
——才怪。被困在这些讨厌的柱子中间，我都快变成安提基色拉人的动力核心了！
...Just kidding! Being stuck between these awful pillars, I feel like I'm about to become the Antikytherans' energy core myself!
你知道这些柱子是什么吗？桀桀，它们是支撑翁法罗斯的服务器——我猜是这样。
You know what these pillars are? Heheh, they're the servers that keep Amphoreus running, or so I'd guess.
喂喂，我现在可是卡在了翁法罗斯的服务器上唉！关心一下你的老伙计啦。
C'mon, I'm literally stuck inside the Amphoreus servers here! Spare a thought for your old pal here, will you?
…诶，对了对了——咱们朋友一场，你就行行好，帮我把剩余的「培训课程」做完如何？
Oh, I know! Since we're pals and all, how about you do me a solid and finish up the rest of this "training course"?
我受不了这些该死的机关，它们锁住的大宝箱就归你了！只要早点把我放出来就好……
I can't deal with these blasted mechanisms anymore. The big chest they're locking up? It's all yours! Just get me out of here as fast as you can...
桀桀桀，亲爱的伙计，看在{RUBY_B#列位星神}天外诸神{RUBY_E#}的份儿上，巴特鲁斯向您致以崇高的问候！
Hehehe, my dear friend, by the {RUBY_B#Aeons}gods beyond the sky{RUBY_E#}, I, Bartholos, send you my most noble greetings!
Stop playing games and give me back my spear.
短矛我会还你，不过…你瞧，月色如此美丽，老巴特鲁斯也忍不住想与老朋友在月下攀谈——
You'll get your spear, but first... just look at that beautiful moon. It makes me want to have a nice chat with an old friend.
虽然由咱来提这个问题兴许有点奇怪，不过，作为漫长旅途中的小小一站……
I know it's a bit weird for me to be asking, but since this is just a little stop on your long journey...
翁法罗斯，是否让您留下了遗憾？
Do you have any regrets about your time in Amphoreus?
桀桀…甚好、甚好。扎格列斯老祖说过，遗憾是爱的证明。
Heheh... Excellent, excellent. As ancestor Zagreus used to say, "Regret is proof that you ever loved."
诡计的泰坦，偷走一切又归还一切，目的也不过是用失去来唤醒珍惜。
The Trickery Titan, who takes all only to give it all back, only to teach us to appreciate what we have through the pain of loss.
桀桀…甚好、甚好。如此我们便能轻装前行，各赴前程。
Heheh... Excellent, excellent. Then we can move on with light hearts, each to our own destiny.
巴特鲁斯会买下奥赫玛的一整条街，以后想偷哪家就偷哪家；您呢，以后要是想回来坐坐，举会儿黎明机器玩玩也不在话下……
I'll buy a whole street in Okhema to rob any place whenever I want. And you, if you ever want to come back and visit, you can play with the Dawn Device all you want...
咳咳…天机不可泄露，老巴特鲁斯一不小心好像又说得太多。好啦，咱说话算话——
Ahem... Some secrets are better left unknown. Looks like ol' Bartholos got carried away again. Anyway, as promised...
短矛还你，有空记得回来玩啊！
Here's your spear back. Do come back and hang out again sometime!
月光、池水、翻飞的金币…扎格列斯老祖说过，「无所事事的夜晚，连思考都是罪过」。
Moonlight, the pool, coins flipping in the air... Our ancestor Zagreus once said: "The slightest thought is a sin on an idle night."
It really feels like a lifetime ago.
桀桀，还记得扎格列斯老祖的另一句名言吗？「行窃，只是取回本该属于自己的东西」。
Heheh, remember another one of ancestor Zagreus's famous sayings? "Theft is but retrieving what belonged to you in the first place."
如果不算那些留着金血的英雄豪杰，毫无疑问——咱巴特鲁斯，就是在这{RUBY_B#翁法罗斯}方寸果壳{RUBY_E#}里陪伴了您最久的朋友。
If you don't count those heroes with golden blood, then without a doubt: I, Bartholos, have been your longest companion in this little {RUBY_B#Amphoreus}nutshell{RUBY_E#}.
哦，对了对了…说到这个，就让老巴特鲁斯再告诉您一个小小的秘密……
Oh, yes, that reminds me... allow ol' Bartholos here to let you in on one more tiny little secret...
这里是巴特鲁斯为自己精心挑选的归隐之地。换句话说…如果您哪天觉得自己手头不够宽裕…回这里翻翻，巴特鲁斯的财宝也是您的财宝！
This is the secluded retreat that I hand-picked for my retirement. In other words... should you ever find your coin purse a bit light, feel free to come back and rummage around. What's mine is yours!
回见！到时候，请允许老巴特鲁斯再偷走您的一点儿时间~
See ya! When we meet again, allow me to steal just another moment of your time~
你要不要我的翻飞之币
桀桀，那当然要啦！巴特鲁斯特别为您准备了一些「好东西」——瞧一瞧，看一看，要是钱不够了还可以找扎格列斯去换…哦，我是说扎格列斯之手，还有类似的那些东西。

Hehehe, of course! Bartholos has prepared some "good stuff" specially for you! Take a look, have a peek, and if you're short on money, you can always trade with Zagreus... oh, I mean the Hand of Zagreus, and things like that.
你面前的大家伙纹丝不动。仔细一看，大家伙的旁边压着一张字条……
The huge entity in front of you won't budge. Upon closer inspection, you see a note pinned next to it...
「如果您又遇到了困难，请大喊一声『帮帮我，巴特鲁斯！』」
"If you run into trouble again, just give a shout: 'Help me, Bartholos!'"
「——给你的老伙计留一个踩着七彩祥云来救你的机会吧，桀桀。」
"Do give your old pal a chance to swoop in and save the day like a hero does, heheh."
哦，当然，巴特鲁斯随时随地响应您的召唤！
Oh, absolutely! Bartholos, at your service, anytime, anywhere!
你决定不给巴特鲁斯这个机会。
You decide not to give Bartholos this chance.
嗝~白煮蛋要剥壳才能吃，箱子里的宝物也一样，让巴特鲁斯消化一下才能乖乖听话。
Burp~ You've gotta peel a hard-boiled egg before you eat it, and it's the same deal with treasure in a chest. O' Bartholos gotta digest it a little before it'll behave!
等等——这么说来，老巴特鲁斯莫非是海胆的亲戚？不对不对，海胆喜欢戴帽子，但老巴特鲁斯并不喜欢。事了拂衣去，深藏功与名……帽子还是太过拉风了点。

Wait a second! Does that mean I'm related to sea urchins? No, no, that's not it. Sea urchins love wearing hats, but I don't. I do my thing and disappear right after, keeping my contributions and reputation unspoken... Hats are just too flashy for my style.
「无聊的真相个个相似，精彩的诡计个个不同」——送你一句扎格列斯老祖的格言，咱们有缘再会~
"Boring truths are all the same, while every brilliant trick is unique in its own way." Here's a little proverb from ancestor Zagreus for you. Until we meet again~
紫色的大胃袋包裹了你……
The purple stomach pouch engulfs you...
这跟平常的口嗨可不一样，咱们换个人少的地方再聊。
This is different from our usual banter. Let's go somewhere quieter to talk about this.
不过——原来我一直等待的合作伙伴就是你啊！不错不错、这可真是太好了！
But... I guess you're the partner I've been waiting for. This is great news! Excellent news!
恩维尔带你来到了一个相对僻静的角落……
Avilius takes you to a relatively quieter corner.
嗯，这里就方便说话多了。
倒也不是？只是重要的事情当然要追求点仪式感嘛！
Not really, but it's important enough to warrant a sense of seriousness!
I feel like I'm being robbed...
诶，别这么开玩笑啊…就我这小身板，怕不是叠起来十个也不够你一棒子打？
No way! You can take on ten of me easily!
总之，既然你向我打听起了「黄金替罪羊」——这是我自己秘密给它们取的名字——你也已经通过了最基础的4关，是这样没错吧？
Anyway, since you asked me about the Golden Scapegoat — a name that I came up with secretly — that means you've cleared the four basic stages as well, right?
嗯，我自己也试过挑战它，侥幸通过了不那么凶险的几关。也正因为如此，我才弄到了这个——在开始挑战或者点亮世界的时候，我们能听到的那些古泰坦语的翻译。

Yes, I challenged them too, and was fortunate enough to pass the ones that weren't so dangerous. That's how I got this — the translations of the ancient Titan language that we can hear when the challenge starts or when the world is illuminated.
怎么样，是不是感觉它背后似乎有一些…神神秘秘的东西？比如，屠龙者终将成为恶龙，传火者终将成为灰烬……
Well? Feels like there's something... enigmatic behind it, right? For example... The dragonslayer inevitably becomes the evil dragon, and the torchbearer inevitably becomes ashes...
确实，即使是负责翻译这些文本的那位学者前辈，她自己也无法笃定这一点。
That's true. Even the scholar who translated this couldn't be sure about it.
不至于吧…就这种朦胧诗？
Really? She couldn't be sure about these misty poems?
好吧，如果你是在意这里面的语言风格…那我必须说明，这都是翻译的结果。原文是我还不太能搞懂的古泰坦语，是不是真的也是这种风格，就只有那位帮助我的学者前辈自己知道了。

Well, if it's the style that concerns you... just know that all of this is translated from the ancient Titan language, which I don't fully understand yet. Only the scholar knows if the original was also written in the same style.
是有点…不知该怎么形容。
It's a little... How should I put it?
对吧，有种灰暗而深沉的味道…但又充满了诗意的能量！
Right. It gives off an energy that's a little gloomy and deep... but extremely poetic!
无论如何，这些都是从「黄金替罪羊」赐予我们的战利品中提取、翻译出来的宝贵信息——我相信它们一定有着非比寻常的特殊意义。
Anyway, they're all precious information extracted and translated from the treasures bestowed upon us by the Golden Scapegoat, and I firmly believe that they are of unusual significance.
比如第一段里提到，「火与光即是那罪的化身」——这段话会不会是指那些伟大的黄金裔？
Just look at the first stanza. "Fire and light are the incarnation of that sin." Is this referring to the great Chrysos Heirs?
也许他们的救世计划，会在无形之中对世界造成某种讳莫如深、但又无可奈何的损害？他们是否会因此深深心痛，却又无法对我们这些世俗大众作任何辩解？

Maybe their plan to save the world will somehow cause irreversible damage to the world, but we must bear it no matter what? Are they hurting because of it, but are unable to explain anything to us mortals?
又比如这第二段，「我毕竟对屠刀一无所知」——信息的来源似乎相信有种来自神秘领域的不可见的力量在威胁着整个世界…但会是什么呢？

Also, in the second stanza, "After all, I know nothing of the butchering blade." The source of the information seems to believe that an unseen power from a mysterious domain is threatening the world... But what could it be?
还有还有，第四段最后的那句——「神明想看见世界：因此便有了{RUBY_B#光明}黑暗{RUBY_E#}」…在这里，前辈无法准确把握的泰坦语词意出现了两种截然相反的意思…那究竟代表什么呢？

Oh, and the last line of the fourth stanza... "The god wishes to see the world, and so {RUBY_B#light}darkness{RUBY_E#} came into being." The scholar was unable to precisely interpret the meaning of the Titan word here, and it contains two opposing interpretations. What does that mean?
…难道说，在古泰坦语的某些特殊表达方式里，光明和黑暗——哦，还有时间——都可以用同一个词来指称？
...Could it be that, in the ancient Titan language, light and darkness — Oh, and also time — are represented by the same word?
对此，那位前辈和我都无法做出任何经得起推敲的解释。或许只有从不同的挑战中记录下更多不同的这类低语，我们才可能解答自己的疑问…当然也可能带来更多的疑问就是了！

The scholar and I couldn't come up with any explanations that withstood scrutiny. Maybe the only way for us to answer it is to record more such whispers from the different challenges... But that might also bring about more questions!
诶，这怎么是阴谋论呢！你明明也在攻略「黄金替罪羊」，我不信你会觉得那里面没藏着任何惊天秘密。
It is not a conspiracy! You're trying to conquer the Golden Scapegoat too, right? You can't possibly think that there are no surprising secrets within.
I'm busy. Please just get to the point.
哦哦，简单来说，就是我认为「黄金替罪羊」里面藏着了不得的秘密——但包括我自己在内的任何人都还不知道那是什么！
Basically, I think there's an incredible secret hidden in the Golden Scapegoat, but no one knows what it is, including me!
你慢点…说这么多我记不住。
Slow down... I can't keep up.
啊…呃，是我一下说得太多了吗？
Um, did I speak too much?
…这样，我稍后把你拉进我们在传信石版上的秘密讨论组；只要你攻略到更多的「黄金替罪羊」，那位学者前辈就能阶段性地把自己新的翻译成果发在讨论组里——
...Well, why don't I add you to our secret discussion group on the teleslate? Once you overcome more of the Golden Scapegoats, the scholar will be able to send her newer translations to the group.
嗯…比起经常在现实中碰头，还是这样更安全一些。
It's much safer compared to meeting up in person frequently.
哦，单线联系的秘密调查！
Ah, a secret investigation with a single point of contact!
嘿嘿，你果然也是懂的——这种有点禁忌氛围的研究才最带感嘛！
Yes, you get it! It's more exciting if the research feels a little forbidden, right?
...Why can't we be more open about it?
我倒是也希望…不过那位学者前辈专门叮嘱过我，此事或许与世界背后的本质规律有关，在真的发现什么之前最好不要张扬……

I would like to, but the scholar specifically warned me that the research might be linked to the underlying rules of the world, and that we shouldn't talk about it openly before we make concrete discoveries...
你说什么都行，因为我没兴趣。
诶，别这么说嘛！不管你嘴上怎么说，你的脚都已经走到这一步了不是？
Don't say that! You're here already, aren't you?
好了…在这里嘀嘀咕咕太久难免引人生疑——我们下次还是在传信石版上接头吧！溜了溜了，在刻法勒广场上见面的时候，可别说我们聊过这个神秘话题啊！
Anyway, people might start suspecting us if we stay here any longer. Let's talk on teleslate next time! Don't mention this conversation when I see you in Kephale Plaza!
恩维尔像一溜烟似的跑得无影无踪。
哈哈，你是因为前辈在群里发的消息来的吧！
Ha, you're here because of the messages from the teleslate, right?
说实话，关于咱们到底能不能从这些挑战里发现某些古代不为人知的秘密…我和前辈的想法并不一样。
To be honest, I don't agree with the scholar on whether we can discover unknown secrets of the past from these challenges.
——怎么样，还是像上次那样找个僻静之处，我跟你好好说道说道？
Well? What do you say? Should we go somewhere quiet like last time so I can tell you what I think?
得了，把最后一段给我就行。
Just give me the last stanza.
这就是我们已知的最后一段。希望它已经能满足你的好奇心。
This is the last known stanza, I hope it quenches your curiosity.
未来…我会找到更强有力的证据来说服所有人。
Going forward... I'll find more concrete evidence to convince everyone.
恩维尔带你来到了一个相对僻静的角落……
Avilius takes you to a relatively quieter corner.
哎呀，你愿意听我细细讲来，这实在是太感谢了。
Thank you so much for being willing to listen to me.
我有一个大胆的假设——一旦它成立，或许世界上所有的未解之谜就全都说的通了！
I have a bold hypothesis that, if proven true, can explain just about every unsolved mystery in this world!
我们每个人都是「忘记了自己是泰坦」的泰坦！是的，在过去，人类和泰坦的关系不仅仅远比现在更亲密，甚至根本就是同一存在！
We are all Titans who have forgotten our identity as a Titan! That's right. Humanity and the Titans had a much closer relationship in the past, to the point where we were one and the same!
逻辑：人是由自我定义的物种。
Logic: Humans are a species defined by itself.
嗯……差不多是这个意思？不过为了避免误会，你还是听我解释一遍吧。
Umm... Kind of? But let me explain so you don't misunderstand me.
I'm not interested in mental gymnastics.
为什么老师翻译出来的文本总是让人似懂非懂？为什么这种据说属于泰坦的语言如此模棱两可，以至于「光明」和「纷争」、「时间」和「罪恶」竟然在用同一个词汇表达？

Why are the translations from the scholar so fuzzy? Why is this language, supposedly having been used by the Titans, so vague that "light" and "strife," and "time" and "evil," are expressed by the same word?
答案就在这里。因为我们忘记了人类也是泰坦，忘记了这种语言不是通过耳朵和眼睛，而是通过心灵去理解的。
The answer lies in my hypothesis. It's because we have forgotten that humans are Titans too. We forgot that the language must be understood by the soul, instead of ears and eyes.
——也就是说，我们必须换一种方式，用心灵去阅读「黄金替罪羊」的遗存，这样才能真正理解它当中蕴含着的深意。具体来说，就是……
...In other words, we must read the legacy of the Golden Scapegoat with our soul to truly understand its significance. And that is...
恩维尔不知从哪里搬来了一张躺椅。
Avilius brings a lounge chair out of nowhere.
我决定用一顶由细铜丝特制的帽子，把自己的头皮和黄金替罪羊零距离连通…然后在这里睡上一觉，试试能不能用梦境和世界背后的真实沟通！

I've decided to connect my scalp directly to the Golden Scapegoat with a hat made from thin copper strands. I will then take a nap here to see if I can communicate with the truth behind this world in my dream!
这集我是不是在哪里看过。
Have I seen this somewhere before?
You're really getting to the bottom of this, aren't you?
诶，凡事总要试试才知道有没有价值吧？如果演化神秘学的理论没错，那么人类或许至今都还保留着泰坦的全部感官，只是退化之后，自己完全意识不到罢了。
How will I know if I don't try? If Evoccultism is correct, modern humans still possess all the Titan senses, but we are unaware of them because these senses have atrophied.
说到「自己无法控制、甚至意识不到」的感官体验，那最容易想到的就是「做梦」了吧？
And naturally, the sensory experience that we aren't aware or in control of is dreaming.
或许，黄金替罪羊就是某个已经陷入沉睡的泰坦的梦境……我们不能想当然地就否定这种猜想。说不定做梦就是泰坦的思考方式呢！
Maybe the Golden Scapegoat is the dream of a slumbering Titan... It's a conjecture that we can't just rule out. Perhaps dreaming is how Titans think!
啊——没关系，这个实验不需要你出手，你只要当个见证人，避免偶然路过的谁不小心把我叫醒，别让实验意外被打断就好。
And don't worry, I'm not going to ask you to participate in the actual experience. Just be my witness, and make sure no one accidentally interrupts the experiment by waking me up.
恩维尔麻利地带上了特质的细铜丝帽子，躺下以后迅速地睡着了。你不禁疑惑，拥有如此强悍的入睡能力，这是否意味着他平日里对塞纳托斯的「称颂」真的起了效果？

Avilius puts on the special hat made from thin copper strands, and lay down before quickly falling asleep. Seeing how little effort it takes him to fall asleep, you can't help but wonder if this is the effect of his usual praises for Thanatos.
一种嫉妒的心情在你的心头蔓延开来。考虑到自己这个时不时废寝忘食的大忙人不可能真陪他在这里虚耗时间，你给那位「提灯找人」老师发个了「快来照顾这个傻子」的消息，然后就迅速离开了。

A hint of jealousy begins spreading within you. You're so busy that you sometimes don't even have time to eat or sleep, so why are you wasting your time here? You send a message to Scholar Light-Hunter to "come and look after this idiot" before swiftly making an exit.
哎呀，这不是{NICKNAME}嘛！这下可巧了，正好正好，我的老师、还有老师的老师，都和你介绍一下！
Ah, isn't this {NICKNAME}! What a coincidence! Perfect timing — let me introduce you to my teacher and my teacher's teacher!
这位安提基色拉人，就是我老师的老师，来古士老师。在整个奥赫玛，能流利诵读古泰坦语的学者，也只有他一人而已。
This is my teacher's teacher, the Antikytheran scholar, Mr. Lygus. He's the only one in all of Okhema who can fluently recite ancient Titan texts.
恩维尔同学谬赞了。只是安提基色拉人天然擅长记住各种零碎的知识，所以能帮助奥赫玛做一些力所能及的工作。
Avilius, you flatter me. Antikytherans are naturally good at remembering bits and pieces of knowledge, so I simply assist Okhema in ways I can.
It's a pleasure to meet you, Lygus...
很高兴认识你{NICKNAME}，想必我们将来会有更多的缘分。
Pleased to meet you too, {NICKNAME}. I'm sure we'll cross paths more often in the future.
没错，{NICKNAME}与我见过面的。切莫惊奇，我只是个古泰坦语爱好者罢了。
Indeed, {NICKNAME} and I have met before. Don't be surprised. I'm just an enthusiast of ancient Titan language, nothing more.
顺便，我就是在传信石版上那位「老师」，帮你解读「黄金替罪羊」所含信息的人。
By the way, I'm the teacher mentioned on the teleslate, the one who helped you decipher the information about the "Golden Scapegoat."
哦对对对，正式介绍一下，这位第欧根娜小姐就是传信石版上的「提灯找人」老师，成功翻译出<unbreak>20</unbreak>段《黄金替罪羊的呓语》的天才少女学者！

Oh right, let me formally introduce this young lady — Miss Diogena, the "Light-Hunter" mentioned on the teleslate. She's a brilliant scholar who translated 20 passages in Golden Scapegoat's Mutterings!
…你说话怎么越来越离谱了。算起来，这好像还是我们第一次在正式场合见面啊，{NICKNAME}。
...What you're saying is getting more and more exaggerated. Come to think of it, I believe this is the first time we've officially met, {NICKNAME}.
看来大家聊得很投机呢，不错不错。寒暄就聊到这里，让我们言归正传吧。
It seems everyone is enjoying the conversation. Good, good. Let's cut the small talk and get to the point.
— Excuse me, may I borrow a "head"?
Will a pinhead do the work?
Not really. My head is just not in the game.
...It got dark all of a sudden.
啊，您误会了…我是说「艾吉克拉尼翁」——您从「黄金替罪羊」那里收获的羊头。
Ah, it's nothing like that. I meant Aegikranion — the ram's head you recovered from the "Golden Scapegoat."
如您所见，这两面炫耀狩猎成果的标本墙稍显空旷。就在去年的例行粉刷中，终于被那位凯妮斯大人下令弃置了。
As you can see, the two trophy walls showcasing hunting achievements are looking a bit sparse. During last year's routine repainting, Lady Caenis ordered to have them removed.
而在下是个恋旧的人，颇不习惯这面墙就此空出…正好，第欧根娜和我说起了你们调查「黄金替罪羊」的活动——
But I'm quite sentimental and dislike leaving the walls empty... So, when Diogena mentioned your investigation of the "Golden Scapegoat" —
在下就想，你们的战利品好像正适合在这里展出？放心，作为回报，我也会协助你们，一同解读那些疑似来自遥远时代的神秘信息。
I thought your trophies might be perfect for display here. Don't worry, in return, I'll assist you in decoding the mysterious information that seems to come from a distant era.
真的吗？这可真是如虎添翼啊！{NICKNAME}，考虑一下？
Really? That would be a huge help! {NICKNAME}, what do you think?
I don't see any problem with that.
那真是太好了。不如先借我<unbreak>14</unbreak>个如何？每天两两一换，既可以轮流展示，也有足够的数量在手头研究。
That's fantastic! How about lending me <unbreak>14</unbreak> trophies? We can swap out two each day — it'll keep the exhibits fresh while ensuring I have enough for research.
那么，这些是我代表元老院向您支付的展品租借费用，请收好。
Here's the payment I'm making on behalf of Council of Elders for borrowing the exhibits. Please accept it.
No way, I'm not taking a loss here.
哈哈，既然是代表元老院，租借展品所需费用，我当然会如数奉上。
Haha, since it's the Council of Elders, I'll pay the full fee for borrowing the exhibits.
那么，就借我<unbreak>14</unbreak>个如何？每天两两一换，既可以轮流展示，也有足够的数量在手头研究。
In that case, how about lending me <unbreak>14</unbreak> trophies? We can swap out two each day — it'll keep the exhibits fresh while ensuring I have enough for research.
嗯，效果不错。那么，在下会尽快着手解读手里这些战利品了。
Alright, that works well. I'll get started on analyzing these trophies right away.
太谢谢您了，来古士老师！
Thank you so much, Mr. Lygus!
别急着谢我，哦…对了，虽然这话说出来多少显得对树庭缺乏尊重，不过——
Don't thank me just yet. Oh, by the way... though I mean no disrespect to the Grove... but—
{NICKNAME}阁下，您可否帮我借树庭的「瑟希斯之心」一用？
{NICKNAME}, could you help me borrow the "Heart of Cerces" from the Grove?
可是…{F#她}{M#他}甚至不是树庭的学生…再说那个心，比人大多了……
But... {F#she}{M#he} isn't even a student of the Grove... Besides, that heart is much bigger than a person...
哈哈，我当然不是让{NICKNAME}阁下搬走它——
Haha, of course I'm not asking {NICKNAME} to move it physically—
{NICKNAME}阁下，请收好这件小装置。如果您有空路过树庭，可以在「瑟希斯之心」晶体的下方找到一个小小的插口——刚好符合插入这件装置的规格。
{NICKNAME}, please take this little device. If you pass through the Grove, you'll find a small slot under the "Heart of Cerces" crystal. This device should fit perfectly.
您只要将此装置插入其中，略等片刻，让绿灯变成红灯，「瑟希斯之心」就可以对各位之前的翻译结果做一次校对，看看我们的研究出发点是否有所偏颇。
Just insert this device into the slot and wait a moment. Once the green light turns red, the "Heart of Cerces" will check our previous translations to see if there were any biases in our research.
如果一切顺利…今后我们就可以进一步利用它的算力来解析「黄金替罪羊」之谜。
If all goes well... we might even be able to leverage its computational power to further analyze the mystery of the "Golden Scapegoat."
哇！不过，树庭真的会同意让我们……？
Wow! But... will the Grove really let us...?
恩维尔。树庭…不久前遭遇了黑潮的袭击……
Avilius. The Grove... it was recently attacked by the black tide...
抱歉…愿{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}赐予他们平静的安眠。
My condolences... May {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} grant them eternal peace.
恩维尔少见地长叹一声。
Avilius sighed deeply, an unusual gesture for him.
利用「瑟希斯之心」核对我们研究成果的事就拜托你了，{NICKNAME}。
I'll leave the task of verifying our research with the "Heart of Cerces" in your hands, {NICKNAME}.
将机械插入「瑟希斯之心」后，它上面亮起了一盏类似发光二极管的小小绿灯。按来古士的说法，接下来只要「略等片刻」即可……
After inserting the device into the "Heart of Cerces," a small LED-like green light flickers on. According to Lygus, all that's left to do now is to "wait a little while..."
绿灯的确变成了红灯。只是除此之外，你也感受不到任何其他的变化。看来，只有来古士本人才能对结果加以解析……
The green light indeed turned red. Other than that, you couldn't sense any changes. It seems only Lygus can interpret the results...
哦？看来「瑟希斯之心」已经帮我们计算出了结果？
Oh? It seems the "Heart of Cerces" has completed the calculations for us?
At least the green light turned red.
感谢阁下。请稍等，我可以把它插入自己的身体，读取计算结果。
Thank you so much. Please wait a moment. I'll plug it into my system to read the results.
抱歉…事情好像并不顺利。
Apologies... it seems something has gone wrong.
万万没想到，竟然有人对「瑟希斯之心」动过手脚。这么说吧——「瑟希斯之心」为我们计算出的结果，是一片空白。
Unbelievable... Someone has tampered with the "Heart of Cerces." Let me put it this way — what it calculated for us was... nothing.
…后续我们还能不能从{RUBY_B#羊头战利品}「艾吉克拉尼翁」{RUBY_E#}当中解读出新的信息，或许都很难说了。
...At this rate, whether we can uncover any new information from {RUBY_B#ram-head treasure}Aegikranion{RUBY_E#} remains uncertain.
Is this also a result of the black tide?
Who would do such a thing?
不知道。但按照有限的情报推断，最有可能的…是那个毁灭树庭的恐怖剑士。除了那缺乏理智的黑潮怪物，没人会故意去毁坏「瑟希斯之心」。

I'm not sure. But based on the limited information we have, the most likely culprit is the terrifying swordmaster who destroyed the Grove. Other than the mindless monsters of the black tide, no one else would deliberately damage the "Heart of Cerces."
没有理智的怪物…能做到这样的事情？
Mindless monsters... capable of doing something like this?
不好说。也许这同样是黑潮的某种机制…比如那剑士或怪物只是随便摸了摸「瑟希斯之心」，就可以造成这种破坏性的效果。
Hard to say. Maybe it's just another mechanism of the black tide. For instance, the swordmaster or the monsters might have only brushed against the "Heart of Cerces," yet caused this level of damage.
抱歉，在下不仅没有帮到你们，反而把事情搞砸了。
I'm sorry. Instead of helping, I seem to have made things worse.
感谢阁下的宽宏大量。无论如何，在下还是会为后续的标本支付租借费用。
Thank you for your understanding. Regardless, I will still cover the borrowing costs for the remaining specimens as compensation.
You've had me running errands for nothing!
阁下批评得是。的确是在下弄巧成拙。无论如何，在下还是会为后续的标本支付租借费用，以此聊作补偿。
Your criticism is valid. I had truly messed this up. Even so, I'll ensure the borrowing fees for the remaining specimens are covered as a small gesture of apology.
就像第欧根娜所质疑的，在下也不认为那位恐怖剑士拥有此等算计。只不过……
Just like Diogena's doubts, I also don't think that terrifying swordmaster is capable of such calculated actions. But still...
从某种意义上说，黑潮和那位恐怖剑士，这些都是只是明面上的敌人。它们或许都只是现象。某种由世界真正的威胁所连带产生的现象。
In a way, the black tide and that swordmaster are just threats on the surface. They might be symptoms of a greater danger looming over the world.
在发现新的手段之前，我们的解密之旅恐怕要到此为止了。很遗憾没能帮助阁下解明「黄金替罪羊」背后的秘辛。
Until we discover new methods, it seems our journey of decryption has reached its end. I regret not being able to help you uncover the secrets behind the "Golden Scapegoat."
Are you unwilling to let this go?
在下听说，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}偶尔会说出善意的谎言——比如说，有时候人们的行动不符合预言，过早地逼近了某些真相。
I've heard stories about {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}. Sometimes they speak kind lies — like when people's actions veer too close to a truth that wasn't meant to be uncovered.
每当学生的研究陷入瓶颈的时候，我都会这么宽慰他们。
That's how I tell my students whenever they hit a roadblock in their research.
{NICKNAME}阁下…我相信，这些话对你也拥有类似的价值。您不妨告诉自己——
{NICKNAME}, I believe these words hold value for you as well. Perhaps you should tell yourself—
是某位看不见的「世界的守护者」抹去了那些数据。仅此而已。
Some unseen "Guardian of the World" erased those results. And that's all there is to it.
唉，来古士爷爷总是这样，一旦对事情失去了兴趣，就不再关注它了。不过，如果你还有更多的战利品，还是可以交给我。
*sigh* Mr. Lygus is always like this. The moment he loses interest in something, he completely ignores it. Anyway, if you have more trophies, feel free to hand them over to me.
唔，储备的战利品超过了7个呢。很好，再帮你挂一个上去吧。
Oh, you've gathered more than seven trophies? Perfect, let me add another to the display.
第欧根娜找来帮手把新的战利品展示在标本墙上。
Diogena enlisted help to mount the new trophy on the specimen wall.
好的，我收到了。按来古士爷爷之前的规矩，七个凑一组才好轮展。这次还没凑够，我就先不帮你挂上去了哦？
Alright, got it. But according to Mr. Lygus's rules, trophies should be grouped in sets of seven for proper rotation. Since you don't have enough yet, I won't hang this one up for now.
说起来。之前来古士爷爷的说法，让我产生了一种感觉——
You know, Mr. Lygus's earlier remarks gave me a certain impression—
也许我们翻译出的《黄金替罪羊的呓语》，就和那个毁灭树庭的剑士有关？意味着那个人的某种过去？
Maybe our translations of Golden Scapegoat's Mutterings are somehow connected to the swordmaster who destroyed the Grove? Could they reflect something from that person's past?
对吧？只可惜我们没有任何证据。
Right? Too bad we don't have any evidence.
难讲，毕竟没有任何证据。
Hard to say. Without evidence, it's just speculation.
…唉，就像之前我告诫恩维尔的那样，光靠猜测还是解决不了问题啊。
*sigh* Just like I reminded Avilius earlier, speculation alone won't solve anything.
前面的那块大晶体…「瑟希斯之心」就在这里。
That big crystal up ahead... That's the "Heart of Cerces."
经历过许多轮回的冒险，你应该不会对一只会吐出机械音的羊头感到奇怪。
After countless cycles of adventure, surely you won't be surprised by a goat's head speaking in mechanical tones.
我是最初且最后的替罪羊。8是一个神圣的数字：你可以用8个战利品在我这里换到额外一步的机会。
I am the first and the final scapegoat. Eight is a sacred number: with 8 trophies, you may trade for one extra step here.
把那些和我长得一样的战利品都贡献给我。我将帮助你赢取最终的胜利。
Bring me the trophies that bear my likeness, and I shall aid you in claiming your ultimate victory.
Light Slips the Gate, Shadow Greets the Throne
Through the Petals in the Land of Repose
For the Sun is Set to Die
去获得来自天外的步数吧…它将助你赢取最终的胜利。
Go get those moves from beyond the sky... They will help you achieve ultimate victory.
「拾起一根羽毛，就能想象出鸟的声音；所以一根羽毛就是一只唱歌的鸟。」
"Pick up a feather, and you can imagine a bird's song. Therefore, a single feather is a singing bird."
构造出我的人说，他希望你喜欢这句话——虽然这不是他的创作。他还说，我应该问你，你是否想知道他的名字——因为你可能会不喜欢。
The one who built me said he hoped you'd enjoy this line, though it was not his own. He also said I should ask if you wish to know his name... for you may not like it.
Do you wish to know his name?
「吕枯耳戈斯」。如果你不喜欢这个名字，我对此表示抱歉。
"Lycurgus." If that name displeases you, I apologize.
我想，这确实是更正确的选择。
I think that is, indeed, the wiser choice.
「黄金替罪羊」的记录就到此为止了。再见。
Thus ends the record of the Golden Scapegoat. Farewell.
你从树洞中滑到了下层……
You slip through a hollow in the tree and descend to the lower level...
神奇的气流将你带到了上层……
A strange current of air lifts you up to the higher level...
错认了？的确，我从未在殿内见过你…圣殿把守严密，你是如何进到这里的？
Someone else? Indeed, I've never seen you in the sanctum before... The temple is well-guarded. How did you manage to get in?
…等等，我好像没在殿内见过你？圣殿把守严密，你是如何进到这里的？
Wait, I've never seen you in the sanctum before... The temple is well-guarded. How did you manage to get in?
也或许…是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}给出的许可。请问，你对这墙上的装置可有了解？
Or perhaps... it's a sign of permission granted by {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}. Tell me, do you know anything about the mechanism on this wall?
门径的禁制居然没拦住你，并且…将庞杂的溯寻推演称作玩乐，或许你就是我要找的人。
The containment mechanism didn't stop you, and you even call the intricate extrapolating process a game... Perhaps you're exactly the person I've been looking for.
这话可不能乱说啊…不过，居然连内情都有所掌握，或许你就是我要找的人。
That's not something you should say lightly. Still, if you're privy to such details, perhaps you really are the one I need.
这器物名为「雅努斯迷津」，是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}的卜筮用具，用它可溯寻一切事物的所在地。本月的委托积压了许多，该来的辅祭却杳无音信。而你恰好在此时现身……

This device is called Janus' Maze, a divination tool of the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}. It can trace the location of anything. There's a backlog of requests this month, and the acolyte meant to handle them is nowhere to be found. And now you appear...
理解力不错。不觉得这就是命运泰坦们的安排吗？放心，报酬少不了你的。
That's some quick understanding. Don't you think this is the arrangement of the Fate Titans? Don't worry, you'll be well-compensated.
I have other things to do...
无妨，若是什么时候有兴趣了，回来找我就行。
That's fine. If you ever feel interested, come back and find me.
来，百闻不如一试，去迷津前就位吧。我用简单的问询作为样例，让你先熟悉下。
Now, let's give it a try. Stand in front of the Maze. I'll use a simple question as an example to get you familiar.
{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}啊，请指引我们——「我昨日留存的小甜饼现在何处？」
O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us — "Where is the cookie I saved yesterday?"
The Maze has been revealed. I'll leave it to you.
来得太迟了，辅祭，迅速就位。还有数个失物委托，正等候被溯寻。
You're late, acolyte. Quickly, take your position. Several lost-item requests are still waiting to be traced.
You must have mistaken me for someone else.
你果然有天赋。这便是迷津的推演流程，提出问题，推演路径，得到解答。而我要做的，是将路径化作文法，呈现在石板上，且看——
You've got talent. This is how the extrapolation works: Pose a question, deduce the path, and find the answer. My job is to transcribe the path into text on the slate. Let's see —
…婆婆的甜饼可是连先代圣女都赞叹不已的美味，我本想留到日后慢慢享用的…过后我要去找那个祭司算账。
...That grandma's cookies are a delicacy even the former Holy Maiden praised. I was saving them to enjoy later... Now I'll need to have a strong word with that priest.
趁热打铁，我们再做一次练习，这次就来测算——「真正的辅祭身在何处？」
Let's try another practice. This time, let's trace — "Where is the true acolyte?"
{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}啊，请指引我们——
O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us —
The Maze has been revealed. I'll leave it to you.
不错，溯寻顺利完成了，我们来看看结果吧。
Excellent, the extrapolation is complete. Let's see the result.
…{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}在上，我宣布，辅祭的职位出现了空缺，而你得到了它，恭喜你。
...{RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} above! I declare the acolyte position vacant. Congratulations, you're now appointed.
你已经完全理解「雅努斯迷津」的机制了，现在，是时候处理一些真正的委托了，我瞧瞧……
You've mastered the mechanism of Janus' Maze. It's time to tackle real requests. Let me check...
来自信徒丝西涅——「我父亲的智力去哪里了？」
From a follower named Siphone — "Where has my father's intelligence gone?"
…很遗憾，我认识这位信徒，她的父亲确实年迈而思维阻滞，但若是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}，将其寻回或也并非妄言。就位吧，辅祭。

...Unfortunately, I know this follower. Her father is indeed elderly and mentally diminished. But if the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#} wills it, recovering the father's intellect may not be impossible. Take your position, acolyte.
{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}啊，请指引我们——
O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us —
The Maze has been revealed. I'll leave it to you.
做得好，辅祭，这是你值得纪念的第一个委托，来看看拓写出的结果吧。
Well done, acolyte. This is your first request, a notable occasion. Let's see the transcription.
…这肯定不是委托人想要的答案。幸好，先前出现类似状况时，我研究过补救方法。只需细化问题后再次提问即可。由我来……
This surely isn't the answer the client wants. Luckily, I've studied remedial methods for such cases. By refining the question and asking again, we may get a better result. Allow me —
{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}，请指引我们——「信徒丝西涅的父亲，其脑中的学识飞去了何处？」
O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us — "Where has the knowledge in Siphone's father's mind flown to?"
好了，再试一次吧，辅祭。随着问题的深入，溯寻会变得更困难，但我相信，你能顺利解决的。
All right, try again, acolyte. As the question deepens, the extrapolation becomes more complex, but I believe you can manage.
你已经融会贯通了，辅祭。我在拓写时便能感知到，这次的预兆更加清晰，让我们看看。
You've fully grasped it, acolyte. I can sense it in the transcription — this omen is clearer. Let's see.
看来，即使动用{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的权能，对于不复存在之物，也只能言尽于此了…但我有种预感，这个结果或许不算太差。
It seems that even with {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s power, what no longer exists cannot be entirely restored. Yet, I have a feeling this outcome may not be as bad as it seems.
辅祭，把这石板拿去交给委托人吧，她就在楼下。
Acolyte, take this slate to the client. She's just downstairs.
辅祭，把这石板拿去交给委托人吧，她就在楼下。
Acolyte, take this slate to the client. She's just downstairs.
我来交付雅努斯的神谕。
I've come to deliver Janus's prophecy.
啊，原来是祭司大人！家父已经失智许久了，请告诉我，在哪里能寻回他的智慧？
Ah, you're the priest! My father has been senile for a long time now. Please, tell me, where can I find his wisdom?
原来…如此。{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}在上，请接受我的谢意。
So... this is the answer. {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, I offer you my gratitude.
祭司大人，您有所不知。家父在因身体欠佳而长休前，曾是一位著名的讲师，教导过的门生不计其数。
Priest, you might not know this, but my father was a renowned lecturer who taught countless students before retiring due to poor health.
而{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的回应，毫无疑问是在点醒愚笨的我，父亲的学识早已在世间各处开花结果…他是位伟大的人。
And {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s response is undoubtedly reminding me that my father's wisdom has long taken root all over the world through his students... He was a great man.
无论如何，赞美{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，也感谢您的付出。我打算联系他的学生，或许见见老面孔，能让他的症状得到改善。请收下这些吧，谨以表达我的谢意。

In any case, praise {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, and thank you for your efforts. I plan to contact his students — perhaps meeting some old faces might help improve his condition. Please accept this as a token of my gratitude.
对报酬还满意吗？我们继续吧。
Are you satisfied with the reward? Let's continue.
接下来的委托…来自一位守城的卫士，内容是——「我的真爱该在何处」。
The next request comes from a city guard. The content is — "Where is my true love?"
…实话说，我也没有太大把握。情爱相关理应依靠墨涅塔的权能…总之，相信伟大的{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，先试试看吧。

To be honest, I'm not entirely confident about it either. Matters of love should ideally fall under the domain of Mnestia. Still, let's trust the great {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} and give it a try.
恐怕不是这个意思…就我所知，这位卫兵始终是单身。这是求缘求错泰坦，求到{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}来了…也罢，相信伟大的{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，先试试看吧。

I don't think so... As far as I know, this guard has always been single. It seems they sought love from the wrong Titan and ended up at {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s temple. No matter, let's trust in the great {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} and proceed.
{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}，请指引我们——
O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us —
迷津展露了。完成你的工作吧，辅祭。
The Maze has been revealed. Do your job, acolyte.
你越来越娴熟了，辅祭，有兴趣在圣殿正式就职吗？先来看看石板上的结果吧。
You're getting better at this, acolyte. Have you considered formally joining the temple? First, let's look at the results on the slate.
不出意外，需要继续追问才能得到解答。伟大的{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，请赐予信徒更详尽的指示——
As expected, we'll need to refine the question for a clearer answer. Great {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, please grant our follower more detailed guidance —
I'll leave it to you, acolyte.
如此精确的指示，想必那位信徒应该能满意…石板托付于你了，去交给他吧。
Such precise directions — surely this will satisfy the follower. The slate is yours to deliver.
辅祭，石板托付于你了，去交给那位卫兵吧。
Acolyte, please deliver the slate to that guard.
我来交付雅努斯的神谕。
I've come to deliver Janus's prophecy.
噢噢！感谢阁下！第十次的委托，终于有所回应了！请让我拜领神谕！
Oh! Thank you, great one! This is the tenth time I've submitted a request, and finally, there's an answer! Please, let me receive the prophecy!
<unbreak>177</unbreak>号房…不不不，那是我老朋友的住处，我连她的脸都看腻了。我们之间绝对没可能。
Room <unbreak>177</unbreak>... No, no, that's my old friend's place. I've seen her face too often. There's no way it's her!
可泰坦的神谕绝不会出错，可她，我、我应该…如何是好啊！
But the Titan's prophecy cannot be wrong. Yet... she... What... What should I do!?
这位虔诚的卫兵估计要烦恼好一阵了，据说妨碍恋爱的人会被大地兽踢，还是悄悄离开吧。
This devout guard is likely to stew over this for a while. They say interfering in love can get you kicked by a dromas, so let's quietly slip away.
接下来是积压委托中的最后一件，也是唯一一件因报酬不足，且推演过于繁琐而被其他祭司放弃的委托。
Now for the final request in the backlog. This is the only request that the other priests abandoned due to insufficient pay and excessive complexity.
委托人是一位孩童，虔诚的信徒潘，内容是——「妈妈的灵魂在哪」。
The request comes from a child — a devout follower named Pam — and it reads: "Where is my mother's soul?"
Can we ever find a soul?
伟大的{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，万千道路的化身啊！我们请求您的指引！
Great {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, embodiment of countless ways! We seek your guidance!
I'll leave it to you, acolyte.
不出所料，冥界…塞纳托斯的领域。再合理不过的解答。
As expected... The nether realm — Thanatos' domain. A perfectly reasonable answer.
Should we just tell the child this?
{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}，请指引我们——「冥界究竟在何处？」
O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us — "Where exactly is the nether realm"?
原谅我的自作主张，辅祭。但我…也希望能得到答案。交给你了。
Forgive my presumption, acolyte. But I... I also wish to know. Your turn.
预示出现了变化，但这究竟……？
The omen has changed, but what does it mean...?
我想，我们还需要一次推演，这会是最后一次了。
I think we need one final extrapolation. This will be the last attempt.
{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}，请指引我们——「您的虔诚信徒潘，她母亲所在的冥界究竟在何处？」
O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us — "Where exactly is the nether realm where Pam's mother resides"?
去吧，辅祭，为委托画上结束符。
Go, acolyte, and bring closure to this request.
Are you ready to see the answer?
…对同一个问题的推演，三次便是极限，无论如何，我们已经尽力了。
Three attempts are the limit for a single question. No matter what, we've done our best.
辅祭…能麻烦你把这石板交给那孩子吗？我在这等你。
Acolyte... Could you deliver this slate to the child? I'll wait here for you.
I'll be on my way then.
愿门径…指引我们的方向。
Oh, may the Passage guide us.
辅祭，石板托付于你了，去交给那个孩子吧。愿门径…指引我们的方向。
Acolyte, please deliver the slate to that child. May the Passage guide us.
我来交付雅努斯的神谕。
I've come to deliver Janus's prophecy.
…布？心？我知道了！是上衣口袋里面，妈妈给我做的护身符！妈妈的灵魂就在里面吗？
A cloth? A heart? I understand now! It's the amulet in my jacket pocket — the one Mom made for me! Is my mom's soul inside?
孩子拿出布袋，用力撕扯起来。很快你们发现，绸布的内壁上写着些文字。
The child pulls out the pouch and begins to tear it apart. Before long, you both notice writing on the inner silk lining.
「亲爱的潘：无论我们相距多远，妈妈都会永远陪在你的身边。」
"Dear Pam: No matter how far apart we are, Mom will always be with you."
谢谢你，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！我回家去了，我要把护身符缝好！妈妈教过我了！下次见吧！
Thank you, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}! I'm going home to sew this amulet back together! Mom taught me how! See you next time!
You're back... How did it go?
你将刚刚发生的事告诉了祭司……
You recount the events to the priest...
辅祭，虽说我先前推荐你来圣殿就职，实际上，这并不是份好差事。祭司的生活枯燥乏味，还常要与愚昧贪腐之人同流合污，我实在不愿在此久留……

Acolyte, though I've previously recommended you for a position in the temple, truthfully, it's not a great career. A priest's life is dull and monotonous, often involving dealing with ignorance and corruption. I've no desire to linger here longer than necessary.
但…接触人们的信仰时，总会有那么几件事，能让我暂时忘掉那些烦闷，全身心投入到职务中去，这些委托便是如此。
But... when interacting with people's faith, there are always a few moments that make me forget those frustrations and immerse myself in my duties. These requests were such moments.
辛苦了，辅祭。如此一来，积压的委托就全数完成了，去命运泰坦前称颂自己的美德吧，这是你应得的。
Great work, acolyte. Now that all the backlog has been completed, go to the Fate Titans and extol your virtues — you've earned it.
另外，还有些许旧卷遗存，多是无主无名的条目，没有报酬，难度极高。若能将它们解决，也称得上是祭司的荣光…感兴趣的话就来找我吧。

Additionally, there are a few old scrolls left, mostly unidentified and masterless entries, offering no rewards and posing significant difficulty. Resolving them would truly be a priest's glory. If you're interested, come find me.
…愿你的前路明晰，辅祭。门径会永远为你敞开。
...May your path be clear, acolyte. The Passage will always remain open to you.
迷津已经展露。去溯寻吧，辅祭，我会记录下推演的结果。
The Maze has been revealed. Go trace it, acolyte. I'll record the results of the divination.
瞧瞧谁来了？你的气色不错，辅祭，来找我是有什么事吗？
Well, look who's here! You look great, acolyte. What brings you to me today?
我要挑战高难度的旧卷！
I want to tackle the challenging old scrolls!
我就猜你会感兴趣。选一卷吧。
I knew you'd be interested. Choose one.
金卷的问题是——「丢失的一千万利衡币在何处」，让我布置一下……
Its question is — "Where is my lost ten million Balance Coins?" Let me set the ceremony up...
银卷的问题是——「一切事物的答案在何处」，让我布置一下……
Its question is — "Where is the answer to everything?" Let me set the ceremony up...
白卷的问题是——「我想找的东西在何处」，让我布置一下……
Its question is — "Where is the thing I'm looking for?" Let me set the ceremony up...
迷津已经展露。去吧，辅祭。
The Maze has been revealed. Go ahead, acolyte.
I'm here for a little chat.
当然可以，我面前站着一位见多识广的辅祭，想必聊多久都不会无聊。
Of course! It is fascinating talking to a well-traveled individual such as yourself, no matter how long we chat.
能够溯寻一切事物的卜筮器具，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的伟大权能…类似的称号还有很多，就不一一列举了，这是「迷津」在世人眼中的形象。

The divination tool capable of extrapolating all things, the great power of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}... it has many such titles, so I won't list them all. This is how the world sees the "Maze."
而作为祭司，我们的了解会比民众更深入，比如，「迷津」的形制模拟了雅努斯于门径中穿行的行为，它的历史甚至要比这命运三相殿本身还要久远，等等。
As priests, however, we understand it on a deeper level. For instance, the Maze's structure simulates Janus traversing the Passage, and its history predates even the Temple of the Three Fates.
若是你对卜筮的历程感兴趣，不如浏览一下这里的书架，能找到过去迷津溯寻的记录册——虽然多半都是重复且无意义的委托。
If you're interested in the history of divination, feel free to browse the bookshelves here. You'll find records of past Maze extrapolations — though most are repetitive and trivial requests.
你在卜筮时具体做什么？
What exactly do you do during divination?
我是「执笔人」。每次推演后，你所见到的石板，都是石笔自行移动勾勒而出的，而此期间需要由执笔人来握持。
I'm the "scribe." Each time an extrapolation concludes, the slate you see is etched by the self-moving stone stylus, but someone must hold it throughout the process.
这份工作至关重要，推演时，执笔者必须维持全神贯注的状态，否则不但会影响溯寻的结果，还可能令仪式本身变得意外频频。

This task is crucial. During extrapolation, the scribe must maintain unwavering focus. Otherwise, not only will the results be affected, but the ceremony itself might become fraught with unexpected issues.
如果你对这一职务感兴趣，建议搬来殿内居住，我会手把手教你。不出六十个光历年，我想便能入门了。
If you're interested in this role, I suggest moving into the temple. I'll teach you myself, and within sixty Light Calendar years, you'll be well on your way to mastering it.
I'd like to ask the Maze a question myself.
哦？辅祭也有欲寻之物？当然可以。你知道的，提出委托本应经过层层审批——
Oh? Does the acolyte also have something to seek? Of course, you know that submitting a request usually requires several approvals —
但无需担心，这些琐碎步骤就全都简省吧，以辅祭的贡献，我倒要看看谁有意见。所以，你想问些什么？
But no need to worry. We'll skip those tedious steps. With your contributions, I'd like to see who'd dare object. So, what would you like to ask?
让我们来看看。{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}，请指引我们——
Let's see. O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us —
这…{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}并未给出推演的流程？数百个光历年来可从未发生过啊！
What? {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} has not provided the extrapolation process? This hasn't occurred for hundreds of Light Calendar years!
看来铁路不归雅努斯管。
It seems the railways lie beyond Janus's domain.
居然还有这种事，我开始好奇辅祭你的来历了…但别灰心，命运泰坦们并没有否定你的寻求，我相信，将来某日，你一定会得知它的所在。
Unbelievable! I'm growing curious about your origins, acolyte. But don't lose heart — the Fate Titans have not denied your pursuit. I'm sure you'll find your answers one day.
嗯…愿你的前路明晰，辅祭。门径会永远为你敞开。
Hmm... May your path be clear, acolyte. The Passage will always remain open to you.
嗯…愿你的前路明晰，辅祭。门径会永远为你敞开。
Hmm... May your path be clear, acolyte. The Passage will always remain open to you.
推演完成了，拿去吧，这是拓有结论的石板。
The extrapolation is complete. Here, take it — this slate bears the conclusion.
I want to replay the maze!
呵，会把推演当做游乐的，寻遍这雅努萨波利斯，也就辅祭你一人了。好在欧洛尼斯也身在三相殿中，借助它的权能，溯回记忆中的迷津不成问题，只是——

Ha, treating divination as amusement — among all of Janusopolis, you're the only acolyte who would do so. Fortunately, Oronyx resides within the Temple of the Three Fates, and with their authority, retracing the labyrinth of memories should be no issue. However —
我不是欧洛尼斯祭司，没法控制它具体回到哪一个委托的状态。若是腻了，不妨再来找我换一个——这方法是我偷偷跟岁月祭司学来的，你可别往外说啊。

I am no priest of Oronyx, so I can't precisely control which state of a request we return to. If you tire of it, feel free to come back and ask me to change it. This trick? I secretly learned it from the Priest of Time, so don't go spreading it around, okay?
「欧洛尼斯，我呼唤你！——激起往西的涟漪！」
"Oronyx, I summon thee! Stir up ripples of past referee!"
每次念祷言都感觉怪怪的，为什么一定要往西呢？
It feels odd every time I recite the chant. Why does it need a referee?
I want to replay the maze!
腻了？那我们就换一个。「——激起往西的涟漪！」每次念祷言都感觉怪怪的，为什么一定要往西呢？
Bored already? Let's change another one. "Stir up ripples of past referee!" It feels odd every time I recite the chant. Why does it need a referee?
球还在原位，但若虫不在。上面有一行小字——「我先去吃个饭，等会回来」
The iron ball hasn't moved, but the nymph has disappeared. A tiny message on the ball says: "Taking a lunch break, be right back"
你被旋转的铁球砸晕了——
You got knocked out by a spinning iron ball—
你仿佛听见有虫子鸣叫着「好砸，好砸」。
You seemingly hear a bug chirping, "Nice hit, nice hit."
就算是虫子也该分清有些话可以说，有些话不可以说啊！
Even bugs should know when to keep their mouths shut!
哗啦啦？！居然躲过了我的铁球？
*whoosh* You actually dodged my iron ball?
哗啦…也许你只是亡魂？大铁球从你身上穿过去了。原来如此，我逐渐理解了一切。
*whoosh* Or maybe you're just a ghost? The iron ball passed right through you. I see, it's all starting to make sense now.
Is that the corpse of a bug talking?
我用球棒帮你加深理解。
Let me help you understand with my bat.
唔，对不起对不起。都怪我这大发声器官，太久没和真人交流，「说都不会话」了…嘿嘿。既然是活人，我就不该拦你了——上面有宝物，快上去看看吧！

Uh, sorry, sorry. It's all my fault — this loud mouth of mine. It's been so long since I've talked to a real person, I barely remember how to speak... Hehe. Since you're alive, I shouldn't stop you — there's treasure up there, go take a look!
哗啦~欢迎来到迷阵屋子。对这些球熟悉吗？只要借助{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的力量让它们落到洞内——
*whoosh* Welcome to the maze house. Are you familiar with these balls? Just use the power of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} to get them into the holes—
——坏啦！太久没看见活人，我都忘了确认了…你应该会用欧洛尼斯祷言吧？
—Uh oh! It's been so long since I've seen a living person, I forgot to check... You know how to use the Oronyx's Prayer, right?
哗啦，完蛋。我可教不了你。再见，很高兴认识你。
*whoosh* We're doomed. I can't teach you. Goodbye, it was nice meeting you.
Just kidding, I actually know how to use it.
没关系，就在刚才我悟了。
It's fine, I just figured it out.
吓死我了…我就说嘛，会用祷言又不是什么稀奇事。听好，只要让<color=#dbc291ff>所有的球都停在压力板上</color>，就算完成啦！
You almost got me... Anyway, using the prayer isn't such a big deal. Listen carefully, as long as you make <color=#dbc291ff>all the balls stop on the pressure plates</color>, it's done!
交给你啦，我就在这飞来飞去。哗啦啦——
It's up to you now, I'll be flying around here. *whoosh*
哗啦啦——为何欧洛尼斯的祭司要设置谜题，又为何将谜题留给未来的人呢？
*whoosh* Why did the priest of Oronyx set up a riddle, and why did he leave it for future generations?
他总是说让我耐心等，迟早会有人来解开这些「刻意」的谜题，我原本是不信的。直到你出现了，哗啦啦。
He always tells me to be patient, that sooner or later someone will come to solve these "deliberate" puzzles. I didn't believe it at first. Until you showed up. *whoosh*
瞧，我没骗你吧？这还只是一小部分，那位欧洛尼斯的老祭司还留下了两道谜题——
See? I wasn't lying. This is just a small part. The old priest of Oronyx left two more puzzles behind—
哗啦——好让人怀念的氛围，我有多久没回这里了？
*whoosh* Such a nostalgic atmosphere. How long has it been since I've been here?
为了谜题能够继续，不要走来时路，我们从另外一侧绕过去吧！
To keep the puzzle going, let's not take the same route back. We'll go around from the other side!
哗啦，让人想起了过往呢，但我不可以一直呆在过去的回忆中，我们继续吧。
*whoosh* It brings back memories. But I can't stay in the past forever. Let's move on.
Darn it, why is there another statue?
这…也是舞台装置做到的？
Is this... also part of the stage mechanism?
舞台装置？我不知道你在说什么，你说是就是吧。
Stage mechanism? I don't know what you're talking about, but if you say so, then sure.
记得那老祭司说过，谜题会随着岁月不断扩张…看来就是这么个意思了，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的祭司，厉害吧？
I remember the old priest saying that the puzzles would keep expanding over time... Looks like this is what he meant. The priest of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} — impressive, isn't it?
事不宜迟，我们开始吧！球的位置要记好哦！
No time to waste. Let's begin! Be sure to remember the position of the balls!
另外，<color=#dbc291ff>浮台现在还不会动</color>呢，不知道那边的祭器是不是和它有关。
Also, <color=#dbc291ff>the floating platform isn't moving yet</color>. Maybe it's connected to that ritual vessel over there.
想必这样的谜题也难不倒你吧，加油，哗啦啦——
I bet this puzzle won't stump you. Go for it! *whoosh*
你知道吗，曾经我也向往泰坦的伟力，直到我听说老祭司也记不起昨天是哪只脚先迈进的神殿，我就对{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的奇迹产生了怀疑。

You know, I once admired the power of the Titans — until I heard that the old priest couldn't even remember which foot stepped into the temple first yesterday. That's when I began doubting the miracles of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.
哗啦啦，好多东西呀。我都不知道，祭司居然收集了这么多稀奇古怪的东西吗？
*whoosh* Look at all this stuff! I had no idea the priest collected so many bizarre items.
那个人一直神神秘秘的。听说，这里除了存放着他一生的积蓄，他还把最重要的宝物也藏在了这里…就连陪着他时间最久的我都不知道是什么。
That person was always so mysterious. They say this place not only holds all his life savings, but also his most prized treasure... Even I, who spent the most time with him, don't know what it is.
好啦，接着解谜吧，我先飞回去等你，记得要绕回去哦？哗啦。
Alright, back to solving puzzles. I'll fly back and wait for you. Don't forget to circle back. *whoosh*
刚刚有个怪物差点坐浮台上来了，已经被我用大铁球撞进冥河里去啦。
A monster almost got onto the floating platform just now, but I knocked it into the River of Souls with a giant iron ball.
哗啦！怎么这么多东西啊！
*whoosh* Why is there so much stuff here!?
There are a total of one, two, three... three balls!
在那边的是…风口吗？虽然现在还没有打开，但是用风或许可以把球吹跑？
Is that... a wind vent over there? It's not active yet, but maybe we could use the wind to blow the balls away?
还有这满地的杂物…这么不想被人解开，肯定是最后的谜题了！解开它解开它，老祭司家就没有余粮啦。
And all this junk on the floor... If they didn't want anyone solving this, it must be the final puzzle! Solve it, and the old priest won't have any rations left!
唔，死去的祭司在念叨我——也可能是我对花粉过敏…明明我是只虫。
Ugh, the dead priest must be cursing me — or maybe I'm just allergic to pollen. Strange, since I'm an insect.
哗啦啦，好大的宝箱。恭喜你，大家伙！让我们瞧瞧，祭司他到底藏了什么东西，竟然连我都不给看……
*whoosh* That's a huge chest. Congratulations, big guy! Let's see what the priest hid inside that even I wasn't allowed to see...
This priest really knew you well.
哗啦！都离开这么久了，几句话就让我想起那些日子…说我顽皮的部分是他捏造的，让你产生误会了，不好意思哦，哗啦。
*whoosh* Even after all this time, a few words bring back those days... Sorry for the misunderstanding about me being mischievous. He made that up. My apologies. *whoosh*
Come, let's go to Okhema together.
我记得这里的衣匠应该是在……
If memory serves me right, the garmentmaker here should be...
哗啦啦…不不不，别听他的，我还没玩够呢。
*whoosh* No, no, no, don't listen to him! I'm not done playing yet.
而且，虽然我感觉到冥河水开始流动了，但是他的亡魂应该还没来得及离开。我想等他彻底去往冥界之后，我再离开这里……

Besides, even though I feel the water from River of Souls starting to flow, his soul likely hasn't left yet. I want to wait until he's completely moved on to the nether realm before I leave this place...
总之，你完成了我伙伴的遗愿，谢谢你啦！哗啦。那些利衡币你可得省着点花哦，别为了买什么奇怪的升值产品给赔光了，这可是他作为冒牌祭司的经验谈！

Anyway, you've fulfilled my companion's last wish. Thank you. *whoosh* And be sure to spend those Balance Coins wisely. Don't blow them on some weird "investment" product. That's advice from his experience as a phony priest!
你自己一只虫真的不要紧？
Are you sure you'll be okay on your own as just a bug?
没事没事，你也见到他写的了，我有大铁球呢！
No worries, no worries. You saw it written, right? I've got a giant iron ball!
再说了，我这么不起眼，也没有人会闲到到处去找虫子，对吧？
Besides, I'm so inconspicuous. Nobody would bother looking for a bug, right?
另外，偷偷告诉你…这个房间还有着<color=#dbc291ff>另一种特别的样貌</color>，我曾经偶然瞥见过它的幻影，连岁月的祭司都没能发现。
Oh, and just between you and me... This room has <color=#dbc291ff>another hidden form</color>. I once caught a glimpse of its phantom, something even the Priest of Time didn't discover.
能够使它显现的谜题已经在刚刚的房间里布置好了，但解答的方式好像和之前不一样。感觉<color=#dbc291ff>相关的线索压根就不在这两个房间里</color>……
The puzzle to reveal it is set up in the previous room, but the solution seems to differ from before. It feels like <color=#dbc291ff>the clues aren't even in these two rooms</color>...
要是你感兴趣，就自己去摸索摸索吧。我要去接着玩大铁球了！下次走路小心点嗷，哗啦啦~
If you're interested, explore it yourself. I'm going back to play with the iron ball! Watch your step next time. *whoosh*
顺便一说，你试过用球撞怪物吗？可好玩了！就像是你刚来的…啊不，我什么也没说。
By the way, have you tried using the ball to hit monsters? It's so fun! Just like when you first arrived... Oops, I didn't say anything.
我还给每个招式都起了名字，左旋球叫「电光石火」，右旋球叫「石破天惊」，直球叫「直球」。
I even named each move! The left spin is "Flash Strike," the right spin is "Earth-Shattering," and the straight shot is just "Straight Shot."
再试一次吧！这次抓住时机<color=#dbc291ff>用祷言让它停住！</color>你可以的！
Try again! This time, seize the moment and <color=#dbc291ff>use the prayer to stop it!</color> You've got this!
停住了！你真厉害！不是敷衍你哦？连设计谜题的祭司自己都把握不好时机呢，哗啦。
You stopped it! Amazing! I'm not just flattering you. Even the priest who designed the puzzles couldn't time it perfectly. *whoosh*
改主意啦？好，我在这等你——
Changed your mind? Okay, I'll wait here—
The door's open — this way, this way—
其实我也试过自己解开谜题，但很可惜我的分类是荧虫，头上没有犄角，撞不碎塑像。
I did try to solve the puzzle myself once, but unfortunately, as a glowworm, I don't have horns to smash the statues.
啊呀，祷言断掉了耶。看来<color=#dbc291ff>不能让球和球撞到一起</color>呢，哗啦。
Ah, the prayer broke off. It seems like <color=#dbc291ff>the balls can't collide with each other</color>. *whoosh*
哗啦啦，门开啦——悄悄跟你说，即使不解迷，我也可以从旁边的缝隙飞进去。
*whoosh* The door's open! Just so you know, even if we didn't solve the puzzle, I could've slipped through the cracks.
可惜你还活着，要是你是亡魂，就也能直接钻进来了…哗啦。
Too bad you're still alive. If you were a ghost, you could've squeezed in... *whoosh*
我没事，营造一下气氛而已，哗啦。用它<color=#dbc291ff>让球改道</color>吧！
I'm fine, just setting the mood. *whoosh* Use it to <color=#dbc291ff>redirect the ball</color>!
咦？这扇门…好像可以自由开关。
Huh? This door... seems to open and close freely.
或许可以<color=#dbc291ff>用它来挡住球</color>？多试试看吧！
Maybe you can <color=#dbc291ff>use it to block the ball</color>? Give it a few tries!
哗啦，这种洁净的感觉，真让虫心旷神怡——
*whoosh* This clean feeling—it's so refreshing for a bug—
和外出旅行之后，回家做完大扫除的感觉一样呢——祭司说的，我不懂，哗啦。
It's like coming home from a trip and doing a thorough cleaning. That's what the priest said — I wouldn't know. *whoosh*
哗啦，我懂，用球撞东西的爽快感实在令虫欲罢不能。
*whoosh* I get it. The thrill of smashing things with the ball is truly irresistible for a bug.
哇哇，这浮台是载人的，不是投石机啦，举不起来的！被球压住就动不了啦，哗啦——
Whoa, this platform is for carrying people, not a catapult! It can't lift off when the ball's pressing down on it. *whoosh*
门开啦，哗啦！你好厉害啊！不过…想了想，我给了你这么多提示，给我一枚利衡币也不算过分吧？
The door's open. *whoosh* You're amazing! But... now that I think about it, after giving you so many hints, don't you think I deserve a Balance Coin?
哗啦～可是这里连个需要钱的商人都没有…这些钱你留着吧，心里惦记着我就好。
*whoosh* But there's no merchant here who even needs money... Keep it for yourself, and just think of me fondly.
铁球压住了浮台。你试着推了推，它纹丝不动。附近好像看不到什么机关。
The iron ball pins down the platform. Try as you might, it won't move. No obvious mechanism can be found nearby.
先去做其他该做的事吧。说不定过一阵子，它就会自己长腿跑掉了…
Let's focus on other tasks for now. Who knows, it might magically grow legs and move itself later...
要是你感兴趣，就自己去摸索摸索吧。我要去接着玩大铁球了！下次走路小心点嗷，哗啦啦~
If you're interested, explore it yourself. I'm going back to play with the iron ball! Watch your step next time. *whoosh*
要是你感兴趣，就自己去摸索摸索吧。
If you're interested, explore it yourself.
哗啦啦…真的吗？岁月的祭司都没你厉害。
*whoosh* Really? You're even more capable than the Priest of Time.
Alright, I'll go check it out.
不光要看，还要解谜哦，很难的，哗啦。
You'll need to solve puzzles too, not just look around. Challenging stuff. *whoosh*
我要去接着玩大铁球了！下次走路小心点嗷，哗啦啦~
I'm going back to play with the iron ball! Watch your step next time. *whoosh*
圣杯屹立于群山之间，海浪和鱼儿从中跃出——这是{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的象征。
Amidst mountains stands the Holy Grail, with leaping waves and fish — the symbol of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}.
这个房间的主人似乎信奉{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}满溢之杯{RUBY_E#}。在阳光明亮的黄金时代，海水曾经比现在更加澄澈。
The room's resident appears to follow the {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Chalice of Plenty{RUBY_E#}. During the radiant Golden Age, the oceans were more pristine than today.
桌上摆着尚未读完的书卷，还有尚未吃完的果盘。它们看上去都不像是经受过岁月侵蚀的模样。
On the table lies an unfinished scroll and a partially eaten fruit platter. Both appear untouched by time.
书卷和水果都保存得相当完好，仿佛房间的主人只是临时有事出门，随时可能回来继续手头的工作。
Both scrolls and fruits remain in pristine condition, suggesting the room's occupant merely stepped out briefly and might return at any time to resume their work.
皎洁的月光从窗外射入，如奶油花般涂抹在地上。
The bright moonlight shines through the window, spreading across the floor like creamy frosting.
于破败的古城中，你难得感受到了恬静。
In the dilapidated ancient city, you feel a rare sense of tranquility.
天父啊…伊来内呢？阁下，您有没有看到伊来内？
O, sky father... Where's Alain? {NICKNAME}, have you seen him?
他是负责看管火种匣的祭司，恐怕被困在了半神议院…外面黑潮肆虐，除了您，怕是没有别人能指望了…您能去找找他吗？

He's the priest in charge of Coreflame Caskets. I'm afraid he's trapped in the Demigod Council... The black tide is everywhere outside. If anyone can save him, it's you. Please... will you look for him?
太感谢了！愿天父看护您！
Thank you! May the sky father watch over you!
我明白，我明白…现在谁也顾不得谁了。天父啊，但愿他去了别的避难地……
I know. I know... No one can afford to worry about anyone else right now. O, sky father, I hope he made it to another shelter...
呃啊…还没有起效吗…你…你是……
Ngh... It's still not working... You... who are you...?
Someone sent me to find you.
伊来内…我…？啊，是的…我是祭司伊来内。
Alain... I...? Ah, yes... I am Priest Alain.
您是…{NICKNAME}阁下，那位继承了欧洛尼斯火种的黄金裔？真是天父显灵了，我刚唤取出这个「火种匣」，拜托您打开它吧！
You're... {NICKNAME}? The Chrysos Heir who inherited Oronyx's Coreflame? By the sky father's grace, I just retrieved this Coreflame Casket — please, open it!
天父曾将火种的余温赐予我们，当黑潮倾覆世界，它能庇佑人子一夕安存…这份「余火」，被元老们封存在了某个火种匣中。

The sky father once granted us the Coreflame's lingering warmth. When the black tide swallows the world, it will be the only thing that can give the children of humanity a brief respite... This "ember" is sealed inside one of these Caskets.
我也想赶紧逃跑…但找到它，就能让更多人免于痛苦。
I want to run, too... but if we find it, then we can save so many more lives.
开启火种匣需要欧洛尼斯的祷言，凯妮斯女士已死，元老和祭司也四散逃走，现在能打开它的只有您了——
Opening the Coreflame Casket requires Oronyx's prayer. Lady Caenis is dead, and the elders and priests have scattered... You're the only one left who can do it —
如果您仗义出手，我这有些他们没能带走的宝贝，全都归您！
If you help me, I'll give you something valuable — whatever the priests left behind, it's all yours!
I won't turn my back on this.
太好了，{NICKNAME}阁下，请您打开这个火种匣试试吧。
That's a relief! {NICKNAME}, please, try opening this Casket.
You should've said there was a reward sooner!
事不宜迟，{NICKNAME}阁下，请您打开这个火种匣试试吧。
No time to waste! {NICKNAME}, please, try opening this Casket!
I've got other matters to handle...
我明白，事态紧急，{NICKNAME}阁下一定有更重要的事去做。愿天父庇佑您！
I understand. The situation is urgent everywhere. You must have more pressing matters to attend to. {NICKNAME}, may the sky father guide you!
秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...
吕枯耳戈斯元老把秘术锁传授给元老院后，他们也会用火种匣寄存些不便透露给外界的私人物品，这大概也是其中之一。

After Elder Lycurgus taught the art of arcane seals to the Council of Elders, they also began storing personal belongings in the Coreflame Caskets — items they preferred to keep hidden from the outside world. This is likely one of them.
So where exactly is the ember?
这玩意儿能保护些什么？
What can this thing even protect?
可惜，只有凯妮斯女士和她的那帮「清洗者」心腹，才清楚每个火种匣里究竟是什么。
Unfortunately, only Lady Caenis and her inner circle of "Cleaners" know what's inside each Coreflame Casket.
目前统计在册的火种匣共有三百二十个，我依据档案中的信息排除了大半…余火一定在剩下的这些火种匣里！
There are a total of <unbreak>320</unbreak> registered Coreflame Caskets. I've managed to eliminate most of them based on archival records... The ember must be in one of the remaining ones!
拜托您先解锁下个火种匣…这段时间里，我会继续筛查。
Please, unlock the next Coreflame Casket. I'll keep sorting through the records in the meantime.
秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...
抱歉抱歉，我这人就是容易大惊小怪。
Sorry, sorry! I tend to get overexcited.
这是之前挂在神殿亭廊里的黄金世古画「欢宴之盟」。它记录了诸多城邦签订盟约时，云石天宫初次奠基的场景，曾被拍出千万利衡币的高价！

This is Feast of the Covenant, an ancient mural of the Era Chrysea that once hung in the temple pavilion. It depicts the foundation of Marmoreal Palace during the signing of a great city-state alliance. It was once auctioned for millions of Balance Coins!
奇怪，记得掌账祭司明明说它已经被「贼灵」偷走了啊……
That's odd... The accounting priest claimed it was stolen by the Spirithief.
No wonder it feels so empty...
呃啊…时间不多了，拜托您抓紧时间看下一个匣子吧！
Ugh... Time is running out. Please, let's move on to the next Casket!
秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...
您、您怎么抢我的台词呢！
Wait — why are you stealing my line!?
This has to be the one, right?
Let me check... Ah, this is—!!!
这是天父的赎罪膏油…只要为泰坦断崖的篝火添加膏油，天父就会原谅一切罪过，在末日中准许你前往下一个黄金世。

This is the Atoning Balm of the sky father... We claim that just a single drop of this into the bonfire in Titan Cliff will atone for all your sins, and the sky father will forgive you and grant you passage to the next Era Chrysea in the apocalypse.
虽然惭愧，但这确实是我们重要的收入来源。
Embarrassing as it is, this is one of our main sources of income.
这东西就别放在火种匣里了！
Why even bother keeping this in the Coreflame Casket!
还愣着干什么，赶紧点上啊。
What are you waiting for? Next!
确实… 每分每秒，圣城里都有人死去。
Yeah... Every second, people in the holy city are dying.
时间不多了——{NICKNAME}阁下，拜托您打开下一个火种匣吧！
There's no time — {NICKNAME}, please, open the next Coreflame Casket!
秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...
找到了不得了的东西啊。唉，想当初，我也差点成了他们中的一员……
Now this is something big. Heh... Y'know, I almost ended up like them once...
Wait, are you a Cleaner too?
不必紧张。我受大司铎委派在此管理火种匣，多少知晓了一些秘辛，凯妮斯女士也曾因此向我抛出橄榄枝——说实话，元老院的一席之地，的确十分诱人。

No need to be on edge. The Chaplain assigned me to oversee these Coreflame Caskets, so I know a few secrets. Even Lady Caenis extended me an invitation — honestly, a seat in the Council of Elders is indeed a tempting offer.
可…成为「清洗者」虽然能够继承大量知识和记忆，却也意味着自己独有的记忆将被淡化、抹去。
But... becoming a Cleaner means inheriting vast knowledge and memories — at the cost of losing your own.
我就是为了不上战场才来当祭司的，这些事情…对我来说果然还是太勉强了。
I became a priest so I wouldn't have to fight on the battlefield. This... This is just too much for me.
我又筛选出一批火种匣，还剩下七十二个需要确认。该死，这得开到什么时候？可是我…嘶……
I've sorted through another batch of Coreflame Caskets. Still <unbreak>72</unbreak> more to go. Darn it, how long is this gonna take? But I... ngh...
啊，不…没关系。不打紧。请您继续解开下一个火种匣吧！
Ah, no, no, it's fine. I'm fine. Please, let's keep going. Open the next Casket.
您是…{NICKNAME}阁下？对了，火种匣，要继续打开火种匣。
You're... {NICKNAME}? Right... the Caskets. I need to keep opening them.
这个…是考卷？不…经卷…不对……
Wait, this is... an exam paper? No... a scripture? No, that can't be right...
你真没事？感觉不大对劲…
You sure you're okay? You don't seem like yourself...
没有一惊一乍，好不习惯。
Wow, no sudden outbursts? Feels kinda weird.
不必担心，{NICKNAME}阁下…我其实感觉好多了。
Don't worry, {NICKNAME}... I actually feel much better now.
想起来了，这是刻法勒的谕示集，每个侍奉天父的祭司，都要在受洗礼前对它宣誓虔诚。
I remember now. This is the oracles of Kephale. Every priest serving the sky father must swear their devotion to them before baptism.
从树庭「绳结学派」结业时，大家都以为我会成为一位工程兵…但在本该去应征的那天，我却选择对它宣誓，成为了一名祭司。
When I graduated from Nodism in the Grove, everyone assumed I'd become an engineer. But on the day I was supposed to enlist... I swore my oath instead. I became a priest.
对不起，阿普列尤斯老师…我太害怕了。害怕面对黑潮，害怕直面死亡…可现在，就像你们一样，这一天还是来到了我的头上。
I'm sorry, Mr. Apuleius... I was scared. Scared of the black tide. Scared of death. But now, just like you... my time has come.
我想至少今天，至少这次…呃啊…可档案里的线索都用尽了，我还是想不起来…找不出那个火种匣。时间不多了…果然，我还是和以前一样没用……

At least for today, at least this time — ugh... I've gone through all the records, but I still can't remember... I still can't find the right Coreflame Casket. We're running out of time... I really am useless, just like before...
时间宝贵，别自怨自艾了。
We don't have time for this. Focus.
谢谢…您说的是。我确实还不愿放弃…您愿意再尝试的话，我会再唤取一个火种匣，拜托您了！
Thank you... You're right. I don't want to give up yet. If you're willing to keep going, I'll summon another Coreflame Casket — please, I'm counting on you!
I... what am I...? I am...?
祭司难以置信地抚摸着自己的脸颊，随后突然镇静下来，好像接受了某种现实。
The priest touches his face in disbelief. Then, suddenly, he calms, as if accepting some unknown reality.
这次匣子里面是余火吗？
Is this one holding the ember?
不必看了…这不是装余火的匣子。我已经想起余火在哪里了。
No need to check... This isn't the right Casket. I remember where the ember is now.
封存余火的火种匣由三层秘术锁保护，{NICKNAME}阁下，只差最后一步…相信您一定能把它打开。
The Coreflame Casket holding the ember is sealed behind three layers of arcane seals. {NICKNAME}, this is the final step... I know you can do it.
秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...
一枚余火缓缓下落，降在伊来内的掌心。
A single ember drifts downward, landing gently in Alain's palm.
没想到有一天，我也能触碰到天父的火种。
Never thought I'd live to touch the sky father's Coreflame...
Huh. No dramatic reactions this time.
呵呵…原来我是那样一个人吗？
Heh... So that's the kind of person I was, huh?
不重要了…请您将余火送下黎明云崖，让它保护更多人吧。
It doesn't matter anymore... Please, take the ember to the Dawncloud. Let it protect those who still remain.
Why aren't you coming with us?
时间已经不多了…属于我的时间。
Because... my time is almost up.
只有凯妮斯女士和「清洗者」知晓余火所在的火种匣。所以在您来之前，我利用被封存的一份遗物，独自完成了成为「清洗者」的仪式。
Only Lady Caenis and the Cleaner knew which Casket held the ember. So before you arrived, I used a sealed relic to perform the Cleaner's ritual on myself.
时间紧迫，仪式并不完全，破碎的记忆像潮汐，要把沙滩上的一切抹去…好在最后，它也将那个答案送到了我的面前。
The ritual was rushed, incomplete. My memories are breaking apart, like waves washing over the shore, erasing everything in their path... But in the end, at least it gave me the answer.
The Era Nova is almost complete...
为什么要做到这个地步？
I can open more Coreflame Caskets!
您已经为我们做得太多，{NICKNAME}阁下…而且，时间的确也不容许我们打开它们。
You've already done so much for us, {NICKNAME}... Besides, we don't have time to open them all.
「再创世」——我也曾抱着这样的期盼活着。但当黑潮真的来临，看着黑潮吞没同伴，听到他们的惨叫…我承认，我还是…怕死。
"Era Nova" — I once lived with that hope, too. But when the black tide came, when I watched it consume my friends and heard their screams... I won't lie. I was still afraid.
怕死亡那一瞬间的痛苦，也怕死后漫长黑暗中的了无知觉。尽管也有人许诺了彼岸……
Afraid of the pain in that final moment, afraid of the endless dark that follows. Even if some promised salvation beyond...
{NICKNAME}阁下，请您原谅，这可能只是一个胆小鬼将死前的胡话——

那刻夏证明过。我相信他。
Anaxa proved it's possible. I believe in him.
Haha... Well then, I'll take your word for it.
希望…我们能在西风的尽头…在那个阳光明媚、没有伤痛的世界重新相识。
Maybe... we'll meet again, beyond the western winds... in a world of light, free from pain.
{NICKNAME}阁下，谢谢你…帮助我做了件能让自己感到佩服的事。
{NICKNAME}... Thank you. You helped me do something I can be proud of.
感谢您坦诚相待。因此，即便只有一线生机，我也希望能尽力抓住。
I appreciate your honesty. That's why even if there's only the slimmest chance... I want to hold onto it.
一生着实过于仓促…{NICKNAME}阁下，谢谢你，帮助我做了一件能让自己感到佩服的事情。
Life is far too short... {NICKNAME}, thank you for helping me do something I can be proud of.
即便这就是旅途的终点，我也再无遗憾了。
Even if this is the end of my journey, I have no regrets.
时间不多了，请您尽快将余火送下黎明云崖，让它保护更多人吧。
There's no time. Please, take the ember to the Dawncloud. Let it protect those who still remain.
即便这就是旅途的终点，我也再无遗憾了。
Even if this is the end of my journey, I have no regrets.

The ember, paid for with Alain's life, melts soundlessly into the light, vanishing in an instant. And yet... was it just imagination, or did a warm breeze brush against your cheek?
Let's hope it was worth it.
好了，去帮助下一个人吧。
Alright. Let's find the next person who needs help.

打开第一层了。接下来的秘术锁可能会越来越复杂，请小心应对。

{NICKNAME}, use Oronyx's power to break the final arcane seal!

秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
