{NICKNAME}阁下，请您原谅，这可能只是一个胆小鬼将死前的胡话——
{NICKNAME}, forgive me. These are just the ramblings of a coward at death's door—
假使世界会在英雄的眼中重塑，那从未在他们眼中出现过的我们，是否也能得到来世的接引？
If the world is reshaped through a hero's eyes... then what about those of us who were never seen? Will we have a place in the next life?
那刻夏证明过。我相信他。
Anaxa proved it's possible. I believe in him.
Haha... Well then, I'll take your word for it.
希望…我们能在西风的尽头…在那个阳光明媚、没有伤痛的世界重新相识。
Maybe... we'll meet again, beyond the western winds... in a world of light, free from pain.
{NICKNAME}阁下，谢谢你…帮助我做了件能让自己感到佩服的事。
{NICKNAME}... Thank you. You helped me do something I can be proud of.
感谢您坦诚相待。因此，即便只有一线生机，我也希望能尽力抓住。
I appreciate your honesty. That's why even if there's only the slimmest chance... I want to hold onto it.
一生着实过于仓促…{NICKNAME}阁下，谢谢你，帮助我做了一件能让自己感到佩服的事情。
Life is far too short... {NICKNAME}, thank you for helping me do something I can be proud of.
即便这就是旅途的终点，我也再无遗憾了。
Even if this is the end of my journey, I have no regrets.
时间不多了，请您尽快将余火送下黎明云崖，让它保护更多人吧。
There's no time. Please, take the ember to the Dawncloud. Let it protect those who still remain.
即便这就是旅途的终点，我也再无遗憾了。
Even if this is the end of my journey, I have no regrets.
这团由伊来内的生命换来的「余火」，就这样悄无声息地融入光芒，转瞬间消失不见。不知是否是错觉…一股暖流拂过你的面庞。
The ember, paid for with Alain's life, melts soundlessly into the light, vanishing in an instant. And yet... was it just imagination, or did a warm breeze brush against your cheek?
Let's hope it was worth it.
好了，去帮助下一个人吧。
Alright. Let's find the next person who needs help.
遗体尚有余温，身上可见与黑潮怪物搏斗留下的伤痕。
The body is still warm, bearing the scars of battle against the creatures of the black tide.
他以这种方式为自己写下了最后的结局。
This is how he chose to write his final chapter.
打开第一层了。接下来的秘术锁可能会越来越复杂，请小心应对。
The first layer's down. The next ones will only get more complex — stay sharp.
{NICKNAME}阁下，请您用欧洛尼斯的力量，打开最后一重秘术锁吧！
{NICKNAME}, use Oronyx's power to break the final arcane seal!
你三下五除二揍趴了黑潮造物。
You knock out the Black Tide Creature in no time.
不，不要紧。谢谢你，英雄大人！只是……
Yeah, we're fine. Thanks for the rescue, hero! It's just...
我绝对没看错！帮了我们的肯定是个幽…幽灵！
I swear I'm not seeing things! The one who helped us has to be a... a ghost!
在这道屏障罩住我们之前，就有怪物盯上我们了，多亏一位女士将它引开，我们才没有遭遇危险。
Before this barrier trapped us, a monster was closing in. Thankfully, a woman led it away, keeping us safe.
但那位女士有些面生，而且一转眼就不见了，搞得我们有些慌张……
But the woman was a stranger, and she disappeared in the blink of an eye. We got a little freaked out...
我们这就撤去安全地带，英雄大人，如果您再遇到她，还请替我们向她道谢。
We're heading out to the safe zone now, hero. If you run into her again, please thank her for us.
刻法勒在上，哪位英雄能来救一下啊！
For Kephale's sake, could some hero please come to the rescue!
眼前的这一位…存在？她一言不发，但你却能理解，她没有敌意。
This person in front of me... Is she real? She's silent, but somehow you can tell she means no harm.
She's got feet. No doubt she's a real person.
Can ghosts even be seen on camera?
…云朵的芳香。你是否…曾到过我的故乡？
...The scent of clouds. Have you... been to my homeland?
Are you from the same place as Hyacine?
陌生的词语…但，像是一位天空之子的姓名。或许……
An unfamiliar term... but it sounds like the name of a Skyfolk. Maybe...
Are you talking about the Eye of Twilight?
啊啊，艾…格勒。怀念的发音。是的，是的…
Ah, Aqui.. Aquila. What a nostalgic sound. Yes, yes...
昏光…庭院…那片湛蓝色的风鸣……
Twilight... Courtyard... the sound of wind in the deep blue sky...
请帮我…找到回去的路。我想要回到那片天空。
Please help me... find the way home. I want to return to that sky.
语毕，身影在刹那间消散，仿佛从未存在过一般。而你的手中，却在不知不觉间握住了一串吊坠。
With those words, the figure vanishes in an instant, as if it never existed. But in your hand, you find a pendant you didn't even notice you were holding.
Who do I report this to when I'm done with the mission?
没有人回应你。她貌似和昏光庭院有些联系，但好像又不认识风堇，况且「回到天空」是指……
No one responds. She seems to be connected to the Twilight Courtyard, but doesn't seem to know Hyacine. Also, when she said return to the sky, what did she mean...?
总之，把能做的事做了吧。
Anyway, I should finish what can be done.
母亲，您曾说…冬、雨、晖，彼此间别无二致。
Mother, you once said... winter, rain, and sunlight, they are all the same.
唯有彼此齐聚，才是无瑕斑斓的天空。
Only when they come together, does the sky become flawless and radiant.
吊坠微颤，将你引向更下方。
The pendant quivers slightly, leading you further down.
父亲，您曾说…微光象征着弥合与疗愈。
Father, you once said... the faint light symbolizes healing and reconciliation.
但若是医者难以自医，又能去往何处寻？
But if a healer can't heal themselves, where else can they turn?
吊坠微颤，将你引向更下方。
The pendant quivers slightly, leading you further down.
晨昏的分界已淡，这份誓言，会随着「昏光庭院」之名传承下去。
The boundary between dawn and dusk fades, and this vow will live on with the name "Twilight Courtyard."
所以，已经够了…对吧？我真的…好想…再见到你们……
So, it's enough... right? I really... just want to see you both again...
人影不再言语，你手中的吊坠向往着沉眠，将你引向了天空之底。
The figure falls silent, and the pendant in your hand sinks into slumber, leading you toward the bottom of the sky.
就是这里…接下来，只要把吊坠放入池中就好。
This is it... now, just place the pendant into the pool.
这一次，我们不会再分开了。
This time, we won't be separated again.
你从疑惑中回神，虹彩色的屏障逐渐在空中溶解——不知何时，风堇用她的权能罩住了你。
You snap out of your confusion, and the prismatic barrier slowly melts away — somehow, Hyacine has cloaked you with her power.
发动欧洛尼斯祷言时的荡漾感还残留在你的身上，刚刚那段经历，或许…只是一缕追忆。
The lingering sensation of Oronyx's Prayer still clings to you. That recent experience, perhaps... was just a fleeting memory.
May she find peace with her regrets.
…即使羽翼尽散，大地生灵的笑靥使人驻足——天空子民的归宿，却仍是那片湛蓝。
...Even with wings scattered, the smiles of the earth's creatures make you stop and look. And the place where Sky denizens belong remains that same blue expanse.
声音逐渐远去，留下些许祥和。
The voice fades away, leaving a sense of calm.
空气似乎突然炎热起来，一股粘腻的风缠住你的脚腕，令你本能地觉得不适：「均衡…」一个低沉的，毫无感情的声音低语，「宇宙应当…均衡……」一个又一个回音加入低语，宛如交响。

The air seems to heat up suddenly, and a sticky wind grips onto your ankles, leaving you feeling intuitively uncomfortable. "Equilibrium..." Mutters a low, emotionless voice. Another whisper echoed, as if in symphony: "The universe should be... in equilibrium..."
The universe should be... in equilibrium...
「『均衡』的『仲裁官』要交给你一项试炼…」许多回音续道，「为了诸界的平衡…展示你的力量，而我们仲裁；强大之人将获得机遇，弱小者亦有喘息之机。」

"The Arbitrators of the Equilibrium are giving you a trial." And the echoes continued, "For the equilibrium of all worlds, you must demonstrate your strength. The strong will be given greater opportunities, the weak a chance to breathe."
「通过试炼，则证明你的力量已动摇了天秤。」声音说，「诸界因此改变，从而…均衡；你将面对更强的敌手，更难的谜题，以及…更丰厚的报偿。」

"Passing the trial will prove that your strength has shaken the scales of power." The voice said, "Worlds will change, and thus... equilibrium. You will encounter stronger enemies, harder puzzles, and... greater rewards."
「均衡…」回音不断重复，「你仍会遭遇试炼…」
"After equilibrium..." The voice keeps repeating, "You will go on to face yet more trials..."
Please explain in the human language.
这是所谓的「动态难度」吗？
我能拒绝这什么「试炼」吗？
声音没有回答，半晌：「这是你的选择…」它低声说，「但均衡必将得到维系……」
The voice does not answer, then after a while: "It is your choice to make..." And it continued, "But in the end, equilibrium will be upheld..."
Get to the point, what are the rewards?
「你会得到更多…」声音回答，「那些物质上的，与精神上的；可数的，与不可数的。所得将匹配于你的力量，从而…均衡。」

"You will obtain more..." The voice said, "More of the material, more of the spiritual... more of the countable, more of the immeasurable. What is obtained will be in proportion to your strength, and thus... in equilibrium."
「均衡。」声音重复。你从那没有感情的语调中琢磨出了一丝赞许，「诸界将因此改变。」
"Equilibrium." The voice repeated. You detect a hint of approval from that emotionless tone, "It is for this that all worlds change."
空气再度毫无征兆地炎热起来，柔软的清风抓挠你的脚腕：「均衡。」陌生的声音在你耳边低语，「诸界已然改变，因为『均衡』至高无上；试炼会找上你。」它的话音落下时，一切又恢复了正常。

The air turns hot again without warning, and that soft breeze itches at your ankles. "Equilibrium." An unknown voice whispers into your ear, "The worlds are already changing, for equilibrium reigns supreme. Rest assured, the Trial of Equilibrium will find you." As its voice falls, everything returns to normal.

世上没有绝对的无敌，也没有永恒的不朽，这只是凡人视角下的夸张而已。不过「繁育」的陨落，倒确实超越凡人的尺度。祂陨于其祂星神之手。

There is no true invincibility or immortality in the world — such exaggerations are born of the perspectives of ordinary beings. Nonetheless, ordinary beings could not have orchestrated the fall of the Propagation... That Aeon was slain at the hands of another Aeon.
…不明白。都是星神，为啥要打打杀杀呢？
...I don't understand. They're all Aeons, why do they want to fight?
你…真的是仙舟人吗？！别的星神不提，「{RUBY_B#「巡猎」的星神}岚{RUBY_E#}」与「{RUBY_B#「丰饶」的星神}药师{RUBY_E#}」的故事，你总该知道吧？联盟的夙愿，不就是消灭星神药师吗？
You... Are you really from the Xianzhou!? Other Aeons aside, surely you must know the story of Lan and Yaoshi? Isn't destroying the Aeon Yaoshi the Alliance's cherished aim?
当然知道啦！唔，知道一点儿。我整天被我娘监督练剑，没怎么上过学……
Of course, I know! Well, I know a little. My mum made me practice with swords all day — I didn't really go to school...
那…还是换个话题吧。既然你连巡猎和丰饶的死仇都不清楚，很多事情解释起来太费劲了。
In that case... let's just change the subject. If you don't know about the feud between The Hunt and the Abundance, I'm afraid there's just too much to explain.
好吧，那我换个话题：这个大盒子里装的是啥？
Fine, how's this for a subject — what's in the box?
这具白匣子吗？它是「灵柩」，俗名「棺材」，专用于收殓逝者的遗体。
Oh... this one? It's a casket, more commonly known as a coffin. It's for containing the remains of the deceased.
The deceased... A—Aren't you a merchant?
这也是商旅的一部分工作。在下受了嘱托，要将这具灵柩顺路送回仙舟。呵，对动辄寿抵千年的长生种而言，「死亡」大概是个遥远的概念吧？
Yes indeed, this is just part of my job. I was asked to deliver this coffin to the Xianzhou. Ah, I'd quite forgotten — for long-life species, death is probably a distant concept?
也不是啦，云骑军人投身沙场，死亡也是平常事。但我们没有用盒子……呃，灵柩盛装遗体的习惯。仙舟人辞别同袍的习俗，是将名字和玉兆供奉在「{RUBY_B#长生管理机构}十王司{RUBY_E#}」的因果殿里。

Nope. The Cloud Knights spend a lot of time on the battlefield — death is a common occurrence. It's just, we don't put bodies in boxes — uh — coffins... In Xianzhou, people go to the Hall of Karma in the {RUBY_B#Long-Life Supervisory Authority}Ten-Lords Commission{RUBY_E#} and consecrate the names and jade abacuses of the dead. It's our way of saying goodbye.
而且，狐人和持明各有自己的告别仪式。我见过狐族战士将离世同胞安置在星槎里，任它飘向遥远的星辰——他们管这叫「正首青丘」。
The foxians and the Vidyadhara have their own ceremonies. Foxian soldiers place their dead in Starskiffs and then let them drift out into the stars. They call it "the Verdantia Returning."
持明嘛，他们…就比较神秘了。听说持明活得久了，又或受伤濒死，会化作一颗珍珠般的蛋，然后以幼子形貌破壳新生……

As for the Vidyadhara, they're... more mysterious. They say that when a Vidyadhara is very old or has a fatal injury, they turn into an egg that looks like a pearl. When the shell breaks, they come out looking young again...
我娘管持明叫「龙裔」。小时候听娘讲的故事里，持明族还都能化身巨龙哩，也不知是不是真的……
My mum calls the Vidyadhara "Long's Scions." When I was young, she told me stories of how the Vidyadhara could turn into dragons. I don't know if that's true...
只有特殊的持明能化龙。
Only special Vidyadhara can turn into dragons.
好家伙，「闷葫芦」先生开腔啦。
What do you know? Silent but deadly speaks.
…令堂说的不错，持明是「龙裔」，亦即星神「{RUBY_B#龙}不朽{RUBY_E#}」的后代。因此持明之中，曾经是有人能化龙的，却不是人人都有此资质。
...Your mother is right. The Vidyadhara are Long's Scions. They are descendants of the Aeon of {RUBY_B#Long}Permanence{RUBY_E#}. That was why some, but not all, could turn into dragons.
这份力量是珍稀之传，必须经由繁多的仪式和考验方能承接。对接掌者…也难说是幸事。
The power was a rare inheritance, passed down only to those who could successfully complete numerous rites and challenges. For the inheritor, it was hard to say whether it was a blessing or a curse.
…我听说过「不朽的龙」和其子裔的故事。许多神话故事都称颂祂拥有完满不朽的生命。
...I've heard the story of Long the Permanence and THEIR descendants. Many myths and legends praise the Aeon for a rich and immortal life.
但不知为何，祂在群星间消失无踪，就像从未存在过一般——只留下了孑遗子嗣。
But for some reason, the Aeon disappeared among the stars without a trace — almost as if THEY had never existed... leaving only THEIR descendants.
天年有尽，但凡生命皆有定数的极限。即便星神也难称不朽，终会抵达逝去的那一刻吧。
Every life has its limit. Even the Aeons are not truly immortal and will eventually reach the end of their lives.
呃，我多嘴问一句……棺材里的人，你认识么？
Uh, let me ask you one more question... Do you know the person in the coffin?
哈哈，姑娘想哪儿去了？棺中躺着的与我非亲非故，仅有一面之缘。巧合之下答应了别人，只好走这一趟罢了。
Haha, miss, whatever gave you that impression? The individual in the coffin is neither friend nor relative — we met only once. By chance, I made someone a promise, and so I have to run this errand.
就聊到这儿吧？诸位休息得也差不多了。
Let's leave it at that, shall we? I think we've all had enough rest.
Wait! Let's think before we act.
「闷葫芦」、罗刹，咱们一起上，速战速决搞定这些家伙，救下那个女孩！
Silent but deadly, Luocha, let's charge in together. If we take them out quickly, we can rescue the girl!
之前不是说都交给你就好吗？
What happened to "us letting you handle it"?
我、我这是双拳难敌四手呀！拜托啦，事成后，我给你俩颁发「见义勇为」奖！
I—I've only got two hands! Please — I'll wangle you a prize for your bravery or something when it's all over!
啊…抱歉，我没瞧着血迹，还以为没事…原来你是{RUBY_B#机械改造人}机巧偃偶{RUBY_E#}。
Ah... Sorry, I didn't see any blood, so I thought you were okay... You're a {RUBY_B#cyborg}puppet{RUBY_E#}.
My motor is broken — I can't move.
你是云骑军？…很好，请送吾去地衡司。
Are you a Cloud Knight? ...Good. Take me to the Realm-Keeping Commission.
罗刹，闷葫芦，不好意思，可能咱们又得耽搁一下了…这姑娘是属于「{RUBY_B#长生管理机构}十王司{RUBY_E#}」的偃偶判官，我身为云骑，得优先配合她的指示。

Luocha, silent but deadly, I'm afraid we have to delay things again... This lady is one of the judges of the {RUBY_B#Long-Life Supervisory Authority}Ten-Lords Commission{RUBY_E#}. As a Cloud Knight, I must prioritize her orders.
抱歉…早知道不让你俩跟我走了，你们要是自己走，没准都到了……
I'm sorry... If I'd known I wouldn't have got you to come with me. You'd probably be there by now if you'd gone by yourself...
在下略懂医术，不妨让我试试能否医治姑娘的伤势。
I happen to have some medical knowledge — perhaps I can treat the young lady's injuries.
呃，你不知道啦，她是{RUBY_B#机械改造人}偃偶{RUBY_E#}。咱们还是把她送去地衡司吧？
Well, it's just... she's a {RUBY_B#cyborg}puppet{RUBY_E#}. I think we should just take her to the Realm-Keeping Commission?
不要紧，素裳姑娘——交给我吧。
Don't worry, Miss Sushang — leave it to me.
应该不疼，但会有些奇怪的感觉……或许酸，或许麻，可以忍住不动吗？
You might get an aching or numbing sensation, but it shouldn't be too painful... Do you think you can hold still?
没用的…吾身是机巧工造之物，并非血肉凡胎——
It won't work... My body is mechanical, not flesh and blood—
机巧也好、血肉也罢…都不过是有形之物。只要姑娘不介意我用的手段……
Be it mechanical or organic, we're still dealing with composite substances. I just hope you'll tolerate my methods...
你、你是怎么做到的——这根本不是医术吧！
H—How... What kind of "medical knowledge" is this!?
很好，不必回地衡了，任务继续。
Very good — we no longer need to return to the Realm-Keeping Commission. The mission continues.
按「十王司」律条，吾身为判官，不牵外缘。但你们助吾脱身，吾便规劝一句：趁早离去。
As a judge in the employ of the Ten-Lords Commission, I am forbidden from interfering in the affairs of outsiders. However, seeing as you came to my aid, a word of advice: Leave as soon as possible.
吾到此是为正本清源，捉拿要犯——星核猎手。此人剑技非凡，手持神兵，危险至极。
I came to address the root of our crisis by arresting a fugitive — a Stellaron Hunter. This villain possesses exceptional swordsmanship and wields a divine weapon — they are extremely dangerous.
若不是遭遇了奇异变故，吾的「阳寿」也许就此折损了。
If it hadn't been for a strange accident, my wakespan might have been cut short.
吾还没见过这样的景象呢。
I've never seen anything like it.
Uh. It's an accident this time.
之前「位面」功能做的不错，我们几个就各用这个功能擅自做了点实验…结果每个都给系统代码捅了点篓子。
The "Plane" function worked pretty well last time, so each of us used this function to experiment a little... and we all made some mistakes in the system's code.
我，阮•梅，螺丝咕姆，斯蒂芬。我没管他们做了些什么。
Me, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, Stephen. I don't care what they did.
反正给代码造成了一点小小的创伤，无伤大雅的事！但…这些代码漏洞正在宇宙里疯狂膨胀，让其中的东西都变成了<color=#dbc291ff>「无尽」</color>！
We just damaged the code a little. Just a little! But... these bugs in the code are expanding like mad in the universe, and everything in it became <color=#dbc291ff>"Endless"</color>!
你自己进去吧，看看就知道了。
Just go in there yourself. You'll know what I mean.
「嗯，我对银河大乐透动了点手脚，想靠它多获取点宇宙里的奇物。」黑塔敷衍地解释着，「我的初衷有问题吗？只不过现在收拾不了了…靠你了，{NICKNAME}。」

"Well, I made some edits to the Cosmic Big Lotto and wanted to use it to get more Curios from the universe." Herta explains half-heartedly. "My intent was perfectly fine. I just... can't fix it myself anymore... It's all up to you, {NICKNAME}."
你只是懒得自己收拾吧。
「没有的事。」黑塔的视线游移着，似乎在回避事实。
"No way." Herta's eyes are shifting around, seemingly trying to deny the truth.
「总之，现在它不会被损毁了。」黑塔讥笑着指出了问题，「你试试呗，可以获得<color=#dbc291ff>无穷无尽的奇物</color>——帮我多弄点来！最多损失点血量而已，反正是模拟宇宙，又不会真的被炸晕。行就这样，拜。」

"Anyways. It can't get destroyed anymore." Herta snickers and points out the issue. "Why don't you give it a go? You can get <color=#dbc291ff>endless Curios</color> — and help me gain even more! The worst that can happen is you losing HP. It's the Simulated Universe anyway. Not like you'll actually get blown up. Anyways, that's all. Bye."
「我突然有了个绝妙的点子。」黑塔突然现身，「上一次，螺丝不是说模拟宇宙的存储功能还需要迭代吗？我们反而可以利用这次代码的漏洞，验证现在『内存』的极限！」

"I suddenly had a brilliant idea." Herta suddenly pops up. "Didn't Screwy say last time that the Simulated Universe's storage function still needs iterating? We can actually use the code errors this time to verify the limit of the current 'RAM'!"
「我想看看你的数据可以疯狂<color=#dbc291ff>『膨胀』</color>到什么地步，{NICKNAME}！」黑塔饶有兴致，「我要把你的丰功伟绩都存档下来！放心，我会给你报酬。」

"I want to see how crazy the <color=#dbc291ff>memory leak</color> can get with your data, {NICKNAME}!" Herta is interested! "I am going to save all of your glorious achievements! Rest assured. I'll reward you."
「打个比方而已，差不多这个意思吧。」黑塔不屑地说，「模拟宇宙可不是游戏。别告诉斯蒂芬•劳艾德，不然他听到『存档』二字八成就会开始兴奋…这家伙什么游戏模式都想做！」

"It's just an example. Something like that." Herta dismisses the notion. "The Simulated Universe is not a game. Don't let Stephen Lloyd hear you, otherwise he'd get excited just from hearing the word 'save'... That guy wants to make every game mode under the sun!"
「新的切片。」阮•梅的形象翕动着，闪烁着柔和的光晕，「嘘，{NICKNAME}，别告诉黑塔我们在这里做了些什么。」
"A new world slice." Ruan Mei's figure flutters and shines with a gentle sheen. "Shhh, {NICKNAME}, don't tell Herta what we are up to here."
I will keep this a secret.
「奖励。」阮•梅眨了下眼睛，抿着嘴角笑了，「在这里<color=#dbc291ff>你一定会遇到我的切片</color>。感谢你为我的培育切片做的付出，这是一个纯粹的馈赠——为了我们的『以后』。」

"A reward." Ruan Mei blinks and gives a closed-mouth smile. "<color=#dbc291ff>You will always encounter my world slice</color> here. Thank you for your contribution to my nurturing slice. This is simply a gift — A gift for our 'future'."
「又没抓到斯蒂芬•劳艾德露面。」黑塔摊手，「看来他是对升级做的实验——这个游戏小狂人，心里只想着玩游戏迅速升级了！现在，<color=#dbc291ff>祝福正在无尽升级</color>！」

"I failed to catch Stephen Lloyd's face reveal. Again." Herta shrugs. "Seems like he experimented on leveling up — That mad gamer is only thinking about leveling up quickly in this game! And now, <color=#dbc291ff>Blessings are leveling up endlessly</color>!"
「尊敬的{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。」螺丝咕姆的形象出现了，他深深地鞠了一躬，「我本想撰写代码收集#64原始博士的博士之袍，用以吸引他于模拟宇宙中现身。然而没想到代码错误推演出了『纯美之袍』…接着，它与宇宙碎片产生了奇妙的化学反应。」

"Dear {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}." Screwllum's figure appears, and he gives a deep bow. "I was originally intending to write a code that collects The Doctor's Robe, property of Dr. Primitive, #64 of the Society. I hoped to use that to lure him into appearing in the Simulated Universe. However, the erroneous code generated the Robe of The Beauty instead... and then a wondrous chemical reaction occurred with the Cosmic Fragments."
「事实：我仍未能参悟『纯美』与宇宙碎片之间的联系。」螺丝咕姆彬彬有礼，「结论：<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片正在无尽膨胀</color>。」

"Fact: I am still unable to comprehend the connection between the Beauty and Cosmic Fragments." Screwllum is extremely polite. "Conclusion: <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments are expanding endlessly</color>."
「斯蒂芬•劳艾德！小天才捅的篓子也比别人多，不错噢。」黑塔讥笑着，「我猜他是对碎星芳饵动了点手脚，这东西可以用来吸引宇宙中的古兽——没想到，现在吸引到了<color=#dbc291ff>无穷无尽的扑满</color>！」

"Stephen Lloyd! That little genius made more problems than other people. Not bad." Herta snickers. "I'm guessing he did something to the Shattered Star Bait. It can be used to attract cosmic Leviathans — But it ended up attracting <color=#dbc291ff>endless numbers of Trotters</color>!"
「你来了。」阮•梅的声音不起波澜，她对你的到来毫不意外，「这是我们的『秘密』空间，依旧的，请别告诉黑塔…它会在一定时间后彻底销毁。」

"You're here." There isn't a single hint of emotion in Ruan Mei's voice. She seems unsurprised by your arrival. "This is our 'secret' space. Just as it used to be, please don't tell Herta... it will self-destruct after a certain amount of time."
「培育数据发生膨胀，很神秘的现象。处理起来并不棘手，但…我不知道『秘密』还能藏多久。」她抿嘴，歪头温婉一笑，「感谢你的到来，为我又带来些有效数据。现在让我给你些奖励——为了我们的『以后』。」

"The cultivated data has seen some unusual expansion. It's quite mysterious. It's not difficult to handle, but... I don't know how much longer this 'secret' can remain hidden," she pouts, tilts her head, and smiles gently. "Thank you for coming. You've brought me some valuable data again. Now, let me give you some rewards — for our 'future'."
"However, you remember my help 'doesn't come for free', right?"
{NICKNAME}，看得见我说话吗？如果看见了，就随便点一下屏幕——
{NICKNAME}, can you see this message? If you do, just {LAYOUT_MOBILE#tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#click} anywhere on the screen —
很好，别担心，你的行动权限暂时被我锁了，先听我解释一下：
Very well. Don't worry. I've temporarily revoked your activity permissions. Let me explain.
你的身体还在办公室里，这里是根据记忆生成的模拟宇宙，现在，试着随便走走。
Your body is still sitting in the office. This is a Simulated Universe generated from your memories. Now, try to walk around.
瞧，和现实中没区别。你可以自由行动了。找几个怪物打打，做点符合命途的事情。让我看看你会先把哪个模拟星神引来。
See? It's no different from reality. You can move around now. Find some monsters to fight. Do something in line with a Path. Let me see which simulated Aeon you'll attract first.
我把那两个小朋友预加载进来了，{NICKNAME}，不用孤军作战啦。我人不错吧？
{NICKNAME}, I pre-loaded those two kids so you don't have to fight alone. How very kind of me, no?
对，站在那儿就好，机器会读取你的脑波，自动匹配沉浸模拟系统……
Yes, just stand there and the computer will read your brainwaves, then automatically generate an immersive simulated experience...
一声隆隆巨响从天际传来，在模拟宇宙回荡，久久不绝。你抬头上望，只见琥珀色的天空之上，是一尊巨大的无头巨像。眨眼间，巨像消失了，仿佛刚刚的一切只是你的幻觉，只有低低的响声仍在空气中激荡。

A loud rumbling sound descends from the sky, echoing endlessly within the Simulated Universe. You look up and a gigantic, headless colossus could be seen in the amber-colored sky. In the blink of an eye, the colossus disappears as if everything was an illusion, leaving only faint echoes rippling through the air.
<color=#dbc291ff>「居然是克里珀。」</color>黑塔的声音突然在你耳边响起，<color=#dbc291ff>「真让我意外，本来以为第一个会是阿哈呢。你的行为符合存护命途吗？我觉得你俩只有不说话这点比较像。」</color>她发出意义不明的吃吃笑声，<color=#dbc291ff>「好吧，至少你证明了自己确实能吸引星神。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"So it's Qlipoth."</color> You suddenly hear Herta's voice. <color=#dbc291ff>"What a surprise. I thought the first one would be Aha. Do your actions align with the Path of Preservation? I thought the only thing you two have in common is not talking a lot."</color> You can't tell why she is giggling. <color=#dbc291ff>"Well, at least you proved that you really can attract Aeons."</color>
黑塔啧了一声，好像觉得你的疑惑毫无意义：<color=#dbc291ff>「那是『存护』的星神，名为克里珀的太空巨像。当然啦，你看见的是阮•梅和螺丝咕姆精心培育的模拟体，真正的星神才不会搭理咱们哩。」</color>她闷闷不乐地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「——其实模拟星神也一个德行。所以我们找你来当诱饵，好找到和祂们联络的途径。」</color>

Herta tuts, as if your suspicions are utterly meaningless.<color=#dbc291ff>"That's the Aeon of Preservation, the space colossus known as Qlipoth. Well, what you saw was the simulated entity that Ruan Mei and Screwllum had meticulously nurtured. The real Aeons would pay no attention to us."</color>She continues sullenly,<color=#dbc291ff>"Actually, the simulated Aeons are not much better than the real things. That's why we're using you as bait to try to find a way to communicate with THEM."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「要记得：你在模拟宇宙中的身份是『开拓』的阿基维利，如果你不知道怎么扮演祂，那就尽量少说话，多提问。我希望你首先认识这群星神，接着和祂们搞好关系，最后从祂们嘴里把我们关心的那点秘密全掏出来。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"Remember, your identity in the Simulated Universe is Akivili of Trailblaze. If you don't know how to act like THEM, then talk less and ask more questions. I hope you can get to know these Aeons first, get on well with THEM, and ultimately drag all THEIR secrets out of THEM."</color>

好一阵沉默，随后是黑塔的叹息：「我还指望祂会出现呢，算啦。我这就关掉『模拟宇宙』，一瞬间的事，你不会有任何感觉。稍后我们在现实里再谈。」

There is a long silence, followed by a deep sigh from Herta. "I was expecting THEM to appear. Never mind. I'll switch off the Simulated Universe then. It'll only take a second and you won't feel a thing. Let's chat back in reality."
Didn't you say it'll only take a second?
<color=#dbc291ff>「…祂来了！」</color>你的耳边传来黑塔不可置信的说话，<color=#dbc291ff>「不，不是祂…是另一个*星神*！是——」</color>她的声音突然被拉远了，变成长长的一条音带。你有种奇怪的感觉，仿佛黑塔的话语凝固了，整个「模拟宇宙」也变得不那么真实。寒气突兀地出现，往你的毛孔深处钻去，一层烟雾飘上你的眼睛——

"THEY... came!" You hear Herta's stunned words."No, not THEM... It's another Aeon! It's —" Her voice suddenly drifts off, turning into a stretched sound wave. You have a strange feeling about this, as if Herta's words solidified and the whole Simulated Universe became somehow unreal. A cold draft suddenly blows past, drilling deep into the pores of your skin as a layer of smoke flutters before your eyes —
在烟雾深处，你看见一个模糊的人影：祂看上去像是由一片片镜子组成的，反射五彩斑斓的光华。光线摇曳，晃得你头晕目眩，而就在模糊成一团的视线中，你看见了…卡芙卡？大雨倾盆。长得很像卡芙卡的女人撑着伞，雨水从伞边似瀑布般垂落。你见过她，可是此刻，她是那么陌生，仿佛这是你第一次与她相见。好奇怪啊，她看上去好像有山那么高……

Through the layers of smoke, you see a vague figure. THEY appear to be made up of mirrors, a splendid kaleidoscope. The light flickers, making you dizzy and blurring your vision. You see... Kafka? Rain is pouring down. A woman who looks like Kafka is holding an umbrella, and the rain is falling down from the brim of her umbrella like a waterfall. You know who she is. However, right this moment, she seems like a stranger, as though this is the first time you've ever seen her. It's so strange. She looks as tall as a mountain peak...
新的记忆涌入你的脑海：一个身披褴褛长衣的怪物，喃喃低语，身躯越来越远；一个皮肤黝黑的男人，在星空的阴影下，他的双眼化作烟雾；一个战士高举长弓，弓矢好似流星，紧追仇敌不放；有着许多张脸的女人向你张开臂弯；一道金色的伤痕；遮天蔽日的虫群；一张你平生见过最美丽的面孔；婴儿的啼哭和放肆的笑声……

New memories flood into your mind — A monster in a ragged coat, murmuring as its body shifts farther away. A dark-skinned man whose eyes turn to smoke beneath the shadows of the stars. A warrior raises a longbow, arrows streaming after their nemeses like comets. A woman with many faces stretches out her arms to you. A golden scar. A swarm of insects covering the sky. The most beautiful face you've ever seen. A baby crying and giggling with pure joy...
记忆的碎片在你眼前闪烁，最后快到来不及辨认。这时你才恍然醒悟：那些并不是你的记忆，而是属于这片宇宙的，从亘古延绵至今的时间切片。「…是你是你吗奋勇者破碎者背叛者…」星神「记忆」向你发出探询：「…我记得你噢列车划过白巨星的轨道噢那道光在银河的星彩终结…」从祂口中说出每个字都连接着彼此，仿佛呢喃。接着，不等你回答，祂消失了。

Fragments of memories flash before you until they get too fast to be recognizable. That's when you suddenly realize those are not your memories, but frozen moments of this universe since time immemorial. "...is you is that you the brave one the broken one the traitorous one..." The Aeon of Remembrance asks of you. "...i remember you oh the express glide past the white giant orbit oh that beam of light end in cosmos color..." Every syllable THEY utter is connected to the next. Then suddenly, without waiting for your answer, THEY disappear.
<color=#dbc291ff>「对。」</color>黑塔兴奋地喊道，<color=#dbc291ff>「那是浮黎，祂以为你是已陨的阿基维利，主动向你搭话——成功了！比我想得还棒，浮黎几乎是最有价值的星神了，祂知道的事情仅次于博识尊！出来吧，{NICKNAME}，我要升级『模拟宇宙』，以后你要在里面待更久一点！」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"Yes!"</color> Herta yells with excitement.<color=#dbc291ff> "That was Fuli. THEY thought you were the fallen Akivili, so THEY actively started a conversation with you — we did it! Come on out, {NICKNAME} — I want to upgrade the Simulated Universe so you can stay in there even longer in the future!"</color>
You said you wouldn't interfere anymore —
你的肚脐眼被钩子拽了一下，整个人翻了个跟头：睁开眼睛时，你已经身处黑塔的办公室中。第一次「模拟宇宙」的体验到此结束。

It feels like a hook pulled at your belly button and your entire body tumbled in a circle. When you open your eyes, you're already back in Herta's office. Your first experience of the Simulated Universe had ended.
成功了！我得赶紧把这个消息告诉斯蒂芬——{NICKNAME}，你也别愣着，再进去逛逛，试试能不能说上一两句话或者别的什么……

我已经升级了「模拟宇宙」。现在它有更大的内存，可以支持更长的流程。我猜上一局应该挺无聊的，所以我会让斯蒂芬多加点有趣的东西。
I've upgraded the Simulated Universe — it now has more memory and can support longer sessions. The last round must've been pretty boring — I'll get Stephen to add a few more interesting things.

好耶，我喜欢有趣的游戏！
斯蒂芬也这么说——我不是很懂，但随便啦。更重要的是：奖赏也会增加！

不如多给点奖赏来得实际。
Not as good as adding more rewards...

Oh, but we will — after all, you're gonna be spending more time on this project.

所以我更愿意和你谈谈更多奖赏的部分。
...so I'd rather talk with you about the added rewards part.

In a nutshell, this is a long-scheduled version update with longer gameplay, more content, better rewards, and a more bizarre difficulty curve — so get ready and prepare to get back into the Simulated Universe!
我会为你提供更多帮助。
I'll help you out some more. Don't worry.
对，站在那儿就好，机器会读取你的脑波，自动匹配沉浸模拟系统……

耀眼的白光吸引了你的注意。你望向高空，只见一颗流星划过天际——那是你生平仅见最璀璨的星星，喷薄有如将死恒星的光亮。流星一闪即去，只在你的视网膜上烙下一颗光点，光点中依稀有个人影，可你看不真切。

A dazzling white light captures your attention. You gaze up into the sky and see a comet streaking across. It is the brightest star you've ever seen, its brilliance as blinding as a dying star's. The comet disappears in a flash, leaving only a spot of residual light on your retina. There is the faint shadow of a person inside the light spot, but you can't really make it out.
<color=#dbc291ff>「『巡猎』的岚…」</color>黑塔低声说，<color=#dbc291ff>「祂注意到了你，但是…没有停留。」</color>过了一会儿，她补充道，<color=#dbc291ff>「或许祂眼里只有仇敌『丰饶』。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"Lan of The Hunt..."</color> Herta whispers. <color=#dbc291ff>"THEY noticed you, but... THEY didn't stop for you."</color> After a while, she adds, <color=#dbc291ff>"Maybe THEY only care about THEIR nemesis, the Abundance."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「一个可悲的神灵，被仇恨与宿命束缚，永远得不到片刻的停歇。」</color>从她的语气里，你倒并没有听出可悲的意味，<color=#dbc291ff>「不过活着就是这样。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"A tragic Aeon bound by hatred and destiny, never to have even a moment's rest."</color> You don't hear any hint of sympathy for the said tragedy in her voice. <color=#dbc291ff>"But that's life."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「是啊，『丰饶』药师。」</color>黑塔冷漠地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「全宇宙最大的善神，要么是个怪物。祂治愈看见的一切，小到一个原子，大到一个星系。没准祂能帮你解决星核的问题呢。」</color>她玩笑般地补了一句。

<color=#dbc291ff>"Yeah, Yaoshi the Abundance,"</color> Herta answers indifferently. <color=#dbc291ff>"The kindest being in the whole universe, probably also a monster. 突然，你感到悲伤。这是在做什么？你为什么在这里？一台巨大的意识机器挟持你的思维，把你带到了遥远的，遥远的宇宙他方。一切都是假的，真相并不存在，冒险毫无意义。悲伤像油脂漂浮在思海之上，很快沉入其中，只留给你巨大的空洞……

Suddenly, you feel sad. What's this about? Why are you even here? A gigantic machine of consciousness holds your mind hostage and transports you far away into the universe. Everything is false. Truth does not exist. Adventures are meaningless. Tragedy gloats like oil atop a sea of thought, quickly sinking into it to leave behind an enormous void...
<color=#dbc291ff>「喂！怎么回事——」</color>一个女声说着，<color=#dbc291ff>「你的脑波有点不对劲，喂——」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Hey! What's going on — "</color> A female voice is speaking. <color=#dbc291ff>"There's something wrong with your brainwaves. Hey — "</color>
那不重要。脑波是什么？不重要。你不需要知道任何事情也可以活着，就像一棵无知无觉的猴面包树，你吸收养分，成长，然后消亡。生命不就是那样？片刻的欢愉，欢愉之后徒留虚无，日复一日，没有变化，没有未来，没有光亮……

That's unimportant. What are brain waves? Not important. You can live without knowing anything, just like a mindless baobab tree. You take in nutrients, grow, then die. Isn't that what life is? A moment of elation, after which there is nothing. Day after day, timeless and unchanging, having no future, having no light...
是啊，放弃思考吧。思想是行动的负担，令你在意，令你痛苦。随波逐流的树叶，风中打旋的沙尘，无边无垠的宇宙，那黑洞——黑洞？你好像意识到了什么，思维开始跃动，就像行将溺亡的人儿用力击打水面，你挣扎呼吸。很好，总算回来了，是Ⅸ影响了你。

Yes, abandon all thoughts. Thoughts are burdens of action. Thoughts make you care and make you miserable. The leaves that drift with the current, the dust particles swirling in the wind, the boundless universe, and that black hole — black hole? You seem to realize something. A thought begins to struggle upward, like a drowning human violently beating against the waters. You fight through everything to gasp a breath. Very good. You're finally back. IX was influencing you.
<color=#dbc291ff>「很好，总算回来了，是Ⅸ影响了你。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Very good. You're finally back. IX was influencing you."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「『虚无』的Ⅸ出现了，祂让你觉得一切都没有意义，你差点就要在『模拟宇宙』里当一个植物人了——其实那也不要紧，我可以在现实里唤醒你。但不能每次遇到Ⅸ都来这么一次。」</color>黑塔啧道，<color=#dbc291ff>「这家伙是真的非常虚无，祂让自己无意义到系统都没发现祂出现了的地步，我现在相信Ⅸ能轻而易举地干掉整个宇宙了。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"IX the Nihility appeared. THEY made you feel that everything is meaningless, and you almost became a vegetable in the Simulated Universe — Actually, it won't matter. <color=#dbc291ff>「振作起来吧，{NICKNAME}，下一次Ⅸ的招数就没那么容易生效了。你很重要，真的，你的生命非常有价值，有很多人爱你。」</color>她毫无感情地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「你有意义，你是个了不起的人，你很受爱戴，你为世界带来了光明和未来。现在继续玩『模拟宇宙』，快！」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"Cheer up, {NICKNAME}. IX's trick won't be so effective next time. You are important, really — Your life is very valuable, and there are many people who love you."</color> She continues emotionlessly. <color=#dbc291ff>"You have meaning. You are an amazing person. You are loved and respected. You bring light and a future to our world. Now, keep playing the Simulated Universe. Go!"</color>
有一位星神出现在附近，这感觉非常熟悉；能量的漩涡席卷而来，吞没一切，构成你的每个原子都在碰撞中湮灭。燃烧的愤怒与破坏欲望将你撕扯成一道金色的伤口，那既是你的末日，也是「毁灭」纳努克的视线……

An Aeon materializes nearby, and you recognize the familiar sensation. A vortex of energy approaches you and engulfs everything, annihilating every composite atom of your body in the collision. Burning rage and destructive desires tear you into a golden scar that is both your doom and a glimpse from Nanook the Destruction...
痛苦瞬间便结束了。你仿若新生。
The pain is over in an instant. You feel like a newborn.
<color=#dbc291ff>「对不起，这是我的过失。」</color>黑塔的声音在你耳边响起，<color=#dbc291ff>「纳努克没见过阿基维利，没想到祂对陌生的星神也这么粗暴，你一下子就被祂分解了。我只好用系统指令还原了一个你。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"I'm sorry. This is my fault."</color> You hear Herta's voice. <color=#dbc291ff>"Nanook has never met Akivili. I didn't expect THEM to be so violent even towards an unknown Aeon. You were disintegrated instantly. I had to use system commands to restore a backup of you."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「我知道，我知道。可是事先告诉你，就没法收集有效的数据了。」</color>黑塔不以为然地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「我会让螺丝咕姆事先做好防护。下次见到虚拟纳努克，你会让祂大吃一惊的——祂再也没法伤害你了。好，就这样，辛苦你啦，挂了。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"I know, I know. But if I tell you in advance, there's no way to collect reliable data."</color> Herta says carelessly. <color=#dbc291ff>"I'll ask Screwllum to protect you in advance. Next time you see the simulated Nanook, you'll give THEM a huge surprise — THEY won't be able to hurt you anymore. Well, that's it then. Great job. I'm gonna hang up."</color>
温柔的光雨从天而降，落在你身上轻如亲吻。「丰饶」的药师踏空而来。祂面带笑意，眉眼间蕴藏慈悲，似不忍见你此刻的折磨与痛苦。当祂行走时，一根根荆条生长发芽，开出花来。

A gentle sprinkling of light falls from the sky like a soft kiss. Yaoshi the Abundance steps out of thin air. With a smile on THEIR face and compassion knitted into THEIR brows, THEY seem unable to bear seeing you suffer in pain. As THEY walk, thorns sprout up and blossom in THEIR wake.
<color=#dbc291ff>「有情皆有三死，谓之命死、变易死、觉不死。」</color>悲悯的星神轻声道，<color=#dbc291ff>「有涯之身岂可济渡无涯之海？『开拓』，愿汝弃舍重担，不受后有，解脱自在。」</color>一根荆条缓缓飘来，花叶在你面前绽放，如甘露醍醐，滴落舌尖。

<color=#dbc291ff>"All sentient beings have three deaths — the death of the body, the death of thoughts, and the death of desires."</color> The merciful Aeon whispers. <color=#dbc291ff>"How can a body bounded by its limits cross the boundless oceans?
