Its flowers and leaves bloom before you, and its divine and enlightening nectar falls onto the tip of your tongue.
你的伤痛和疲惫一扫而空……
Your pain and exhaustion have been swept away...
药师微微一笑，祂的身影远去了。
Yaoshi smiles and THEIR figure recedes into the distance.
怎么了？我只回答「模拟宇宙」相关的问题喔。
What's up? I'll only answer questions about the Simulated Universe.
它要怎么解开「星神」的奥秘？
How is it going to answer the mystery of the Aeons?
哦，说来简单，就是模拟星神并向祂们发问。
Oh, in layman's terms, it will simulate the Aeons THEMSELVES. Then we can ask THEM questions.
俱乐部动用了大量资源和关系来做这件事情…我们现在模拟出的虚假星神与本质具有联系，因此你可以理解为我们创造出了不具有力量的迷你神明。

The Society has pulled a lot of strings and diverted a lot of resources to make this project happen... The false Aeons we have simulated are connected with real Paths, so you can say we have basically created a bunch of powerless mini gods.
当然，往深了说，没那么简单…这个项目现在也遇到了很多问题，并不顺利……
Of course, if you want to get to the nitty-gritty, it's not that simple... This project has encountered plenty of hiccups along the way. It wasn't all smooth sailing.
You said there are other collaborators?
嗯，四位俱乐部会员联合发起了这个项目。有阮•梅：创生领域的大师，模拟星神的原体就是她培育的；大名鼎鼎的机械贵族螺丝咕姆，他负责编写程序的底层逻辑并演算银河……

Well, the project was jointly launched by four members of our society. There's Ruan Mei, a master in the field of creation. She cultivated the protoplasm simulating the Aeons. There's Screwllum, the famous mechanical aristocrat, who is responsible for writing the underlying logic of the program and the algorithm for the galaxy.
有我黑塔，负责提供场地、人手、资源并添加一些有趣的系统；还有斯蒂芬——噢，他想保密，所以你把他忘了吧。

There's me, Herta, who is responsible for providing the venue, personnel, resources, and adding some interesting systems to the project. There's also Stephen— oh, um, he wants to keep it a secret, so... forget about him.
唔，因为你比较特殊…你身体里有颗星核，走在「开拓」命途的同时还被纳努克瞥了一眼。因此你可能更容易被星神承认一些。
Well, because you're special... You have a Stellaron in your body. You're living the life of a Trailblazer while also receiving a glance from Nanook. So, the Aeons may be more willing to accept you.
要知道，星神毫无自由意志，除了命途之外别无所想。因此我们提问的时候，祂们根本不予理睬…即使螺丝咕姆给每个星神都做了份虚拟人格，还把社交倾向拉满了也没用。

You know, the Aeons have no concept of free will at all. THEY think about nothing but the destined Path. So, when we asked THEM questions, THEY simply ignored us, even when Screwllum gave THEM each a simulated personality and maxed out THEIR social tendency stat.
所以我们打算另辟蹊径…就找到了你。
So, we decided on a different approach... with you.
About the content of the Simulated Universe...
按螺丝咕姆的设计，模拟的是整个「宇宙」。不过现在这台终端机只开放部分场景，这就够用了。螺丝咕姆经常设计些大而无当的东西，那家伙有一整颗星球，所以毫无顾虑……

It is a simulation of the entire universe according to Screwllum's design. But right now, only limited locations are open for access in this terminal. It's enough for us. Screwllum likes to design big useless things. He has a whole planet to himself, so he doesn't care about spatial limitations...
Why is combat a part of the design?
因为战斗是最能展示命途倾向的行为。只有通过与命途的连接，才能把我们设计好的虚拟「星神」召唤出来。这些家伙虽然没什么本事，麻烦程度上却一点不比本尊逊色……

Because combat is the best way to demonstrate which Path one is likely to walk. We can only summon those simulated Aeons we designed when there's a connection to a Path. Those creatures don't have any special powers, but are as much a real pain in the butt as the actual gods...
当然！为了你的安全，我要确保你见到的景色是熟悉可控的。我可不想你被一台虚拟设备弄到发疯！
Of course! For your safety, I want to ensure that everything you see is manageable. I don't want you to lose your mind in the simulation!
我就知道你要问这个，说吧。
I knew you'd ask about this. Go on.
测试「模拟宇宙」有什么好处？
What do I get for testing the Simulated Universe?
从虚拟「星神」那儿弄到的所有情报都是你的——这还不够吗？你知道有人为了被星神瞥一眼都出卖过什么？而你甚至能和祂们面对面说话！
You can keep all the information you get from the simulated Aeons. Isn't that enough? Some people would sell their firstborn just to see an Aeon! And you will get to speak with THEM face to face!
你说的酬劳应该是真金白银吧？
I thought you were talking about a financial reward?
呃，这个嘛……我的信用点多到花不完，你真的想要也行，但说实话，那玩意不过是公司随手打的一串数字而已。
Oh, well... If you want, I am sure I can arrange something. I have more credits than I know what to do with. But honestly, it's just a bunch of numbers the IPC typed up.
我想给你点更务实的东西，能够对你有帮助，你确实用得上的东西。所以形式上可能和你想象的不一样……
I want to give you something more practical and realistic, something that can really help you. So, it may be different from how you imagined...
别忘了测试我的「模拟宇宙」！
Don't forget to test my Simulated Universe!
它要怎么解开「星神」的奥秘？
How is it going to answer the mystery of the Aeons?
哦，说来简单，就是模拟星神并向祂们发问。
Oh, in layman's terms, it will simulate the Aeons THEMSELVES. Then we can ask THEM questions.
俱乐部动用了大量资源和关系来做这件事情…虚拟星神和现实的命途具有联系，因此你可以理解为我们创造出了不具有力量的迷你神明。

The Society has pulled a lot of strings and diverted a lot of resources to do this... The false Aeons have connected with real Paths, so you can say we have basically created a bunch of powerless mini gods.
当然，往深了说，没那么简单…这个项目现在也遇到了很多问题，并不顺利……
Of course, if you want to get to the nitty-gritty, it's not that simple... This project has encountered plenty of hiccups along the way. It wasn't all smooth sailing.
You said there are other collaborators?
嗯，四位俱乐部会员联合发起了这个项目。有阮•梅：创生领域的大师，模拟星神的原体就是她培育的；大名鼎鼎的机械贵族螺丝咕姆，他负责编写程序的底层逻辑并演算银河……

Well, the project was jointly launched by four members of our society. There's Ruan Mei, a master in the field of creation. She cultivated the protoplasm simulating the Aeons. There's Screwllum, the famous mechanical aristocrat, who is responsible for writing the underlying logic of the program and the algorithm for the galaxy.
有我黑塔，负责提供场地、人手、资源并添加一些有趣的系统；还有斯蒂芬——「怪人」斯蒂芬•劳艾德。他想保密，所以你别外传。

There's me, Herta, who is responsible for providing the venue, personnel, and resources, and adding some interesting systems to the project. There's also Stephen "Weirdo" Lloyd. He wants to keep things a secret, so please don't leak anything.
唔，因为你比较特殊…你身体里有颗星核，走在「开拓」命途的同时还被纳努克瞥了一眼。因此你可能更容易被星神承认一些。
Well, because you're special... You have a Stellaron in your body. You're living the life of a Trailblazer while also receiving a glance from Nanook. So, the Aeons may be more willing to accept you.
要知道，星神毫无自由意志，除了命途之外别无所想。因此我们提问的时候，祂们根本不予理睬…即使螺丝咕姆给每个星神都做了份虚拟人格，还把社交倾向拉满了也没用。

You know, the Aeons have no concept of free will at all. THEY think about nothing but the destined Path. So, when we asked THEM questions, THEY simply ignored us, even when Screwllum gave THEM each a simulated personality and maxed out THEIR social tendency stat.
所以我们打算另辟蹊径，找一个特别的人假扮成某个星神和祂们套近乎，可能神与神之间更容易交流一些。
So we plan on finding another way by sourcing a special person who can disguise as one of the Aeons. Someone who can get close to THEM. It may be easier for Aeons to communicate directly with Aeons.
About the content of the Simulated Universe...
按螺丝咕姆的设计，模拟的是整个「宇宙」。不过现在这台终端机只开放部分场景，这就够用了。螺丝咕姆经常设计些大而无当的东西，那家伙有一整颗星球，所以毫无顾虑……

It is a simulation of the entire universe according to Screwllum's design. But right now, only limited locations are open for access in this terminal. It's enough for us. Screwllum likes to design big useless things. He has a whole planet to himself, so he doesn't care about spatial limitations...
Why is combat a part of the design?
因为战斗是最能展示命途倾向的行为。只有通过与命途的连接，才能把我们设计好的虚拟「星神」召唤出来。这些家伙虽然没什么本事，麻烦程度上却一点不比本尊逊色……

Because combat is the best way to demonstrate which Path one is likely to walk. We can only summon those simulated Aeons we designed when there's a connection to a Path. Those creatures don't have any special powers, but are as much a real pain in the butt as the actual gods...
当然！为了你的安全，我要确保你见到的景色是熟悉可控的。我可不想你被一台虚拟设备弄到发疯！
Of course! For your safety, I want to ensure that everything you see is manageable. I don't want you to lose your mind in the simulation!
好处是，模拟宇宙里不仅有你熟悉的场景，也有你熟悉的人物，所以不会觉得孤独。
Good thing is, there're familiar scenes and people inside the Simulated Universe, so you'll never feel lonely.
我就知道你要问这个，说吧。
I knew you'd ask about this. Go on.
怎样才能让星神出现呢？
How can we bait an Aeon to appear?
第一个诱饵是你，你假扮星神阿基维利，看看能不能招来几个认识的；第二个诱饵是命途，根据你在战斗中表现出的倾向，对应的命途会产生回响……

The first piece of bait is you. Pretend to be the Aeon Akivili and see if you can attract a few of their acquaintances. The second piece of bait is the Paths. Based on the combat tendencies you've demonstrated, the corresponding Path should produce a Resonance...
行于相同命途的星神就会被吸引过来。
Aeons who follow the same Path will be drawn in.
怎样才能和星神交谈呢？
How can one speak to an Aeon?
那就得看你自己了。阿哈和浮黎大概会主动找你搭话，克里珀和Ⅸ可能不会理你，纳努克也许刚见面就会把你烧成灰……

That's up to you. Aha and Fuli will probably strike up a conversation proactively, while Qlipoth and IX might ignore you. And Nanook, well, they'll probably scorch you to cinders the second they see you...
不过没事，我们不搞盗梦那一套。就算你在模拟宇宙中死了，现实中也不会受伤。
But it's okay. It can't hurt you — even if you die in the Simulated Universe, you'll be untouched in reality.
别忘了测试我的「模拟宇宙」！
Don't forget to test my Simulated Universe!
瞧，你可以自由行动了。我要你扮演阿基维利，先去找几个怪物打打，看看哪位模拟星神会先注意到你。
See? You can move around now. I want you to play Akivili and find some monsters to fight. Let's see which simulated Aeon will notice you first.
先去找几个怪物打打，看看哪位模拟星神会先注意到你。
Find some monsters to fight. Let's see which simulated Aeon will notice you first.
嗯，进展不错，你的行为得到了克里珀的回响。「存护」的祝福能让你获得更好的保护。
Mmm, it's going well. Your deeds have been recognized by Qlipoth. The Blessings of Preservation will offer you much better protection.
不过嘛，至少这一次你有我的保护，也没什么可担心的啦。选吧。
On the other hand, you at least have my protection. So you've got nothing to worry about. Come and pick one.
利用「存护」的祝福提升生存能力，再寻找提升战斗力的机会，然后再见一次琥珀王！
Use Preservation Blessings to increase your survivability, look for opportunities to improve your combat strength, and have an audience with the Amber Lord again!
唉，克里珀没来，我也猜到了——选那个把护盾转化为伤害的祝福吧，咱们走快点。
Alas, Qlipoth didn't come. I guessed as much — Pick the Blessing that turns Shields into damage, and hurry onward.
{NICKNAME}，我要加快流程了：接下来你要连打三场——模拟宇宙不是这么运行的，但我没什么耐心。
{NICKNAME}, I'm going to speed up the process. Now you're going to fight three times in a row. This is not how the Simulated Universe should operate, but I'm running out of patience.
好好地收集「存护」祝福，行吗？看看能不能让克里珀再出现一回。
Be sure to collect Preservation Blessings, okay? See if we can get Qlipoth to visit once more.
战斗结束，你在原地等待，但什么也没有发生。
The fight is over and you wait in place, but nothing happens.
好一阵沉默，随后是黑塔的叹息：「我还指望祂会出现呢，算啦。我这就关掉『模拟宇宙』，一瞬间的事，你不会有任何感觉。稍后我们在现实里再谈。」

There is a long silence, followed by a deep sigh from Herta. "I was expecting THEM to appear. Never mind. I'll switch off the Simulated Universe then. It'll only take a second and you won't feel a thing. Let's chat back in reality."
Didn't you say it'll only take a second?
「…祂来了！」你的耳边传来黑塔不可置信的说话，「不，不是祂…是另一个*星神*！是——」她的声音突然被拉远，你有种奇怪的感觉，仿佛黑塔的话语凝固了，整个「模拟宇宙」也变得不那么真实——

"THEY... came!" You hear Herta's stunned words. "No, not THEM... It's another Aeon! It's..." Her voice suddenly drifts off. You have a strange feeling about this, as if Herta's words solidified and the whole Simulated Universe became somehow unreal.
你看见一个模糊的人影：祂由镜子的碎片构成，五官被棱镜反复折射成谜团。无数记忆在你眼前涌现。
You see a blurry figure made of mirror fragments, and THEIR facial features are repeatedly refracted by the prism to form a mystery. Countless memories spring up before your eyes.
你看到了<color=#dbc291ff>卡芙卡</color>。她的身躯被拉扯、变形，和她手里的伞揉在一起，变成水滴落在你脚边。
You see <color=#dbc291ff>Kafka</color>. Her body is stretched, deformed, and rubbed together with the umbrella in her hand, turning into water droplets and falling at your feet.
你发现自己是啼哭的<color=#dbc291ff>亚德丽芬婴儿</color>，拥抱脐带还未剪断的胞胎。你记得身上有条<color=#dbc291ff>金色伤痕</color>，金血流淌在消亡星球。你发现自己皮肤黝黑，长袍席卷荒原。你发现你是跨越深渊的<color=#dbc291ff>迅影</color>，伸手揽住流星。

You find yourself become a weeping <color=#dbc291ff>Adlivun baby</color> with an uncut umbilical cord. You remember that there is a <color=#dbc291ff>golden scar</color> on your body, and golden blood flowing on the dying planet. You find yourself dark-skinned and wearing a robe on the wasteland. You find that you are a <color=#dbc291ff>swift shadow</color> across the abyss, reaching out to catch the shooting star.
接着，祂的声音突然传来——<color=#dbc291ff>「…长袍飘拂包裹游历你张开黑色皮肤你嗤笑探索丝线旋转交叠经纬织成海洋词语…」</color>从祂口中说出每个字都连接着彼此，仿佛呢喃。不等你回答，祂突然消失了。

Then, THEIR voice suddenly came... <color=#dbc291ff>"...robe flutter wrap travel you expand dark skin you laugh explore thread rotation intertwine coordinate weave ocean vocabulary..."</color> Every word THEY say is connected to each other like a whisper. Before you could say anything, THEY suddenly disappear.
「成功了！」黑塔兴奋地喊道，「那是浮黎，祂以为你是已陨的阿基维利，主动向你搭话——比我想得还棒，浮黎对我们的研究非常有帮助，因为祂拥有所有人的记忆，知道的东西仅次于{RUBY_B#「智识星神」}博识尊{RUBY_E#}！出来吧，{NICKNAME}，我要升级『模拟宇宙』，以后你要在里面待更久一点！」

"We did it!" Herta yells with excitement, "That was Fuli. THEY thought you were the fallen Akivili, so THEY actively started a conversation with you. Fuli is valuable for our research because THEY have the memories of all beings and know almost as much about everything as {RUBY_B#Aeon of Erudition}Nous{RUBY_E#} does! Come on out, {NICKNAME}, I want to upgrade the Simulated Universe. You need to stay in there even longer in the future!"
You said you wouldn't interfere anymore —
琥珀色天空传来低鸣。你抬头，这是黄昏。无数铜矿、琥珀与蛋白石从你的面前掉下来。这是一场举世瞩目的矿物质雨。在蒸腾的熔化中，庞大之物从地幔中伸展脊椎，祂宽阔的手掌紧握一柄巨锤。——你睁大双眼，发觉这竟是<color=#dbc291ff>「存护」星神克里珀</color>！

There is a murmur in the amber sky. It's dusk. You look up and find countless copper ore, amber and opal falling from the sky. This is a wondrous mineral rain. In the steam, the colossal thing stretched THEIR spine from the mantle with a sledgehammer gripped in THEIR broad palm. You opened your eyes and realized that this is actually <color=#dbc291ff>Qlipoth, the Aeon of Preservation</color>!
Is this a new trick by Herta?
Is this some kind of role-playing?
祂身边发出巨大的轰鸣——祂真的在<color=#dbc291ff>警告</color>你，接着，祂就在你眼前消失了。
There is a huge roar around THEM – this is a <color=#dbc291ff>warning</color> for you. Then, THEY disappear before your eyes.
「我们的计算成功了，『存护』的星神克里珀真的现身了。」黑塔的声音突然响起，她发出意义不明的吃吃笑声，「『开拓』的星神阿基维利死而复现，引来老朋友了。」

"Our calculations are correct. Qlipoth, the Aeon of Preservation, has really appeared." Herta's voice suddenly sounded, and she let out an ambiguous giggle, "The Aeon of Trailblaze, Akivili's revival has attracted an old friend."
多给我讲点星神之间的交情故事！
Tell me more stories about the relationship between the Aeons!
「你看见的是阮•梅和螺丝咕姆精心培育的模拟体星神，真正的星神才不会搭理咱们哩，模拟星神当然也一个德行。我就把你的模拟身份设置成『开拓』星神阿基维利，用来吸引祂们。」黑塔啧了一声，「现在看来我的判断没错，接下来你遇到虚拟星神时，就得跟祂们多套套近乎。」

"What you saw was the simulated Aeon carefully cultivated by Ruan Mei and Screwllum. The simulated Aeons will ignore us just like the real ones, so I set your simulated identity as Akivili, Aeon of Trailblaze, to attract THEM." With a click of her tongue, Herta says, "Now it seems that my judgment is correct. Next time you run into the Aeons, try to get something out of THEM."
What do you want to know?
You must know more about gossip than I do!
「星神秘史，逸闻，爱恨情仇，或者宇宙起源，什么都行。」黑塔没好气，「你自己想想就是了！」
"Myths of the Aeons, anecdotes, love stories, the origin of the universe... Anything will do!" Herta was annoyed, "Just think of something!"
奇怪的事情又出现了。寒气浮上你的背脊，朦胧水雾罩住你的眼睛——异象并不陌生，你很熟悉，又一次。
The strange thing happened again. A chill creeps up your spine, mist clouds your eyes, and you see the familiar vision appearing again.
这一次，祂更近了——巨大的威慑力扑面袭来。<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」星神浮黎</color>再次出现，祂漂浮在半空，从上空以俯首压迫你。祂…在看着你？你不确定哪个剖面才是祂的眼睛。

This time, THEY are even closer – you can feel THEIR presence and power. <color=#dbc291ff>Fuli, the Aeon of Remembrance</color>, appears again. THEY float in midair, bowing THEIR head from above. Are THEY looking at you? But you are not sure which section is THEIR eyes.
你告诫自己要清醒……你思考应尽的使命：开口与祂对话。
You tell yourself to stay sober and complete the mission: Speak to THEM.
What a coincidence! We meet again.
你这家伙怎么做到控制我的脑子的？
How did you manage to control my mind?
<color=#dbc291ff>「…混乱变成时间你的失职注定过去体积不再等比例缩小步伐一步两步三尺离开阻止你好自为之艾利欧列车前进婴儿坠地癌症正在长大…」</color>祂听到了你的话。祂缓缓回应，你感到寒气扑在脸上，皮肤上绒毛战栗。

<color=#dbc291ff>"...chaos become time your dereliction determine past volume no longer proportional shrink steps one step two steps three feet depart prevent you be warned elio express advance baby fall cancer growing now..." </color>THEY respond to you after hearing what you say. You feel the chill on your face, and the hairs on your skin shudder.
接着祂抽身远去，刹那间消失。你终于松了口气。
Then THEY draw away and disappear in an instant. You feel relieved.
黑塔的声音适时响起：「又遇见浮黎了，进展不错。在你之前的测试者甚至得不到浮黎的回响。」听上去她已经从短暂的激动状态中醒觉，因为声音又恢复成那平淡冷漠的，仿佛机械般毫无热情的语调了。

You hear Herta's voice at just the right time. "You met Fuli again. Well done. Previous testers never even got a response from Fuli." Sounds like she has settled down from her excitement, and her voice has returned to the usual emotionless and mechanical register.
「是啊，是啊，就当是新手福利吧。等你熟悉了『模拟宇宙』，我就不会再频繁打扰你啦，还有那么多事情要干呢，你就自己玩吧。」

"Yup, sure am. Just treat it as the perk of being a rookie. Once you're familiar with the Simulated Universe, I won't bother you too much. There's so much to get done, so just play around by yourself."
「你以为升级是什么，电子游戏的版本更新吗？每一个半月给你点无足轻重的小玩意儿？」黑塔啧了一声，「这可是一整个微型宇宙！如果所有变化你都能一眼看见，我们还费劲培育宇宙干什么，给你家列车盖个花园不就行了？」

"What do you think an upgrade is? The next version of a video game? Some tiny rewards handed out every one-and-half-months?" Herta snorts. "This is a whole micro-universe! If you could see all the changes at a glance, why would we spend all the time training a universe? I can just build a garden for your Express instead!"
黑塔叹了口气：「再往前走一点有个<color=#dbc291ff>下载装置</color>，记得用它扩充队伍。你的大脑正在逐渐适应『模拟宇宙』，可用的内存会慢慢释放给你，这样就可以让更多的人参战。好了，别愣着啦，去选祝福吧。」

Herta sighs. "There's a <color=#dbc291ff>Downloader</color> just a little further ahead. Remember to use it to expand your team. Your brain is gradually adapting to the Simulated Universe, and the available RAM will gradually become accessible for you so you can play with more people. Alright, snap out of it. Go and choose your Blessing."
不知为何，你突然被吸入黑暗中。这是时空曲率膨胀至极限的重力场，任何物质和光线都无法逃脱。
For some reason, you are suddenly sucked into darkness. This is a gravitational field where the curvature of space-time expands to its limit, and nothing – neither matter nor light – can escape.
你感到自己正被黑色液体吞没，这是片黑暗之海。声音、嗅觉都被隔绝，一切变得离你很远。
You feel yourself being swallowed by some black liquid — a sea of darkness. Your hearing and smell are cut off, and everything becomes far away from you.
「喂！怎么回事——」黑塔的声音传来，「你的脑波有点不对劲，喂——」
"Hey! What's going on..." You hear Herta's voice. "There's something wrong with your brainwaves. Hey..."
你伸出手指去探，无法触碰到大量微暗的海。你感到自己像一块油脂，漂浮在悲伤的黑暗海面。
You stretch out your fingers, but still can't touch the vast, dark sea. You feel like a piece of grease floating on a dark sea of sorrow.
「{NICKNAME}，振作点。我猜『虚无』星神Ⅸ出现了，祂本身就是虚无，系统没法辨识祂出现了。」黑塔说道，「Ⅸ现在离你很近，你的精神被影响了。你有意义，你是个了不起的人，你很受爱戴，你为世界带来了光明和未来。现在继续玩『模拟宇宙』，快！」

"Cheer up, {NICKNAME}. I guess IX, the Aeon of Nihility, has appeared. THEY are nothingness, so the system cannot detect THEIR appearance." Herta says, "Your spirit is affected because IX is near you. You have meaning. You are an amazing person. You are loved and respected. You bring light and a future to our world. Now, keep playing the Simulated Universe. Quickly!"
黑塔的声音将你分散的精力拉了回来。
Herta's voice brings your distracted mind back.
你只关心你的模拟宇宙！
You only care about your Simulated Universe!
You don't care about me at all!
「是么，我忘记了。」她毫无感情地道歉，「真抱歉，让你不舒服了。再等一会，我再收集点Ⅸ的数据，然后马上把你弄出去。」
"Yeah, I forgot." She apologized emotionlessly, "Sorry for making you uncomfortable. Give me a sec. I'll collect some more data on IX, and then I'll get you out right away."
你屏气凝神，努力聚集精神。你好像能听到虚空深处不成语调的音节，这是祂的声音。
You hold your breath and try to stay focused. You seem to be able to hear toneless syllables deep in the void — it's THEIR voice.
你四处张望，看不到祂的实体。但你知道，祂就在附近…也许，就在你耳边…很快，你的精神开始溃散…
You look around and know that THEY are nearby, but cannot see THEIR presence. Maybe, THEY are right next to your ear... Soon, your spirit starts to break...
「就这样吧{NICKNAME}，再继续你可能撑不住了。」黑塔啧道，「靠近Ⅸ这家伙身边就会这样，祂好像也不是故意的。辛苦你了，干得不错！」

"Stop, {NICKNAME}. You won't be able to hold it anymore." Herta says, "human minds will break when people get near IX, but IX doesn't seem to do it on purpose. Thank you for your hard work, you did a good job!"
「抬头看看。」黑塔轻声说，「值得期待的家伙出现了。」
"Look up." Herta says softly, "Someone worth getting excited about has appeared."
你抬头，看到一个身影张开六臂，祂肆意伸展虬美身姿，关节舒张，就像在表演宇宙之舞。
You look up and see a figure with six arms wantonly stretch THEIR body and bones, as if performing a cosmic dance.
祂的头发如同鹊翎，在千星寰宇中盛开。你想起书中记载人们对星神的遐想——<color=#dbc291ff>「丰饶」星神药师。</color>

THEIR hair is like a magpie's feathers, blooming in a universe of thousands of stars, which reminds you of people's reverie about the Aeons recorded in the book. It's <color=#dbc291ff>Yaoshi, the Aeon of Abundance</color>.
「『开拓』，吾因汝之归来而欢喜。」祂用身躯上的万只眼睛注视着你，声音悲悯，像是垂怜。
"The Trailblaze, I am delighted by your return." THEY stare at you with tens of thousands of eyes on THEIR body, with a voice so sympathetic, as if speaking to you in pity.
一直盯着我看，我会脸红的。
Don't keep staring at me, I'll blush.
「有涯之身岂可济渡无涯之海？愿汝弃舍重担，不受后有，解脱自在。」话毕，祂亲吻你，然后离去。

"How can a body bounded by its limits cross the boundless oceans? May you give up your burdens, be removed from the cycle of being, and set yourself free from suffering." When THEY finish speaking, THEY kiss you and leave.
你愣在原地，十分惊愕，祂如同毒蝎伸出钩尾，对你轻轻一蛰。你看到疯狂场景，万物藤蔓生长不再受控，缠住受馈者，遍地孽物哀啼。

You freeze in place, terrified. THEY stretch out THEIR poisonous scorpion-like hooked tail, and sting you lightly. You see wondrous scenes flashing before your eyes — vines grow wildly and entangle their beneficiaries, and there are abominations and crying everywhere.
「你没事吧，给点反应？」黑塔不满的声音传来，「算了，这样也行，反正总会再遇到祂。」
"Are you okay? Talk to me," said Herta with a dissatisfied voice, "well, that's fine. We will meet THEM again."
你身处一片白昼中。你抬头，巨大的身影跨过裂界，身影如王储般英勇。
You stand in a vast expanse of whiteness and raise your head. You see a tall, valiant figure like a crown prince striding across the Fragmentum.
极亮的恒星风被煽动，你看到祂扬起长弓，接着，祂的身影突然跃至远处——你分明看到祂前来的模样，但一瞬后就只剩祂的背影。
The dazzling stellar wind wavered. You see THEM drawing a bow, and then THEY suddenly leap into the distance. You clearly see THEM coming, but after a moment, only his shadow remains.
「『巡猎』的岚…」黑塔低声说，「别发呆了，祂在你前头，快喊住祂。」
"Lan, The Hunt..." Herta whispered. "Don't be in a daze. THEY are ahead of you, hurry up and call THEM."
你发现自己无法动弹——不知何时，祂已将你钉于无形的墙，你甚至没有察觉祂在何时出手。你奋力挣扎，念起祂的名字，开口——
You find yourself unable to move at all — it's like THEY have nailed you to an invisible wall, and you don't even know when THEY made the move. You struggle, say THEIR name, and...
回合制游戏，你还得接我一招再走。
It's a turn-based game. You have to deal with me one time before you can go.
祂没有理会——你眨眼间，祂消失了，一切空空如也。
THEY ignore you and, in the blink of an eye, disappear from your sight.
「别太受挫，下回我把祂的社交属性调高点。」黑塔有些失望，「祂动作太快了。不过，足够我捕捉些祂的数据了。」
"Don't be too discouraged. I will increase THEIR social attribute next time." Herta was a little disappointed, "THEY move too fast. But I was able to intercept some of THEIR information."
「祂可能和阿基维利不太熟。」过了一会儿，她补充道，「也许祂眼里只有仇敌『丰饶』。」
"THEY're probably not very familiar with Akivili." A moment passed. She added, "Perhaps THEY only have THEIR enemy, the Abundance, on THEIR mind."
「一个可悲的家伙，目前的记载看来是这样。被仇恨与宿命束缚，永远得不到片刻的停歇。」从她的语气里，你倒并没有听出可悲的意味，「不过活着就是这样。」

"A tragic being, according to our record. They are bound by hatred and destiny, never to have even a moment's rest." You don't hear any hint of sympathy for said tragedy in her voice, "But that's life."
「是啊，『丰饶』的星神，药师。」黑塔冷漠地说，「全宇宙最大的善神，要么是个怪物。祂治愈看见的一切，小到一个原子，大到一个星系。没准祂能帮你解决星核的问题呢。」她玩笑般地补了一句。

"Yeah, Yaoshi, the Aeon of Abundance," Herta answers indifferently. "The kindest being in the whole universe, probably also a monster. THEY would heal everything THEY see, be it as small as an atom or as large as a star system. Perhaps THEY can solve your Stellaron problem for you." She adds jokingly.
你突然跌入漩涡里，抬起头，看到了祂——祂庞大身躯遮天蔽日，躯干有一道巨大的、被划开的创伤，汩汩金血从中流淌。你震栗不已，因为祂的视线瞥向了你——

You suddenly fall into a vortex. Looking up, you see THEIR huge body obscuring the sky and the sun. There is a huge, open wound on THEIR torso, from which golden blood flows. You tremble as THEIR eyes glance at you...
接着，空气立刻被掀起热浪，痛苦猛烈袭来——你突然意识到，这就是<color=#dbc291ff>死亡来临的瞬间。</color>
Immediately, the air suddenly heats up, and the pain hits you hard. You realize that this is <color=#dbc291ff>the moment of death</color>.
……嘀……嘀……你的意识已被切断……正被重新接入模拟宇宙……
...Beep ...Beep ...Your consciousness has been cut off... Reconnecting to the Simulated Universe...
「你刚被{RUBY_B#「毁灭星神」}纳努克{RUBY_E#}一瞬间就杀死了，连接切断了。」黑塔的声音在你耳边响起，「纳努克没见过阿基维利，是没什么交情，但没想到祂会直接攻击你。」

"You were disconnected because you just got killed by {RUBY_B#Aeon of Destruction}Nanook{RUBY_E#} in an instant," Herta's voice rang in your ear. "Nanook had never met Akivili before, so it's understandable that THEY don't know you. But I didn't expect THEM to attack you."
你这家伙也太不靠谱了！
「我知道，我只是忘记提醒了。」黑塔不以为然地说，「下次我会让螺丝咕姆事先做好防护。好，就这样，辛苦你啦，挂了。」
"I know, I just forgot to remind him," Herta said disapprovingly, "Next time I will ask Screwllum to take precautions. Alright, that's all, thanks for your hard work, bye."
敌人纷纷倒下，你无法控制兴奋情绪。你是天才，你很确信。你的注意力开始溃散，你爱每片叶子的震颤，你享受无穷思维的破坏力，直至你察觉自己的不对劲——这不是你。

Enemies are falling, and you can't contain your excitement. You are a genius, you are sure of it. Your concentration starts to crumble, you love the shaking of every leaf, you enjoy the destructive power of endless thoughts, until you realize that something is wrong with you — this is not you.
「阿基维利——阿基维利！」一个声音发疯大笑着，「好久不见，甚是想念！」你毛骨悚然，疯子才具有的感染力。
"Akivili, Akivili!" A voice laughed wildly, "It has been so long, I miss you greatly!" Your hairs stand on end. This is the infectious enthusiasm of a madman.
祂出现在你面前：祂没有头颅，怀抱面具。祂朝你摆手，兀自转圈，手臂悬在半空，肌肉控制指节颤动，姿态如同雕塑。

THEY appear before you: Without a head and a mask in THEIR arms. THEY waved THEIR hand at you, still spinning in circles, THEIR arms hanging in midair, THEIR muscles controlling THEIR trembling knuckles, and THEIR posture like that of a sculpture.
「我很伤心。」祂突然变得悲伤，「为什么你会死去？」祂痛苦地呜咽，泪水蹭过你的手背，你感到自己真的*死亡*过。
"I am so sad." THEY suddenly became sorrowful, "Why did you die?" THEY whimpered in pain, as tears ran down the back of your hand. You felt like you really had died.
「你陨落太久，宇宙失去了秩序。」祂开始拍手，「接着，一切开始变得混乱！这就是我想要的！我想拥抱你，<color=#dbc291ff>可惜我是个计算机里的方程</color>。噢，这好像还挺酷的。」祂挠了挠头。

"You have fallen too long and the universe has lost its order." THEY began to clap THEIR hands, "Then everything started to turn to chaos! This is what I want! I want to hug you, <color=#dbc291ff>unfortunately I'm just an equation in a computer</color>. Oh, that seems kinda cool." THEY scratched THEIR head.
「这个混账又知道了，我得让螺丝咕姆再改改祂的数据…」
"This punk has figured it out again. I have to get Screwllum to edit THEIR data once more..."
「我得跟你道歉，真的。我埋伏在你列车上一整年，只为炸掉它和你的无名客。我忍不住，抱歉。」祂愧疚地把手放在胸前，郑重鞠躬。

"I have to apologize to you, really. I lay in ambush aboard your train for a whole year just to blow it up with your Nameless followers. I couldn't resist, I'm sorry." THEY put THEIR hand to the chest guiltily and bowed solemnly.
「这混账还在装，祂已经发现你不是阿基维利了。」
"This disgrace is still pretending. THEY've already figured out you're not Akivili."
「你就是阿基维利——你还活着，有趣的对手！请你多耍耍我，那就是我想要的…成长起来，然后打败我！」祂踢着地面发出踏踏声，渐渐离开…你大口喘气，从折磨中逃生。

"You're Akivili — you're alive and well, what an interesting opponent! Please play with me more, that's what I want... Grow up and defeat me!" THEY kick the ground with a stomp and fade away... You gasp for air as you escape from the torment.
「『欢愉』的星神阿哈。」黑塔没好气地解释道，「非常难捉摸的家伙，祂大概发现自己活在游戏里了。这家伙很聒噪，也很危险。下次捏着鼻子和祂多聊几句吧，辛苦你了。」

"Aha, the Aeon of Elation." Herta explained uncharitably, "A very elusive one who probably found THEMSELF living in a game. This fella is very noisy and dangerous. Next time, bite your tongue and talk to THEM more, thanks for your hard work."
<color=#dbc291ff>「斯蒂芬•劳艾德提了一堆把『模拟宇宙』做有趣的点子，对于钓星神这件事毫无帮助，不过也许能让你玩得更开心点。」</color>黑塔叹气。

<color=#dbc291ff>"Stephen Lloyd has come up with a bunch of different ideas for making the Simulated Universe more fun. It won't help us attract more Aeons, but it might just help you have more fun."</color> Herta sighs.
总之，这是一次筹划已久的版本升级：更长的流程，更多的内容，更好的奖励，以及更诡异的难度曲线——所以做好准备，再回到「模拟宇宙」beta测试去吧。

Overall, this is a long-scheduled version update with longer gameplay, more content, better rewards, and a more bizarre difficulty curve — so get ready and prepare to get back into the Simulated Universe beta test!
我会为你提供更多帮助。
I'll help you out some more. Don't worry.
「模拟宇宙」要关闭一阵子了，我们想给系统来一次大升级，顺便看看虚拟阿哈这事怎么处理。下一次你会玩到正式版本的「模拟宇宙」，测试服先废弃了。

The Simulated Universe will be closed for a while. We want to give the whole thing a big overhaul, and think about what to do with Aha. Next time you will play the official version of the Simulated Universe, the test version will be abandoned.
我没想到阿哈会出现…看来得启用正式版本了。我们得花点时间升级，测试服先废弃了。
I never thought Aha would show up... Looks like I'll have to deploy the official version. We have to spend some time on upgrading, the test version will be abandoned.
正式版本的「模拟宇宙」！快把之前的测试版给忘了。变化还挺多的，要我给你个更新清单吗？
The official version of "Simulated Universe"! Forget about the previous beta version. There are lots of changes. Do you want me to give you the patch notes?
正式版本体验怎么样？你要是觉得简单，可以去挑战下个世界。
How's your experience with the official version? If you find it easy, you can go challenge the next world.
对了，有个模拟宇宙配套的图鉴装置在那边，你要是闲着没事可以去看看，没兴趣就算了。
By the way, there is a Simulated Universe Index over there, you can check it out if you have nothing else to do. But if you're not interested then forget it.
收集不就是人类的天性吗？
Is it not human nature to collect?
「干得不错，今天就到这儿吧。我和几位合伙人商量了一下，决定加大投入。等你下次来的时候，会玩到我们的『模拟宇宙』正式版本。」

"Great job. That's it for today. I've chatted with a few of my collaborators, and we've decided to re-double our efforts. Next time you come back, you'll enjoy our official version of Simulated Universe."
「在你测试的时候。」黑塔回答，「我们有些比公司和博识学会厉害得多的通讯手段，而且，就我们这个智商的人群来说，交流效率很高。」

"While you were testing," Herta replies. "We have methods of communication far more powerful than those possessed by the IPC or the Intelligentsia Guild. As far as people with our IQ are concerned, this communication is highly efficient."
「大概会来个翻天覆地的大升级吧。」黑塔回答，「螺丝咕姆和阮•梅没什么想法，但斯蒂芬兴奋极了，我估计他以为我们是真心想做个游戏。」

"Pretty much a complete overhaul of an upgrade," Herta replies. "Screwllum and Ruan Mei didn't think much about it, but Stephen is thrilled to pieces. I bet he thinks we're really developing a game here."
「斯蒂芬•劳艾德提了一堆把『模拟宇宙』做有趣的点子，对于钓星神这件事毫无帮助，不过也许能让你玩得更开心点。」黑塔叹气。
"Stephen Lloyd has come up with a bunch of different ideas for making the Simulated Universe more fun. It won't help us attract more Aeons, but it might just help you have more fun." Herta sighs.
喂，图鉴装置在右边，别迷路了。
Hey, the Index is on the right. Don't go the wrong way.
它没准能给你测试模拟宇宙带来一些帮助和动力…但也可能有点多余，我说不好。
It may help and motivate you with your test of the Simulated Universe... But it could also be a bit redundant. Well, I'm not sure.
黑塔的人偶出现在模拟宇宙里，她之前只用声音和你交流，因此这次现身着实令人意外。她看了看你，面无表情。
Herta's puppet appears in the Simulated Universe. Having only communicated with you via voice before, it's a little surprising to see her manifesting like this. She looks at you expressionlessly.
「这是休整区域，在可怕的模拟宇宙中为你提供喘息之地。我们希望这里能够回复生命，复活队友，购买装备，强化祝福什么的。」黑塔用不负责任的声音说道，「你可以在我这<color=#dbc291ff>强化祝福</color>，至于其他功能，你在房间里自己找找。」

"This is the resting area, giving you a place to catch your breath in an otherwise scary Simulated Universe. We hope you can restore your health, resurrect your team, buy equipment, and enhance your Blessings here." Herta says irresponsibly. "You can <color=#dbc291ff>Enhance Blessings</color> with me, and as for the other functions, you can find them in the room itself."
「嗯，嗯。」黑塔敷衍地应和，「作为游戏的管理员，我有权将你的祝福变得更强，甚至发生翻天覆地的变化——以一定的<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>作为代价，不然搜集那些碎片有什么用？现在就开始吧。」

"Mmm. Mmm." Herta replies flippantly. "As the game master, I can make your Blessings stronger, or even make earth-shattering changes to them — at the price of paying <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color>. What's the point in collecting those otherwise? Now then, let's begin."
走近那个相框，去吧。试试新玩意。
Go get closer to that picture frame. Time to try something new.
你看见一个男人，他大约三十岁，其貌不扬，上着一件白衬衫，下身是褐色的吊带裤。当他开口时，他的眼神四处游弋，像在躲闪：「呃，我想给这个游戏加点儿随机事件，那会很好玩…不过，似乎脑波读取器的稳定性有点问题。所以，呃，现在你碰到的事件会比较，呃，单调。我很抱歉。」

You see a man about thirty years old with an unremarkable appearance, wearing a white shirt and brown suspenders. His eyes wander while he speaks, as if avoiding something. "Uh, I wanted to add some random occurrences to this game to make it more fun... But I think the brainwave reader is on the fritz. So, uh, now the events you encounter will be a little more, uh, monotonous. Sorry about that."
「比如，」男人没有看你，他磕磕绊绊地说，「呃，比如，这就是个随机事件。我写了一些模板，但『模拟宇宙』现在没办法把它转换成有效的内容。所以你会看到下面这些……」

"Like," he stutters without looking at you, "like, uh, this is a random Occurrence now. I wrote some templates, but the simulation currently doesn't have any way of converting them into content. So, you will just see the following..."
说着，男人的身影消失了，他所在的地方出现了一行字：你遇到了<color=#dbc291ff>随机事件</color>。
After speaking, the man disappears, and a line of words materializes where he was standing: You have encountered a <color=#dbc291ff>random Occurrence</color>.
「呃，就是这么单调。」男人的声音说，他似乎是真的很抱歉。
"Uh, yeah, that's how monotonous." The man says as if he is genuinely sorry.
「希望很快就能修复。」男人诚恳地说，「我真的很想你玩得愉快，真的。呃，再次向你道歉。」
"Hopefully very soon," the man says earnestly. "I really want you to have a good time, really. Um, once again, I'm really sorry about that."
这个敌人的数据好像有点问题…它的能力和战法和你印象中的不一样。
There seems to be something wrong with this enemy's data... Its abilities and tactics are different from what you remember.
不能把现实的经验套用在这种敌人身上，换用新的打法吧。
You can't apply real-world experience to this kind of enemy. Let's switch up the rules of the game, then.
前面那个沉浸装置，它可以生成我之前说的「位面饰品」数据。
That immersion device in front can generate the Planar Ornament data that I mentioned before.
给你个沉浸器，去试试。每次生成「位面饰品」都需要沉浸器。
Here's an Immersifier. Go try it out. You need an Immersifier every time you generate Planar Ornaments.
你的手脚突然不听使唤。黑塔——「模拟宇宙」的最高权力者又冻结了你的行动权限，人偶没好气的声音在耳边响起：「你怎么不去打那个东西？」

You suddenly lose control of your limbs. Herta — the Simulated Universe's most powerful being — has revoked your permissions again, and the puppet's angry voice sounds in your ear: "Why didn't you hit that thing?"
「那个东西。」黑塔不耐烦地说，「就是你平时走在路上，会用球棒打破的玩意儿。你怎么不去打它了？没看见吗？」
"That thing," Herta says impatiently, "that's what you usually smash with a bat when you walk past it on the road. Why didn't you go and hit it? Can't you see it?"
「居然没看见…」你听见黑塔仿佛咬牙切齿地嘟囔，「小小年纪，一点都不知道观察生活……」
"You didn't see it..." You can hear Herta muttering angrily with gritted teeth. "You are so young, yet you have no idea how to be observant..."
「真势利…」你听见黑塔仿佛咬牙切齿地嘟囔，「玩游戏不就是把看到的一切都打烂吗……」
"What a snob..." You can hear Herta muttering angrily with gritted teeth. "Isn't playing games all about smashing up everything you can see...?"
「『模拟宇宙』和外边不一样，可破坏物会掉落<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>，很有用的。现在，回去把那玩意打了。」黑塔叹了口气，「白给你发钱，你就拿着！」

"The Simulated Universe is different from the real world. Destructible objects will drop useful <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color>. Now, go back and hit that plaything." Herta sighed, "If something's free, just take it!"
你一进入「模拟宇宙」，就听见黑塔抑制不住兴奋的声音：「{NICKNAME}，」你听得出她在努力佯装正常，「目前的『模拟宇宙』你还适应吗？」
You can hear Herta's excitement as soon as you enter the Simulated Universe: "{NICKNAME}," she asks, trying to play it cool, "Have you adapted to this version of the Simulated Universe yet?"
「哦，好，明白了，这样啊。」黑塔流畅地回答，「有个好消息告诉你：通过这段时间的沉浸体验与学习，这台机器已经很适应你了，现在你通过深度沉浸，让『模拟宇宙』引导你的意识，为你打造专属的 <color=#dbc291ff>『位面饰品』</color>。」

"Ah, okay, I see. Got it," replies Herta fluidly, "I've got some good news for you: The computer's grown highly adapted to you throughout all the immersion experiences and machine learning we've been doing. You can immerse yourself deeper now. Let the Simulated Universe guide your mind and build your own exclusive <color=#dbc291ff>Planar Ornament</color>."
"It's just an expression, don't worry about it."
「是呀。当你想面面俱到的时候，事情就会越变越复杂。做减法是一门艺术，目前我们还不打算搞艺术。」
"Yup, things get more complicated when you try to cover all your bases. Minimalism is a real art form, and we're not doing enough of it right now."
「机器利用你的意识，为『模拟宇宙』增添变量，从而产生『或然的世界』。接着，外面的我利用研究裂界掌握的遗器复制技术，把这部分数据提取出来，制作成『位面饰品』。它就像是一种遗器，只不过更庞大…也更浓缩。」

"The machine uses your mind to add variables into the Simulated Universe, thereby generating what we call a Probable World. Then, I use Relic-cloning tech mastered from my Fragmentum research to extract this part out of all the data, creating a Planar Ornament. It's like a kind of Relic, but much bigger... and much more condensed."
「在这里就不多说了，接着探索吧，可以进行沉浸的时候我再向你说明。」她难得地笑了一声。
"That's all you need to know for now. Get exploring, and I'll tell you more once the immersion function is ready to be used." She lets out a rare laugh.
（黑塔宣称的升级…好像没什么区别？）
(Herta's so-called upgrades... seem to make no difference at all?)
寒气浮上背脊，一层烟雾罩住你的眼睛——异象并不陌生，它来自「记忆」的星神浮黎，但这一次没有停留。星神好像没有注意到你，祂的消失与出现同样毫无征兆。

Cold air creeps up your back, and a layer of smoke covers your eyes — This is a familiar scene from Fuli, the Aeon of Remembrance, but this time THEY did not stop. The Aeon doesn't seem to notice you, and THEIR disappearance is just as mysterious as THEIR appearance.
黑塔的声音适时响起：<color=#dbc291ff>「别灰心，这已经很好了，在你之前的测试者甚至得不到命途的回应。继续吧{NICKNAME}。」</color>听上去她已经从短暂的激动状态中醒觉，因为声音又恢复成那平淡冷漠的，仿佛机械般毫无热情的语调了。

You hear Herta's voice at just the right time. <color=#dbc291ff>"Don't be discouraged. You're already doing great. Previous testers never even got a response from the Paths. Keep going, {NICKNAME}."</color> Sounds like she has settled down from her excitement, and her voice has returned to the usual emotionless and mechanical register.
<color=#dbc291ff>「是啊，是啊，就当是新手福利吧。等你熟悉了『模拟宇宙』，我就不会再频繁打扰你啦，还有那么多事情要干呢，你就自己玩吧。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"Yup, sure am. Just treat it as the perk of being a rookie. Once you're familiar with the Simulated Universe, I won't bother you too much. There's so much to get done, so just play around by yourself."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「你以为升级是什么，电子游戏的版本更新吗？每一个半月给你点无足轻重的小玩意儿？」</color>黑塔啧了一声，<color=#dbc291ff>「这可是一整个微型宇宙！如果所有变化你都能一眼看见，我们还费劲培育宇宙干什么，给你家列车盖个花园不就行了？」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"What do you think an upgrade is? The next version of a video game? Some tiny rewards handed out every one-and-half-months?"</color> Herta snorts. <color=#dbc291ff>"This is a whole micro-universe! If you could see all the changes at a glance, why would we spend all the time training a universe? I can just build a garden for your Express instead!"</color>
黑塔叹了口气：<color=#dbc291ff>「再往前走一点有个下载装置，记得用它扩充队伍。你的大脑正在逐渐适应『模拟宇宙』，可用的内存会慢慢释放给你，这样就可以让更多的人参战。好了，别愣着啦，去选祝福吧。」</color>

Herta sighs. <color=#dbc291ff>"There's a Downloader just a little further ahead. Remember to use it to expand your team. Your brain is gradually adapting to the Simulated Universe, and the available RAM will gradually become accessible for you so you can play with more people. Alright, snap out of it. Go and choose your Blessing."</color>
「记忆」的祝福体现在冰冻上，它能强化冰冻的效果和收益。
The Blessings of Remembrance are embodied in Ice, enhancing Freeze effects and buffs.
那个就是下载终端，去试试。
That's the download terminal. Go give it a try.
瞧，左边是你大脑里的虚拟朋友，右边是已经下载进入系统缓存的队友。
Look, on the left are the virtual friends in your brain, and on the right are teammates already downloaded into the system cache.
先带上我，把队伍凑足四个人，也能最大限度地发挥「记忆」祝福的作用。
Take me with you so you can get four people in the team. This also maximizes the effects of the Remembrance Blessing.
为了延长流程，系统加入了「区域」这个概念。现在穿过传送门，我们去下一个区域。
To extend the session, the system created a concept of "domains." Go through the teleporter into the next zone.
「欢愉」的祝福喜欢出其不意，适合能进行追击的角色。
Blessings of Elation likes to surprise people, and is useful for characters with Follow-Up ATKs.
斯蒂芬给场地里加了点东西。他说：翻箱倒柜和打砸破坏是游戏必不可少的两种体验。
Stephen added something to the stage. He said ransacking and smashing things are two essential experiences in games.
一个又一个敌人倒在你的面前，天啊，你简直无人能挡！就像神话传说里的英雄那样英姿伟岸！你挥舞棍棒，打倒一只不自量力胆敢挑战你的野兽，不禁放声大笑。畅快的欢愉令你忘乎所以——慢着，到底发生了什么？

One enemy after another falls before you. Oh my, you are unstoppable! Just like the heroes of myth and legend! You can't help but laugh as you swing your baseball bat and take down a beast that dares to challenge you. You are getting carried away by the bliss — wait, what the heck just happened?
<color=#dbc291ff>「阿基维利，阿基维利！」</color>一个愉悦的声音笑道，<color=#dbc291ff>「真的是你？还是某个小小生灵在和我开致命玩笑呢——好啦，我很想张开双臂欢迎你，可是我没有手臂！毕竟我只是个被囚禁在计算机里的虚假神灵！」</color>祂的说话有种神奇的魔力，令你情不自禁地感到放松。

<color=#dbc291ff>"Akivili! Akivili!"</color> A cheerful voice laughs. <color=#dbc291ff>"Is that really you? Or is some tiny being playing a fatal joke on me — well, I'd love to welcome you with open arms, but I don't have any arms! I'm just a false god imprisoned within a simulation, after all!"</color> There's something magical about THEIR words that causes you to completely relax.
<color=#dbc291ff>「这个混账又知道了，我得让螺丝咕姆再改改祂的数据…」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"This punk has figured it out again. I have to get Screwllum to edit THEIR data once more..."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「问你个问题，伙计：假货什么时候能成为真的？」</color>——你仿佛看见（其实你看不见）声音冲你眨了眨眼睛——<color=#dbc291ff>「答案是你信以为真的时候！加油啊，天才们，你们差一点就唬过我了！没事，我会把一切都忘掉，等你来耍我！再见，*阿基维利*。」</color>

"A question for you, my friend. When can a fake become the real thing?" — You seem to see (but actually don't) them wink at you — "The answer is... When you believe it to be real! Come on, geniuses. You almost fooled me for a second there! It's okay. I'll forget everything and wait for you to trick me again! So long, Akivili."
<color=#dbc291ff>「那是『欢愉』阿哈。」</color>黑塔没好气地解释道，<color=#dbc291ff>「非常难捉摸的星神，祂大概发现自己是假的了。不过，我想祂也不会在乎。这家伙很聒噪，捏着鼻子和祂聊几句吧。辛苦你了。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"That's Aha the Elation,"</color> Herta explains sullenly. <color=#dbc291ff>"A very elusive Aeon who probably figured out that THEY are a simulation. But I don't think THEY even mind it. THEY are very chatty. Just pinch your nose and have a chat with THEM. Thanks in advance."</color>
战胜这个家伙吧，让我们结束这趟旅程。
Beat this entity, and let's end this trip for now.
<color=#dbc291ff>「干得不错，今天就到这儿吧。我和几位合伙人商量了一下，决定加大投入。等你下次来的时候，会看到一个更完善的『模拟宇宙』。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"Great job. That's it for today. I've chatted with a few of my collaborators, and we've decided to re-double our efforts. Next time you come back, you'll see an even more perfected Simulated Universe."</color>
When did you chat with them?
<color=#dbc291ff>「在你测试的时候。」</color>黑塔回答，<color=#dbc291ff>「我们有些比公司和博识学会厉害得多的通讯手段，而且，就我们这个智商的人群来说，交流效率很高。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"While you were testing,"</color> Herta replies. <color=#dbc291ff>"We have methods of communication far more powerful than those possessed by the IPC or the Intelligentsia Guild. As far as people with our IQ are concerned, this communication is highly efficient."</color>
What tricks are you trying to pull this time?
<color=#dbc291ff>「大概会来个翻天覆地的大升级吧。」</color>黑塔回答，<color=#dbc291ff>「螺丝咕姆和阮•梅没什么想法，但斯蒂芬兴奋极了，我估计他以为我们是真心想做个游戏。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"Pretty much a complete overhaul of an upgrade,"</color> Herta replies. <color=#dbc291ff>"Screwllum and Ruan Mei didn't think much about it, but Stephen is thrilled to pieces. I bet he thinks we're really developing a game here."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「斯蒂芬•劳艾德提了一堆把『模拟宇宙』做有趣的点子，对于钓星神这件事毫无帮助，不过也许能让你玩得更开心点。」</color>黑塔叹气，<color=#dbc291ff>「就这样吧，我也得想想有没有更方便的觐见星神的法子。升级完成后我会通知你的。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"Stephen Lloyd has come up with a bunch of different ideas for making the Simulated Universe more fun. It won't help us attract more Aeons, but it might just make you have more fun."</color> Herta sighs. <color=#dbc291ff>"That's it then. I have to think whether there's an easier way to have an audience with an Aeon. I'll buzz you once the upgrade's complete."</color>
「模拟宇宙」要关闭一阵子了，我们想给系统来一次大升级，顺便看看虚拟阿哈这事怎么处理。
The Simulated Universe will be closed for a while. We want to give the whole thing a big overhaul, and think about what to do with the simulated Aha.
What a shame! I was just getting addicted.
按照斯蒂芬的说法：以后的版本你会更「上瘾」，信不信由你。
According to Stephen, you'll be even more addicted in future versions, believe it or not.
那家伙的热情也太不寻常了……
That guy's enthusiasm is just unreal...
It's okay. I'm not interested either.
「欢愉」是个很奇怪的星神，祂混乱又清醒，同时不像别的星神那样固执。阿哈不会停留在单一的概念里，或许祂看破了「模拟宇宙」的本质。

Elation is a very strange Aeon. THEY are both confused and clear-minded, and not as stubborn as the other Aeons. Aha won't stay confined to a single concept. THEY may have seen right through the nature of the Simulated Universe.
你可以走了，准备完成后我会发信息给你的。
You can go. I'll message you when I'm ready.
Hang on. I still have questions.
里面的星神真的是虚拟的吗？
Are the Aeons in there really simulations?
哼哼，你也觉得祂们很厉害吧？虚拟星神和人工智能可不一样。我和阮•梅想到了个办法，把虚拟星神和现实的命途连接到了一起。
Ha, do you find THEM awe-inspiring, too? A virtual Aeon is not the same as any old AI. Ruan Mei and I came up with a way to connect virtual Aeons with THEIR real Paths.
「模拟宇宙」里的星神相当于一个终端，祂的神格和智慧都来自于真实存在的星神。要不然，我们拿到的情报还有什么价值呢？
Aeons in the Simulated Universe are the equivalent of a terminal, and THEIR divinity and wisdom come from the real Aeon. Otherwise, what would be the value in any information we get?
你们打算怎么处理阿哈？
Have you decided on what to do with Aha?
我和螺丝咕姆有个初步共识：首先，他会想办法削减虚拟阿哈的倾向性，甚至屏蔽祂的自我认知部分，但那有些危险，没准会引来真正的「欢愉」……

I have a basic consensus with Screwllum. First, he'll try reducing the partiality values of the simulated Aha, even going as far as blocking THEIR Intra-Cognition — but that's a little dangerous and may attract the real Elation...
如果我们评估下来不可行，大概会放任这个阿哈随便玩耍，隔绝掉祂和其它虚拟星神的交流吧。
If we feel that method is unfeasible, then we'll probably leave this Aha to play however THEY like, while isolating THEM from communicating with the other simulated Aeons.
你常挂在嘴边的斯蒂芬是谁？
Who's this Stephen you keep going on about?
唔，他是我们的第四个合伙人，#84「怪人」斯蒂芬•劳艾德。作为一个天才，这家伙对发挥才能毫无兴趣，每天2/3的时间花在他养父的水果店里。
Oh, he's our fourth partner, member #84, Stephen "Weirdo" Lloyd. That guy's a genius with no interest in using his abilities, and spends two-thirds of his time in his adoptive father's fruit shop.
对「模拟宇宙」这么酷的项目，他也提不起劲儿。斯蒂芬帮了我们一点忙，他本人要求匿名，不想大张旗鼓，可能有些天才就是不愿意成为天才吧。

He can't even get himself excited about something as cool as the Simulated Universe. Stephen did us a favor and asked to remain anonymous — he doesn't want to make a big splash at all. Perhaps some geniuses wish they weren't one.
You better beg me to come back next time.
If I have to, then I will.
我给「模拟宇宙」做了一次预升级，不过还得等等再启用，你到哪儿去了？我一直在等你的测试报告——现在快进去！
I did a pre-upgrade for the Simulated Universe, but you'll have to wait until I can deploy it. Where have you been? I've been waiting for your test report — get in there, now!
我没想到阿哈会出现…看来得启用升级版本了。
I never thought Aha would show up... Looks like I'll have to deploy the upgrade version.
What a shame! I was just getting addicted.
喔，没事，更新用不了几秒钟。斯蒂芬特别热情，内容早就做好了。

Just say them out loud to me.
首先，斯蒂芬大幅调整了流程，按他的说法「在每个阶段的挑战目标会更明确」——我不大理解。但我是天才，不代表我很懂游戏，所以随他吧。

Firstly, Stephen has made significant adjustments to the gameplay loop. According to him, "The challenge goal of each phase is even clearer" — I don't really get it. Just because I'm a genius doesn't mean I understand gaming — so whatever he says goes.
这个版本提供了更高的自由度：你可以自由搭配自己的队伍，选择更多样的祝福，还会有随机发生的事件确保每次都有不同的体验。
This version offers a higher degree of freedom. You can mix and match your team, choose from a variety of Blessings, and there are even random events to guarantee you a unique experience every time.
最后，还加入了一点小机制，帮助你更好地假扮阿基维利。
Finally, there's a new mechanic that helps you to better pretend to be Akivili.
Alright. You'll find out soon enough.
有多个世界供你选择，难度循序渐进。
There are many worlds to choose from, with progressive difficulties.
现在你可以选择自己认识的人加入队伍，他们的能力也和现实中你的认知一致。
Now you can choose from people you know to join your team. Their abilities are consistent with your perception of them in reality.
准备好了就按这个按钮，机器会将你传送到第一世界。
Press this button when you're ready and the machine will teleport you to World 1.
你的手脚突然不听使唤。黑塔——「模拟宇宙」的最高权力者又冻结了你的行动权限，人偶没好气的声音在耳边响起：<color=#dbc291ff>「你怎么不去打那个东西？」</color>

You suddenly lose control of your limbs. Herta — the Simulated Universe's most powerful being — has revoked your permissions again, and the puppet's angry voice sounds in your ear: <color=#dbc291ff>"Why didn't you hit that thing?"</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「那个东西。」</color>黑塔不耐烦地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「就是你平时走在路上，会用球棒打破的玩意儿。你怎么不去打它了？没看见吗？」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"That thing."</color> Herta says impatiently. <color=#dbc291ff>"You usually smash it with a bat when you walk past. Why didn't you go and hit it? Can't you see it?"</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「居然没看见…」</color>你听见黑塔仿佛咬牙切齿地嘟囔，<color=#dbc291ff>「小小年纪，一点都不知道观察生活……」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"You didn't see it..."</color> You can hear Herta muttering angrily with gritted teeth. <color=#dbc291ff>"You are so young, yet you have no idea how to be observant..."</color>
I'm psychologically well and don't need to hit anything.
<color=#dbc291ff>「真势利…」</color>你听见黑塔仿佛咬牙切齿地嘟囔，<color=#dbc291ff>「玩游戏不就是把看到的一切都打烂吗……」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"What a snob..."</color> You can hear Herta muttering angrily with gritted teeth. <color=#dbc291ff>"Isn't playing games all about smashing up everything you can see...?"</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「这次不一样，这里是『模拟宇宙』。」</color>黑塔叹了口气，<color=#dbc291ff>「在『模拟宇宙』里，可破坏物会掉落珍贵的东西，也就是宇宙碎片。现在，回去把那玩意打了。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"This time it's different. This is the Simulated Universe."</color> Herta sighs once again. <color=#dbc291ff>"In the Simulated Universe, destructible objects can drop precious things called Cosmic Fragments. Now, go back and smash those things up."</color>
「模拟宇宙」里的可破坏物还会掉宇宙碎片哦。
Destructible objects in the Simulated Universe will drop Cosmic Fragments.
黑塔的人偶出现在模拟宇宙里，她之前只用声音和你交流，因此这次现身着实令人意外。她看了看你，面无表情。
Herta's puppet appears in the Simulated Universe. Having only communicated with you via voice before, it's a little surprising to see her manifesting like this. She looks at you expressionlessly.
<color=#dbc291ff>「这是休整区域，在可怕的模拟宇宙中为你提供喘息之地。我们希望这里能够回复生命，复活队友，购买装备，强化祝福什么的。」</color>黑塔用不负责任的声音说道，<color=#dbc291ff>「不过这才是第一世界，你用不着那么多功能，所以你只能强化祝福。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"This is the resting area, giving you a place to catch your breath in an otherwise scary Simulated Universe. We hope you can restore your health, resurrect your team, buy equipment, and enhance your Blessings here."</color> Herta says in an irresponsible tone. <color=#dbc291ff>"But this is just World 1. You don't need too many features, so you can only enhance Blessings."</color>
I need those other features too!
<color=#dbc291ff>「嗯，嗯。」</color>黑塔敷衍地应和，<color=#dbc291ff>「作为游戏的管理员，我有权将你的祝福变得更强，甚至发生翻天覆地的变化——以一定的宇宙碎片作为代价，不然搜集那些碎片有什么用？现在就开始吧。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"Mmm. Mmm."</color> Herta replies flippantly. <color=#dbc291ff>"As the game master, I can make your Blessings stronger, or even make earth-shattering changes to them — at the price of Cosmic Fragments. What's the point in collecting those otherwise? Now then, let's begin."</color>
Approach that spot of light. Go on.
你看见一个男人，他大约三十岁，其貌不扬，上着一件白衬衫，下身是褐色的吊带裤。当他开口时，他的眼神四处游弋，像在躲闪：<color=#dbc291ff>「呃，我想给这个游戏加点儿随机事件，那会很好玩…不过，似乎脑波读取器的稳定性有点问题。所以，呃，现在你碰到的事件会比较，呃，单调。我很抱歉。」</color>

You see a man about thirty years old with an unremarkable appearance, wearing a white shirt and brown suspenders. His eyes wander while he speaks, as if he's avoiding something. <color=#dbc291ff>"Uh, I wanted to add some random Occurrences to this game to make it more fun... But I think the brainwave reader is on the fritz. So, uh, now the events you encounter will be a little more, uh, bland. Sorry about that."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「比如，」</color>男人没有看你，他磕磕绊绊地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「呃，比如，这就是个随机事件。我写了一些模板，但『模拟宇宙』现在没办法把它转换成有效的内容。所以你会看到下面这些……」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"Like,"</color> he stutters without looking at you, <color=#dbc291ff>"like, uh, this is a random Occurrence now. I wrote some templates, but the Simulated Universe currently can't convert them into content. So, you will just see the following..."</color>
说着，男人的身影消失了，他所在的地方出现了一行字：你遇到了「商店」事件。
After speaking, the man disappears and a line of words materializes where he was standing: "You have encountered a Shop event"
购买一个随机普通祝福
购买一个随机稀有祝福
<color=#dbc291ff>「呃，就是这么单调。」</color>男人的声音说，他似乎是真的很抱歉。
<color=#dbc291ff>"Uh, yeah, that's how bland it'll be for now."</color> The man says as if he is genuinely sorry.
<color=#dbc291ff>「希望很快就能修复。」</color>男人诚恳地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「我真的很想你玩得愉快，真的。呃，再次向你道歉。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Hopefully very soon,"</color> the man says earnestly. <color=#dbc291ff>"I really want you to have a good time. Really. Um, once again, I'm really sorry about that."</color>
第一世界就这样了，你可以去挑战下一个世界。第二世界会出现更强的敌人。
That's World 1. You can push on and challenge the next world, with stronger enemies appearing in World 2.
听说难度会高一点，敌人也会变得更强。螺丝咕姆说按照他的模型，你有<unbreak>60%</unbreak>的可能性在首次挑战时输掉，不过反正没啥损失。

Apparently it's more difficult with stronger enemies. Screwllum said that, according to his model, you have a <unbreak>60%</unbreak> chance of losing the first time, but it's not like you'll actually lose anything.
You'll clear it sooner or later.
你们真的想研究星神吗？
Are you folks really here to research Aeons?
我感觉越来越像游戏了…
This is feeling more and more like a real game...
说什么呢，我们的目标是不会变的。现在快去准备。
What are you talking about? Our goals haven't changed. Now run off and get ready.
这个敌人的数据好像有点问题…它的能力和战法和你印象中的不一样。
There seems to be something wrong with this enemy's data... Its abilities and tactics are different from what you remember.
不能把现实的经验套用在这种敌人身上，换用新的打法吧。
You can't apply real-world experience to this kind of enemy. Let's switch up the rules of the game, then.
哈，你得到了一个「奇物」！我从收藏里挑了点有趣的东西放进「模拟宇宙」里了。
Ha, you got a Curio! I picked out some interesting stuff from my collection and uploaded them to the Simulated Universe.
「奇物」有持续性的效果，它的获取会改变你接下来的探索体验。
Curios give a persistent buff, and they are going to completely rewrite your subsequent exploration.
唔，「模拟宇宙」做了个技能树系统，我在犹豫要不要启用…如果开启了，你在「模拟宇宙」里会慢慢变强，但这么做是不是好事，我说不清。你先试试吧。

Well, the Simulated Universe has an Ability Tree system. I'm debating whether to enable it... If I do, you'll gradually grow stronger in the simulation, but I can't say for sure whether that's a good thing. You try it out first.
你想要的变化来了，现在你可以选择不同的行进路线。下一个区域的内容会显示在门上。
The change you wanted is here. Now you can choose a different travel route. The content for the next domain will be displayed on the door.
你甫一进入「模拟宇宙」，就听见黑塔抑制不住兴奋的声音：<color=#dbc291ff>「{NICKNAME}，」</color>你听得出她在努力佯装正常，<color=#dbc291ff>「目前的『模拟宇宙』你还适应吗？」</color>

You can hear Herta's excitement as soon as you enter the Simulated Universe: <color=#dbc291ff>"{NICKNAME}," </color>she asks, trying to play it cool, <color=#dbc291ff>"have you adapted to this version of the Simulated Universe yet?"</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「哦，好，明白了，这样啊。」</color>黑塔流畅地回答，<color=#dbc291ff>「有个好消息告诉你：通过这段时间的沉浸体验与学习，这台机器已经很适应你了，现在你通过深度沉浸，让『模拟宇宙』引导你的意识，为你打造专属的『位面饰品』。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"Ah, okay, I see. Got it."</color> Herta replies smoothly. <color=#dbc291ff>"I've got some good news for you: The computer's grown highly adapted to you throughout all the immersion experiences and machine learning we've been doing. Now you can immerse yourself deeper. Let the Simulated Universe guide your mind and build your own exclusive Planar Ornament."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"It's just a manner of speech. Don't think about it too much."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「是呀。当你想面面俱到的时候，事情就会越变越复杂。做减法是一门艺术，目前我们还不打算搞艺术。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Yup, things get more complicated when you try to cover all your bases. Minimalism is a real art form, and we're not doing enough of it right now."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「机器利用你的意识，为『模拟宇宙』增添变量，从而产生『或然的世界』。接着，外面的我利用研究裂界掌握的遗器复制技术，把这部分数据提取出来，制作成『位面饰品』。它就像是一种遗器，只不过更庞大…也更浓缩。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"The machine uses your mind to add variables into the Simulated Universe, thereby generating what we call a Probable World. Then, I will use Relic-cloning technology mastered from Fragmentum research to extract this part from the data, creating a Planar Ornament. It's like a kind of Relic, but much bigger... and much more condensed."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「在这里就不多说了，接着探索吧，可以进行沉浸的时候我再向你说明。」</color>她难得地笑了一声。
<color=#dbc291ff>"That's all you need to know for now. Get exploring, and I'll fill in the gaps once you are ready to get immersed."</color>She lets out a laugh, a rare thing from her.
这是沉浸装置，它会生成「位面饰品」数据。退出后，我会把「位面饰品」给你。
This is an immersion device that can generate Planar Ornament data. I'll give you the Planar Ornaments once you exit the simulation.
使用它还是非常耗神的，你可以把一部分开拓力储存起来，在沉浸时使用。
They are really exhausting to use, so save up some of your Trailblaze Power and use those for immersion.
你静待在原地，渴望跟上岚的速度。但时间缓慢流逝…什么也没发生。
You wait in place, hoping you can keep up with Lan. As time slowly slips by, nothing happens.
「忘了告诉你，<color=#dbc291ff>岚在这时还没出现</color>。」黑塔开始拨自己头上的花，一片一片地扯，「『繁育』陨落是很久以前的事，远早于岚的诞生。」

"I've forgotten to tell you that <color=#dbc291ff>Lan hadn't emerged at this period</color>." Herta starts plucking out the flowers on her head one by one as she continues, "The fall of the Propagation took place a long time ago. It was way earlier than Lan's birth."
So Lan has nothing to do with this matter?
「显然。」黑塔开始敷衍，「不过你也不会白费力气，模拟宇宙可能会推演出一些历史上不存在的命途痕迹。虽然祂不会来了…」

"Obviously so." Herta explains perfunctorily, "Your effort won't go to waste, as the Simulated Universe might reveal some traces of the Path that aren't recorded in history. Still, Lan won't be coming..."
我怀念被祂的利箭刺穿！
I miss being pierced through by THEIR arrows!
「不要对星神产生不必要的依恋。」黑塔皱着眉头嫌弃你，「虽然这次见不到祂啰，不过你也不会白费力气，模拟宇宙也可能推演出一些历史上不存在的命途痕迹。虽然祂不会来了…」

"Don't get too attached to an Aeon." Herta frowns at you with disgust. "Although you can't meet Lan this time, your effort won't go to waste, as the Simulated Universe might reveal some traces of the Path that aren't recorded in history. Still, Lan won't be coming..."
祂不会来了！这句话侵入你的脑海，被你反复咀嚼。祂不会来了！它来回闪烁…你感到自己像吞下镇静药剂一般知觉失调。接着！黑塔的声音渐渐被拉远，胡作非为的意象在你的脑中乱窜……

"Lan won't be coming..." You ruminate over this as the words invade your mind. The thought flashes all over, throwing your senses off-balance as though you have just downed a bottle of sedative. Next, Herta's voice gradually fades away while chaotic and delusional images wreak havoc in your brain...
祂不会来了…你还是渴望见到祂？向宇宙祈祷吧，三秒之后，或许你可以……
THEY won't be coming... but you still long to meet THEM. Make a prayer to the universe, and you might see THEM in three seconds...
你睁开双眼，却发现自己身在一片绚丽的画廊中央！趁着蓝皮肤的老头史学家出门，你那积蓄已久——渴望更加迅捷的<color=#dbc291ff>巡猎</color>信仰压制了其他的躁动，你迅速吸取了无数图画，它们像春天的剖面一样变换着花瓣的颜色…意象的王国在加速流动的时空里愈筑愈高。

You open your eyes and find yourself in the middle of a colorful gallery! While the blue-skinned elderly historian is out, your long-accumulated desire for greater swiftness in <color=#dbc291ff>The Hunt</color> overpowers your other impulses. You quickly absorb numerous paintings, their petals changing colors like the cross-section of spring... The imaginary kingdom grows stronger in the accelerated flow of time.
穿过图画，感官对知识的索取如同狂热的欲望一般加速。直觉像鲜艳的螃蟹爬过你的脑海，最终你在那幅最疯狂的、散发着怪异色彩的<color=#dbc291ff>贡多拉</color>前停下了。在虚与实的边界中，你甚至有献祭自我的冲动，寻找「繁育」陨落的真相……

Moving through the paintings, your senses' demand for knowledge elevates to a burning desire, and your intuition creeps through your brain like a brightly-colored crab. At last, you stop before the craziest painting of a <color=#dbc291ff>gondola</color> in odd colors. In the boundary between the virtual and the real, you even feel the urge to sacrifice yourself in return for the truth behind the fall of the Propagation...
你凭借巡猎的直觉找到了答案所在的那一页——是概念的膨胀！祂的子嗣吞噬了太多食物…祂毁坏了宇宙「秩序」…祂威胁了世间「均衡」…祂拦住了「开拓」的道路…

With The Hunt's instinct, you find the page with the answer — it is the expansion of concepts! THEIR descendants have gobbled up too much food... THEY have disrupted the Order of the universe... THEY have threatened the Equilibrium of the universe... THEY have blocked the way of the Trailblaze...
你凭借巡猎的直觉找到了答案所在的那一页——这是完全空白的一页；这本书从后往前撰写，结局早已注定，而起因却可被任意书写…无论是哪个可怜虫被利用，对棋局都毫无关系。

With The Hunt's instinct, you find the page with the answer — it is a blank page. The book is written in reverse chronology, with the ending predetermined. Yet, the cause can be made up arbitrarily. Whoever is the poor soul that is manipulated will have no bearing on the big picture.
...Fine then, but I still want to see Lan.
「说了这不可能。」黑塔耸了耸鼻子，「除非我把祂的出生日期用修改器强行调一下。但这还有什么意义？」
"I've told you that isn't possible." Herta scrunches her nose and adds, "Unless I change THEIR date of birth with the modifier, but what's the point in doing so?"
…好吧，模拟宇宙会给我点什么吗？
...Fine then. Will I get anything from the Simulated Universe?
「报酬想要多少都有的是。」黑塔讥笑着，「继续玩就是了。」
"You'll get paid whatever you ask for," Herta chuckles. "Just keep playing."
「根据你的脑前额叶活动，多巴胺会在三秒后大量涌入——你熟悉的家伙要来了。」阮•梅只陈述事实，「但不完全一样。」

"Based on your prefrontal cortex's activity, dopamine will be flooding into your brain in three seconds. That familiar experience will come soon, but it will be slightly different this time," Ruan Mei states matter-of-factly.
躁动的意象在你的脑中乱窜…你相信！保护可有多种方式，你的开拓之旅无论以何种姿态，都可以抚慰众生。
Chaotic images run rampant in your mind... You believe that protection can take various forms, and your trailblazing expedition, regardless of its form, will bring solace to all beings.
蒸汽浮现，你有种熟悉的感受——更多幽灵生命从黄油中绽开，巨大的城墙下满是虫壳蝶翅的尸骸，那些寰宇灾祸被祂的城墙挡在了外边；更多生灵正在巨大的城墙脚下运土，将它愈筑愈高……

As the steam is rising, you experience a familiar sensation. More specters come to live from the butter, and there are heaps of insect carcasses and butterfly wings at the bottom of the fortress. THEIR walls keep the disasters in the universe at bay. Many creatures are toiling away to build the fortress higher and higher.
一点灵感乍现！在雾气里你似乎看到——那从庇佑的土地中汲取万千尘料汇聚而成的庞大身躯！哈，你轻松地明白了：大概是那位模拟的祂要来了！…你似乎都能够听见祂的锤子在地上拖出难以忍受的刮磨声。喔，你嗅了嗅鼻子，却嗅到了异常的气味……

A spark of inspiration hits you! Amid the steam, you seem to catch a glimpse of the massive body that takes form through the congregation of countless particles and dust from the earth under THEIR protection! Realization dawns on you — the simulated Aeon is coming! You seem to hear the ear-splitting scraping sound of THEM dragging THEIR hammer on the ground. You sniff the air and catch an unusual scent...
你相信这气味是种交流，攀谈者似古老旧友，而祂们的会晤非凡人可以妄想……
You believe the smell is a form of communication, and the speaker is akin to an old friend of yours.
天幕上有黯淡的铂金铝片，一只眼睛忽明忽暗…
In the sky, there are some dull platinum aluminum flakes and a flickering eye...
一种多变的声音从唇齿间挤出，如同雾气盖住你的耳朵，其间有上亿种调式音程——一个灰蓝色的影子笼罩住你。祂降身下来，友好地拢抱住琥珀王庞大而分散的头颅；祂似乎身形凑近…你终于听清祂的声音，是帝侯兵器同时发出的合音轰鸣，它们在祂身下如光芒般散开——

A voice that speaks in changing tones comes from between the lips and envelopes your ears like mist. In the meantime, there are <unbreak>100</unbreak> million tonal variations, and you are shrouded by a grayish-blue shadow. THEY descend and embrace the massive and scattered head of the Amber Lord. THEY seem to approach you, and you can finally hear THEIR voice clearly. It is a resounding chorus coming from the imperial weapons simultaneously. The weapons spread out beneath THEM like a beam.

「汝终应吾之邀请…克里珀；搅局者无有规法慎独，其行不将饶恕。」

但回应你们的只有亘久的静止…黑塔耸了耸鼻子。「找不到了…记忆碎片对模拟宇宙来说可能太多了。这可是整个宇宙的历史！可怕的浮黎，祂令多少『记忆』得以留存？」

Resounding silence is the only response you two receive... Herta scrunches her nose and says, "They can no longer be found... The memory fragments might be too many for the Simulated Universe to handle. They contain the entire history of the universe! Fuli is terrifying. How many memories have THEY preserved?"
一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...
你在原地等待——直到攻击的欲望平息下来。你相信你也懂得暴力美学…躁动的杀戮欲望会逐渐膨胀，你渴望与所有你恨的事物再次相逢。

You wait in place until your desire to attack subsides. You believe you understand the art of violence... Your desire to kill will grow over time, and you yearn to encounter the things you hate again.
至少你有家，不是吗？这使你不会被「虚无」吞没。
At least you have a family, isn't it? Because of that, you won't be engulfed by the Nihility.
Yes, I hate the people I've loved.
因为爱就是很痛的，至少你还可以表达。
It's because it hurts to love someone. At least, you know how to express your love.
此刻，另一种光辉将你笼罩——你躁动的恨意突然停止了喧嚣。一切变得温顺，你的思维与行为，甚至情绪都被祂用线仞熨好。

At this moment, another type of light envelops you, appeasing your intense hatred all at once. Everything becomes peaceful. Your mind, your actions, and even your emotions are smoothed by the Aeon with threads.
但强烈的战斗渴望永远不会被浇灭！你突然觉得为了「毁灭」的「开拓」也不错…
However, your burning desire to fight will never be dampened! You suddenly find the idea of Trailblazing for the sake of Destruction to be acceptable...
「这是在做什么？」她皱眉，「我培育的宇宙土壤十分稳定，我想<color=#dbc291ff>毁灭不可能会出现在这里</color>。」
"What are you doing?" Ruan Mei frowns. "The soil of the universe I cultivate is very stable. I believe <color=#dbc291ff>Destruction will never appear here</color>."
「噢…我想看{NICKNAME}的内心戏。」黑塔耸了耸鼻子，十分整蛊，「纳努克是最年轻的星神，当然不可能和寰宇蝗灾有关！要是反物质军团也掺和进这场浩劫…天，想都不敢想。」

"Oh... I'd really love to see what's on {NICKNAME}'s mind." Herta scrunches her nose mischievously. "Nanook is the youngest Aeon, so they can't possibly have anything to do with the Swarm Disaster! I don't even dare imagine the Antimatter Legion becoming part of this disaster..."
「这会儿没有纳努克。」黑塔不是很快乐，「那我们还走毁灭命途干嘛，就为了狠狠打碎那些可破坏物？——都寰宇蝗灾了，还惦记你那可破坏物呢？」

"If there's no Nanook in this time period," Herta sounds upset as she continues, "then why are we still taking the Path of Destruction? Just to break those destructible objects? Swarm Disaster is going on! There's no time for those destructible objects of yours!"
「嘘…」阮•梅把指尖凑近唇语，周围突然安静。
"Shh..." Ruan Mei places her finger on her lips, and the surroundings fall silent at once.
你刚想把话接下去，却感到周围的气温骤低——你感到自己被一种古老的威严震慑，手脚突然被不可视的、如游丝般的细线吊起，仿佛有人在将你当作木偶操弄。

As you are about to speak, you feel a sudden dip in your surrounding temperature and the intimidation of an ancient authority. All of a sudden, your limbs are suspended by invisible strings, as though someone is manipulating you like a puppet.
祂的指节轻轻触动，拨动宇宙秩序千丝万缕。你躁动不安的破坏欲骤然止息…你并不确定，祂对你的安抚究竟是出自爱护，还是出于剧烈的、无可遏止的「秩序」？

The gentle movement of THEIR fingertips rattles the intricate order of the universe, causing your strong urge to destroy to come to a sudden halt... You are unsure whether THEY placate you out of love or out of an intense and unstoppable desire for "Order."
你看向祂——祂也同样看着你……
You look at THEM, and THEY look at you...
「哇——」黑塔两眼发光，像看到钻石，「是『秩序』太一，最古老的星神之一。在祂还未陨落的时代，祂的光辉如同珠石一般圣洁！我说什么来着？这会儿没有纳努克！古老的秩序命途压制着众多灾祸——你确定还要再靠近吗？让我推演下祂的声音。好，来了！」

"Wow!" Herta's eyes gleam as though she has just discovered diamonds. "It's Ena the Order, one of the most ancient Aeons. In the times before THEIR fall, THEIR radiance was as holy as gems! What did I say just now? Nanook had yet to exist in this time! The ancient Path of Order suppressed numerous calamities. Are you sure you want to get even closer? Let me simulate THEIR voice. Okay, THEY are coming!"
祂的身下有帝国轰鸣，信众轰然发出和声；祂似浮空却身形厚重，其面容有圣歌般的光辉；祂发出的每个字都像有纵向排列的音节，带有或黯淡或富丽的色调。

Empires thunder beneath the Aeon as the believers roar in harmony. The Aeon appears to float despite THEIR massive and heavy body, and THEIR countenance glows like a sacred hymn. Every word THEY utter sounds like vertically aligned syllables with either a somber or posh tone.

「亦又是何人制梦牵引，感染嬗变之意志？吾将控制秩序之一切，将搅局者清除出局。」
