"I received an invitation with Rubert's resurrection as its seal." The voice keeps its distance but is easily capable of ending you at any moment. "...with the fifth genius joining your laughable project as bait."
「所以，我来了。但不是为加入你们而来……」
"So, I am here. But 'tis not to join you all..."
一个人的死亡，成为帝皇战争的导火索。一个变量的疏漏，反有机病毒将学派战争推向崩溃的边缘。一颗粒子的变化，爆炸湮灭了改变世界的灵感。只要施加一个微小的变量，未来就会截然不同，宇宙的面貌将幡然变改，群星将成为造物大锅中的混沌汤。

The death of one person becomes the spark for the Emperor's War. The oversight of one variable means the Anti-Organic Virus pushed the Scholars' Strife to the brink of destruction. The change in one particle causes an explosion that obliterates an inspiration to change the world. As long as an infinitesimal variable is added, the future would become vastly different, the face of the universe becomes radically altered, and the stars turn into a chaotic soup in the great cauldron of creation.
如果圆圈外未知的知识会破坏确定的未来，那么，让它们不再出现便好。在未来模型被导向不可知前，有一位天才立于黑暗中，推落第一块骨牌，以天才的尸骨铸成的骨牌。

If unknown knowledge outside the circle threatens to disrupt the ascertained future, then such knowledge should never appear again. Before the future model can be guided into the unknown, a genius stands in the darkness, pushing down the first domino — a domino set forged from the bones of geniuses.
「我来，是为杀死你们会带来的种种混沌可能性。」
"I come to kill the myriad of chaotic possibilities you will bring."
「关于寂静领主一意追杀天才，我们几个猜想过一千种理由…为嫉妒？为权势？为掠夺知识？我们唯独没想到这个——熄灭混沌的可能性？你的犯罪动机还真是别具一格啊。」

"We have speculated over a thousand reasons regarding the Lord of Silence's relentless hunt for geniuses... Envy? Power? Or the plundering of knowledge? This is the only reason we hadn't considered — Extinguishing chaotic possibilities? Your motive for your crimes is truly unique."
「你，杀死天才，试图限制宇宙知识的增长，是为了把整个宇宙都变成自己的『全知域』吗？」
"You murder geniuses in an attempt to stem the growth of cosmic knowledge... Is it just so you can turn the entire universe into your own Knowable Domain?"
难道说，黑塔遇到的那些意外？
You mean... those accidents that Herta encountered...?
难道说，学派战争的背后也是？
You mean... the one behind the Scholars' Strife as well?
寂静领主沉默不语。她不屑回应你们的指控。
The Lord of Silence does not speak. She does not deign to respond to your accusations.
一只蝴蝶扇动翅膀，哪怕数百光年外的世界因此毁灭，蝴蝶也对此一无所知，因为它只是在扇动翅膀。为实验修正偏离的变量，避免未知信息的干扰，这是每位学者都会做的事。

When a butterfly beats its wings, even if worlds hundreds of light-years away are destroyed because of this, the butterfly would not know any better because it is just beating its wings. Correcting deviating variables in an experiment and avoiding interference from unknown information — this is what every scholar would do.
「倘若用思维实验将宇宙关进圆圈，就会成为罪人。那为宇宙锚定『时刻』，把所有智慧都关进『智识』的祂，又要如何审判？」她并非在询问，只是自说自话。

"If one would be considered a sinner to use a thought experiment to confine the universe in a circle, then how are we to judge THEM, who anchors 'Instants' onto the universe and locks all wisdom into 'Erudition'?" She is not inquiring. She merely talks to herself.
「难道…你在替祂执行指令？！不，这不符合祂「求知」的神性。」
"Are you... executing THEIR orders!? No, this does not match THEIR divine trait of seeking knowledge."
「你有没有想过，『完美的计算』也是一种求知——你很清楚，没人能违背祂的计算。」
"Have you ever considered that 'Perfect Calculation' is also a form of seeking knowledge? You should be very aware that no one can defy THEIR calculations."
「如果我连通鲁珀特二世留下的所有『权杖』进行思考，就像那位帕提维娅……创造出一个<color=#dbc291ff>知识奇点</color>呢？我是说，既然祂如你说的那般，要将宇宙限定在完美的枷锁里，又何必准许帝皇造出那些用于思考的『天体神经元』…那些『权杖』，准许他跨出知识的圆圈？」

"If I connect to all the Scepters that Rubert II left behind and start to think, just like how that Patavia... How she created a <color=#dbc291ff>Knowledge Singularity</color>? What I'm saying is, if THEY are going to confine the universe within the fetters of perfection as you claim, why would the emperor have been allowed to create those 'Celestial-Body Neurons' used for thought... Did those Scepters allow him to step beyond the circle of knowledge?"
「……」她在思考黑塔的提问吗？还是说，仅是在思考，怎样富有趣味地杀死你们？
"..." Is she contemplating Herta's question? Or is she merely thinking about how to kill you all in the most entertaining way?
「问得好，你比其他的受害者更敏锐。」面目模糊的女人声音听来如此悲伤，「人的思考仅限于方寸头颅之内，而神明的思考，以星光明灭为神经元放电…以我等天才对垒的胜负为思考结论。」

"Good question. You're sharper than the rest of the victims." The murky-faced woman's voice sounds sorrowful. "Human thoughts are processed within our tiny brains, while divine thoughts are on a scale where the birth and implosion of stars are mere sparks on THEIR neurons... And the conclusion of THEIR thoughts is nothing less than the outcome of us geniuses' battles to the death."
天才们，「智识」延伸进现实的思维突触，星神思考的具象化展现。
Geniuses. Thought synapses that the Erudition extends into reality. The physical manifestation and phenomenon of Aeonic thought.
「祂用『时刻』宣告了完美的未来模型。而你，是一只挣脱昆虫针的蝴蝶标本，你扇动翅翼掀起混沌和未知，这会提前将宇宙导向『终末』。」

"THEY used 'Instants' to declare a perfect model of the future, and you are a butterfly specimen that escaped from its needle. You flap your wings and roil up the chaos and the unknown — this will prematurely lead the universe to Finality."
「我不允许。我会将你们一个、一个钉死在这『全知域』中。」她叹息，像是在为即将被制成标本的蝴蝶的脆弱之美而叹息。
"I won't allow it. I will stake you down with nails, one by one, inside this Knowable Domain." She sighs, as if lamenting the fragile beauty of a butterfly about to be turned into a specimen.
「好大的口气。你应该知道这是我们主动发出的邀请，对吧？」
"A bold statement. You do know that we were the ones who sent out the invite, don't you?"
「我看到了，我看到祂的演算了，」波尔卡的语调冰冷，「一个『时刻』，<color=#dbc291ff>一个天才们挣扎的『时刻』</color>来了。黑塔、斯蒂芬•劳艾德、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆…还有你，误入网中的虫儿，尽你们所能，挣扎吧！」她将破碎的面部转向你，你的直觉一阵毛骨悚然，她在微笑。

"I see it. I see THEIR extrapolations." Polka's tone is chilling. "An 'Instant,' <color=#dbc291ff>an 'Instant' where geniuses shall struggle</color> has arrived. Herta, Stephen Lloyd, Ruan Mei, Screwllum... and you, a little bug who stumbled into a web. Struggle with all your might!" She turns her shattered face towards you. Your instincts send your entire body into a hair-standing frenzy — She is smiling.
帝皇的衣冠冢，自我加冕的终点。不巧的是，有人比你们来得更早。挣扎的瞬间，定格在希望破灭的刹那，将成为蝴蝶最美丽的时刻。

The Emperor's cenotaph, the end of self-coronation. Unfortunately, others came earlier than you. That flash of struggle, suspended in that instant of hope's decimation — Will become the butterfly's most beautiful moment.
"You sure have a twisted sense of what you find interesting."
那道孤波，同样的研究对象，两位天才却得出了两种同样正确，却水火不容的理论——其中一位说，宇宙不是发条玩具，未来永远悬而未定。而另一位却说……

With that same solitary wave as the research topic, two geniuses obtained equally correct but completely divergent theories — One of them said the universe isn't a clockwork toy, that the future is forever in an unknown pendency. And the other one said...
「宇宙是一轮精密的钟表，现在，天才们停止挣扎的『时刻』就要到了。」波尔卡擦拭着手术刀，缓步向你们逼近。
"The universe is an exquisitely precise clock. Now, the 'Instant' where the geniuses stop struggling is about to arrive." Polka polishes her scalpel, slowly sauntering towards you.
「结束？嗝，老子还没冲出宇宙呢！」一艘支离破碎的贡多拉撞进花海，从中跌出的却是一名头戴假面的小丑。远方的骑士高声赞颂：「何等纯美的壮举！被模拟的生命打算向真实进军！」

"Over? Hic, I haven't even charged out of the universe!" A shattered gondola crashes into the sea of flowers and a masked clown stumbles out of it. The knight from afar extols resoundingly: "A stance of utter beauty! Life that is being simulated intends to assault the truth!"
「我已经再三强调，我不是虚构出来的！」他的身旁，一名虚构史学家怒吼。
"I've already told you umpteenth times! I'm not fictional!" A History Fictionologist yells out angrily beside him.
「……」寂静领主沉默无言，你无法得知这重如天体的沉默是出自困惑，还是隐而不发的愤怒。
"..." The Lord of Silence responds with silence. You cannot ascertain if that divine-esque silence stems from confusion, or a simmering, seething rage.
数百米高的巨大铁人踏碎了模拟宇宙的天空球，一只脚踏起了山摇地动。筑城者用巨大的扩音器高喊，「虚假的壁垒，亦是琥珀王对我的试炼！」

An iron giant hundreds of meters tall crushes the Simulated Universe's skybox, each step sending shockwaves across the ground. Through the loudspeaker, the Architects bellow: "The false bastion is a trial meted unto me by the Amber Lord!"
You guys on a team building exercise?
无数个角落里，数据如暴雨和狂风钻出：厄兆先锋的铃声，悲悼伶人的哭泣，焚化工点燃喷火器的热浪——它们只是这个宇宙中安分守己的代码，但在这一刻却一齐涌现。

From countless corners, data erupts like torrential rain and howling winds: The chime of the Omen Vanguards, the sorrowful wails of the Mourning Actors, and the scorching heat from The Cremators' flamethrowers — these were just compliant lines of code within this universe, but at this moment, they all surge forth.
模拟宇宙，疯了。这并非代码错误导致的混乱，而是天才们精心设下的戏码。调用，复制，调用，复制……宇宙图景释放了所有资源，试图用疯狂将迫近的「全知杀手」挤出舞台。万物仿佛高喊着，此处没有你的立足之地，波尔卡！

The Simulated Universe descends into madness. This chaos isn't caused by coding errors, but a carefully orchestrated plan by the geniuses. Call, copy, call, copy... The cosmic scene deploys all its resources, trying to force the approaching "Omniscient Killer" off the stage with chaos. Everything seems to scream, "There's no place for you here, Polka!"
「为我准备的陷阱么…」糖果色的杀手扼住风暴的咽喉，手术刀切、刺、划……代码尽数化为支离的碎片。她举手投足，高视阔步，目光所及之下一切观测系成了僵死凝固的铁板，回归井然有序。

"A trap prepared just for me...?" The candy-colored killer grips the storm by its throat, using her scalpel to slice, stab, and cut... The code is shattered into pieces. With each movement, her gaze freezes everything in sight into a rigid iron panel, restoring order to the chaos.
「现在，你们还有什么把戏可玩？」波尔卡姿态闲适，面向你。尽管你的视线无法穿透遮覆其五官的面部认知滤网，但她轻轻的哼笑似乎出卖了心情。

"Now, what other tricks do you have up your sleeve?" Polka faces you with a relaxed posture. Although you cannot penetrate the facial recognition filter that's hiding her features, her muffled scoff seems to betray her mood.
「在我面前，扑克的牌张顺序没有随机性可言，硬币的正反面是预设好的结果。风暴也好，波涛也罢，一切混沌要按我要求的方向转动。」
"In my presence, the sequence of poker cards is not random, and the outcome of a coin flip has been predetermined. Whether it's storm or waves, all chaos shall move according to my instructions."
她笑了起来。「哼…哈哈……哼哼哈哈哈哈？」这到底有什么可笑的？她的笑声中尽是疑惑，让你也摸不着头脑。
She starts laughing. "Hoo... Haha... Hoohoohahaha?" What's so funny about this? There is doubt in her laughter, confusing you as well.
焦虑和恐惧被一阵突如其来欢欣之风焚尽。亢奋、癫狂、无上的愉悦攫住你的感官。模拟宇宙的天幕上响起一声惊雷般清脆的声音——

Anxiety and fear are burned away by a sudden gust of joyous wind. Exhilaration, madness, and unparalleled delight grip your senses. A crisp and thunderous sound rings through the sky of the Simulated Universe.
你大笑，在场的所有人，所有代码，万事万物开始大笑。
You burst into laughter, and soon everyone present, every line of code, and all things begin laughing.
「阿基维利，你又惹了什么麻烦？」如同一团面具的疯狂之源自群星中现身，向你行了个礼，「瞧瞧这个地方，所有东西都被固定在轨道上，简直安静得可怕。要我说，星星们都该哈哈大笑，毕竟，无论是这个假宇宙，还是那个真的，都不过是个拙劣的笑话。」

"Akivili, what trouble did you get yourself into this time?" The source of madness in the guise of a cluster of masks appears and gives you a bow. "Take a look at this place. Everything is locked in its path, and it's eerily silent. Honestly, the stars should all burst into laughter, because whether it's this false universe or the real one, they're both just poorly executed jokes."
「我也好想你啊，想得头都弄丢了。」
"I missed you too, so much that I've lost my head!"
谁把这鬼东西放出来的？
Who let this ghastly thing out?
「一只黄色的小鸭子告诉我，多出来逛逛，有利于身心健康。」
"A little yellow duckling once told me, 'go out and touch some grass. That's good for your health.'"
「逻辑：孤波算法，模拟宇宙的演算基础，当系统内的不稳定程度超出界限，任何运动都会变得无法预测。」你听到他的齿轮转动，「我改写了系统的倾向性，告知他们世界的真相，我为波尔卡女士的模型，带来了一只混沌的蝴蝶。」

"Logic: The solitary waves theory is the extrapolation fundamental to the Simulated Universe. Once the system's extent of instability hits its limit, all motions become unpredictable." You hear his gears churning. "I've rewritten the system's tendencies, revealing the truth of the world to them. I've introduced a chaotic butterfly into Madam Polka's model."
「干得漂亮，螺丝咕姆！我头一次觉得这家伙的话那么悦耳。」
"Nicely done, Screwllum! This is my first time hearing such pleasing words from this fella."
<color=#dbc291ff>阿哈宣告，宇宙如疯人的玩笑，混沌痴愚，不可洞知。</color>「全知域」自此更名「不可知域」。
<color=#dbc291ff>Aha declares, the universe is like a madman's jest — chaotic, irrational, and beyond comprehension. </color>The Knowable Domain will henceforth be known as the Unknowable Domain.
THEY rested from all the work of creating that THEY had done, and said...
宇宙在混乱中加速膨胀，如同小丑在生日宴会上为孩子们吹胀的气球。无论是你们，还是波尔卡，彼此的距离都在膨胀中被无限延长。你看见黑塔走进核心，全宇宙的「权杖」在共鸣中再度成为完整的神经系统。

The universe rapidly expands in the midst of the chaos, like how a clown blows up balloons at a children's birthday party. Whether it's you or Polka, the distance between you both stretches endlessly. You watch Herta walk into the core, all of the Scepters in the universe in complete resonance, reuniting into one neural system.
「寂静领主的目标是要阻止我们走出知识圆圈。那么，她的出现，是否意味着我们已身处圆圈边缘？」
"The goal of the Lord of Silence is to stop us from leaving the Circle of Knowledge. Then, with her appearance, does it mean we are currently at the edge of the circle?"
「你会像所有的天才那般，永远无法知晓答案了。」波尔卡并不慌张，她整理自己糖果色的衣袍，如同拨动蝴蝶的鳞羽，在宇宙中掀起最后的飓风。未来是确定的还是混沌的？学派战争的难题在二人身上重演。

"You'll be like all the other geniuses, forever unable to know the answer." Polka remains unfazed, tidying her candy-colored robe, like how a butterfly flutters its wings, unleashing the final cyclone upon the universe. Is the future certain or chaotic? The conundrum of the Scholars' Strife plays out once again between the two.
「我们会有很多共同语言，不是吗？」黑塔笑了，「波尔卡，要不要加入我们？」
"We'll have a lot in common to talk about, no?" Herta smiles. "Polka, would you like to join us?"
「我拒绝。我们确信心中的猜想是唯一正确的猜想，这一点不会改变。」
"I refuse. We both are certain that the hypothesis in our mind is the only correct one, and that certainty will not waver."
女人看向天空，她那无形的视线宛如钉死蝴蝶的标本针，将某个结果确凿无疑地钉死在了模拟宇宙中——天空中星罗棋布的「权杖」开始瘫痪熄火。

The woman looks skyward, her invisible gaze like an insect pin that stakes down butterflies, pinning down a certain outcome in the Simulated Universe without the shadow of a doubt — The Scepters scattered among the sky begin to malfunction and extinguish.
"And that is how we became geniuses."
Can the both of you show me some concern?
The wind is too loud, and I can't hear you.
在狂乱的宇宙风中，两位天才的对垒一瞬间就落下了帷幕。
In the tempestuous cosmic winds, the battle between the two geniuses comes to an immediate end.
「『权杖』…全完了！我还没像帕提维娅那样…提出我的问题啊！」她在狂风中跺脚。
"The Scepters... It's all over! I haven't even gotten the chance to ask my question... like Patavia did!" She stomps her foot in rage.
「你为我献上了一幕精彩的舞剧，我就用你剩下的生命作为小费回报，」女人再次整了整糖果色衣袍的褶皱，仿佛她极其在意其上每一道纹路是否各安其位。「就此别过了，小家伙，你该庆幸自己依旧停留在『知识圆圈』里。」

"You've given me a spectacular performance, and I will grant you the rest of your life as my tip." The woman adjusts her candy-colored robe as if the position of each crease on the fabric is of utmost importance. "Farewell, little one. Count your lucky stars that you're still within the Circle of Knowledge."
宇宙停止了暴胀，那抹糖果色的身影溃散在空无中，把巨大的沉默抛给了你和黑塔。你迟疑半晌，决定开口。

The universe stops its expansion, and that candy-colored figure dissolves into emptiness, leaving a profound silence hanging over you and Herta. After a moment of hesitation, you decide to break the silence.
「怎么会，我们成功邀请了第五位天才加入模拟宇宙项目——她拒绝了。知道答案就够了。」
"Of course not! We've successfully invited the fifth genius to collaborate on the Simulated Universe project — but she declined. Knowing the answer is enough."
「……不愧是天才们的杀手。只是一次现身，就几乎让整个项目瘫痪报废。」
"...A real killer of geniuses indeed. With just one appearance, she nearly brought the entire project to a grinding halt."
「好在也不算一无所获。我们成功邀请了第五位天才加入模拟宇宙项目——她拒绝了。唉，知道这个答案就够了。」
"Luckily, it was not entirely in vain. We've successfully invited the fifth genius to collaborate on the Simulated Universe project — but she declined. *sigh* Knowing this answer is enough."
「……」你一度以为她的人偶停止了运作。
"..." You temporarily believe that her puppet has stopped working.
「……不愧是天才们的杀手。只是一次现身，就几乎让整个项目瘫痪报废。」
"...A real killer of geniuses indeed. With just one appearance, she nearly brought the entire project to a grinding halt."
「好在也不算一无所获。我们成功邀请了第五位天才加入模拟宇宙项目——她拒绝了。唉，知道答案就够了。」
"Luckily, it was not entirely in vain. We've successfully invited the fifth genius to collaborate on the Simulated Universe project — but she declined. *sigh* Knowing this answer is enough."
波尔卡离去了。你松了口气，你们捡回一命。
Polka has left. You relax. Your lives are safe.
「真想扒下这家伙的面部认知滤网，把她的照片传到星际和平网络最显眼的版块。」人偶伸了个懒腰——这一定是她身为人类时的习惯。

"I really want to rip off that facial recognition filter and post her picture on the most obvious spot on the main page of the Interastral Peace Network." The doll stretches lazily, a habit probably from when she was human.
你尝试重新接入「权杖」系统，但一无所获。
You attempt to reconnect to the Scepter system, to no avail.
看来你们的运气不太好，奇物竟然被突然出现的微型虫洞吞掉了。
Looks like you guys are down on your luck. The Curio has been swallowed by a sudden micro-wormhole.
波尔卡挥下手术刀，充斥寰宇的欢笑声，和压榨算力的强制干涉，使她的数据体濒临瓦解。无论是对她还是黑塔，这都将是最后一棋。

Polka swings the scalpel. The mad laughter resonating across the cosmos, along with the forced interference that squeezed at the computational power, causes her data model to teeter on the verge of collapse. For both her and Herta, this will be their final move.
大人们说，世界就要毁灭，连绵的冰川在重力牵引下撞击大陆，碾过地表。而后，战前关怀员的封冻将使所有生灵陷入沉寂。

The adults say that the world is going to be destroyed, and that the endless glaciers will crash into the continent, obliterating the surface under the pull of gravity. Then, the frozen seal of the Pre-Battle Caregiver will plunge all life into eternal silence.
但你笃信，这些都只是虚假的、惑乱人心的话语。你感到分外寒冷，打起哆嗦，而这也是假象，是试图固化认知的陷阱。

But you firmly believe that this is no more than the fake and misleading words of man. You feel an intense cold and begin to shiver, but this is just another illusion, a trap trying to enforce these ideas in your mind.
你闭上双眼，尝试脑海里描摹出真实的世界。
You close your eyes and attempt to picture the real world in your mind.
一个温暖的世界，整个宇宙就封装在一个瓶子里，没有外星球、外星人。那些骇人耸听的故事，都是编出来骗小孩的把戏。
A world of warmth, where the entire universe is sealed inside a bottle. There is no such thing as other planets or aliens. They are all sensational stories made up to trick children.
那些口口声声说见过外星人的外交官呢？他们只是给其他的东西取名叫外星人而已。比如，一台叫外星人的吸尘器，相对认知的诠释。

All of those diplomats that swear that they have seen aliens before? They are simply naming things they have seen as "aliens." For example: A vacuum cleaner known as an alien. Another example of relative cognition at work.
你听到高楼坍塌的声音，自己正在坠落，但是不怕，你仍能给予它新的解释。
You hear the sound of a tall building collapsing and find yourself plummeting to the earth below, but you are not scared. You can just give it another interpretation.
I have shrunk to the size of an ant.
疼痛，只要不睁开眼，就一定是错觉。你继续描摹世界，能让所有人都幸福生活下去的，真实的世界。
If you close your eyes, all pain is no more than an illusion. You continue to picture your world, the real world in which everyone can live happily ever after.
窗外的哭喊声，不过是鸟儿们的啸叫，它们在迎接一场盛大的婚礼。冰冷的液体滴落到你的腿上，你感到一阵心惊。
The screams you hear out the window are simply the calls of birds celebrating a lavish wedding ceremony. A freezing liquid drips onto your leg as you feel a shock.
一旦睁眼，就会被虚假的现实欺骗。你蜷缩着身子，向虚无的深处沉没，属于自己的，封闭而美好的雪景球。

The moment you open your eyes, you will be taken in by the deceit of the false reality. You curl into a ball and find yourself pulled deep into the depths of the void, into your own personal, sealed-off, and perfect snow globe.
又一个自转周期，异乡的微小生命在你的表皮上涂抹亮色，「凯旋而归」，这是独属于他们文化的花纹，从动作来看，代表亢奋、进食和捕猎的信息。

Another sidereal day. A microscopic life form from another land paints colors on your skin. "Triumphant return," it is a pattern unique to their culture. Their movements seem to communicate information on excitement, feeding, and hunting.
他们并不分享你携子嗣带来的猎物，相反，你乐于见到他们为你引来更多的蠹虫。「乐于」，这是你在演化中得到的，最具智慧的态度。

They do not share in the prey that you bring in with your offspring. To the contrary, you are pleased to see that they are attracting more insects to your location. This act of "taking pleasure" is the most intellectual attitude function you have developed during evolution.
他们为你的巢穴浇筑外壳，以防天敌的袭击。甲壳上尖锐的犄角耸立，不时迸发出热量与火光，他们就寄居在这些犄角里。
They construct an outer shell for your nest to protect it from natural predators. Sharp horns protrude from the carapace, occasionally emitting heat and flames. They live inside these horns.
你有时会把多余的唾液分给他们，用于加固犄角。这样，你的子嗣便能获得一个更温暖的巢穴。
Occasionally, you will offer excess saliva to them to help fortify the horns. This way, your offspring will have a warmer nest to live in.
For the prosperity of the next generation.
虽然他们总做出一些你无法理解的事情，但你的脑蛋白天生不适合处理这种问题。他们在你打造的一颗颗天体上都留下了足迹。而这种足迹会带来更多的子嗣——不过，你也无法处理这样的问题。

Although they are constantly doing things that you cannot understand, your brain proteins were not designed to handle problems such as these. They leave footprints on every celestial body you create, and these footprints will bring greater offspring... But this is also a question that you cannot handle.
你想为孩子缔造一个居所，让种族的血脉不断延续。「共生，共存」，你常常能听到他们呼喊类似的词句。
You wish to create a home for your children, to allow the blood of your species to continue on. You often hear them calling out slogans like: "Coexistence and co-survival."
我没有这样的思考能力。
I have no mental capacity to question this.
你瘫软的身体浸入巢穴，沿着通路下潜。异种生物修筑的透明外壳让通路变得更为坚固，他们站在那里，欣赏你的沉没。而你只想要好好睡一觉。

Your limp body sinks into the nest, flowing down through tunnels. The transparent outer shells crafted by alien creatures have fortified the passages as they stand by, admiring your sinking form. All you long for is a good sleep.
睡眠，有机体如此称呼这一过程。连贯性意识的中断，对你而言，也可以将其视为死亡。是的，你是已经死去的巨人，筑城者留下的无数机器中的一台。

Sleep. That is what organic organisms call it. A break in the continuity of consciousness, it could also be seen as a form of death. That's right, you are a deceased giant, just another of the countless machines left behind by the Architects.
但你正感受着自我的存在，庞大的身躯，密集的热源分布在周身的各处。你曾大得像一座山脉，现在的你比山脉还要广阔。
But you can currently sense your own existence. Your gigantic body has concentrated heat sources distributed across it. You were once the size of a mountain range, and now you are even vaster.
你睁开眼，如一片遮蔽海洋的云翳在转瞬间散去，星光投射在你的传感器里。无论将视线往什么地方移动，能看到的，只有一望无际的星海。

You open your eyes. A great nebula disperses in front of your eyes like clouds over a vast ocean as starlight hits your sensors. No matter where you cast your gaze, all you can see is an endless sea of stars.
嘿！难道你是飘在宇宙里的太空垃圾吗？
Hey! Could it be that you're space trash floating around in the universe?
你迫切地想要知道，那些曾受你保护的人去了哪里？为了替他们赎回笑容，你甚至献出了最后的机心。
You desperately want to know where the people you once protected have gone to. You even sacrificed your last mechanical heart to buy back their smiles.
「大块头，往里面看！」喧闹声在回路深处响起，你感到些许烦躁，但更多的却是安心。你将目光转移向自己的内部，绚烂的光球上，巨大的城市屹立其间。在那里，渺小的有机体们在向你挥手。

"You big idiot, look in here!" You hear a call resound deep in your circuits, which irritates you slightly, but brings a greater sense of relief. You cast your gaze inside yourself, and atop a shining sphere of light stands a great city. In this city, tiny organic organisms wave back at you.
你终于理解了现状，整颗星球，所有的笑声，它们都在你的身体里，成为你的心脏和眼睛，构成机器新的使命。
You finally understand what has happened. The entire planet and all of their laughter are now inside your body. They have become your heart and eyes and formed a new mission for this machine.
在古老的过去，你送了一颗心给他们。所以，他们也送了你一颗星星。
In the ancient past, you gave them a heart. Now, they have given you a star.
一场突兀的宴会，扎入体内的针管，拘束的枷锁和实验舱壁。倘若早知道，在老人面前展示祂的赐福，会被幕布后的诸位「邀请」至此，你是否会做出相同的选择。

An impromptu gathering, a needle that shoots into your skin, chain restraints, and the experiment pod walls. If you had known sooner that showing THEIR blessings to the elder would have won you an "invitation" here from the people behind the curtain, would you have made the same choice?
毫无疑问，这样的事已经历了千遍万遍。
Without question, I have experienced this a million times already.
你望向舱壁外，垂垂老矣的资助者，他甚至没有力气与你四目相对。
You look outside the pod at the aged man funding the operation. He doesn't even have the strength to look you in the eyes.
The blessing of immortality is also a curse.
没人对你的警告做出回应。
No one responds to your warning.
强烈的刺痛将你层层包裹，仿佛要撕开你的脉搏，将你晒干成入药的粉末。骇人的生命力沿着血浆和药剂流进他们的躯体。首先是实验体，它被划开的身体逐渐愈合，移植的肿瘤被健康的细胞吞噬。

A powerful, stinging pain envelops your body. It feels as if your very veins were being torn open, and you were being reduced to medicinal powder. The terrifying vitality flows into their bodies with your blood plasma and medicinal elixirs. First is the test subject, whose slashed open body begins to gradually heal, their transplanted tumor devoured by healthy cells.
然后是病人，他惬意地享受着这个瞬间，与「死亡」道一声永别。
Then is the sick patient, who rejoices at his eternal farewell with "death."
闹剧的罪魁祸首骤然抽搐，节肢动物的附足，软体动物的触手，植物的枝条，浑浊的生命力自他的皮肤上源源不断地涌出。

Suddenly, the face of the man that instigated this disaster begins to contort as anthropoid limbs, mollusc tentacles, plant vines, and a stale, fetid life force come bursting endlessly from their skin.
扯断的注射器把药剂撒到护工和研究员身上，暴涨的生物质将实验舱的外壁挤碎，他们哀嚎着，肿胀的身体相互交融，刺进对方脆弱的皮囊。

The snapped syringe leaks the elixir onto the bodies of the nurses and researchers as the resulting explosion of biomass crushes the experiment pod walls. They cry out in suffering, their swollen bodies blending together and piercing each other's fragile skin.
This is the medicine you asked for.
生长啊，生长啊，不死的怪物冲出实验室，蹒跚地爬进立宪国的广场。此刻开始，又一颗星球被宣判死亡。
Grow, grow! The immortal monster bursts out of the laboratory and staggers into the plaza of the constitutional state. It was at this moment that another planet was pronounced dead.
{NICKNAME}，模拟宇宙更新了。我们给<color=#dbc291ff>「扩展装置」</color>加了一个新的演算分支。
{NICKNAME}, the Simulated Universe has been updated. We've added a new algorithm branch to the <color=#dbc291ff>expansion module</color>.
#27鲁珀特，俱乐部里我最感兴趣的家伙之一。它自号帝皇，掀起了寰宇皆知的机械帝国危机——「第一次帝皇战争」。

For me, #27 Rubert is one of the most intriguing members in the Society. It proclaimed itself to be an emperor and started a crisis in the Machine Empire known throughout the universe — The First Emperor's War.
这次阮•梅想培育「博识尊」，而螺丝咕姆一直对无机生命的起源很感兴趣，于是我们一拍即合，选取了#27鲁珀特死亡前的时间。

Ruan Mei plans to cultivate Nous, and Screwllum has always been interested in the origins of inorganic lives. So, we quickly found ourselves on the same page and decided to focus on the time before the death of #27 Rubert.
第一步是将「计算」、「逻辑」等概念系统性地提取出来，加以整理，筛选出和无机生命有关的内容。
The first step is to extract concepts such as calculation and logic systematically. Then, we need to organize them and filter out content related to inorganic lives.
一会儿别大惊小怪，你马上要见证宇宙机器头的历史了。
Prepare yourself, for you're about to witness the history of the cosmic Droidhead.
你体验了就知道。看不见实物，听我干讲也没用，对不？
You'll know it when you go through it. There's no point in listening to my description without seeing the real thing, right?
听说公司对模拟宇宙项目有兴趣…
The IPC seems interested in the Simulated Universe project...
他们当然有兴趣，这可是模拟宇宙，谁不喜欢？我已经在和他们谈落地了。
Of course, they would be. Who wouldn't? I'm already discussing with them about the implementation of the project.
Be a good tester and do your best.
You're back. What do you think?
好吧，你可以去找斯蒂芬反馈。
Well, you can give Stephen your feedback.
给你介绍下，来了位客人——公司战略投资部的。
This is our guest from the Strategic Investment Department of IPC.
您好，{NICKNAME}。我受P<unbreak>-45</unbreak>「真珠」小姐委任，代表战略投资部前来与黑塔女士洽谈合作。
Hi, {NICKNAME}. I was appointed by Miss Pearl, P<unbreak>-45</unbreak> to discuss our cooperation with Madam Herta on behalf of the Strategic Investment Department.
听闻模拟宇宙的下个研究方向是「第一次帝皇战争」，真珠小姐很感兴趣，因为那也是「边星贸易战争」的年代。

We heard that the Simulated Universe would do research on The First Emperor's War next. Miss Pearl is quite interested, as the Emperor's War happened in the same era when the Borderstar Trade War took place.
战略投资部是公司众多组织中相对年轻的部门，未曾经历那一时期。如今，部门精英奔行银河，清算各项因「万界之癌」产生的坏账，需要更多史实资料。

The Strategic Investment Department is relatively new compared to other departments in IPC, so we have no first-hand experience of that history. Now, the best and brightest of our department are traveling around the galaxy to settle bad debts stemming from the Cancer of All Worlds. We need more historical data for that.
我们有意为模拟宇宙项目提供支持，并希望能购买与公司相关的推演数据。
We'd like to support the Simulated Universe project and purchase the derivation data related to the IPC.
不知道。螺丝咕姆好像提起过，那多半是位智械吧。
No idea. Screwllum seems to have mentioned it before, so it's likely to be an Intellitron.
The Simulated Universe is that famous?
说实话，帝皇战争太久远了，我不觉得能对现在的投资工作有什么帮助——除非他们是办公室坐无聊了，想多看些公司刚成立时的八卦。

Frankly, the Emperor's War was so long ago that I don't think it'll be any help to modern investment — Unless they've run out of things to gossip about in the office and just want to read about the IPC back when it was first established.
或者——算了，商业斗争我不关心。
Or... Forget it. I'm not interested in corporate conflicts.
他们愿意掏钱，我没阻止的理由。这事很有趣，我答应了。加油收集公司秘闻吧。
Since they're willing to pay for it, I see no reason to stop. This is an interesting proposal, so I'll say yes. Do your best and keep collecting IPC secrets.
如何，{NICKNAME}，模拟宇宙挺有趣的，对吧？
What do you think, {NICKNAME}? The Simulated Universe is pretty fun, no?
在你探索的时候，我产生了一个想法，然后马上去做了：等着也是等着，我决定和这位小跟班分享模拟宇宙的见闻。
An idea hit me while you were exploring, so I immediately went for it. I decided to share my insights about the Simulated Universe with my sidekick here while I waited for you.
我们打了个赌，关于「帝皇」鲁珀特：历史上，鲁珀特遭破坏，机械帝国覆灭，据说其死亡是公司刺客所为，也有一称是「寂静领主」将其毁坏。

We made a bet about Rubert the emperor. Historically, Rubert was destroyed and the Machine Empire collapsed. Some purport that Rubert was killed by an IPC assassin, and some claim that it was smashed up by the Lord of Silence.
哪边才是对的？我相信是波尔卡•卡卡目。
Which version is the truth? I believe it was Polka Kakamond who did it.
What are the stakes for the bet?
我认为前者的可能性是存在的。公司会与「鲁珀特一世」抗争到底。
I think the first version has a possibility to be true. The IPC would fight Rubert I to the death.
走着瞧吧。如果我赢了，它就会把战略投资部此行的计划一五一十道出——虽然我也没那么感兴趣。
We'll see. If I win, the sidekick will come clean with the Strategic Investment Department's purpose behind this trip — even though I'm not really interested.
否则，我就把模拟宇宙的产权转让给公司。
Otherwise, I'll transfer the ownership of the Simulated Universe to the IPC.
那可是「寂静领主」，我怎么可能输？噢，别把这事告诉阮•梅和螺丝咕姆。
There's no way I'll lose by choosing the Lord of Silence! By the way, please don't tell Ruan Mei and Screwllum about this bet.
这样就告一段落了。关于公司的片段还真不少——小跟班，这些资料够你们用上好久了吧？
Well, that's gonna be the end of it for a while. There's quite a lot of information related to the IPC. Hey, sidekick, is this enough to last you a while?
非常感谢您的帮助，黑塔女士。尾款支付会在……
I appreciate your help, Madam Herta. The final payment will be made...
结给艾丝妲就行。我不管这个。
Sort it out with Asta. I don't deal with money.
About the bet between you two...
哦，显而易见——当然是我赢了。
不过另一种观点也不是空穴来风。你应该看到了，在一小段数据中，东方启行出现在「寂静领主」的对面。这两人产生过接触，具体关系不明。

However, the other version isn't totally baseless. You must have seen that Dongfang Qixing appeared opposite the Lord of Silence in a small section of the data. The two have come into contact before, but their relationship was unknown.
我怀疑，路易斯•弗莱明退居幕后也和他们有关，这就是一段更复杂的故事了……
I suspect they had something to do with Louis Fleming's retirement. That's another even more complicated story...
等待揭开的谜团太多了，我跃跃欲试呢。谁还关心打赌？
There are so many mysteries waiting to be solved. I can't wait... Who cares about the bet anymore?
{NICKNAME}，还记得那个小跟班吗？使命完成，它回去了。
{NICKNAME}, you remember that sidekick? It left after its mission was accomplished.
不过，它用自己账户里全部的信用点，在星际互联网络帮模拟宇宙发布了「招募合伙人」的消息。它说愿赌服输，虽然不能透露工作内容，但可以换种形式。

Still, it spent all the credits in its account to post a "Collaborator Recruitment" advert on the Interastral Network for the Simulated Universe. It said although it couldn't disclose the exact details of the job, it can honor the bet in a different way.
我没想到，如今一个小小机器人的「自由意志」…也会发展到这种程度。
I'm surprised by how developed the... "free will" of a robot is nowadays.
「欢迎你，{NICKNAME}。斯蒂芬让我一定要给你详细介绍一下『自定义骰』。」黑塔似乎不想解释太多，「他说『自定义骰』乃是一名智械的孕育之壳。你可以将『感情』、『思维』、『记忆』、『魅力』等物附着于它。」

"Welcome, {NICKNAME}. Stephen asked me to give you a thorough breakdown of those 'custom dice'." Herta doesn't seem to be in the mood to explain much. "According to him, the die is actually a shell of an Intellitron, and you can attach your emotions, thoughts, memories, and charms to it."
So, this die is an Intellitron?
「不知道。」黑塔耸了耸肩，「玩就是了，也许它什么时候会冒出自由意志吧。」
"I don't know." Herta shrugs. "Just enjoy it, and maybe it'll develop its own free will someday."
「嗯，是这样。」黑塔说，「玩就是了，有什么反馈就给斯蒂芬。」
"Yeah, that's it," Herta replies. "Just enjoy it and give your feedback to Stephen."
「加油，继续前进吧，{NICKNAME}。」黑塔说完，把画面关掉了。
"Keep going, {NICKNAME}." Herta says, turning the screen off.
I have some new points of confusion...
What kind of questions do you have?
我要怎么得知「繁育」的秘密？
How will I learn of Propagation's secrets?
践行「行者之道」，走在各位前路人已踏好的行迹上，努力接近星神！不用担心，按自己的性子去践行命途就行。

Continue along the Trail of Pathstrider, and walk along the traces already paved by those who came before you, and try your hardest to get closer to the Aeons! Don't worry! Just carry out the Paths in the way you want to.
What kind of questions do you have?
我要怎么得知「智识」的秘密？
How will I learn of Erudition's secrets?
嗯，好问题。时刻注意自己的「自我认知」，防止自己变成机器人，或者全然丧失理性。不用想太多，反正你总会走到祂的计算之下。

Hmm, good question. Pay close attention to your Intra-Cognition at all times to prevent yourself from becoming a robot or totally losing your rationality. Don't think too much. You'll eventually end up following THEIR calculations anyways.
The dice is not with you.
You're quite good with the dice!
编队功能已经可以自由使用了，一动不动的下载装置，现在只想做条晒太阳的咸鱼。
The team lineup function can be used freely now. The Downloader can now lie back and be a freeloader.
你遇到了黑塔的人偶，在模拟宇宙里遇到她的人偶实体，你还是有些惊讶。
To your surprise, you run into a physical Herta puppet in the Simulated Universe.
「你可以拿你的<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>，跟我换点东西。」黑塔毫不客气，「别那么看着我，我是怕你手里的钱太多，花不完。不过我估计，你也没那个本事。」

"You can use your <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color> to buy things from me," Herta proposes bluntly. "Don't stare at me like that. I'm just worried you might have too much money to know what to do with. But I reckon you're not good enough to get THAT rich."
你遇到了黑塔，她漫不经心，面无表情地看着你。
You encounter Herta. Uncaring, she looks at you expressionlessly.
「恭喜你啊，来到这里真不容易。」黑塔敷衍地应付，「如果你有多余的<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>，可以在我这里全部用掉，强化你的祝福。不然也没机会用了。」

"Congratulations. Well done on getting here." Herta responds carelessly. "You can use up all your <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color> here to enhance your Blessings. You won't get another chance to use them otherwise."
黑塔的人偶实体又一次出现商店门口，她仍秉持不屑一顾的态度。
Once again, Herta's puppet appears in front of a store, still maintaining a dismissive demeanor.
「这种商店该由斯蒂芬看管，可惜他不愿露面。我把藏品使用权限都为你打开了，不错吧？」黑塔叉腰，「得拿<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>来换，这是基础游戏规则。」

"Stephen should manage stores like this, but he refuses to make an appearance. I've given you permission to use all the exhibits here. Isn't it great?" With her arms on her waist, Herta continues, "You still have to exchange them with <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color>, though. That's a basic rule of the game."
你惊讶地在商店门口发现螺丝咕姆的实体——能在模拟宇宙中遇见此位机械贵族，已足够令人荣幸。
To your surprise, you notice Screwllum's physical body at the entrance of the store. It is an utmost honor to meet the mechanical aristocrat in the Simulated Universe.
「黑塔女士因事务繁杂，邀请我一并处理。」螺丝咕姆十分平易近人，「{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，由我暂为您带来更多『祝福』。」
"Madam Herta, overwhelmed with work, invited me to assist her." Screwllum is very amiable and says, "{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, as of now, allow me to bring you more 'Blessings' on her behalf."
黑塔的人偶实体又一次出现商店门口，她对自己捅的篓子毫不在乎。
Herta's physical puppet once again appears before the store's doors. She doesn't care about her own mistakes at all.
「这么多奇物冒出来，总有些你用不着的垃圾。」黑塔叉腰，「感恩戴德吧，这次你可以选择回收一些奇物，跟我换些祝福。」

"With this many Curios popping out, there will always be trash you can't use." Herta put her hands on her hips. "Be thankful. You can choose to recycle some Curios this time and swap for Blessings with me."
你惊讶地在商店门口发现螺丝咕姆的投影——他正悉心研究模拟宇宙中出现的异常现象。
You are surprised to find Screwllum's projection before the store's doors — He is immersed in studying the abnormal phenomena occurring in the Simulated Universe.
「{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我仍在研究此刻发生的代码膨胀。」螺丝咕姆气质彬彬，向你鞠了一躬，「结论：由我暂为您带来更多『祝福』。」
"{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, I am still investigating the code expansion happening right now." Screwllum gracefully bows to you. "Conclusion: For now, allow me to bring you more 'Blessings.'"
黑塔的人偶实体又一次出现商店门口，她似乎对代班有些厌倦了。
Herta's physical puppet once again appears before the store's doors. She seems a bit sick of sitting in for someone else.
「毫不意外，斯蒂芬把捅的篓子丢给我了。」黑塔叉腰，「他说『变强』是游戏中的永恒乐趣之一…你看着办吧。」
"As expected, Stephen chucked his problems to me." Herta puts her hand on her hips. "He said 'growing strong' is one of the eternal joys in gaming... just do whatever you think will work."
黑塔的人偶实体又一次出现商店门口，她手拿几枚画满「斯蒂芬•劳艾德戳记」的扑满手办。
Herta's physical puppet once again appears before the store's doors. She is holding a few Trotter figurines stamped all over with "Stephen Lloyd's seal'."
「嗯，不错的成绩，换点奖励吧。」黑塔十分敷衍。
"Hmm, not bad. Come get some rewards." Herta says perfunctorily.
你惊讶地在商店门口发现螺丝咕姆——他正悉心研究一串公式。
Much to your surprise, you stumble upon Screwllum at the store entrance — he is utterly engrossed in studying a series of equations.
「{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我正在研究『等价交换』原则的起源。」螺丝咕姆气质彬彬，向你鞠了一躬，「尝试解析：奇物可与祝福进行等量的『数据兑换』。」

"{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, I am studying the origins of the equivalent exchange." Screwllum gracefully bows to you and says, "Analysis: Curios can be traded in equal amounts with Blessings via 'Data Exchange.'"
现在是黄昏时分，你站在热浪里。矿地令你一阵晕眩，矿脉烧得像融化的黄油。
It's dusk, and you're standing amid the heat waves. The atmosphere at the mines makes you dizzy, the mineral veins burning like melted butter.
「伟大的存护星神克里珀…祂能听到我们的声音。」矿工们举起铁锹又落下，他们像狂热动物，又像信徒。
"Great Qlipoth, Aeon of Preservation... THEY can hear our voices." The miners raise and dip their shovels like frenzied animals — or the faithful.
有人看到了你——戴着探测灯的*头号矿工*。他的臂膀黝黑健壮，嘴唇同样乌黑。他豪迈的笑容令人难忘。他镶了一颗金牙，在你脑海中不停放大、扭曲，最后你只看得到他的*笑容*——嘴唇和眼睛搅在一起，像调色盘里颜料融化。

Someone notices you — It's the "lead miner" wearing a detector lamp. His arms are dark and muscular, and his lips are in a similar shade of ink. His hearty smile is very memorable. He has a gold tooth that ceaselessly expands and twists in your brain, till all you can see is his "smile" — His lips and eyes fuse together, like the melting sludge of paint on a palette.
「琥珀王的恩赐，『克里珀』存护这片地脉。你可以挑一个带走。」
"Qlipoth, the blessing of the Amber Lord, preserves these leylines. You can have one of them."
你从未见过如此富丽堂皇的图书馆，它没有屋顶，被笼罩在无垠的星夜穹顶之下。
You have never seen a library as opulent as this. Without a roof, it is enveloped by the boundless, starry sky.
穹顶圣洁的光辉，照耀楼梯上的杂书。你随手打开一本书，书页上布满斑驳的色块代码。
The sacred light from the firmament shines on the books scattered on the stairs. You open a random one to find the pages filled with patchy color block codes.
「多此一举的小家伙！别乱翻我的书！」头发花白的老人呵斥道。他向你走来，你看到他皱得发胀的皮肤。「你手里拿着的那本，*新伦蒂尼恩王国*的历史，我最得意的作品。」

"Hey, nosy kid! Don't touch my books!" An elderly man with white hair reprimands you. As he approaches, you notice his wrinkled and bloated skin. "What you're holding is the 'history of the kingdom of New Londinium,' my proudest work."
「虚构史学家，只创造历史。我创造新伦蒂尼恩王国的过去，联席总理完全没有察觉他们的王国建立在一段虚假的、从未发生过的历史上。」他说。

"History Fictionologists only create history. I have created the history of the kingdom of New Londinium, and the Prime Minister of the Commonwealth does not even realize that their kingdom is based on a fake history that has never taken place." He answers.
「虚构史学家，只修改历史。很多时候，你只需要把两个主语出现的顺序互换。改变新伦蒂尼恩王国的过去，就是如此简单。」他说。

"History Fictionologists only amend history. More often than not, you can simply change the order of the subjects in a sentence. That was how easily the history of the kingdom of New Londinium was changed." He answers.
「我在星空图书馆呆了十个琥珀纪…独自一人！」虚构史学家来回踱步。「我创造悖论、谬误、自相矛盾和含糊不清的说辞。」
"I've been living at the Starry Library for ten Amber Eras... all by myself!" The History Fictionologist paces. "I concoct paradoxes, fallacies, and statements that are contradictory and vague."
你做过些什么多此一举的行为?
What kind of superfluous actions have you done?
你做过些什么绝妙的处理？
What kind of brilliant touches have you made?
「比如——巴维鲁的现代居民以为咕嘟的声音，是表达喜悦。事实上，我很抱歉，这种声音其实是脏话。我把脏话的含义改成喜悦，伟大之举。」

"For instance, the modern Bavirus inhabitants think that their gobbling sound is an expression of joy. Well, I'm sorry to say this sound is actually a vulgar term. I've given the sound a positive meaning, which is quite a brilliant move."
「因为我们信仰『神秘』星神。」他沉吟片刻。
"It's because we're believers of the Aeon of Enigmata." He stays silent in deep thought for a moment.
「如果神秘不再笼罩宇宙，每个人都会察觉到自己被注定的命运，他们自以为通过*自由意志*做出的选择，都是在那个*时刻*必然出现的。」

"If the universe is no longer shrouded in mysteries, then everyone will detect the determined state of their destinies. A choice they think they make through free will is actually pre-arranged for that particular moment."
「我会证明给你看的，只需要对你之前的经历改上几笔。」他突然露出落寞的眼神。「你要切实忘掉过去，才能假装对未来一无所知。」

"I'll prove it to you. All I have to do is to make some changes to your past." Suddenly, his eyes are tinged with despondence. "You must genuinely forget about your past to pretend that you know nothing about your future."
「好了。记住，在代码构造的模拟世界之外，你察觉到任何矛盾，别怀疑，都是本人的伟大手笔——记住，我并不是被*模拟*出来的！」
"It's done. If you notice any contradictions beyond the simulated world created by codes, don't doubt them, as they are all my brilliant touches. Remember, I'm not 'simulated'!"
你又来到了富丽堂皇的图书馆。你抬头看去，可以看到众多星系，它们如银河污泥般被搅成胶状，缓慢流动。
Once again, you arrive at the opulent library. You look up and see a multitude of star systems. Like cosmic sludge that has been stirred into jelly, they swirl around slowly in the sky.
图书馆正中央古老的楼梯，呈螺旋状一直通到天上，看不到尽头。
The ancient staircase in the center of the library spirals up into the sky, with no end to be seen.
「你怎么又来了？」虚构史学家呵斥道。「这次又有什么历史想让我帮你改改？」
"Why are you here again?" The History Fictionologist scolds you. "What kind of history do you want me to change this time?"
你身处一片无垠的废墟，视野被废弃集装箱遮蔽。这里弥漫着浓烟，报废的机器人被拆成零碎的部件。它们的躯干上印着「星际和平公司」字样，脑袋挨着脚底，不再拥有智能。

You are in a sprawling wasteland, and your vision is obscured by abandoned containers. Thick smoke permeates the air, and scrapped robots are dismantled into broken parts. The words "IPC" are printed on their torsos as their heads rest next to their feet, no longer sentient.
此时，你身后的垃圾堆传来窸窣的声音。你察觉有东西正盯着你——你回头，发现一个机器人躲在箱子后面。
A rustling comes from the pile of trash behind you. You sense someone's eyes on you. As you turn around, you notice a robot hiding behind a box.
你走近它身旁——你发现机器人的线缆已经断裂，失去了行动能力。
You approach the robot and find that it is incapacitated with its cables snapped.
「我们被誉为『琥珀王后援队』，*塔拉梵•基恩*制造我们、使用我们，并最终放弃了我们。」机器人向你展示它用尽力气保存的物品。
"We were hailed as the Amber Lord's Support Team. Taravan Keane created us, used us, and ultimately abandoned us." The robot shows you the items it is trying its best to keep safe.
「杰姆·哈克在<unbreak>371029</unbreak>秒前已经停止运转，杰姆·哈尔即将在<unbreak>74158</unbreak>秒后停止运转，无法再保存哥哥的物品。不情之请，请您带一个离开这里。」

"Jim Hulk stopped functioning <unbreak>371,029</unbreak> seconds ago. Jim Hall is about to stop functioning in <unbreak>74,158</unbreak> seconds and can no longer keep my brother's items. Please help me. Bring one of these out of here."
你身处一个漆黑的房间。面前的电视机正放映购物频道——来自星际和平公司传统项目部门。
You are in a pitch-black room. The television before you is showing an infomercial channel funded by the IPC Traditional Project Department.
「热夜之都电视购物频道，在节目开始，我们先回复观众来电，对于测不准匣的投诉。众所周知，如果测不准匣可以测得准，那么它应该名叫测得准匣……呲……」

"You're watching the Capital of Passion infomercial channel. Before we start, we'd like to respond to the complaints on the Casket of Inaccuracy lodged by our viewers. As you know, if the Casket of Inaccuracy is accurate, it should be called the 'Casket of Accuracy' instead... *crackle*..."
老旧电视机开始泛起雪花屏，它的信号变得越来越差。很快，你完全无法听清声音了。
Static appears on the old television as the signals get weaker. Soon, you cannot even hear the sound clearly.
你拍了电视机一下，它的屏幕闪烁两下，接着恢复了正常的画面。
You smack the television. Its screen flickers twice and returns to normal.
你踹了电视机一下，痛感从脚趾传来——按钮刺进了你的指甲缝。电视机的屏幕闪烁两下，接着恢复了正常的画面。
You kick the television, and a surge of pain shoots up from your toes — a button wedges between your flesh and your toenail. The television screen flickers twice and returns to normal.
「接下来是星际和平公司为我们带来的跨银河产品。」
"Next, we'd like to introduce a pan-cosmic product from IPC."
「一盒过期的甜甜圈。热夜之都已经进入第IV纪年，食物的保质期已经接近于永恒。公民们都很好奇，过期的食物究竟是什么味道。」
"A box of expired doughnuts. As the Capital of Passion has entered its 4th era, food can almost be preserved forever. Thus, the citizens are curious about how expired food tastes."
「会唱生日快乐的莲花。共同的童年回忆，它无数次出现在梦里。」
"A lotus that can sing the Happy Birthday song. As a feature in everyone's childhood, it appears countless times in people's dreams."
「一个机械匣子。看上去像是卖了两百年也没卖出去的东西。」
"A mechanical box. It looks like it didn't manage to get sold for over <unbreak>200</unbreak> years."
你吃了甜甜圈，你感觉自己的胃有奇怪的动静……
You take a bite of the doughnut and feel your stomach churning...
莲花唱起歌，你被唤起童年回忆，你仿佛回到上个时代……
As the lotus starts singing, your childhood memories come flooding back. You seem to have traveled back in time to the previous era...
你打开了匣子，里面似乎有奇怪的东西……
You open the box and see something odd inside...
购物节目令你如痴如醉。你还想接着看，但屏幕「咻」地关闭了。
The infomercial is addictive. You want to keep watching, but the screen suddenly turns off.
电视机碎了！一些奇怪的东西从里面蹦了出来。
The television shattered! Some strange things are coming out of it.
这个洞穴十分安宁，半空中跳跃的虫团像彩星。一位女士睡在洞中，脚边爬满诺布莱斯虫，她的皮肤像*灰质*一样没有色泽。

It is quiet and peaceful inside the cave. The groups of insects jumping in the air look like colorful stars in the sky. A lady with a gray-matter-esque complexion is sleeping in the cave with Noblesse Worms crawling at her feet.
她睁开眼，看见你时，她身边瞬间冒出一团彩色的火焰，火舌沿着皱壁蔓延，很快触到你的脚掌，你顷刻被火焰包围。
When she opens her eyes and sees you, a colorful flame instantly materializes next to her, spreads along the wall, and soon reaches your feet. You're surrounded by fire in an instant.
无数记忆在你的脑内涌现，你感到精神开始过热。你回想起第一个掰手指数数的下午，第一次看太空蚂蚁排队走路，你为什么记得这些？

Waves of memories gush into your mind, overloading your psyche. You recall the afternoon when you counted with your fingers for the first time in your life, and the first time you saw space ants walking in a straight line. Why do you remember these?
You are missing the country of gray matter.
「铭记这些垃圾让你感受自己活着。」你听见她冷哼一声，「信仰{RUBY_B#「记忆星神」}浮黎{RUBY_E#}，我们会焚烧你黯淡的记忆。」她说。
"Remembering the trash makes you feel alive." You catch her letting out an icy snort. "Worship {RUBY_B#Aeon of Remembrance} Fuli{RUBY_E#}, and we will burn your dull memories." She says.
你身处「西格玛星系联合剧院」的五号大厅。你不敢相信，自己坐在一群衣香鬓影的绅士与淑女之间。
You are in Hall No. 5 of the Sigma Galaxy United Theater. You find it hard to believe that you're sitting among a group of well-dressed and sophisticated ladies and gentlemen.
你开始期待，红鹅绒幕布之后的演出。你想，也许是萨尔索图歌剧团的宇宙公主，裙摆宽阔得可以笼罩住整个舞台。
You feel a buzz of anticipation for the show behind the red velvet curtains. You start picturing the Salsotto Troupe's cosmic princess, whose dress has a hem wide enough to cover the entire stage.
或是雅各宾数理院的老家伙们最爱的科学装置演出，他们将人工智能「普朗托专家系统」用于计算戏剧性情节。

Or it might be a scientific installation performance, the favorite of the old folks from the Jacobin School of Mathematics and Science. The Pronto Expert System, an AI device, is used to calculate the plot of the play.
或者，更伟大一点，西格玛圣女的不插电伴奏，那位永恒的「圣女」是拥有黄金比例的男性，世人都铭记他托举太阳的虬曲姿态。

Or, to be more mighty, the Sigma Maiden's unplugged accompaniment. That eternal "Maiden" is a man whose figure contains the Golden Ratio. His coiled posture when lifting the Sun is forever etched in the memory of the entire world.
很快，演出拉开帷幕——台上站着一位蓝色黏质皮肤的女士。她抬起手，开始歌唱——那是一种合成花腔。
Soon, the curtains are drawn. On the stage stands a lady with slimy blue skin. She lifts her hand and starts to sing with a synthesized coloratura.
你挺起胸膛，想活动僵硬的肌肉，却发现自己无法动弹——侧腰传来冰凉触感。是的…你确信…你被枪管抵住了。

You puff your chest out and try to move your tense muscles, but you find yourself unable to move — You feel something cold pressed against the side of your waist. Yes... you're very sure... that it is a gun.
「我们更换了节目单。『阿基维利』的时代落幕，古典艺术就已死去。今天大家都爱看动作片。告诉我你的选择。」一个男子声音传来。
"We've changed the program. The era of Akivili has ended, and classical arts are dead. Nowadays, action movies are the crowd-pleasers. Tell me your choice." A man's voice says.
「呃，不是这样的。」男子的声音有些茫然，他舔了舔嘴唇。「我的意思是，你喜欢歌舞片还是动作片？」
"Um, that's not what I meant." The man sounds bewildered. He licks his lips and continues. "I wanted to ask whether you prefer musicals or action movies."
你的腰椎被注射进药剂，一种宇宙和谐统一的喜乐贯穿你的脑髓。西利维亚小精灵围绕着你，他们吟唱颂歌。你跟着乐曲扭动着身体。

A potion is injected into your lumbar spine, and a joy of universal harmony and unity shoots through your cerebral fluid. As the Silvia Spirits encircle you and start singing a hymn, you sway your body along with the music.
你的腰椎被注射进药剂，冷兵器与燃烧的子弹在你的脑髓里穿梭。爆炸的艺术宏伟瑰丽。你吸入化学废气，神清气爽。

A potion is injected into your lumbar spine, and steel weapons and blazing bullets jet through your cerebral fluid. The art of explosion is spectacular. You breathe in the chemical exhaust gas, feeling refreshed.
「你…误会了。」他的声音变得急促，「这是互动戏剧，是戏剧性的一环。」
"You've... got the wrong idea." There is urgency in his voice. "You're watching an interactive play. This is a part of the show."
你的腰椎被注射进药剂，一种宇宙和谐统一的喜乐贯穿你的脑髓，无数冷兵器与燃烧的子弹在其中穿梭。
A potion is injected into your lumbar spine, and a joy of universal harmony and unity shoots through your cerebral fluid. Countless steel weapons and blazing bullets flying through your psyche.
「互动戏剧，这是剧目情节中的一环。我们希望从中看到艺术的现代性——打破第四堵墙。我的业务还不太熟练，非常抱歉。」

"This is an interactive play. This is a part of the show. We hope to perceive the modernity of art through it — to break the fourth wall. I don't have a lot of experience with this job yet. I'm very sorry."
「很抱歉给您带来了过于真实的体验。互动环节已经结束，请继续安心观赏剧目。」
"We're sorry for providing an overly realistic experience for you. The interactive part has now ended. Please continue enjoying the show."
你身处无垠草原，白云点缀蓝天——一切都是*像素*绘制。你低头看自己的双手，它们变成了像素方块。
You are in a vast grassland and the sky is speckled with clouds. Everything is a "pixel" drawing. You look down at your hands and find them to be pixelated cubes.
你手腕戴着一块像素手表。你用变成一个像素点的大拇指摁了摁它——「砰」地一声，你为自己切换了一套背带裤。
You are wearing a pixel watch on your wrist. With your pixelated thumb, you press down on the watch. With a bang, your clothes change into overalls.
你看着空中浮动的像素砖块，耳边回响复古电子乐。一群像素蚂蚁在地上爬行，它们摆出了几个字「欢迎吉巴欧萝卜先生」。

You stare at the pixel blocks floating in the air as vintage electronic music plays in the background. A group of pixel ants crawls on the ground in a formation that reads, "Welcome, Mr. Jibaou the radish."
什么是吉巴欧萝卜先生？
Who is Mr. Jibaou the radish?
蚂蚁很快摆出了几个像素字「那就是你呀！」你决定不再理会这些蚂蚁。你在一朵飘来的像素云上看到几个蜡笔字「黑塔制造」。

The ants quickly form several pixel characters that read, "That's you!" You decide to ignore the ants. On a pixel cloud that drifts in your direction, you see some words written with crayons: "Produced by Herta."
你明白，是奇物「降维骰子」攻击了你。你身处模拟宇宙墙壁上的涂鸦里——黑塔随手创作的蜡笔画。
You realize you've been attacked by the Curio "Dice of Dimensionality Reduction." You are now a part of the graffiti — casually drawn by Herta with crayons — on the wall of the Simulated Universe.
你气急败坏地踢了一脚砖块，冒出来一块像素金币。
You kick a brick in exasperation, and a pixel Gold Coin emerges.
你想弄明白如何回到模拟宇宙。你可以从左边的管道爬出去，或者跳上右边的砖块。
You want to figure out how to get back to the Simulated Universe. You may climb out from the pipe on your left, or hop onto the brick on your right.
你吃到了一块开拓者留下的金币。这块金币一分为二，接着二分为四，不停分裂、增殖……你拥有了意外的财富。
You have eaten a Gold Coin left behind by a Trailblazer. The Gold Coin splits into two, then into four. It constantly divides and proliferates... giving you a surprising windfall.
你遇到了地火组织的大块头，他看上去和这个世界的画风格格不入。他摆出了拳击姿势，并大叫着「KO」！很可惜，你没能躲过他的一拳。
You run into a brawny man from Wildfire who looks out of place with the artstyle of this world. He strikes a boxing pose and yells "KO!" Unfortunately, you fail to dodge his punch.
你继续前进，遇到了一个像素问号，你把帽子挂在它上面，显然这是存档点——下次再继续玩。
You proceed and see a pixel question mark on which you hang your hat. Obviously, this is a save point. You can continue the game later.
你遇见了一只三等身人形玩偶，它有稻草般的麻绳头发，肚子上有一个计数器。
You encounter a doll whose body is three times as tall as its head. It has straw-like hair made of ropes and a counter on its stomach.
你打开它的说明书「阿哈按照祂的样子制成的发泄玩偶——祂希望看到自己被暴揍的样子。揍得越凶他越开心，就会给您越多金币奖励！注：质量品控与阿哈本人无关。」

You open its manual, which reads, "This is a doll to vent extreme emotions on, made by Aha in THEIR own likeness. THEY wish to see THEMSELF beaten up. The worse the beating is, the happier THEY will get, and the more Gold Coins THEY will award you! Note: Aha is not involved in the quality control process."
阿哈玩偶毫无反应，计数器上的数字没有跳转。你太逊了！
Aha's doll does not react, and the number on the counter remains unchanged. You suck!
计数器缓慢跳转到「<unbreak>150</unbreak>」。玩偶内嵌芯片启动，传来一首颂歌「毁灭像个疯子，存护是个呆子；星神都一根筋，阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！……」

The number on the counter slowly reaches <unbreak>150</unbreak>. The chip embedded in the doll is activated to play a song: "The Destruction is crazy, and the Preservation is dumb. All the Aeons are stubborn, and Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed..."
你获得了一些宇宙碎片。
You have obtained some Cosmic Fragments.
阿哈玩偶被你打爆了——它碎成几块躺在地上。内嵌芯片启动，传来一首颂歌「智识是坨废铁，存护是个呆子；星神都一根筋，阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！……」

You punch Aha's doll into pieces that scatter across the ground. The chip embedded in the doll is activated to play a song: "The Destruction is crazy, and the Preservation is dumb. All the Aeons are stubborn, and Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed..."
阿哈玩偶的计数器数字跳转，它达到了<unbreak>299</unbreak>。再来一下？你生活里需要发泄的地方太多了。
The number on the Aha doll's counter reaches <unbreak>299</unbreak>. One more? There is so much frustration in your life, after all.
计数器继续跳转，最后停留在了「<unbreak>400</unbreak>」上。玩偶内嵌芯片启动，传来一首颂歌「智识是坨废铁，存护是个呆子；毁灭像个疯子，阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！……」

The number on the counter continues going up until it stops at <unbreak>400</unbreak>. The chip embedded in the doll is activated to play a song: "The Destruction is crazy, and the Preservation is dumb. All the Aeons are stubborn, and Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed..."
You have obtained a large number of Cosmic Fragments.
阿哈玩偶的计数器疯狂跳转，它的数值膨胀至<unbreak>2147483647</unbreak>时突然跳转至了0，数据溢出了。你鄙视在如今使用<unbreak>32</unbreak>位int类型储存数据的制造商。

The number on the counter increases rapidly. When it reaches <unbreak>2147483647</unbreak>, it suddenly shifts to zero — This is an integer overflow. You spite the manufacturers who are still using <unbreak>32</unbreak>-bit systems to store data in the modern world.
玩偶的脑袋炸开了花！<unbreak>500</unbreak>宇宙碎片掉落了出来。
The head of the doll has blown up! <unbreak>500</unbreak> Cosmic Fragments fall out from it.
玩偶突然转过头看你——它伸手从你口袋里抢走了一半宇宙碎片。
The doll suddenly turns to look at you. It reaches for your pocket and snatches half of your Cosmic Fragments.
你获得了一些宇宙碎片和祝福。
You have obtained some Cosmic Fragments and Blessings.
你获得了大量宇宙碎片和祝福。
You have obtained a large number of Cosmic Fragments and Blessings.
星际和平公司的董事会理事「疤眼夫人」坐在你对面。她的左眼有一道狭长的疤，你感受到她正观察你，你知道她并不好惹。
Madam Scarred Eye, board member of the IPC, sits across from you. A long and narrow scar cuts through her left eye. You can sense her gaze on you, and you know she is not to be trifled with.
迫于她强大的威慑力，你坐在这里。一位女佣递上香槟，轻吻疤眼夫人的手背。
You are sitting here because of her overwhelming intimidation. A maid offers her a glass of champagne, and softly kisses the back of her hand.
「埃维利星球遭遇了金融危机。」疤眼夫人说，「业务巩固部准备帮助星球度过难关，我们推出了天使型谢债发行机，我会给你开个无法拒绝的条件。」

"The planet Evelli is hit by a financial crisis," Madam Scarred Eye announces. "To help them tide over, our Business Consolidation Department has launched the Angel-type I.O.U. Dispenser. I'll make you an irresistible offer."
「购买公司的债务，等待这场浩劫过去，公司就会给予你数十倍的回馈。」
"Buy the IPC's debt, wait for this catastrophe to be over, and the IPC will pay you an amount more than ten times your principal."
疤眼夫人身旁的佣人推出一个长着翅膀的机器天使。「天使型谢债发行机，你需要定期把口袋里的金币喂给它。它会记录你的投资。投资周期结束，它会给你数十倍回馈。」

The servant next to Madam Scarred Eye pushes out a robot angel with wings. "This is the Angel-type I.O.U. Dispenser. You need to feed Gold Coins into it regularly, and it will keep a record of your investment. At the end of the investment term, it will pay you an amount more than ten times your principal."
「你不知道你错过了什么。」疤眼夫人说。「每一个工人，都会激动地把握住这个机会。这是一个*投机主义*的时代。」
"You have no idea what you have missed out on," Madam Scarred Eye remarks. "Every worker would be thrilled to be given such an opportunity. After all, this is an 'era of opportunism'."
「我们可以解决你的匮乏——给你一个*机会*，得到你想要的东西。」疤眼夫人说。
"We can solve your deprivation by offering you a 'chance' to get what you want," Madam Scarred Eye adds.
「当然。你的投资回报率会达到十倍以上。只要你确定，你的匮乏来自于*物质*。克里珀庇佑着我们。」疤眼夫人说。

"Of course. Your return on investment will be above <unbreak>1000%</unbreak>, as long as you are certain that your deprivation is in terms of 'materialism'. Qlipoth blesses us." Madam Scarred Eye states.
「当然。爱可以作为宇宙通用货币，我们量产它。星际和平公司会致力于为众人提供永无止尽的爱，克里珀庇佑着我们。」疤眼夫人说。

"Of course. Love can be a universal currency, and it is something we mass-produce. The Interastral Peace Corporation endeavors to provide everyone with an endless supply of love. Qlipoth blesses us." Madam Scarred Eye states.
「有一天你会回来找我。」疤眼夫人缓慢地说，仿佛在对你下达命令。「如果客户们什么也不想要，贸易就无法继续。贸易的兴盛会为克里珀筑起更高的墙，这就是意义。赠给你些纪念品，期待与你下次见面。」她站起身，背对着你离开。

"One day, you'll come back to me," Madam Scarred Eye slowly asserts in an authoritative tone. "Trade stops when clients desire nothing. When trade is booming, it will allow Qlipoth to build higher walls. That is the purpose. Here are some complimentary gifts for you. I look forward to meeting you again." She stands up and turns her back to you as she leaves.
「有一天你会回来找我。」疤眼夫人缓慢地说，仿佛在对你下达命令。「如果客户们什么也不想要，贸易就无法继续。贸易的兴盛会为克里珀筑起更高的墙，这就是意义。赠给你些纪念品，期待与你下次见面。」她站起身，背对着你离开。

"One day, you'll come back to me," Madam Scarred Eye slowly asserts in an authoritative tone. "Trade stops when clients desire nothing. When trade is booming, it will allow Qlipoth to build higher walls. That is the purpose. Here are some complimentary gifts for you. I look forward to meeting you again." She stands up and turns her back to you as she leaves.
星际和平公司的董事会理事「疤眼夫人」坐在你对面，她的左眼有一道狭长的疤，你感受到她正观察你。
Madam Scarred Eye, board member of the IPC, sits across from you. A long and narrow scar cuts through her left eye. You can sense her gaze on you.
「你回来了。我知道我不会等太久。」她看到你，双手交叉靠在下颚，丝毫不感到意外。
"You're back. I knew you wouldn't make me wait too long." She puts her chin on her crossed fingers, not at all surprised by your visit.
「天使型谢债发行机，定期把口袋里的金币喂给它。它会记录你的投资。周期结束，它会给你数十倍的回馈。」

"This is the Angel-type I.O.U. Dispenser. You need to feed Gold Coins into it regularly, and it will keep a record of your investment. At the end of the investment term, it will pay you an amount ten times your principal."
在伊须磨洲红岩石中间，你发现了一冢白石人头雕像，它的大小可以被手掌握住。你阅读石台刻字，上述其为{RUBY_B#「丰饶星神」}药师{RUBY_E#}。

In between the red rocks in Insumousu, you discover the white stone sculpture of a human head. Its size is just right to be held in your fist. You read the inscription on the stone platform that says, "{RUBY_B#Aeon of Abundance} Yaoshi{RUBY_E#}."
一股冲动上涌，你伸手握住雕像。你感到它在手中变为一只鸟，它的长寿以具象化的形式增生、膨胀，接着，赭红液体从你的指缝里流下来。

On the spur of the moment, you wrap your fingers around the sculpture, feeling it transforming into a bird in your hand. Its longevity proliferates and expands in a visualized form. Then, scarlet liquid flows through your fingers.
「…令诸有情…所求皆得…折磨治愈…互为共生……」
"...All sentient beings... will have all their wishes fulfilled... torment and healing... are in a symbiotic relationship..."
你不慎一脚踏入软木碎叶搭成的地面陷阱中——你相信这是布莱德星最*老式作风*的猎人才会使用的陷阱。你站起身，面前有一个巢穴入口。

You accidentally step into a ground trap made of branches and leaves — the type you believe to be used only by the most old-fashioned hunter on planet Bled. You get to your feet, and the entrance of a nest is before you.
你慢慢地深入虫巢。你拨开倒悬的虫卵，惊奇发现半透明的虫泡中，新生命正用触须挠它还未睁开的复眼。

Slowly, you make your way into the insect nest. As you brush off the eggs hanging upside down from the roof, you discover to your amazement that newborns within the translucent egg sacs are scratching their still unopened compound eyes with their antennae.
你发现了尽头惊异的景象，在数以百计的*虫泡*堆起的王座上，祂昏沉地睡在那里。
You find an astonishing sight at the end of the nest. On a throne atop a pile of hundreds of "egg sacs," "THEY" are sleeping soundly.
你眨了下眼，时间流逝了一天。你感到自己正一次又一次观看「虫皇」塔伊兹育罗斯睡在那里，你希望祂睁开眼看你。
A day passes when you blink once. You feel you are looking at the sleeping form of Tayzzyronth, the Imperator Insectorum, over and over, hoping that THEY will open THEIR eyes and look at you.
第一个虫泡轻轻破裂，生命迎来绽开时刻。
The first egg sac softly ruptures, and new life blooms.
你抱起扁圆状的虫泡，它的养料漏出，就像一粒开了口的绿细胞。它扭动着虬曲的身体，钻进了你的皮肤里。
When you lift the flat, round-shaped egg sack with your hands, its nutrients leak out like a punctured green cell. Then, it wriggles its curved body into your skin.
很快，你的脑袋里开始出现声音……塔█伊兹█ ██育█罗█ █斯██……漫长的等待摧毁了你，你慌忙逃离。
Soon, a voice begins to ring in your head... Tay█zzy█ ██ro█n█ █th██... The long wait destroyed you, and you flee in a hurry.
你相信，你的人生不需要探险。…当然更重要的是，你害怕在虫巢里直面塔█伊兹█ ██育█罗█ █斯██ 的█ █子嗣███ ████……
You believe your life doesn't need adventures... More importantly, you dread to face Tay█zzy█ ██ro█n█ █th██'s █ █childre███ ████...
你获得了一些宇宙碎片。
You have obtained some Cosmic Fragments.
你闻到一股并不冷峻的糕点香氛——你的目光落至面前的一盏芸豆糕点，上缀有惊惶鹿花朵。
You catch a whiff of the aroma of warm pastries. Your eyes fall on a bean pastry adorned with Startled Deer petals.
你继续追寻着这股味道——你抬头，发现一位黑发女子站在你面前。她吮着食指上残留的糕泥，你能嗅到她唇齿留有的香味。

You continue to trace the source of the aroma. As you look up, you find a dark-haired lady standing in front of you. You can smell the residual aroma on her lips while she licks the bits of pastry stuck on her fingers.
你是黑塔的另一个人偶？
Are you another puppet of Herta's?
「黑塔邀请我参与这个项目，培育宇宙。」她摇头。「我和她可不一样。虽然在很多地方，我和黑塔很像是知己…但总的来说，我们没什么交情。」

"Herta invited me to participate in this project and nurture the universe." She shakes her head. "I'm different from her. Although we appear like the best of friends in many aspects... the truth is, we aren't that close with each other."
「模拟实验室，我的微型培养皿。」她皱眉。
"This is the simulated lab, my miniature petri dish." She says with a frown.
「我独自培育这个微型切片，把它嵌在了模拟宇宙的代码里。」她抚摸自己围巾上的刺绣，漫不经心。「别告诉黑塔和螺丝咕姆。」

"I nurtured this miniature slice by myself and embedded it into the code of the Simulated Universe." She strokes the embroidery on her scarf distractedly as she adds, "Don't tell Herta and Screwllum about this."
你和黑塔的代码有哪里不一样？
What's the difference between your code and Herta's?
「黑塔，她喜欢做一些新奇的系统和小玩意。」她说。「我培育宇宙和星神原体。」
"Herta has a thing for inventing quirky systems and gadgets, while I nurture the prototypes of the universe and the Aeons." She answers.
Both of you like to pull off little tricks.
「闯进我的切片概率极小，高兴一些吧，我会给你些东西。」她说。「厉害的东西，但不免费。」
"The chance of breaching into my slice is slim, so you should be happy about this. I'll give you some things," she says, "good things. But they don't come for free."
你漫步于希斯拉达恩部落的荒原，三只外形像猪的胆小序列生物撞见了你。它们反应各不相同：一只瑟瑟发抖，一只准备逃跑，一只摆出战斗姿势。

Three timid sequence creatures that resemble a pig bump into you as you wander across the wilderness where the Hithradahn people dwell. They react differently to your presence: One is trembling, one is ready to flee, and one is in a combat position.
你记得星际和平指南上的描述：它们的名字叫「序列扑满」，跨维度生物，一生中大部分时间，花在进食和逃跑。

You remember the description written in the Interastral Peace Guide. The creatures are called Sequence Trotters, and they are trans-latitudinal organisms. They spend most time of their lives eating and escaping.
遇见「序列扑满」是为吉兆。你开始思考如何应对：玩耍的规则，得根据每只扑满的性格定制。
Running into a Sequence Trotter is an auspicious sign. You start to think of a way to deal with them. The rules of the game must be fixed according to the personality of each Trotter.
这是哪里？…你喃喃自语。你掉入了无垠黑暗中，这里没有光线，方向无法辨寻。
"Where's this place?" You mumble to yourself. You plunge into the boundless darkness. There is no way to get your bearings as there is no light.
神秘的嗡鸣在你的耳边响起，巨大的吸力拉扯你。你的精神力变得异常懒散。环绕你的气流并无实体，你肌肉松懈，眼皮蜷缩…

An inscrutable humming rings next to your ears, and a tremendous force is pulling at you. Your mental prowess becomes unusually weak, and the air flowing around you is not of a material nature. Your muscles are relaxed, and your eyelids are drooping...
这是一个异常可怕的体验。虚无吞没了你，你慌忙逃窜。
This is an exceptionally terrifying experience. As Nihility engulfs you, you scramble to escape.
这是一个异常可怕的体验。虚无吞没了你，你感到自己被抽走了生命力。
This is an exceptionally terrifying experience. As Nihility engulfs you, you can feel your vitality being drained.
你遇见了萨尔维亚星虔诚的筑墙者大队。他们推着矿车，正为星球筑起高墙。你注意到一位女孩，她栗色头发反射着身后砂石的色彩。

You cross paths with a devout Wallbuilder brigade from Servia. They are pushing mine carts while building a high wall for the planet. A girl catches your eye. The color of the gravel behind her reflects on her chestnut hair.
她的双手捧着流光碎银的矿物质，里面是木料和黄金。一瞬间你看到她的眼睛，像是银河，闪亮的小玩意倾泻下来。
She is holding a heap of gleaming minerals with wood and gold mixed inside. You briefly catch sight of her eyes, from which sparkles pour down like galaxies.
她远远地向你开口：「克里珀注视着我们，祂的视线很温暖。你可以从多余的材料里挑选你喜欢的。」
She speaks to you from a distance, "Qlipoth is gazing at us with a warm look. You can pick whatever you like from the excess materials."
你踏入递归方程模拟的自然程序，一个黑匣子放在地上。你打开它，全息拟造出一位医师——他腰椎以下是蛇的身形。

You step into a natural program simulated by the recursive formula and notice a black box on the ground. You open it to reveal the holographic image of a physician — he has the body of a serpent below his waist.
他挪动蛇尾，墨绿鳞片窸窣，反射金属光泽。「嘶嘶——」他开口，联觉信标运作，你逐渐理解半蛇人语言。
His dark green scales rustle and reflect a metallic glint as he moves its tail. "Hiss..." He speaks. Thanks to the Synesthesia Beacon, you can slowly understand his language.
「天戈星在<unbreak>62</unbreak>光年外被『岚』的光矢摧毁。黑塔观测到这件事，并在模拟宇宙中培育我的精神体。」他手掌中捧起一团火种。

"Xuange was destroyed by Lan's Lux Arrow <unbreak>62</unbreak> light-years away. Herta observed the incident and nurtured my spiritual form in the Simulated Universe." A kindling emerges in the physician's hands.
「我的存在即是虚无…我没有权限终止黑匣。我尝试翻越防护，仅做到将自灭火种传至黑匣外。希望你接收它，贯彻我的信念。」

"My existence is Nihility... I do not have the authority to terminate the black box. I've tried to get out of the defensive walls, but I've only managed to send the self-extinguishing kindling outside the black box. I hope you can take it and see my belief through."
你来到瓦鲁尼习星球最热闹的夜市。你注意到一个摊位，头戴兜帽的生意人遮住了脸，他盘腿坐在紫色地垫上，身边陈列各类矿瓶。

You arrive at the busiest bazaar in Varunix. One of the stalls catches your attention. The stall owner's face is obscured by the hood he is wearing. He sits cross-legged on a purple floor mat with various mineral bottles displayed around him.
「我是奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德的徒弟。我们来自星际和平公司的信仰狂热部！」他不着调地说。「你知道银河里的贸易是如何产生的吗？」

"I'm the disciple of Oswaldo Schneider. Both of us are from the Fanaticism Department of IPC!" The man says out of nowhere. "Do you know how commercial activities in the cosmos started in the first place?"
It was to earn more galactic currencies.
Does the knowledge of economics help you earn money?
「当然。最初是源于我们对克里珀的追随——后援队为了帮助星神筑墙，从宇宙各地运输材料，这时候，我们学会资源交换。」他挠了挠脸颊，「现在，来尝试交换吧，我保证你的学费不会白交。」

"Of course. It all started from our belief in Qlipoth. To help the Aeon in building the wall, the support team needed materials from different places across the universe. We learned to exchange resources during that time," he says while scratching his face. "Now, let's try to exchange something. I guarantee you that whatever you've spent won't be in vain."
你又一次在夜市看到「奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德」的徒弟，你嗅到他的贪婪——他选用批发矿瓶来节省成本，周身散发着硫磺气味。
Once again, you bump into Oswaldo Schneider's disciple at the bazaar. You can smell his greed — he reeks of sulfur as he uses wholesale mineral bottles to save costs.
「差价就是学费，人人都逃不了交学费。贸易的第一条准则，就是低买高卖。学会这条，你以后都不会吃亏。」他满不在意。

"The price difference is the fees you have to pay for the lesson, and no one can be the exception. The rule of thumb in business is to buy low and sell high. Master it, and you will never suffer a loss in the future," he says indifferently.
「接下来我教你如何掌握消费者心理。这涉及到概率学，人人都会对超级大乐透感兴趣。我保证，你总会有一天开到超级大奖。」

"Now, let me teach you a thing or two about consumer psychology, which involves probability theory. A jackpot with a huge prize is irresistible to most people. I guarantee that you will strike the jackpot one day."
你又一次看到「奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德」的徒弟。他看上去苍老了许多，瓦鲁尼习星球的经济遭遇寒潮，夜市贸易已变得冷清，顾客门可罗雀。
Once again, you bump into Oswaldo Schneider's disciple at the bazaar. He looks like he has aged a lot. The economy on Varunix is in recession, and the bazaar is quiet and deserted.
「啊…没错。在上一个超级好宝贝游戏里，随机库中其实并没有大奖。」他愧疚地说。
"Ah... You're right. There was no prize in the random pool of the previous Super Goodies game." He concedes guiltily.
「但是，我保证我会给你的。你信任过我，是老客户。接下来我要教会你贸易的最后一条准则：永远不消耗自己的信用。」他呲牙笑。
"But I promise I'll give it to you, as you trust me and are my regular customer. Next, I'll teach you the last rule of business: Never lie to your customers." He grins.
你走进庇尔波因特星球最可爱的奇力罗鱼鲜食馆——由一个巨大鱼眼气泡构成。你隔着弧形玻璃能看到亚空障壁。你享受午后惬意阳光，只属于你的时刻。

You walk into the most adorable Kiliro Fish Restaurant on Pier Point — a place made of a giant bubble in the shape of a fish eye. Through the curved glass, you can see the subspace barrier. You have a good time in the pleasant afternoon sunshine.
所有顾客都沉浸在超声鱼波的脑筋膜按摩之中。你一口吞下盘子里的*鱼眼*，感受社会性梦境袭来——庇尔波因特星球迎来黎明发展期，天空中定期会下星际货币雨，你手握公司发售的债券，幸福正在增值。

While the other customers are enjoying the piscatorial ultrasonic wave cerebral fascia massage, you stuff a fish eye into your mouth and plunge into a social dreamland. Pier Point is seeing a period of development during which the galactic currency will be raining down regularly from the sky. You are thrilled, as you own the IPC's bonds.
你的胃黏膜将鱼眼消耗殆尽，你从梦中醒来。你发现上班的时间已经到了。但你还不愿离开…
Your mind returns to reality when the fish eye is fully digested in your stomach. It's time for you to go to work, but you are reluctant to move...
你走进莱顿宁星球昏暗的汽车旅馆。在楼梯口，有位硕大的客人令你害怕——它的身体由透明胶液构成，两只头正互相碰撞，一只长着红色触角，一只带有白色光圈。

You enter a dimly-lit motel on Layton. At the stairway, you meet a massive guest who looks intimidating. Its body is formed by a transparent gel-like substance, and it has two heads knocking each other — one of them has red antennae, while the other has a white halo.
你对于这位邻居感到害怕，你似乎必须在它的两种人格中做出选择。
You find your neighbor terrifying. It seems like you have to choose between its two personalities.
「我们叫萨里奥。萨里哥哥是莱顿宁恶魔，而里奥弟弟是莱顿宁天使。你要和谁当邻居？」
"Our name is Saleo. Sal, the older one, is the demon. Leo, the younger one, is the angel. Which one do you want as your neighbor?"
在汽车旅馆的地下室，你又一次遇到了萨里——它的脑袋上有红色*恶魔*触角，黏质身体正腐蚀吞噬旅馆里的地板、墙壁，它并不很想理你，看上去它正忙于不断膨胀。

In the motel basement, you run into Sal again. He has a pair of red devilish antennae on his head, and his sticky body is corroding the tiles and the walls of the motel. He doesn't pay you any attention, as he is too busy expanding his size.
每个房间内都没有动静，你怀疑其他屋内的旅客究竟是还在自己的床上，还是已经在它的胃里…你有些懊悔自己之前的选择。
Not a sound can be heard from every other room. You wonder whether the other guests are all in bed or whether they are in Sal's stomach... You can't help but regret your previous choice.
「我叫萨里，是恶魔，我的弟弟则是莱顿宁天使，你要和谁当邻居？」
"I'm Sal, a devil. My brother is an angel. Which one do you want as your neighbor?"
在汽车旅馆的公共洗浴间，你又一次遇到了里奥——它的头上长出一只白色*天使*圆环，身体由乳白色胶液构成，小小的触手上捧着一本书，它向你微笑。
In the common bathroom of the motel, you run into Leo again. He has a white angel halo on his head, and his body is made up of white gel. Holding a book with his tiny tentacles, he smiles at you.
接着，它用古怪声音宣读幸福理论，附近住客从窗户里探出头来听。你突然意识到，所有顾客都被它宣读的教义蛊惑了心智…

Using an aberrant voice, he starts reciting the theory of happiness. The guests nearby all stick their heads out to listen. Suddenly, you realize that the guests are all brainwashed by his recitation...
「我叫里奥，是天使。我的哥哥则是莱顿宁恶魔，你要和谁当邻居？」
"I'm Leo, an angel. My brother is a devil. Which one do you want as your neighbor?"
你走在雪原里，裹紧身上温暖的皮毛。你迎面遇到一位男士——他有着红色卷发和雀斑，身材高瘦，穿着小牛皮靴，扛着猎枪。

You wander on the snow plains wrapped tightly in a fur coat. A man is coming your way. The tall and slender man has crimson curly hair and a freckled face. He is wearing leather boots and holding a rifle.
他指着远方球形建筑物「星际和平公司的制药公司在斯诺德兰捕猎生物材料，制作珍贵药品，招募大量赏金猎人。」

He points at a spherical building in the distance and says, "The pharmaceutical branch of the IPC is hunting biological materials to manufacture precious drugs, and so are recruiting bounty hunters in the Snowland."
「秘密情报，S级招募——雪原深境牦牛，极高报酬。这里竟然这么冷，能借我你的皮毛吗？」你目光落在他胸前*斯诺德兰动物保护协会*的徽章…

"According to a secret source, the S-rank bounty for Snow Plains Yaks comes with a handsome reward. I'm surprised by how cold this place is. Could you lend me your fur coat?" You catch sight of the Snowland Animal Welfare Association badge worn on the man's chest...
「出了个小意外，不过问题不大。」黑塔的声音突然传来，你找不到声音的来源。「系统里一部分球形代码产生了熵增，常有的事。」
"There is a small glitch, but it can be easily taken care of." It's Herta's voice, sourceless, ephemeral. "Entropy appeared in some spherical codes in the system. It is a common occurrence."
「它们很混乱，我就干脆把这团代码装起来，塞在了奇物里。」黑塔说。「把它带着，暂时会给让你的行为记录产生偏差，但我很快就会修好它。」
"The bundle of codes was a mess, so I packed it up and stuffed it into a Curio," Herta says. "Carrying it around will cause a deviation in your behavioral record, but I will fix it in no time."
阳光烤灼大地，你嚼着草叶，迎面走来一群壮汉——他们是肆意作乱的街头强盗，身后跟着一群雇佣军队。
You are grazing grass on the sun-baked earth when a bunch of beefy guys comes your way. They are the street bandits who wreak havoc wherever they go. They are followed by a team of mercenaries.
「我们是最后的牛仔！」首领振臂高呼，红鹮袖章象征他们已归顺皇室，你相信，他们就是*皇家*强盗。
"We're the last cowboys!" Shouts the leader who flails his arms happily. The red ibis armbands indicate their submission to the royal family. You believe they are the royal bandits.
「留下你的金币。城邦建设需要资金，慷慨是最后的牛仔精神！」强盗恬不知耻。你瞪着他们，狠狠咬断嘴里的草叶根——

"Leave your gold coins behind. We need funds to oil the development of the city. Generosity is in line with the cowboy's spirit!" Scowling at the shameless bandits, you bite off the grass with your mouth...
你面前的星体计算机正在高速运算，它上身是曲面屏幕，下身是无性别人类身体。它似乎在模拟大质量恒星的塌缩，只有你知道，你们的博弈，是一局石头剪刀布。

The astral computer before you, with a curved screen on top and a genderless human body at the bottom, is running a calculation at a high speed. While it seems to be simulating the collapse of a massive star, only you know that you are playing a game of rock-paper-scissors with it.
「你有<unbreak>82.49%</unbreak>的概率会在第一局就出石头，<unbreak>94.61%</unbreak>的概率在第二局出剪刀。」星体计算机说，「如果你选择现在掀桌与我生成的怪物战斗，你有<unbreak>99.37%</unbreak>的概率会输。」

"There is an <unbreak>82.49%</unbreak> chance of you playing rock in the first game, and a <unbreak>94.61%</unbreak> of you playing scissors in the second. If you choose to flip the table with me and battle with the monsters I created, there is a <unbreak>99.37%</unbreak> of you losing."
「如果你留下宇宙碎片，则有<unbreak>100%</unbreak>的概率会生还。」它正等待你的反应。
"But if you leave some Cosmic Fragments behind, your chance of survival is <unbreak>100%</unbreak>." It is waiting for your response.
你坐在牌桌前，独眼荷官的金属义腿与尼尔迪斯牌桌腿交缠在一起，躯干于桌洞正中央伫立，弹球围绕他的腰间转圈。

You sit at the card table across from a one-eyed dealer whose metal prosthetic legs are intertwined with the legs of the Nildis table. His torso runs through a hole in the center of the table with a pinball circling his waist.
他转动眼球，看向你，绅士地鞠躬。接着，荷官以十支机械手臂分发筹码，优雅切牌。
He moves his eyeballs to look at you before bowing at you gentlemanly. Next, the dealer distributes the chips and shuffles the cards gracefully with his ten mechanical arms.
「一定概率，您将翻开世上最美妙的记忆。」荷官将一叠牌发到你的面前。「您也可能会翻到一些隐秘的、不能被知晓的事情。如果您运气糟糕，后果将很危险。」

"There is a certain chance that you will unfold the most wonderful memory of the world." The dealer deals a stack of cards to you and adds, "However, you might also reveal some mysterious affairs that aren't supposed to be made known. If you are unlucky, the consequences will be dire."
你睁开眼，巨大的灯鱼从你手边游过，眼前埃勒庇努群岛水底最美的珊瑚正抖动它的礁角，星芒碎片四处流溢，你伸手去接……

You open your eyes to see a gigantic lightfish swimming past you. There are magnificent corals under the water of Alepine Islands, and their reefs are swaying. You reach your hand toward the starlight fragments drifting in your surroundings...
你骑在斯诺德兰野猪背上遍游草原！它正发疯驰骋，你在它的背上咯咯发笑，它想甩开你，这令你更开心！你俯身拉紧牵绳，却发现它驮的布袋里有不少好宝贝…

You are traveling across a grassland on the back of a Snowland Wildboar! You laugh giddily while it gallops at full tilt. The harder it tries to get rid of you, the more delighted you are! As you lean down to pull the rein, you notice a satchel full of little treasures...
你跟随在淘金机器人身后潜入山洞，它的探灯照到一处裂缝，钻头开始高速运转，你看到被凿开的地下，源源不断地涌出令人激动的金币……

You follow a gold-panning robot and sneak into a cave. The robot aims its headlight at a crevice, and its drill bit starts running at high speed. To your excitement, gold coins come gushing out non-stop from underground through the crack...
你获得了一些宇宙碎片。
You have obtained some Cosmic Fragments.
你睁开眼，发现眼前仍然是熟悉景象。「你翻开了一张空白牌，虽然概率不高，但也是结果中的一种。」荷官说道。
You open your eyes and find that nothing has changed. "You've drawn a blank card. The chance of drawing one is low, but it is still one of the possible outcomes," The dealer explains.
"Do you want to draw more cards?"
你睡得迷糊不清，空气非常沉闷。你满头大汗，挣扎着无法醒来。你在空中听到一个声音，它在梦里对你呓语：「…星核…将完成你的…任何愿望…」

You are in a deep slumber. The air is stuffy, and your forehead is covered with beads of sweat. As hard as you try, you are unable to wake up. Just then, a voice comes from the sky and whispers to you in your dream, "...The Stellaron... will fulfill... any wish of yours..."
「我非常抱歉。」你的记忆被打断。你抬头，看到荷官十支机械手臂缠绞在一起，组成旋转矩阵，重力波正在汇聚成子弹，你已经成为他的敌人。
"I'm very sorry." Your memory has been interrupted. You look up at the dealer, whose ten arms twist together, forming a spinning matrix and making bullets by converging the gravitational waves.
你来到一个埃尔韦风味小酒馆，这里气氛十分快活。
You reach an Elway-style tavern with a lively atmosphere.
你要了一杯酒，马里亚香橙和棕榈肉桂调成的。你观察人群，他们戴着面具，身材体格各异——「假面愚者」聚集的酒馆。

You order a cocktail concocted with Marian oranges and palm cinnamon. Then, you observe the crowd. Everyone is wearing a mask and has different body sizes. From this, you know it is a tavern where the Masked Fools gather.
「欢迎来到『世界尽头』酒馆。」酒侍布拉琪，向诸位深深鞠躬，「只接待有幽默感的顾客。」
"Welcome to Tavern World's End." Bragi, the bartender, bows deeply to the patrons and continues, "We only serve customers with a sense of humor."
「我们遵循阿哈的意志，接下来要寻点乐子。现在加入擂台的是弗朗斯先生，他带着他的专属安保集团。」酒侍说道，「另一边是亚威拉壮汉，他的佣兵集团块头很大，不可小觑！」

"In keeping with Aha's will, we will have some fun next. Mr. France and his team of bodyguards will be the next to join the arena. His opponent will be Avila. He and his mercenaries are burly and not to be underestimated!"
"Who else is coming? Who's up for the <unbreak>78,201</unbreak>st round?"
在翁瓦克岛，一群星际外来者拦住你——你打量着来人，这些家伙不属于这里。翁瓦克土著仍使用石器，而这群人全身裹着科技行星材料。

In Vonwacq, some outsiders block your path. You size them up and realize they aren't locals. While the Vonwacq still uses stone tools, these people are wearing materials from a technologically advanced planet.
「六十自然年的轮回又要来到，翁瓦克岛周期性魔王将从树上果实中诞育。我们的到来即是为了删除生物库中的数据——周期性魔王乃是一条外星虫子！」一位男士说道。

"The <unbreak>60</unbreak>-natural-year cycle is about to start again, and Vonwacq's Cyclic Demon Lord will be born from the fruit of a certain type of tree. We're here to wipe this data from the biological database, as the Cyclic Demon Lord is just an alien bug!" A man declared.
「果实中的魔王一旦落地，文明将遭受毁灭性打击。根据推算，我们离最后的时限还有四…四个周期！」另一位星际外来者的声音颤抖。

"Once the Demon Lord emerges from the fruit and lands on the ground, it will deal a devastating blow to our civilization. Calculations show that we are just f—f—four cycles away from its arrival!" Another outsider remarks in a trembling voice.
无名客的列车停靠布达安尔利站台，后厢上有无穷馈赠。戴着毛毡帽的旅行者靠在车厢前，他衣着破烂，毛靴沾着泥土。

The Express of the Nameless makes a stop at Budley with an abundance of gifts in its rear carriage. A traveler wearing a felt hat is leaning against the front of the carriage. His clothes are tattered and his boots mud-stained.
你走近车厢，他朝你招手。「阿基维利曾化身普通人，与布达安尔利人一起开拓冒险，我们交换旅程中的有趣经历。」
He approaches and waves at you. "Akivili had an adventure with us under the guise of a civilian. We exchanged a lot of fun experiences during the journey."
你走进圆形房间，绳索捆绑一株枝桠纯白的树。你惊讶于它的纯美，通体圣洁，它像一尊舞动雕像。
You enter a circular room where a tree with white branches is tied up in ropes. Its beauty and sacredness, which make it look like a dancing statue, blow you away.
你注意到树旁倚坐数名士兵，你不确定他们是否睡着了。他们是虔诚的骑士，每人的皮肤都不带血色。
Several soldiers are leaning against the tree, and you are not sure whether they are sleeping. They are pious knights with faces as pale as a sheet.
你也不受控制地走近它。你听到碎裂缓慢的树涛声。你看到树根旁的一块木牌：「用…浇灌…它将…盛开。」
You can't help moving closer to the tree. You hear the slow, crackling sound of the tree waving to and fro. There is a wooden board next to its roots that reads, "Water it... and it will... bloom."
你看见一只可爱的机器人向你招手。当你走近时，它开口了：「这里是星际和平公司销售终端！我们拥有你想要的一切！」在菜单里，你看见医疗、强化和购买业务，价格还算公道……
