You see an adorable robot waving at you. When you get near it, it speaks: "This is an IPC point of sale! You can find everything you desire here!" On the menu, you see medical, enhancement, and purchasing services offered at affordable prices...
警告！你的行为触发了销售终端的「电击」！
Warning! Your actions have triggered electric shock from the sales terminal!
你在「哀恸洞穴」中被困已久…你逐渐变得胡子拉碴、眼神颓靡。倘若此时任谁到来帮助你，你都将其视之为「救赎」。
You have been stuck in the Mourning Cave for ages... You have become unkempt, with a weary look in your eyes. If anyone were to come and help you at this moment, you would see them as your salvation.
就在你思考是否要制造一个如同*信标着色剂*般鲜艳的醒目标识自救时，你听到了一阵古老而优美的歌谣——那声音犹如澄澈雨雾，仿若蜜茶浇灌着你。

As you are contemplating whether to save yourself by making an eye-catching sign as bright as the *Beacon Coloring Paste*, you hear an ancient and beautiful song - The song, as refreshing as the clear rain, soothes your soul like a pot of honey tea.
「遇到您这般坚韧的灵魂是我们的荣幸。我们是纯美骑士团——向您献出枪尖上的衷情。」一些骑士盔甲碰撞的声音传来，一阵幻晕的光辉将你笼罩…接着是巨大飞艇降落的声音。你的意识模糊，只听到他们纷杂议论如何将你救出…

"It's our honor to meet a soul as tenacious as yours. We are the Knights of Beauty, and we'll show you our passion through our spears." Along with the clanking sound of armor, a burst of dazzling light envelops you... You hear the sound of a descending massive airship. While drifting in and out of consciousness, you can only vaguely hear them discussing how to rescue you...
然而…这议论持续了很久。他们各自连声点头称赞，接着自报名讳，他们研究你的困境，并向你提供数十种针对性的「帮助」……境况的困惑程度如熵增愈发膨胀，你开始忧虑起他们是否可被信任。

Yet... the discussion lasts for a very long time. They shower you with praises before introducing themselves. After analyzing your predicament, they provide you with dozens of targeted solutions... You find the situation more and more confusing, and you start to wonder whether they can be trusted.
The knight offers you a flower.
你接过它…「纯美」的花瓣感动了你。
You receive it... The petals of Beauty melt your heart.
The knight extends a hand to you.
你抓住了那只手…传来的余温感动了你。
You grab that hand... The lingering body warmth melts your heart.
The knight offers you a praise.
你望向他，只可惜并未看到他的面容便昏了过去…等你从昏厥中醒来，身边已被骑士众人围绕。
You turn to him but pass out before you can see his face... When you regain consciousness, you are surrounded by the knights.
The knight's long hair hangs down slowly.
你抓住了一缕长发…你很愧疚。
You catch a handful of long hair... and regret doing so.
The knight gives you the round shield.
你感受圆盾的荣耀，骑士的「英勇」震撼了你。
You can feel the glory from the shields, and you are shaken by the valor of the knights.
骑士向你伸出一只圆手。
The knight extends a spherical hand to you.
你判断了一番哪里是它的手指…但你握住了它的手。
After assessing the position of its fingers... you hold its hand in the end.
The knight calls to you fondly.
你回应了呼唤…那声音十分虔诚。
You answer the call... The voice sounds very pious.
骑士向你放出一名伙伴。
The knight gives you a companion.
哇！你驾驭了一名伙伴！你从半空中呼啸着落下！
Wow! You're riding a companion and swooping down from the sky!
将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们仍然不愿离去。他们忧虑地担心你缺少宇宙碎片…
After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty are reluctant to leave. They are worried that you might not have enough Cosmic Fragments...
纯美骑士把身上所剩无几的宇宙碎片给了你。
A Knight of Beauty gives all his few remaining Cosmic Fragments to you.
「希望我的帮助令你满意。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
"I hope you're satisfied with my help," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.
将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们仍然不愿离去。此刻，一位骑士认为你非常喜欢咕咕钟…
After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty are reluctant to leave. One of the knights thinks you are a fan of cuckoo clocks...
纯美骑士把身上收藏的咕咕钟都给了你！
The knight gives you his entire collection of cuckoo clocks!
「希望我的帮助令你满意。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
"I hope you're satisfied with my help," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.
将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们仍然不愿离去。此刻，一位骑士认为你非常喜欢奇物…
After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty are reluctant to leave. One of the knights thinks you are a fan of Curios...
纯美骑士把身上的奇物给了你。
The knight gives you his Curio.
「希望我的帮助令你满意。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
"I hope you're satisfied with my help," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.
将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们仍然不愿离去。他们认为你对星神的信仰十分虔诚…
After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty are reluctant to leave. They consider you a devoted follower of the Aeons...
纯美骑士决定将向你传授「纯美」的精神。
A Knight of Beauty decides to teach you the spirit of Beauty.
「愿你信仰伊德莉拉。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
"I hope you believe in Idrila," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.
将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们忧郁地注视着你…
After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty stare at you with melancholic expressions...
一位纯美骑士认为你身上仍有「麻烦」，因而帮你收走了一个咕咕钟。
One of the knights thinks there are still "problem" on you, so he helps you to take away a cuckoo clock.
「希望我的帮助令你满意。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
"I hope you're satisfied with my help," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.
将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们忧郁地注视着你…
After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty stare at you with melancholic expressions...
一位纯美骑士认为你仍对「奇物」不堪重负，因而帮你将奇物全部换成了宇宙碎片！
One of the knights thinks you are unable to bear the weight of the Curios, so he replaces all your Curios with Cosmic Fragments!
「希望我的帮助令你满意。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
"I hope you're satisfied with my help," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.
一位纯美骑士认为你身上仍有「麻烦」，因而帮你收走了所有的负面奇物。
One of the knights thinks there are still "problem" on you, so he helps you to take away all Negative Curios.
某天王摇滚巨星粉丝，向你递出他珍藏已久的原声大碟。里面有数十种不同的声音。
One day, a fan of a major rock star hands you a soundtrack album he has kept for a long time. There are dozens of different voices inside.
「最多噪音的摇滚、最神圣古典的说唱、最时髦的复古元素、最炫彩的朴素装饰音！星际潮玩美食、新推出的说谎游戏纯享奏乐、时代多重大混搭的珍藏大碟！」

"The noisiest rock music, the most sacred classical rap, the trendiest retro elements, and the most vibrant basic musical ornaments! This precious album showcases the instrumental piece of cosmic trendy toys and food and the latest social deduction game, with a mixture of elements across the ages!"
你恶狠狠地想着——他看上去一定隶属于矛盾元素组织！
Feeling annoyed, you are certain he is a member of the Contradictory Element Organization!
你来到了一个古怪的太空餐厅。在红砖制的房子里，驻足许多巴维鲁族人、狐人，以及一些人类…你发现甚至有只谛听坐在长桌前。
You arrive at a strange restaurant in outer space. In the building built with red bricks, there are some Bavirus, foxians, and humans. There is even a Diting sitting at a long table.
然而，一些穿灰色长袍囚衣的流刑犯也在这里…你盯着他们脚上的镣铐，打了个寒颤。你绕了过去，来到较为安全的吧台前。
Yet, some exiles dressed in gray prisoners' robes are here too... The sight of the shackles on their feet makes you shudder. You bypass them and walk to the bar with its comparative safety.
「专售异星风味鸡尾酒。」接待员的语调听起来也十分古怪，「天才俱乐部#55余清涂流传至今的调饮配方只剩二十五种，这里兜售三种；是否是她的剧毒配方，我不敢保证。要哪杯？」

"We specialize in exotic cocktails." The waiter speaks in an odd tone. "Out of all the cocktail recipes left by Genius Society #55 Yu Qingtu, only <unbreak>25</unbreak> of them have been passed down to this day. Three of them are available here, but we can't guarantee whether those involve her toxic concoctions. Which one would you like?"
你怀疑起接待员的职业素养。
You start to doubt the waiter's professionalism.
你的鸡尾酒在你眼前发生了爆炸！
Your cocktail explodes in front of you!
你一无所获，这令你非常伤心。
You feel sad. You gained nothing.
你的鸡尾酒搅拌完成了。一位身着缀有亮片的礼服、目光婀娜的女士突然走过来，她带着珠光的耳坠正在灯光下闪烁，这光芒令你眼花缭乱。她抢走了你的酒，却还对着你笑，她挑衅地对你招了招手。

You have finished stirring your cocktail. A lady in a sequined dress with a sensuous gaze suddenly walks over. The gems on her earrings sparkle under the lights, and you are bedazzled. She grabs the cocktail from your hands but still waves at you with a provocative smile.
你正气愤不已时，她却突然发出尖锐的哀嚎！她突然可怖地蜷缩起来…你后退了几步。
While you are still experiencing outrage at her action, she suddenly lets out a shrill cry, and her body curls up in a horrifying manner... You stagger a few steps backward.
天才俱乐部#55余清涂的特调令你惊讶不已。原来你调制出了一杯传说中的有毒鸡尾酒……
You are shocked by the recipe of Genius Society #55, Yu Qingtu. As it turns out, you have made a legendarily toxic cocktail...
你得到了一杯鸡尾酒！你「咕嘟咕嘟」地喝了下去……
You receive a glass of cocktail! You gulp it down...
你得到了一杯鸡尾酒！你「咕嘟咕嘟」地喝了下去…睡意席卷了你。
You receive a glass of cocktail! You gulp it down... Soon, a wave of lethargy hits you.
正在你昏昏沉沉之时，你查觉到长桌另一侧，一个古灵精怪的*窃贼*的目光正打量着你…嗯，她似乎狡黠地坦荡展示了自己的企图。
As you are feeling drowsy, you notice a mischievous *thief* sizing you up slyly from the other end of the long table... She seems to have no qualms about openly showing her evil intentions.
你未能抵抗得住这股睡意…等到醒来后，身边目光炯炯的窃贼已经消失了。
You fail to resist the urge to sleep... By the time you wake up, the thief with her dazzling eyes is already gone.
你的钱包也瘪了。你损失了很多宇宙碎片…你希望能再次遇到她。
Your wallet is no longer stuffed, and you have lost lots of Cosmic Fragments... You hope to run into her again.
在废弃星系的古城，你遇到了一群远古的渴血巨兽。热气腾腾的喘息声拂到你的脸上……
You encounter a group of ancient bloodthirsty behemoths in an ancient city of an abandoned star system. Their hot, steamy breaths brush against your face...
你注意到它们似乎发生了突变…它的皮肤上覆盖一层鎏金硬壳，似乎正饱受突变之苦。
You notice signs of mutation on one of them... Its skin is covered by a layer of gilded hard shell, and it seems to be suffering from the mutation.
你与它耷拉的双眸对视。它的胡须上下浮动，你注意到它的身后仍护着几只幼崽……
You stare straight into its droopy eyes. Its whiskers are moving up and down. You notice it is protecting some cubs behind it...
你不仅一无所获，还被这股强烈的推力炸出了餐厅。
You gain nothing, in addition to being blasted out of the restaurant by this strong force.
你遇到了一个机械生命，它似乎对奇物修理颇有理解。
You meet a mechanical lifeform. It seems to be skilled in repairing Curios.
它示意你将在乎的宝贝丢给它进行修理。
It gestures for you to let it repair your treasures.
一个悲悼伶人骑着银河巨象，缓步步入你的视线…她不知为何仍在哭泣。接着，她从银河巨象走了下来，她祈愿为你展现一场「不收费」的奇妙伶人戏法。

A Mourning Actor riding a cosmic elephant slowly comes into sight... She is still weeping for some reason. Then, she dismounts the cosmic elephant and offers to perform a special magic show to you "for free."
她在你面前，将你的祝福塞到手下的四个杯子里…接着她快速变幻那些杯子！一切瞬间就结束了。伶人将双手放至胸前，礼貌地询问你选择哪一个……

She stuffs your Blessings into four cups in front of you... Then, she quickly moves the cups around, and the show ends in an instant. The Actor then places her hand on her chest and politely asks you to choose a cup ...
你已完全跟不上了…瞎蒙一个吧！
You can't keep up at all... Just choose a random one!
星际和平公司「信仰狂热部」的大乐透发行商人出现了！
The lottery distributor from the Interastral Peace Corporation's Fanaticism Department is here!
「你知道什么是双乐透体验吗？」他小声在你耳边耳语，「我可以为你提供…双乐透体验…呃，只要你为『奥斯瓦尔多·施耐德』的竞选投上一票」
"Have you heard of the Double Lottery Experience?" He whispers into your ear. "I can provide you with... the Double Lottery Experience... as long as you vote for Oswaldo Schneider in the election."
他用期待的眼神看着你。
He looks at you with anticipation in his eyes.
「你知道什么是超乐透体验吗？」他小声在你耳边耳语，「我可以为你提供…超乐透体验…呃，只要你为『奥斯瓦尔多·施耐德』的竞选投上一票」
"Have you heard of the Super Lottery Experience?" He whispers into your ear. "I can provide you with... the Super Lottery Experience... as long as you vote for Oswaldo Schneider in the election."
你跌跌撞撞地闯进一个熟悉的地方。你骤然抬头，看到她站在实验台前——她左手捧着绣面，右手拉起最后一根绣针上的线头，接着轻轻咬断它。

You stumble into a familiar place. You look up and find her standing before an experiment bench. Holding an embroidered cloth with her left hand, she pulls the thread on the last needle with her right hand before gently biting it off.
「又闯进我的切片了。」阮•梅背对着你，声音不起波澜，「我还未完成作品的培育。」
"You've barged into my world slice once again." Ruan Mei's voice is calm as she speaks with her back facing you. "I haven't finished cultivating my work yet."
接着，她迟疑几秒，回头看你…僵持几秒后，她叹了口气，从实验台走下来。糕点的清香扑鼻而来。「来了…就正好帮我瞅瞅。这几个图案哪个是『完美作品』？」

She hesitates for a few seconds before turning around to look at you... After a moment of tense silence, she sighs and steps down from the bench. The mouthwatering scent of snacks permeates the air. "Since you're here, take a look at these patterns for me, and pick the one you think is the perfect masterpiece."
"If you answer it correctly... you'll be rewarded."
「不错的回答。你无需紧张，生命的定义中从未有过『完美作品』，我只考验你的衷心倾向哪边。」阮•梅起身走回自己的试验台，她的鞋跟踩在地上发出清脆的响声，「没有标准答案的问题被设立，本就是为了令人寻找得不到的答案。」

"Great choice. Don't sweat over it. There's no such thing as a perfect masterpiece in life. I was just testing the inclination of your heart." Ruan Mei returns to the bench. Her heels give off a crisp clacking sound when she walks. "Questions without a standard answer are created to search for the unattainable answers."
在空荡的星际百货大楼里，一个街机出现在你面前。潮流扭蛋人、以太球和黏土玩偶堆叠在柜窗内，电子音乐和五彩的灯光随着你的到来而亮起。

An arcade machine appears in front of you in the deserted Interastral Department Store building. Trendy gachapon figures, ether orbs, and clay dolls are stacked inside the display cabinet. Electronic music and colorful lights come alive as you approach.
「我是街机中的*完美型男*！」这个街机开始播放电子音，你认为这是某位玩味的程序爱好者为其设计好输入的声音……
"I'm the perfect man in the arcade!" The arcade machine starts to play an electronic voice. You suppose this was added by a playful programmer...
你止不住打了个寒颤——你怀疑其中有诈！
You can't help but shudder - You suspect that there must be a catch!
完美的开局音乐在你耳边响起……
Perfect music that signals the start of the game blares off next to your ears...
你走开前踹了一脚*完美型男*，接着被石头绊倒了…你恶狠狠地想着，这也是程序设计的恶意之一！
Before leaving, you give the perfect man a kick and trip over a stone... Irritated, you are certain it is another trick set up by the programmer!
「黏土玩偶」随着「抓夹」上升...成功了！
The clay doll rises together with the claw... You've got it!
你获得了一个*完美*的「黏土玩偶」！
The clay doll rises together with the claw...
「黏土玩偶」从「抓夹」上掉落，你一无所获。
The clay doll drops from the claw. You get nothing.
你缓慢地将「抓夹」挪到目标上…你失去耐心了！你狠狠地踢了机器一脚只为希望它快一点！
You slowly move the claw to your target... and lose your patience! You give the machine a vicious kick, hoping it can make the claw move faster!
出乎意料——你的神之一脚让机器电压猛烈升高！「抓夹」哐当一下把一只*黏土玩偶*的头夹了起来，接着它不受控制地旋转、扭曲着扭蛋人的脖子！

Surprisingly, your powerful kick gives the voltage of the machine a surge! With a clank, the claw grabs a trendy *clay doll* by its head. It starts spinning out of control, twisting the figure's head!
*黏土玩偶*的头被抓爆了！一些礼花从脑袋里爆开，你目瞪口呆地望着这一诡异的场面。
The head of the clay doll explodes! Fireworks burst out from the head, and you watch the bizarre scene with your jaw on the floor.
「完美…完美…宇宙需要*完美*！」它最后的程序如此说道。
"Perfect... Perfect... The universe needs *perfection*!" The final program says.
「潮流扭蛋人」随着「抓夹」上升...成功了！
The trendy gachapon figure rises with the claw... You've got it!
你获得了一个*完美*的「潮流扭蛋人」！
You've won a *perfect* trendy gachapon figure!
The trendy gachapon figure rises with the claw...
「潮流扭蛋人」从「抓夹」上掉落，你一无所获。
The trendy gachapon figure drops from the claw. You get nothing.
你还想继续玩…但这个街机坏掉了。下次再来吧。
You want to continue playing, but the arcade machine has broken. Just come back next time.
你遇到一位栗色卷发、满脸雀斑的男士，他称自己是「黑森林」地带的挖掘者。在他的形容下，那是一个充满神秘气息的地带：据说森林中有着无数预言机、写诗机以及各种齿轮机械生命，有机生命对此少有涉足。

You encounter a freckled man with curly chestnut hair who introduces himself as a digger in the Black Forest. He describes the forest as a mysterious place. It is said that in the forest there are numerous prophecy machines, poet machines, and all kinds of mechanical lifeforms operating on gears. Organic lifeforms rarely set foot there.
他见到你，犹如见到有潜力被发展的同好，立刻面露喜悦！他把自己的「藏品」——咕咕钟塞到你手里。
His face brightens up the moment he sees you, as though he has just found a potential fellow enthusiast. He places his treasure — a cuckoo clock — into your hands.
「带一个咕咕钟回去体验吧！」咕咕钟狂热爱好者说，「我保证你也会爱上咕咕钟。」
"Bring a cuckoo clock home and try using it!" The cuckoo clock fanatic says. "I'm sure you'll fall in love with cuckoo clocks."
他非常激动，认为遇到了同样识货的爱好者！
He is thrilled, thinking that he has met someone who shares his taste!
他被你拒绝，立刻面露忧愁，看来他的内心十分敏感——但这并没有影响到他的狂热！
He looks upset when you turn him down. He seems to be a very sensitive person, but that does not dampen his fervor!
「请…请收下吧…我的推荐一直失败，从没有人懂得欣赏一只咕咕钟。如果真的没有人懂得欣赏咕咕钟…我的生命将变得毫无价值……」他眼含热泪地说着…几乎将要哭了出来。

"Please... Please take it... I've never succeeded in promoting the cuckoo clocks. Nobody could appreciate them. If no one could really appreciate the cuckoo clocks... then my life will be meaningless..." His eyes glisten with tears, and he is on the verge of crying.
他把你的肩膀推了个圈，让你赶紧回家研究——带着咕咕钟回去享受吧！
He keeps pushing your shoulder as he persuades you to go home and study the cuckoo clock - Just take it back home and enjoy using it!
你又一次遇见了栗色卷发的咕咕钟狂热粉丝！他看见你，热切地与你打了个招呼。你注意到他正挂断与「黑森林」地带的挖掘者伙伴的电话……

You run into the cuckoo clock fanatic with the curly chestnut hair again! He greets you enthusiastically when he sees you. You notice that he has just ended a phone conversation with a Black Forest digger...
「又见到你了！我们正准备建立咕咕钟爱好者协会！你还想体会一下其他的咕咕钟魔力吗？」…你还未做好心理准备，他的热情就已扑面而来。
"It's you again! We're going to establish the Cuckoo Clock Fan Club! Would you like to experience the charm of other cuckoo clocks?" His enthusiasm is at full power before you are even ready for it.
你又得到了一只咕咕钟！在这种攻势下，你开始恐惧自己终有一天会走上咕咕钟狂热粉丝的道路……
You've received another cuckoo clock! If things go on at this rate, you might one day become a cuckoo clock fanatic yourself. That thought puts you in fear...
他十分悲伤，他不能理解竟有人可以抵抗一只咕咕钟的诱惑……
He is devastated. He cannot understand how someone can resist the temptation of a cuckoo clock...
这一次，你有所心理准备。当你看到栗色卷发的咕咕钟狂热粉丝再次向你走来时，你相信他真的决不放弃——但你也是有备而来！

This time, you are mentally prepared for it. When you see the cuckoo clock fanatic with curly chestnut hair walking in your direction, you are convinced that nothing will make him give up. However, you are ready to face him!
「噢，我的老朋友，好久不见！我刚告别黑森林中所有的无机生命。」咕咕钟狂热粉丝见到你，立刻开始泣涕连连，「我正联系星际和平公司业务拓展部，他们答应为我们在宇宙中宣扬咕咕钟爱好者！很快我们的队伍将会更加壮大！」

"Oh, my old friend! It's been a long time! I've just bid farewell with all the inorganic beings in the Black Forest." The cuckoo clock fanatic starts sobbing when he sees you. "I've contacted the Business Development Department of the IPC, and they've promised to help us promote our fan club in the universe! We'll be a stronger team soon!"
你看到他身后还有不少新采掘出的咕咕钟……
There are a lot of newly excavated cuckoo clocks behind him...
你感到自己终于无法抵抗地变成了咕咕钟狂热粉丝…
You can feel yourself succumbing helplessly and turning into a cuckoo clock fanatic...
他非常开心！你终于领略到他用尽一生所推动的事业——令众人都能理解集成式交换咕咕钟的快乐！
He is over the moon! You finally comprehend the great work he spent his life setting into motion - The great work of making everyone understand the joy of ensembled tradeable cuckoo clocks!
他非常开心！你终于领略到他用尽一生所推动的事业——令众人都能理解集成式交换咕咕钟的快乐！
He is over the moon! You finally comprehend the great work he spent his life setting into motion - The great work of making everyone understand the joy of ensembled tradeable cuckoo clocks!
这是你来到星际和平公司的第一天。你望着高耸入云的星际和平分部大楼，决心成为一名出色的星际和平员工。
This is your first day at the Interastral Peace Corporation. Staring at the towering IPC branch building, you are determined to become an excellent IPC employee.
你骄傲地挺起了胸膛！你胸前的「P<unbreak>-13</unbreak>」级别标识在太阳下闪闪发光，不，「P<unbreak>-13</unbreak>」怎可定义你？你的*野心*可远不止于此……

You straighten up confidently! The level P<unbreak>-13</unbreak> staff badge on your chest gleams brightly under the sun. But no... P<unbreak>-13</unbreak> is not going to define you! Your *ambition* reaches far beyond it...
这是你获得升职的第一天！你望着高耸入云的星际和平分部大楼，决心成为一名出色的「P<unbreak>-16</unbreak>」正式职工，带领好手下新来的临时雇佣工。你的目光已经投向更高的金字塔顶尖…

This is your first day after being promoted! Staring at the towering IPC branch building, you are determined to become an excellent official P<unbreak>-16</unbreak> employee and a good supervisor to the new temporary workers. You already have your eyes set even higher along the corporate ladder...
哼…你翻阅着星际和平手册对公司领导层的介绍。那面庞英俊、能言善辩的「P<unbreak>-25</unbreak>」分部领导令你不悦…也许，你会比他更有才能？

Hmph... You flip through the overview of the IPC's directors in the Interastral Peace Handbook. That level P<unbreak>-25</unbreak> branch director with a handsome face and an articulate silver tongue annoys you... Perhaps you are more talented than him?
现在…到了你表现自我的时刻。
Now... it's time for you to showcase your talent.
这是你获得升职的第二天！你望着高耸入云的星际和平分部大楼，决心成为一名出色的「公司高级员工」。
This is your second day after being promoted! Staring at the towering IPC branch building, you are determined to become an excellent senior IPC staff.
听说分部最近人心惶惶，一些员工似乎因工作犯错而被秘密处理。但你仍然沉浸在自己将会晋升的美好愿景里，你认为自己应该将此生的目标定为「P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>」，分部的领导者！即便「P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>」仍离总部的大门还有很长距离，但对于你这位青年才俊那都不是问题！

You hear that some employees were secretly fired due to work-related mistakes lately, and this has put everyone at the branch on edge. Nevertheless, you are still immersed in the belief that you will be promoted in the future. Reaching level P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>, branch director, should be your lifetime goal! Although P<unbreak>-35</unbreak> still has a long way to go before you reach the headquarters' gates, it won't be a problem for a young talent like you!
哼…你翻阅着星际和平手册对公司大人物的介绍。在*在田*的领导下，传统项目部已被嘲笑为「养老院」。*姆托尤因•拉杰•扎扎德*？她只会让「人才激励部」的家伙制作点小恩小惠的计划…你越来越猖獗、自信…「P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>」？不！你甚至觉得自己终有一日可以挑战「P<unbreak>-48</unbreak>」*疤眼夫人*！

Hmph... You flip through the overview of the IPC's big shots in the Interastral Peace Handbook. Under Arita's leadership, the Traditional Project Department has been mockingly dubbed the "retirement home." Mtooyin Raj Zazzad? She only knows how to come up with plans that award employees in the Talent Motivation Department with petty benefits... You become more and more audacious and confident... P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>? No! You believe you can even one day challenge level P<unbreak>-48</unbreak>, the *Madam Scarred Eye*!
这是你获得升职的第三天！不知为何，你已经成为整座高楼空地的拥有者！
This is your third day after being promoted! For some reason, you have become the owner of all the space in the entire high-rise!
你将一个自制的「P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>」徽章别在胸前，你认为这时应当向众人炫耀你的功绩了！
You pin a self-made level P<unbreak>-35</unbreak> badge on your chest, thinking it's time you show off your accomplishments to everyone!
*路易斯·弗莱明**奥斯瓦尔多·施耐德*…那些寰宇最顶级、名号最响亮的大人物，他们对你来说曾高不可攀！但——有朝一日，你相信自己能够顶替他们！
The most well-known figures in the universe, such as Louis Fleming and Oswaldo Schneider, were once out of your league. But now, you believe you can replace them in the future!
没有大人物回应你！你突然认清了现实…你对着空地吸了一口烟，沿着空旷的街道一直往后走…最终你靠在了水泥柱前，你的面容变得颓唐、忧愁。

None of the big shots responds to you! Suddenly, you come to terms with reality... You take a puff of cigarette while staring at empty space, then walk back along the deserted street... At last, you lean on a cement pillar, looking low-spirited and crestfallen.
是的…这不是你意料之中的结局，究竟哪一步走错了？你开始渴望人生可以重头再来，也许那时你会选择不一样的…道路？

Indeed... this is not the outcome you have expected. What did you do to make things so wrong? You wish you could start everything over. Perhaps, you would have chosen a different path in the beginning.
…你昏沉地失去了意识，原来被欲望吞没的员工，都会被*奇妙处理*，并成为公司秘密会议室墙上的一枚头像画章。

...You slowly lose consciousness. As it turns out, all employees consumed by greed are subject to a mysterious treatment that will turn them into portraits on the walls of the IPC's secret conference room.
你漫步在蓝色礁湖前，穿过缀满紫罗兰的花园，接着绕过象牙白石制成的殿堂，走上金碧辉煌的楼梯…直到你面见「星际和平分部银行」的招牌。

You stroll alongside a blue lagoon, pass through a garden full of hoary stocks, and go around a hall of ivory and white stones. You walk up a grand golden staircase... and stop in front of the "IPC Branch Bank" sign.
这里的一切装饰都昂贵而夺目…你来到了柜台前。
Every piece of ornament here is posh and dazzling... You walk up to the counter.
「存得越多…额外的利息报酬也越多。」柜员的笑容极具感染力，他举止优雅得体，你相信他是受过公司「人才激励部」培训的优秀员工。

"The more you deposit, the higher the interest rate." The teller has an infectious smile and an elegant demeanor. You believe he is an excellent employee trained by the Talent Motivation Department of the IPC.
金碧辉煌的穹顶令你难以忘怀。在璀璨夺目的各类星系藏品围绕中…你又一次来到了「星际和平分部银行」。你把手伸进了兜里，做好了准备。

The magnificent glittering dome leaves an unforgettable impression on you. Surrounded by marvelous collectibles from various star systems... you find yourself at the IPC Branch Bank again. You reach into your pockets and are ready to take action.
「存得越多…额外的利息报酬也越多！」熟悉的声音响起。
"The more you deposit, the higher the interest rate!" A familiar voice arrives.
你把空空如也的口袋兜翻出来——展示给星际和平分部柜员！他的笑容凝固在嘴角，现在是你取得被许诺报酬的时候了！
You show your empty pockets to the bank teller, and the smile on his face freezes! It's time you claim your promised rewards!
遨游模拟宇宙八百万里，从没有人真正理解过你的内心…
Despite having traversed the Simulated Universe for eight million miles, you did not find anyone who truly understood you...
总是测试项目令你疲倦。你决定在模拟宇宙里收留一只虫子做你的伙伴。
You are tired of continuously testing one project after another. So, you decide to adopt a worm as your companion in the Simulated Universe.
你打量着眼前这位伙伴：这条太空美虫「着涎香」，伤口周围分泌出次生代谢物，散发特别的花、果、蜜香气味…你知道将它抚养长大后，它终将出没于奇异果香、银河茶园之间，它的每次旅行或许都会为你带来*爱*的气息。

You observe your companion: This beautiful space worm is named Sweet Saliva. It secretes secondary metabolites around its wound that give off a unique flowery, fruity, and sweet scent... You know that when it matures, it will linger around the exotic fruit orchards and cosmic tea plantations. Each of its trips may bring the scent of *love* to you.
虽然你一贫如洗…但你仍然可以用尽全力呵护它。
Although you are destitute... you can still do your best to nurture it.
你的太空美虫蠕动着，它对着你的脸蛋「啪嗒」一口，向你表示了感谢。
Your space worm wriggles and spurts a mouthful of saliva at your face to show its gratitude to you.
你的太空美虫蠕动着，你等待着它对着你的脸蛋「啪嗒」一口…
Your space worm is wriggling. You wait for it to spurt a mouthful of saliva at your face...
但它却一跃而起，用尾巴扫了下你的脸！你被打得好痛！
However, it leaps and smacks its tail against your face instead! It hurts a lot!
…看来它似乎并不喜欢被这么对待。
...Seems like it hates to be treated this way.
时光如梭。你所抚养的太空美虫「着涎香」已去星际茶园沉浸式学习已久…当你听到门口出现摸索的声音时，你便知道它归来了。

Time flies. The space worm named Sweet Saliva that you have nurtured has been undergoing immersive learning at the cosmic tea plantation for a long time... When you hear the sound of fumbling at the door, you know it is back.
你打开门——它长大了。它从那种茶菁的表皮中褪色，蜕变出一种掺杂着白毫、黄绿以及褐青色的斑斓花纹…这是「着涎香」已成为成虫的证明。它发出着阵阵呼唤…那是对你*爱*的证明。

You open the door and find that it has grown up. Its skin, which was initially green, has faded and is now covered by a colorful pattern that is a mixture of white, yellowish green, and brownish blue hues... They are the signs that Sweet Saliva has matured into an adult bug. It calls out for you... which is the proof of its *love* for you.
你露出了宽慰的、悲怀的笑容。
A relieved and sorrowful smile breaks out on your face.
一个背着垃圾桶的人遇到了你。他蹲了下来，向你展示它的宝贝垃圾桶。
A person carrying a trashcan meets you. He crouches down and shows you his treasured trashcan.
「这是一个神奇的空间。」他摆了摆手，把那些酸酸情诗掏出来扔掉，为你腾出空间。
"This is an incredulous space." He beckons. Then, he tosses out some collections of pitiful love poems from the trashcan to make some space for you.
他小声对你说，「将你的废物投入，它们会进化出一些进步意识…然后自己精神焕发地跑出来！」
In a hushed voice, he says, "Put your waste in it, and the items will evolve into an advanced awareness, then come running out energetically on their own!"
你遇到了一片「超验之镜」的巨大碎片，碎片下供奉着三盏烛火。
You come across a massive fragment of the Mirror of Transcendence. Three candles are placed beneath it as offerings.
You walk back and forth while being deep in your thoughts...
一盏烛火被点亮，司美之神隐约阔绰的面容在碎片中摇曳…你看得更清晰了，但此时，一位揽镜人的面容却突然从巨大碎片中出现！

As one of the candles is lit, a vague image of the God of Beauty's broad face flickered within the fragment... Just as the image gets clearer, the face of a Mirror Holder suddenly appears within the massive fragment!
「吾被囚禁在此片碎镜中已久。」镜中的揽镜人说，「信仰『纯美』…吾会回应你的祈愿。」
"I've been imprisoned in this mirror fragment for a long time. Believe in the Beauty, and I will grant all your wishes," says the Mirror Holder in the mirror.
一盏烛火被点亮，司美之神隐约阔绰的面容在碎片中摇曳…你看得更清晰了，但此时，一位揽镜人的面容却突然从巨大碎片中出现！

As one of the candles is lit, a vague image of the God of Beauty's broad face flickered within the fragment... Just as the image gets clearer, the face of a Mirror Holder suddenly appears within the massive fragment!
「吾被囚禁在此片碎镜中已久。」镜中的揽镜人说，「信仰『纯美』…吾会回应你的祈愿。」
"I've been imprisoned in this mirror fragment for a long time. Believe in the Beauty, and I will grant all your wishes," says the Mirror Holder in the mirror.
一盏烛火被点亮，司美之神隐约阔绰的面容在碎片中摇曳…你看得更清晰了，但此时，一位揽镜人的面容却突然从巨大碎片中出现！

As one of the candles is lit, a vague image of the God of Beauty's broad face flickered within the fragment... Just as the image gets clearer, the face of a Mirror Holder suddenly appears within the massive fragment!
「吾被囚禁在此片碎镜中已久。」镜中的揽镜人说，「信仰『纯美』…吾会回应你的祈愿。」
"I've been imprisoned in this mirror fragment for a long time. Believe in the Beauty, and I will grant all your wishes," says the Mirror Holder in the mirror.
烛火被你点亮，你期许着…
After lighting up a candle, you make a wish...
你路过一片布满巨型虫群的栖居地。一只巨型「永眠领主」正在腐殖化王座上沉睡。
You pass by a habitat filled by a massive Swarm. A giant Lord of Eternal Slumber is sleeping soundly on a putrefied throne.
这位「永眠领主」双眼紧闭，它看上去沉浸在自己的梦境中。
The Lord of Eternal Slumber has both its eyes closed. It seems to be lost in its dreams.
你看了看手中紧握的地图…你的行进方向被阻塞了！你正准备绕路离开，却发现它的身旁聚拢着一些刚诞育的*孢子*。一些充满勇气的想法从你的心中绽开……

You check the map in your hand... and find that your way ahead is blocked! As you are about to take a detour, you notice some newly born *spores* gathering around the Lord of Eternal Slumber. A daring idea blossoms in your mind...
你还是选择了绕路…你屏息静气，目光注视着前方道路——但你忽视了脚底…你不小心碰到一些碎石！
In the end, you still decide to take a detour... You steady your breath and fix your gaze on the path ahead. Yet, you overlook the ground and step on some gravel accidentally.
你紧张地回头看了眼它…它并没有被你惊醒。
Anxiously, you glance back at the Lord of Eternal Slumber... It remains asleep.
你将孢子全部收纳进你的无限背包中。这可是珍贵的研究样本…你庆幸着。
You put all the spores into your limitless backpack, feeling lucky to have stumbled upon the precious research samples.
突然！你同时感觉到无数隐秘的眼睛在黑暗中注视着你…你再次看向「永眠领主」，它正闭目沉睡。或许你刚刚的动静太大了？你对此感到一丝后怕……

Suddenly, you can sense countless hidden eyes staring at you from the darkness... When you look back at the Lord of Eternal Slumber again, it is still sleeping with its eyes closed. Maybe you made too much noise just now. You feel a hint of unease creeping in...
你似乎迷路了…你发觉这里的景色十分熟悉。你认出于腐殖化王座之上的「永眠领主」。
You seem to be lost... and you find the scenery around you familiar. You can recognize the Lord of Eternal Slumber on the putrefied throne.
但这次似乎有些不同。它的身边多了更多*孢夹*，在那些半透明的液囊中，你似乎认出了一些有机生命…他们的身上有着「开拓」的标志。

But something is different this time. There are more *Sporangium* around the Lord of Eternal Slumber. In the translucent sacs, there seem to be some organic lifeforms... The insignia of Trailblaze can be found on their bodies.
你正准备离开之时，一位被浸泡在液囊里的无名客发出了哀嚎！他似乎正提醒着你可帮助他们逃脱的解药名称…「代谢酶」……
When you are leaving, one of the sac-submerged Nameless lets out a wail! He seems to be hinting at the name of the antidote that can help them escape — Metabolase...
你靠近了那些孢夹。正当你想触碰之时，一位被浸泡在液囊里的无名客发出了哀嚎！他似乎示意你别碰！他断断续续地向你吐露可帮助他们逃脱的解药名称…「代谢酶」……

You approach the Sporangium. Just as you want to reach out for the sacs, one of the Nameless submerged in them lets out a wail to stop you from touching them! After much struggle, he utters the name of the antidote that can help them escape — Metabolase...
你靠近了那些孢夹——你触碰到了它！一些奇异的电流窜过你的脑海，你如同断电一般失足滑落。一些幼体虫群似乎被这声音惊扰，它们发出窸窸窣窣的声音！

You approach the Sporangium and touch them! A strange jolt of electricity shoots straight up to your head, causing you to lose your footing as if you were shocked. Startled by the noise, some Swarm larvae wriggle around, producing a rustling sound.
你回头看了眼仍在沉睡的领主…你不甘心地抓紧时间，赶在被虫群包围前离开了。
You glance back at the Lord of Eternal Slumber, still sleeping. Reluctantly, you hurry up and leave before the Swarm can surround you.
你手握代谢酶，缓步踏入腐殖化王座前…你十分紧张…你相信只需要一丁点剂量，只要沿着虫群的纤维……你扎了下去！

Holding a syringe containing Metabolase, you stride toward the putrefied throne slowly and nervously... All it takes is a tiny dose deliver into the Swarm's fibers and... You pierce it with the needle!
这一剂令「永眠领主」从永眠中醒来！它立刻睁大双眼，口水从齿间低落……
The dose wakes the Lord of Eternal Slumber up! It opens its eyes wide and starts drooling...
你知道*代谢*需要时间…你要等到见证代谢完成的那一刻！但此刻更多幼体虫群到来了！你需要从中迅速脱身…
You know metabolism takes time... and you want to witness its completion! However, more and more Swarm larvae are coming! You must escape from them quickly...
突然！你同时感觉到无数隐秘的眼睛在黑暗中注视着你…尖锐的附足沿着振动寻到你的方位，饥饿的幼体虫群将你团团包围。

Suddenly, you feel as though countless concealed eyes are gazing at you from the darkness! As numerous sharp appendages manage to locate you by following the vibrations, the hungry Swarm larvae surround you completely.
你路过一片布满巨型虫群的栖居地。一只巨型「永眠领主」正在腐殖化王座上沉睡。
You pass by a habitat filled by a massive Swarm. A giant Lord of Eternal Slumber is sleeping soundly on a putrefied throne.

You check the map in your hand... and find that your way ahead is blocked! As you are about to take a detour, you notice some newly born *spores* gathering around the Lord of Eternal Slumber. A daring idea blossoms in your mind...
你不慎一脚踏入高科技流线的悬空矩阵中——你相信这是斯诺星最*新式作风*的猎人才会使用的陷阱。
You accidentally step into a high-tech, streamlined suspended matrix — a trap you believe to be used only by the most cutting-edge hunter on the Planet Snowland.
你站起身，发现自己掉在一个巢穴入口前。你拨开这个巢穴的门帘，认出了这些「鏖兜虫」：它们作为地面作战单位，以牺牲飞行能力为代价，获得了沉重的身躯与刚硬的甲壳。

You get to your feet and find yourself landing before the entrance of a lair. You draw the curtain open and recognize the Combatobugs. As ground combat units, they traded their flying abilities in exchange for heavy and rigid exoskeletons.
这些「鏖兜虫」发出了吮吸的声音…你犹豫是否要进入猎杀它们，这或许会让你的身上沾上更多惹人注意的虫类气味……
These Combatobugs make a sucking sound... You hesitate to enter the lair and hunt for them, as you might find yourself coated in the insects' scent and incur more unwanted attention...
你悄悄离开了…你希望身上没有沾上「鏖兜虫」的味道。
You walk away quietly, hoping you remain untainted by the scent of the Combatobugs.

You flee in a hurry, hoping you didn't get the scent of Combatobug's on you.

These Combatobugs make a sucking sound... You hesitate to enter the lair and hunt for them, as you might find yourself coated in the insects' scent and incur more unwanted attention...
你熟练地戴上皮手套。作为一位「漫游徘徊者」，对于刺杀区域「脑体」这种活儿你已再熟练不过。
You slide your leather gloves on with practice. As a Roamer, you can assassinate *the brain* of a domain with your eyes closed.
是的…在这种遮天蔽日的虫潮之下，总有逆骨反道而行。虽然作为临时雇佣兵的你并不能得到多少报酬…但好歹你还拥有着自己的搭档「设备助理」。

Indeed... In these Swarm-swollen days, it's no surprise that there are rebels trying to go against the flow. Although you are not rewarded handsomely for your work as a temporary mercenary, you count yourself lucky that you still have your partner, the Device Assistant, by your side.
只是现在…有些麻烦。你正被一些「雕虫小技」包围着…你手里握着无线电，正犹豫是否要向搭档拨通电话。
But now... things are getting tricky. You find yourself surrounded by some "small fries"... Gripping your radio, you consider whether to contact your partner.
你的无线电接通成功了。
You get through to your partner using the radio.
你的电流似乎被一种不明精神体拦截…你不安地思考着是否该区域「脑体」的警戒值提高了。
Your electrical currents seem to be intercepted by an unknown spiritual entity... Feeling on edge, you wonder whether it is because the alert level of *the brain* of the domain has been raised.
你准备继续向前…你应当十分谨慎、小心。
You are ready to move on... You should be acting very cautiously.
你正在前去刺杀区域「脑体」的路上。
You are on your way to eliminating the *the brain* of the domain.
事实上，你刚告别一位混沌医师。他的话令你有所深思：「繁育」的虫群只是一群除繁育本能外毫无智能的虫子，究竟是什么人将其改造为这种「神经网络兵器」？

In fact, you have just parted ways with a Doctor of Chaos, the words of whom are thought-provoking: The Swarm of Propagation is just a bunch of bugs bereft any true intellect beyond their breeding instincts. Who, then, transformed them into this manner of weaponized neural network?
你定睛一看——面前已有一群漫天虫潮作战部队。
You look closer and notice there is an army of insects in front of you.
你感到神清气爽，如同清凉药剂抹在天灵盖上！但你接着开始看到第IX机关在天上乱跑的景象，你感到自己有些不太对劲了…可恶的混沌医师！你决定立刻绕路离开。

You feel so rejuvenated as though you have just slathered some cooling ointment on your forehead! But then you star seeing Device IX shifting across the sky, and start to feel unwell... It must be the fault of that Doctor of Chaos! You decide to take a detour and leave immediately.
你感到自己变得虚弱了…你的肠胃有些不适！可恶的混沌医师！你决定立刻绕路逃跑。
You can feel yourself getting weak... your stomach twisting and churning! It must be the fault of that Doctor of Chaos! You decide to take a detour and leave immediately.
你准备继续向前…你应当十分谨慎、小心。
You are ready to move on... You should be acting very cautiously.
终于到了这一刻——你来到这里，黄沙吹起你的披风，你将直面刺杀「古脑体」。
Finally, the moment has come. Your cloak flaps in the sandy wind, and you will soon be facing the *ancient brain*.
你需要带着你的「设备助理」来时刻确认自己的状态。是的…「古脑体」将会影响你的精神。
You need to carry your Device Assistant with you to ensure you maintain a normal mental state. Yes... the *ancient brain* will affect your consciousness.
你将莫洛托斯鸡尾酒制成的燃烧瓶向其投掷…你成功了！「古脑体」看上去很爱吃这种*热锅*佳肴。
You throw a Molotov cocktail at it... and succeed! It seems like the *ancient brain* loves piping hot delicacies.
你看着它消融的身体，打趣地想着：下次该为它们准备些*下酒佐餐*…
Watching its body melt, a fun idea pops up in your head: You should prepare some "appetizers" to go with the course you just fed it next time...
你失败了！你一脚滑到了「古脑体」面前！
You've failed! You slip and fall right in front of the *ancient brain*!
你只好用莫洛托斯鸡尾酒制成的燃烧瓶作掩护撤退…前功尽弃了！一边撤退一边想，接下来又得从头再来…可恶！

You have no choice but to cover your retreat with a Molotov cocktail... All your previous effort has gone down the drain! While retreating, the thought of having to start everything over leaves you frustrated!
一位狐人舞者来到你面前。她狡黠地对你使了一个嘘的手势，接着为你掀开「会堂」的门帘。
A foxian dancer approaches you. She makes a mischievous shushing gesture at you before lifting the curtain to the hall for you.
「这七盏塘香前，跪拜着寰宇无数日笃癫狂的舞者。他们在会堂前叩首，对那已是第十三位自缢者进行唱谣祷告。舞者团匍匐于神前…恳求得知自己在宇宙之舞结束后的结局。」

"Before these seven pots of incense kneel countless dancers from all over the stars, who are getting madder by the day. They prostrate themselves before the meeting hall, and sing and pray to the <unbreak>13</unbreak>th self-strangler - there are already <unbreak>13</unbreak> of them. The dancers will lie prone before God, pleading to know their end after the cosmic dance ends."
「一张命运符纸，若不信就是个银河瞩目的谣言。」
"Here's a talisman about your fate. If you don't believe this type of thing, just treat it as a famous rumor of the cosmos."
沾满不明血液的符纸摆在你的面前…你对此十分不屑，完全不为所动。你压根不信命……
A talisman stained with blood from an unknown source is placed before you... You regard it contemptuously and remain completely unimpressed. In your opinion, there is no such thing as fate...
你的内心开始蠢蠢欲动……
Deep down inside, you are tempted...
你抹去了符纸上的血液，上面写着：安慰。你十分失望……
You wipe the blood off the talisman on which it reads: "Consolation." You are very disappointed...
你抹去了符纸上的血液，上面写着：安慰。你开始怀疑这是否是场骗局……
You wipe the blood off the talisman on which it reads: "Consolation." You begin to wonder whether this is a scam...
难以置信——你的双手颤抖着，你的热泪从眼眶溢出。一生作为「数据分母」的你从未想过，你会得到如此*曼妙*的体验，你甚至怀疑这一切都是模拟的——

This is unbelievable... Your hands are trembling, and tears are streaming down your face. Being an unlucky dog all your life, you never expected to experience something as *wonderful* as this. You even wonder if everything is still just a simulation...
你居然真的得到了命运的启发。上面写着：「终末」的揭晓…
Surprisingly, you have received a genuine revelation from fate. The talisman reads: "The Revelation of Finality..."
你还未读完，便因激动昏了过去。
You pass out from excitement before you can finish reading it.
吉巴欧萝卜先生！又是你。恭喜你，你发现了像素世界的隐藏关卡！
Mr. Jibaou the radish! Glad to see you again. Congratulations on discovering the hidden stage of the Pixel World!
这个隐藏关卡将使你怀疑人生！
This hidden stage will make you question your life choices!
现在你已没有任何别的办法渡过面前的湍急流水。你的面前有三朵巨大的*食人鱼*！你只能赌一只其中看上去最*友善*的食人鱼跳进它的胃里，来助你渡过这片河…当然，如果你选错，也很可能葬身鱼腹。

Now, you have no other means to cross the rapid stream, and there are three massive piranhas before you! You can only bet your life on a piranha that appears the friendliest and jump into its stomach to let it carry you across the river... Of course, you might perish in its belly if you make the wrong choice.
你呆在食人鱼的胃里等待着漂流过海…你暗自想着：它不爱吃萝卜，对此你很庆幸。等抵达岸上，就即刻储存进度吧！
You stay in the piranha's stomach, waiting to cross the sea... You think to yourself, "Luckily, it doesn't eat carrots." Save your progress immediately when you reach the other side!
「你来了——欢迎来到『机械城』的 『认知理发馆』。」咔戎把头发简单地束起，指节轻敲了酒吧桌面两下，「在这里我们可以调整『自我认知』。你可以成为你想成为的任何东西，对吗？哦，看看你身边那位博士。」

"Welcome to the Cogito Hair Salon of the Mechanical City!" Charon ties up their hair and taps twice on the bar table with their knuckles. "We can adjust 'Intra-Cognition' here. You can become whatever you want to be, no? Oh, just look at that doctor next to you."
你打量着身边这位新的*访客*。
You size up the new *guest* beside you.
No.5博士正被咔戎剪着头发，他沉浸其中，完全没注意到咔戎在剪的是他的胡须。他开始侃侃而谈，「你知道如何提升自己的『知识』吗？」
Dr. No.5 is enjoying Charon's hair-cutting service so much that he does not even realize Charon is cutting his beard. He speaks confidently, "Do you know how to improve the extent of your knowledge?"
「博识学会时常会开展有关『天才俱乐部』的议论与探讨，我也常在集会中论证自己是『天才』。我通过实验，将善与恶融为一体——我如此『善恶兼容』。」博士说，「更厉害的是，我尝试用药液分离两者！如果是你，你会选择哪一种？」

"The Intelligentsia Guild engages in discussions regarding the Genius Society from time to time, during which I often present arguments to prove myself to be a genius. Through experiments, I've blended good and evil into one to show that I'm compatible with both." Says the doctor. "Even better, I've also tried separating them using a potion! Which of the two would you choose?"
「没错。实验成功后，善的我占据了身体的主导权。」他大笑着，「通过这样『癫狂』的求知，可以打开通往更自由、更高阶意识的状态！」

"That's right. After the experiment succeeded, my good self took over my body." He guffaws, "Through such a deranged pursuit of knowledge, we can reach a more liberated and higher-dimensional consciousness!"
「嗯，无所谓。实验成功后，恶的我占据了身体的主导权。」他大笑着，「通过这样『癫狂』的求知，可以打开通往更自由、更高阶意识的状态！」

"Well, it doesn't matter. After the experiment succeeded, my evil self took over my body." He guffaws, "Through such a deranged pursuit of knowledge, we can reach a more liberated and higher-dimensional consciousness!"
「总有一天，『博识尊』会看到我！」他继续说着，似乎已经陷入癫狂，「但『真理医生』却认为我是个白痴——他看谁都这样！如果有天你遇到他，记得做出你的选择。不不不——你现在就得做出选择！」

"One day, Nous will notice me!" He continues as if hysterical, "But Dr. Ratio thinks I'm an idiot — he sees everybody that way! If you ever meet him, remember to make your choice. No, no, no... You'd better make the choice right now!"
你看着博士在两种形态间不断转化，最后在绝望与苦恼下自尽，他在两面性的旋转中变成一枚*机械陀螺*，最终在永恒的旋转中终结了自己矛盾的一生。

You watch the doctor constantly shift between two states and ultimately kill himself in despair and frustration. He has transformed into a *mechanical spinning top* in the spiral between polar opposites, and his conflicted life ends in an eternal spin between his two facets.
「记得，如果有天遇到真理医生——」他留下遗言，「先告诉他谁才是*白痴*！」
"Remember, if you ever meet Dr. Ratio... you must first tell him who is the true *idiot*!" He speaks his last word.
「好，都来齐啰。」黑塔清了清嗓子，「我们终于相聚在机械城的 『认知理发馆』了！虽然是模拟的。现在来理发吧。噢，抱歉，在理发过程中，我们总得聊点什么。」

"Alright, everyone is here." Herta clears her throat and says, "We've finally gathered at the Cogito Hair Salon in the Mechanical City, though it's just a simulation! Now, let's get a haircut. Oops, sorry, we've got to talk about something while getting our hair done."
「逻辑：模拟宇宙的旅程需要时刻确认自我认知。」螺丝咕姆说，「{NICKNAME}，我们好奇你的自我认知在这场奇妙旅途中是否有所改变。如果测试使你的自我认知发生动摇，你将相信自己是一台『机器』，这是我们所不愿看到的。」

"Affirmation: We need to constantly reaffirm our Intra-Cognition during our journey in the Simulated Universe," says Screwllum. "{NICKNAME}, we wonder whether your Intra-Cognition has changed during this wonderful trip. If your Intra-Cognition is swayed by the test, you'll see yourself as a machine, and that's not what we hope to see."
「结论：一些回忆浮现。」螺丝咕姆微笑道，陷入沉思，「时间回到很早之前，有机和无机还未对立，只是，他们有时会陷入『不分你我』的状态。」他从口袋中掏出几枚元件，「这是枚情感『元件』——一些机械生灵友人，它们都住在元件里。挑一个作为纪念品吧。」

"Conclusion: Some memories have resurfaced." Screwllum smiles and sinks deep in thought. "Once upon a time, when the organic and inorganic lives were not at odds, they would sometimes find themselves hardly distinguishable." He fishes out several components from his pocket. "These are emotional components, and some of my machine friends reside within them. You can pick one as your souvenir."
「你来了——欢迎来到『机械城』的 『认知理发馆』。」服务员咔戎把头发简单地束起，指节轻敲了桌面两下，「在这里我们可以调整『自我认知』。你可以成为你想成为的任何东西，对吗？」

"Welcome to the Cogito Hair Salon of the Mechanical City!" Charon ties up their hair and taps twice on the bar table with their knuckles. "We can adjust 'Intra-Cognition' here. You can become whatever you want to be, no?"
「哦，看看你身边那位机械女士。它可以教你提升自己的『魅力』，或是『智力』。一切看你的选择。」
"Oh, look at that mechanical lady next to you. They can teach you how to improve up your charisma or intelligence. It's all up to your choices."
「好啊，我来为你传授。实际上，『智力』不过是从绝对的*经验*中总结出逻辑。我想现在的大家都太过高估理性，当你掌握绝对的*经验*，就可以超越自我的限制。」

"Let me teach you a thing or two. In actuality, intelligence is nothing but logic derived from absolute *experience*. I think people nowadays overestimate reason. When you have absolute *experience*, you'll be able to go beyond the limits of the self."
「我已经遗忘*自我*了。很快，我就要扬升登神！」机械咕母一边理着头发，一边骄傲地说，星球碎片变成她耳上的碎钻闪闪发光，它准备好*一飞冲天*。

"I've already forgotten my *self*. Soon, I'll ascend to become a god!" Screwllita declares proudly as they fix their hair, as fragments of planets turn into glittering diamonds on their ears. They are ready to soar into the sky.
「好啊，让我为你传授。我想『魅力』就是简化事物。越简单纯粹，按照自我想法行事，魅力就将越璀璨夺目。当你掌握绝对的*置若罔闻*，就可以超越自我的限制。」

"Let me teach you a thing or two. I think charisma is all about making things simple. The simpler you are and the more you do things your way, the more charismatic you'll be. When you exhibit absolute *indifference*, you'll be able to do beyond the limits of the self."
「我已经遗忘*自我*了。很快，我就要扬升登神！」机械咕母一边理着头发，一边骄傲地说，星球碎片变成它耳上的碎钻闪闪发光，它准备好*一飞冲天*。

"I've already forgotten my *self*. Soon, I'll ascend to become a god!" Screwllita declares proudly as they fix their hair, as fragments of planets turn into glittering diamonds on their ears. They are ready to soar into the sky.
说着说着…这位顾客的头发理好，它便在你眼前飞走了。
Soon, their hair is done. They then fly away before your eyes.
「一只陷入*自我*主义中的机械昆虫。」咔戎收起剪刀，悲哀地说，「快把它忘了罢。倒是有些它收集的宝石会遗留下来，赠予理发馆，挑一个纪念品带走吧。」

"It's a mechanical bug trapped in *egoism*." Charon puts away their scissors and says despondently. "You should forget about them. Some of the gems they collected were left behind and gifted to the Hair Salon. You can pick one as a keepsake."
一位「骇客」突然闯进了你全神投入的游戏屏幕——它由数据汇成的模样逐渐成型，这是一只蓝色头发的生命。它摇摆着自己蓝色的头发，对你笑了笑。

A "hacker" suddenly invades the screen as you are engrossed in the video game you are playing. The congregating data form it takes gradually solidifies — it appears to be a blue-haired being. It sways its blue hair and flashes you a smile.
「我尝试复制黑塔女士的奇物。」它说，「别问我是谁，这只是我的虚拟形象。给你些宝贝…不过和普通的奇物不太一样。你得先付出代价，才能有收获。」

"I'm trying to replicate Madam Herta's Curios. Don't ask me who I am. This is just my virtual avatar. I'll offer you something nice... but they're different to how normal Curios work. You have to pay the price first before you get the rewards," it says.
Do you want to take the deal?
你看着眼前的图景：黑森林在下雨，每片叶子上都挂着露水。这雨令你感到哀伤。
You look at the scene before you: It is raining in the Black Forest, and there are dew drops on every leaf. The rain saddens you.
你在黑森林淋着小雨，一路兜兜转转，走到路边的铁匠铺旁。一台制造机正痴迷于制作火漆，它专心于敲着手中的小锤子——直到你的到来打断了它。

You wander around in the Black Forest amid the drizzle and arrive at a blacksmith's store by the roadside. A machine is immersed in churning out sealing wax and hammering away in full concentration until your presence interrupts its work.
「你想问我火漆的事吗？」它目光如炬。
"Do you want to ask me about the sealing wax?" It has a penetrating gaze.
「再过百年，我依然在这里生产火漆。」制造机说道，接着继续埋头锤它的小锤子。
"I'll still be making sealing wax here for another <unbreak>100</unbreak> years," the manufacturing machine says, and then gets back to its hammer.
「我是个商业贩子，这是一个神秘的盒子。」星际和平投资机器满不在乎地说，「我的肚子是一个机械口袋，里面有很多数据模拟的『宇宙碎片』。」
"I'm a peddler, and this is a mysterious box." The Interastral Peace Investment Device explains nonchalantly. "My belly is a mechanical pocket that stores a lot of data-simulated Cosmic Fragments."
「我们以*信任*为资源进行投资。」星际和平投资机器打开它的肚子，里面放着一些模拟合成的『宇宙碎片』，「我保证，越多的*信任*，将获得越多的回报。」

"*Trust* is the resource we use to invest." The Interastral Peace Investment Device opens its belly and shows the simulated and synthesized Cosmic Fragments inside. "I promise you'll get higher returns the more *trust* you have."
你还要继续相信星际和平投资机吗？
Will you continue to trust the Interastral Peace Investment Device?
你等待着星际和平投资机器打开它的*肚子*…但它纹丝未动。
You wait for the Interastral Peace Investment Device to open its *belly*... but it stays motionless.
你意识到自己这次上当了！你一无所获。
You realize you have been duped! You gain nothing.
星际和平投资机器打开它的*肚子*…你成功了！
The Interastral Peace Investment Device opens its *belly*... You have succeeded!
你获得了丰厚的*投资*回报！
You get a great return on your *investment*!
星际和平投资机器打开它的*肚子*…你成功了！
The Interastral Peace Investment Device opens its *belly*... You have succeeded!
你获得了丰厚的*投资*回报！
You get a great return on your *investment*!
你等待着星际和平投资机器打开它的*肚子*…但它纹丝未动。
You wait for the Interastral Peace Investment Device to open its *belly*... but it stays motionless.
你意识到自己这次上当了！你肝肠寸断。
You realize you have been duped! You are inconsolable.
你来到了夫莱昂机械联盟的停泊港湾。这里有一个大埠口，遍布各类机械招待员。
You arrive at the docking bay of the Freon Mechanical Alliance. It is a vast harbor with mechanical attendants everywhere.
一位机械招待员带你走上台阶…你发现这台阶是由一条条机械手臂托举而成的。你一直向前，直到离开港湾，看见「星际和平机械分部商城」的招牌。

A mechanical attendant leads you up a staircase, which you notice is formed by numerous mechanical arms. You keep going until you leave the harbor and see the sign of "Interastral Peace Mechanical Branch Shopping Mall."
这里的装修风格十分有公司派头…你来到了柜台前。
The place is renovated in a style very much iconic to the IPC... You walk up to the counter.
「我们卖东西，在埠口价格会实惠些。就这样。」机械职员懒得说太多，示意你自己选。
"We sell our stuff cheaper at the port. That's it." The mechanical staff doesn't bother to explain too much — a signal for you to make your own choice.
你又一次来到了夫莱昂机械联盟的停泊港湾，一位机械招待员带你走上台阶…你发现这台阶是由一条条机械手臂托举而成的，你在上面走得摇摇晃晃。你一直向前，直到看见「星际和平机械分部商城」的招牌。

Once again, you arrive at the docking bay of the Freon Mechanical Alliance. A mechanical attendant leads you up a staircase, which you notice is formed by numerous mechanical arms. You wobble as you walk on it. You keep going until you see the sign of "Interastral Peace Mechanical Branch Shopping Mall."
你对这景象很熟悉…你来到了柜台前。
The scene is familiar to you... You walk up to the counter.
「机械城分部，如果手里有好东西，就拿来升级吧。」机械职员懒得说太多，示意你自己选。
"This is the Mechanical Branch. You can bring your good stuff here and upgrade them." The mechanical staff doesn't bother to explain too much — a signal for you to make your own choice.
你很想对它的脑袋来上狠狠一拳…但你忍住了这种欲望。
You feel like punching its head... but you manage to hold the urge back.
「欢迎来到圣多明戈城！我们倒卖作弊代码。」这位机械招待满不在乎地说，「你小时候一定热衷的那种。但我们这儿的不一样，这里是圣多明戈之城版本。」

"Welcome to the city of St. Domingo! We sell cheat codes here." The mechanical attendant explains without a care in the world. "The kind you were definitely crazy about when you were little. What we have is slightly different, as they are the St. Domingo version."
「随便你怎么用，只要不被机械警察抓到。」它咯咯地笑了。
"Use it any way you want. Just make sure you don't get caught by the mechacops," it giggles.
你进行了一场豪赌！谁知道以后会发生什么呢？
You make a bold gamble! Who knows what will happen next?
你漫步在圣多明戈城…这里的灯光璀璨夺目。正当你沉浸其中时，你的右肩被拍了一下——你诧异地回头，接着左臂就立刻被擒住。

You are taking a stroll in the city of St. Domingo... Dazzling lights are everywhere. As you are mesmerized by the brilliance, someone taps on your right shoulder. You turn around in surprise, and your left arm is clasped the next second.
「你好。」一位圣多明戈机械警察向你鞠了个躬，「走一趟吧。证据：您之前的『作弊代码』已被记录在案。」
"Hello." A St. Domingo mechacop bows to you and says, "Please come with me. Evidence: Your previous usage of cheat codes have been documented."
你找到一只落单的虫群幼崽。它蜷缩在阿纳洛星球的丛林深处，三双复眼可怜巴巴地望着你，牙齿叩击出清脆的啼哭，四散的孢子更叫人心跳加速。

You find a lone swarm juvenile. It is huddling in the jungle depths of planet Anaru, looking up at you with pity in its three pairs of compound eyes as its teeth clack out a crisp cry. Its scattered spores cause your heart to start racing.
瞧瞧它稚嫩的口器，从诞生的那天开始就没进食过一点东西。这么天真可爱的小家伙，谁能忍心看它活活地受冻挨饿？
You look at its tender mouthparts. It has never had anything to eat since the day it was born. Who could bear to see such a cute and innocent little guy suffer from the cold and hunger?
虽然投喂野生动物有违自然规律，但反正也没人看见…要不，悄悄喂它点垃圾？
Despite the feeding of wild animals being illegal, nobody is going to see anything, right? So how about secretly feeding it some trash?
幼虫在奇物的影响下骤然变异，巨大的怪物发出威吓，张牙舞爪地扑向你。
The larva suddenly mutates under the influence of the Curio, and a huge monster lets out a threatening roar before baring tooth and claw to pounce on you.
幼虫在奇物的影响下不断地膨胀、变异，蜕去的外壳一次次地炸开，直到整片丛林的天空都被它遮蔽。
The larva continues to swell and mutate under the influence of the Curio, its molted shell exploding again and again until the entire jungle sky is covered up by it.
幼虫在奇物的影响下迅速成长，鞘翅破开乳白的外皮，分裂成复数的个体向你袭来。
The larva rapidly grows under the influence of the Curio. Its wings break through the milky-white skin and split into several independent units which begin attacking you.
青幽色的火焰将无名客的列车吞没，车厢里传来一阵无比熟悉的奸笑，徘徊的阴冷气息让你不由得后背发寒。
Dark-green flames engulf the Express. An extremely familiar, evil sneer booms out from the carriage, and the shimmering cold air makes the hairs stick up on the back of your neck.
「好久不见，小虫子，没想到吧，我成功逃出来了。」抬头望去，浮烟的大眼睛正死死地瞪着你，愤怒和傲慢以两种焰色在其中猛烈地燃烧。
"Long time no see, little bug. Didn't think I'd actually escape, did you?" You look up to see Cirrus staring at you wide-eyed, angry and arrogant flames burning violently in those eyes.
也不知道这段数据是上哪儿找来的，你总感觉模拟出来的版本比本体还要欠揍。
Who knows where this data came from. You always feel as though the simulated version is worse than the original.
「还记得我说过的吗？无名客和仙舟对我的侮辱，今天就要你们加倍偿还！」大岁阳狂妄地叫嚣道。
"Remember what I said? Today, you will pay double for the insults imparted on me by the Nameless and the Xianzhou!" shrieked the great heliobus hysterically.
你走进冉比希星的废品回收站，成千上万的垃圾桶在垃圾堆里喝彩欢呼。
Walking into the recycling station on the Rumbas system, you hear thousands upon thousands of trash dumps cheering from inside the garbage pile.
作为第二十一届垃圾厨王争霸赛的擂主，反观测护罩、吃剩一半的天环翅堡、未知星球的硬币，观众扔下垃圾来代替花束，表达对你的期待。

As ring master of the <unbreak>21</unbreak>st Garbage Chef Championship, you view the observation shield, half-eaten Halovian Winged Burgers, currency from an unknown system, as well as the garbage thrown from the audience instead of flowers, as an expression of their hopes for you.
你淡然地瞥向身边的挑战者，塔塔洛夫的宫廷大厨埃罗琳，尝遍一千种垃圾的分子食客瑞赛可，还有举世闻名的垃圾美食家贾克佛，全都是些难缠的家伙。

You casually glance around at the challengers: Tatalov's palace chef, Erolyn, the molecular eater Risaac, who's tasted a thousand kinds of garbage, and the world-famous garbage gourmand Jacques Feaux. Every one of them is a demanding prospect.
然而，在你的脑海内，胜利的菜单已然敲定。
And yet, in your mind, the menu for victory has already been decided.
「嚯，好狂妄的后生。」几位评委一跃而上，观众们擦干净盖子，准备见证垃圾厨艺界这史诗级的对决。
"Wow, what an arrogant youngster." Several referees jump forth, and the audience wipe their lids clean — preparing to witness an epic showdown in the world of garbage cuisine.
「吁——吁！」观众纷纷喝出倒彩，挑战者们更是怒不可遏，准备给你点颜色瞧瞧。
"Whoa... boo!" jeer the audience as the challengers grow furious, preparing to teach you a lesson.
有骨气！听了你的话，三位对手纷纷严阵以待，决定以自己最高的水准来表达对你的尊重。
You've got guts! After hearing what you have to say, three fighters get ready to fight and decide to express their respect for you at the highest level.
你坐在满是油污的蒸汽甲板上，眼前宛如图层错乱的桅杆让你一时有些眩晕，瑞勒号的船长站在你的身边，声音是这块乱码唯一接近人类的地方。

You are sitting on the oil-stained steam deck, and the deranged layers of all the masts stacked before you leave you feeling slightly dizzy. The captain of the Riviera is standing beside you, and his voice is the only thing approximating something human out of all this hot mess.
对图珀王国的征讨即将开始，溅起的海浪在顷刻间变得光怪陆离。二进制海洋的干涉让瑞勒号颠簸不断，但仍无法阻止伟大的三进制军团对它发起同化。

Conquest of the Tupah Kingdom is about to commence, and the spattering waves grow bizarre within seconds. The binary ocean's interference makes the Riviera somewhat bumpy, but cannot stop the great Trinary Legion from assimilating it.
「新来的机修工，控制室好像出了点问题，赶紧去处理处理。」你左顾右盼，确认他嘴里的「机修工」指的是你。
"Hey, new mechanic — something's broken in the control room. Go fix it, fast!" You look around, just to be sure that this "mechanic" he's talking about is in fact you.
走到控制室的尽头，三台故障严重的同化单元瘫倒在一起，你将大脑连接进另一个位面，以完成复杂的三进制演算。
Walking to the end of the control room, you find three severely broken assimilation units all bricked together. You hook up your brain to another plane and complete complex trinary extrapolations.
霓虹辉映的地下斗兽场里，封闭的高墙逐渐升起，来自银河各地的两百支达达球队抛接着手里的粉色小球，跃跃欲试。

Beneath the neon lights of the underground boxing arena, high walls gradually rise up out of the enclosure as some two hundred Dahdah teams from all over the cosmos toss a pink ball in their hands, eager to give things a whirl.
在烛墨学派的记录中，这种运动的危险程度仅次于伊斯特邦联的好孩子愤怒板球。
Among the Candelagraphos' records, this sport remains second only to the Isthmian Confederation's angry cricket matches in terms of danger.
「秉承以和为贵的精神，伟大的乐子神创造了达达球。」喇叭里的人捏着鼻子说道，「它用球类撞击替代了肢体冲突，每位选手都能享受比赛的乐趣。」

"Abiding by the spirit of valuing peace, the almighty Laughter created Dahdah ball." Pinching her nose, the person on the loudspeaker says, "It uses ball collisions in lieu of physical clashes. Every player gets to have fun."
「规则只有一个，用球砸晕在场的所有人就算胜利！」伴随着一声哨响，数颗粉色的达达球火速向着你的面门袭来。
"There's only one rule: Knock out all competitors on the field with the ball to win!" With a whistle, several pink dahdah balls fly straight towards your face.
你身处一颗金属林立的无名行星，残阳笼罩的废墟里，一台精密的机械巨构正在缓慢地向你走来。它拾起地面散落的零件，有条不紊地安装到堡垒般的身躯上。

You find yourself on a nameless planet full of towering metallic structures. Among the ruins basked in faint sunlight, a massive, sophisticated machine slowly makes its way toward you. It picks up the parts scattered all over the ground and fixes them onto its fortress-like body in an orderly manner.
活塞往复抬升，密集的杠杆牵引齿轮转动，发出沉闷的咆哮，遥遥无期地修复着破损的躯体。

The piston rises and falls, resulting in a vigorous lever effect that brings about the turning of the gears. The machine emits a deep growl as it mends its damaged body with little hope of completion.
一位耷拉着半截手臂的老翁来到你的面前，对于眼前诡谲的场景，古老的智械早已司空见惯。他用仅剩的一块视觉晶体盯着你这不速之客，很是满意地点了点头。

An old man approaches you with one-half of his arm drooping. The ancient Intellitron is unfazed by the peculiar scene before him. Using his last piece of visual crystal he has, he fixates his gaze upon you, an unexpected visitor, and nods approvingly.
「真是怀念，曾经，也有个像你一样的有机体站在这里，被帝皇亲手创造的生命所震撼。」
"How nostalgic. Once, there was also an organic creature like you standing here, marveling at the lives created by the emperor."
「我哪儿还记得？」老智械晃了晃自己的脑袋，一串被咬断的缆线从里面掉出来，还连带着几块刻有鲁珀特帝国徽记的氧化芯片，「他们都说我坏掉了，和这孩子一样。」

"How could I possibly remember?" The ancient Intellitron shakes his head, and a string of chewed cables falls out along with several oxidized chips engraved with the crest of the Rubert Empire. "They say I'm broken, just like this kid here."
骇人的钢铁堡垒在老翁的身后止住脚步，齿轮不断地咬合，发出奇异的声响，似乎在响应老翁的指令。
The dreadful steel fortress comes to a halt behind the old man. Its gears grind against each other non-stop, producing an odd noise. It seems to be responding to the old man's commands.
「帝皇的遗产并非只向无机体敞开，若你能够舍弃现有的桎梏…它将为你指引正确的方向。」智械的眼中闪烁起猩红的微光，他的话语如同一道魔咒，在你的意识里激起层层共鸣。

"The emperor's legacy isn't only available for inorganic creatures. If you can free yourself from your current shackles... it will guide you in the right direction." A faint crimson light flashes in the Intellitron's eyes. His words send ripples of resonance in your consciousness like a spell.
伟大的方程式在脑海中展开，冰凉的数据浸润在你的认知当中，等待在未来潜移默化的改变。
A grand formula unfolds in your mind. Cold data permeates your perception, waiting for subtle changes to take place in the future.
老翁呆滞地望着你，老旧的逻辑芯片无法理解你的行为，他颤抖着接过你手中的差分机，就像一个普通的、落寞的故国遗民。

The old man stares at you blankly, his obsolete logic chip unable to comprehend your actions. With his hands trembling, he takes the difference machine from you, looking just like an ordinary, despondent citizen of a fallen kingdom.
老翁从金属巨构上取下两块零件，郑重地交到你的手里，密集的方程式将你的认知篡改，强烈的回响令你头痛欲裂
The old man takes two parts from the metal behemoth and hands them over to you solemnly. A plethora of equations alters your cognition, their intense reverberations causing your head to split.
老翁从金属巨构上取下一块零件，它几乎是迫切地向你身边的其它零件靠拢，在它们的共鸣里，你仿佛听见了鲁珀特帝皇的余音。

The old man takes a part from the metal behemoth. The part moves closer to the rest of the parts surrounding you in apparent eagerness. Amid their resonance, you seem to discern the lingering voice of the Emperor Rubert.
残破的移动堡垒从你的头顶掠过，巨大的轰鸣让你的心脏都近乎停滞。
The battered moving fortress glides past the top of your head. Your heart almost stops beating because of the enormous roar.
当你回过神来，智械老人已经带着它走远了，身前只留下满地的辙印。
By the time you snap out of your trance, the ancient Intellitron has gone far with the machine, leaving behind tire tracks on the ground.
金属巨构并未回应你的期待，但它并不焦急，总有一天，帝国的后继者会抵达它的面前。
The colossal metal behemoth has not responded to your expectations. However, there is no need to rush because one day, the successor to the Empire will come here.
你坐在阴暗的帐篷里，耳畔是迪斯普夜市的刺耳喧嚣，催人入睡的香薰，过低的星球重力，都让你不由地感到头重脚轻。
You are sitting in a dim tent. The ear-piercing noise from the Dispo Night Market, the lulling scent of the incense, and the exceedingly low gravity of the planet leave you feeling lightheaded.
占卜师的面纱遮住了表情，唯有迷离的双眼浅浅地望向你，她从星空般深邃的长袖中抽出一副塔奥牌，熟稔地将它们分成几叠，陈列在你的面前。

A veil covers the soothsayer's expression, leaving only her vacant gaze glancing in your direction. She fishes out a pack of Tawot Cards from her sleeves that look as profound as the starlit heavens and deftly arranges them into several stacks before you.
「窥视命运，就像从积木底部抽走部件，倘若过于贪婪，预示便会轰然倒塌，」占卜师将手放在牌堆上，「而你，又希望从中看到什么？」

"Glimpsing into your destiny is akin to pulling blocks from the bottom of a tower. If one is too greedy, the entire prophecy will tumble." The soothsayer places her hands on the card stacks. "So, what do you wish to see?"
你曾经历过一些难以忘怀的事情，它们深刻地改变了你的生命轨迹，当你正视它们，未来也会随着改变。
You have some unforgettable experiences that have drastically altered the trajectory of your life. When you face them directly, your future will change accordingly.
疲惫的现状并非你期望的样貌。考虑的太多，却使你常常错过眼前的机遇，并为此陷入悔恨之中。
The weary state you find yourself in isn't what you hoped for. Overthinking has cost you a lot of opportunities, leaving you wallowing in regret.
你尝试追求日常的一种平衡，即使这意味着需要做出种种选择，你仍向往着理想中的自由生活。
You try to strike a balance in your daily life. Even though you need to make lots of choices along the way, you still long for the ideal life of freedom.
「看来你的运势并不好，收下这个护身符吧，它会保护你。」占卜师长叹了口气，把带着暖意的护符放到你的手心。
"Seems like the odds aren't in your favor. Take this lucky charm. It will protect you." The soothsayer lets out a long sigh and puts a warm lucky charm on your palm.
积极的态度终会得到积极的结果，经过了诸多的努力，你的生活很快就会迎来一次令人振奋的转折。
Life will eventually reward you if you maintain a positive attitude. After a painstaking effort, your life will soon welcome an exciting turning point.
你听到一阵咕噜噜的闷响，有什么在水里游弋。你缓缓转身，熟悉的面孔正伏在实验台前，她往培养仓中注入些许养料，诡丽的生灵在营养液里打了个转，似是在表达喜悦。

You hear a muffled gurgling sound which seems to come from something swimming in the water. Slowly, you turn around and see a familiar face leaning over an experiment bench, adding some nutrients into an incubator. The bizarre but beautiful creature inside makes a spin in the nutrient solution, as if expressing delight.
「时候选得不错。」阮•梅停下手头的工作，饶有趣味地看着你，「这批作品很快就能完成，只可惜，你应该没法在切片里停留太长的时间。」
"You came at a good time." Ruan Mei pauses her work and regards you with amusement. "This batch will soon be completed. It's a shame that you probably can't stay in the world slice for too long."
模仿着她的动作，培养仓里的小家伙也把身子探出水面，试图聆听你们的声音。
The little guy in the incubator imitates Ruan Mei's moves and pokes its body out of the water, trying to listen to your voices.
「或许…它们会给这个模拟宇宙带来一点小小的惊喜。」她的视线垂下，指尖挑逗着水中懵懂的造物。
"Maybe... they'll bring a small surprise for this Simulated Universe." With her eyes downcast, Ruan Mei playfully interacts with the innocent creation in the water using her fingertips.
It'd better not be an unpleasant one.
I hope Herta won't be angry.
Meeting you is also a surprise in itself.
「我会让它的形式变得稍微…温和一些。」她绕过实验台，脚步宛如点水的蜻蜓。
"I'll make it take a slightly... milder form." She rounds the experiment bench in light footsteps.
「是因为奖励吧？」她莞尔一笑，缓步走到你的跟前。
"Are you here for the rewards?" Smiling gently, she approaches you slowly.
「我尽量。」她轻柔地抬起右手，掩住嘴角的笑意。
"I'll try my best." She lifts her right arm gracefully to cover her grin.
「变化是宇宙的常态，没有哪位学者期待一成不变的数据。基因深处的遗传变异，对撞实验的误差数据…」阮•梅悠然的看向实验室里的作品们，表情似笑非笑，「科学并不排斥这样的惊喜，它们往往意味着突破。」

"Change is a norm in the universe. No scholar would expect data to stay static. The mutations in the depth of genes and the anomalies in collision experiments..." Ruan Mei casts a relaxed glance at her creations in the lab with a faint and amused smile. "This kind of surprise isn't frowned upon in science because they often lead to breakthroughs."
「好了，来拿走属于你的那份惊喜吧。」
"Alright, time to retrieve the surprise that belongs to you."
你身处库宁特的一家金属食品店，店长喋喋不休地向你推销每一款产品，他在脸上涂满红黑色的锈斑，展示自己对智械的崇拜。

You find yourself in a Kunint metal foods store where the shopkeeper barely pauses for breath as they try to promote every single product they have. Their face is painted in blotches of dark-red rust to display their adoration for Intellitrons.
「亚共晶糖果，金属纯度<unbreak>29</unbreak>％，不仅复刻了合金的口感，甚至连咀嚼时的铁锈味也能完美复现。」
"Hypoeutectic candy, <unbreak>29</unbreak> percent pure metal. Not only does it replicate that classic alloy flavor, that authentic rust taste really comes through when you chew, too."
店长一把抓起罐里的糖果，塞到你的手里，「试吃一下吧，正宗地道的合金口味。」
The shopkeeper quickly grabs the candy from its can and stuffs it into your hands: "Try it, and you won't find authentic alloy flavors like it anywhere."
你产生了一种错觉，不是自己在嚼糖果，是糖果在嘴巴里嚼你。
You suddenly have a strange vision in your mind that it isn't you who is chewing the candy — it's the candy that is chewing you.
金属伟大，金属神圣，超越有机，不再为人。
Metal is great. Metal is divine. Metal will surpass the organics and humans will be no more.
你看到一幅魔幻现实主义的景象，有机体店长高喊鲁珀特万岁，张牙舞爪地向你冲来。
You glimpse a vision of magical realism as the organic shopkeeper launches themself at you in a violent rage, screaming: "Long live Rubert!"
你毫不怀疑，如果再不溜掉，他迟早得向你推销反有机方程。
You have no doubt that he'll try to sell you the Anti-Organic Equation if you don't get away.
「还有这个磁流体冰淇淋，包你肚子里的引擎都打转转。」店长头部以下的部分转了一圈，背后的义体把冰淇淋举到面前。

"We also have magnetic flow ice cream, perfect to get that engine in your stomach whirring!" The shopkeeper's body below their neck rotates, and their rear prosthetic lifts the ice cream in front of their face.
<unbreak>22</unbreak>％的金属纯度，适合送给义体化程度低的朋友。
This is <unbreak>22</unbreak> percent pure metal, a great gift for a friend with a lower level of prosthesis.
「那是当然，金属纯度<unbreak>70</unbreak>％以上的大货。」店长搬出压箱底的收藏，人工做旧的箱子上，刻满了鲁珀特帝国的徽记。

"Well, of course, that is one of our over <unbreak>70%</unbreak> pure metal specialties." The shopkeeper pulls out their treasured collection from the bottom of an artificially aged chest that is covered in engraved crests of the Rubert Empire.
「据说，只要一个人的金属纯度超过百分之百，就能超脱羸弱的肉体，成为无机生命。」店长越说越起劲，四只义眼在眼眶里疯狂旋转。

"Legend has it that as soon as a person's metal purity exceeds <unbreak>100</unbreak> percent, they will be able to transcend their feeble body and become an inorganic being!" The shopkeeper grows more and more enthusiastic as they speak, their four prosthetic eyes spinning wildly in their sockets.
「你想想，二世不就是有机体？他能成为智械，咱当然也行。」
"Just think about it. Rubert II was an organic being too, right? If he can become an Intellitron, naturally we can, too!"
你走在一片光秃秃的废墟上，粒子湮灭虫在星际能源战争中将这里啃得一干二净，连土壤和岩石都不剩下的苍白地表，只有一台孤零零的自动售货机。

You stroll through the stark and bare ruins, where particle obliterator worms devoured everything on this land during the Interstellar Energy War. Not even soil or rocks remain on its lifeless pallid surface. All that remains is a lonely vending machine.
售货机骄傲地履行着它的职责，直到你的到来，打破了不用上班的美好时光。
The vending machine carries out its duties with great pride. That is until your arrival destroys its luxury of never having to work.
「逻辑：本机仍处于战时管理模式，请证明您拥有比战争另一方更高的投资价值，以及更高的获胜几率。」
"Logic: This machine is still in wartime management mode. Please prove that you have a higher investment value and greater chance of victory than your adversaries."
「基于您的投资价值，本机将评估对您的服务标准。」
"This machine will evaluate the standards of your service based on your investment value."
「否则，本机有理由判断，对您的支援无法使公司利益最大化，并拒绝您的消费要求——哔嘟，即将开始对您进行战斗力检定。」

"Or else, this machine will have justifiable cause to decide that supporting you will not stand to maximize the benefit for IPC and reject your request. Beep. Beep. Commencing your combat capability test."
售货机的辉光将你笼罩其中，对客户数据的测定，在古老的机器里发出嘎啦嘎啦的响声。
The bright light of the vending machine engulfed you as the client data evaluation process caused the ancient machine to rattle and clang.
「哔嘟…方案已拟定完成，请接受您的专属服务。」
"Beep... Your plan has been drafted. Please enjoy your personalized service."
「哔嘟，检定已开始，请勿离开检测范围。」
"Beep. Beep. Test has begun. Please leave the scanning area."
售货机沉默不语，你第一次知道，原来机器也会欺软怕硬。
The vending machine falls silent. For the first time in your life, you realize that machines have a habit of bullying the weak and fearing the strong, too.
事实证明，拳头是宇宙的通用货币。
This just goes to show that fists are the universal currency.
总有一天，你要它求着你买它的东西。
One day, you'll make it beg you to buy its goods.
贵有贵的好处，你如此安慰自己。
"Expensive things are expensive for a good reason," you tell yourself, trying to find comfort.
「基于归属权问题，任何威胁本机的行为，都将视作对星际和平公司的宣战——战斗模式启动。」
"Due to the ownership clauses, any threatening behavior towards this machine will be seen as a declaration of war against the IPC — battle mode activated."
你走进阴暗的档案资料馆，库存史料散发出腐朽的气息，看台中央，执笔的画家正在用调色盘配置颜料。
You enter the dimly lit archives as the records around you emit an atmosphere of decay. In the center of the platform, you see a painter busy mixing colors on their palette.
「烛墨学派，无名无姓的学士，你没有记住我的理由。」
"I am a nameless scholar of the Candelagraphos, and you have no reason to recall who I am."
他在提问前做出回答，又在画布上轻点几笔，勾勒出你的身影。「在历史被蛀蚀之前，总要有人把它们临摹下来。」

He answers your question before you even have time to ask and traces a few gentle strokes onto the canvas to outline your figure. "History must be traced via painting before they are completedly eroded away."
画家长叹了口气，咬住画笔，似是纠结如何收尾。「最后一笔，无名客，在你看来，历史是什么颜色？」
The artist sighs as they bite their brush, seemingly unsure of how to round off their work. "For the final touch, Nameless, what color is history to you?"
「星际和平公司在千余个琥珀纪中扮演着重要的角色，但要我说，他们只是这张画上的污点。」画家发出轻蔑的笑声。
"Though the IPC has played an important role for over a thousand Amber Eras, in my eyes, they are no more than a blemish on this painting." The painter loosed a mocking scoff.
「死亡与鲜血无处不在，星际能源战争和第二次帝皇战争几乎在同时兴起，但帝皇手上的鲜血远不如有机体自身浓艳。」画家缓缓抬手，为画布增添上猩红。

"There is no land that is not stained with the colors of death and blood. Though the Interstellar Energy War and the Emperor's War were waged almost simultaneously, the blood on the hands of the Emperor is nowhere near as bright and radiant as that on the hands of organic beings." The painter slowly lifted their hand to add bright scarlet to their work.
「总有人试图为时间注解特征，虚构史学家试图为鲁珀特杜撰过去，但在时间面前，这些挣扎毫无意义。」画家落笔之重，差些把画布捅穿。

"There are always those who will try to interpret the properties of time. History Fictionologists attempt to fabricate a past for Rubert, but such struggles are meaningless in the face of time itself." The pressure of the artist's brush grows almost heavy enough to pierce the canvas.
普雷图星的核心，古老的造物单元发出滴滴答答的声响，锈蚀的实验记录在一百个琥珀纪前停滞，但留下的程序仍在持续迭代更新。

At the core of the planet Plato, an ancient creation unit ticks away. Though records on this rusting experiment stopped a hundred Amber Eras prior, the protocols left behind had been constantly updating.
「逻辑：鉴于大一统方程缺失，本机尚未具备完整的造物机能，因此，仅支持模糊需求的物品生产，请见谅。」

"Logic: Due to a disparity in the grand unified equation, this machine is not yet capable of complete creation functions. Therefore, only the creation of products with vague requirements can be supported. Thank you for your understanding."
造物单元向你提问，核心需要新的主人给它一个课题，让它完成制造万物的使命。
The creation unit tells you that it requires a new master to provide it with a new research topic so that it may complete its mission of creation of all things.
「程序已启动，开始确定造物需求——您所需要的物品，是否具备虚数真空性？」
"Protocol activated, initializing creation request. Does the item that you have requested utilize imaginary vacuum properties?"
「造物工作已完成，请验收——注：由本设备制造的任何物品，其专利及解释权归▄▀▄▄学派所有。」
"Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."
