You pick up the painted clay tablet and cast it into the fire pit. That was countless days and nights of hard work. Your longing rises with the flames and smoke, until it all vanishes into thin air.
你挥挥手，帮工们搬来衣柜、木箱和其他什物，将它们尽数倒入火坑，发出沉重的响声。思念随火光和烟尘徐徐上升，直到在空中消失不见。

With a wave of your hand, the workers bring over wardrobes, wooden crates, and other belongings, dumping them all into the fire pit with heavy thuds. Memories rise with the flames and smoke, slowly dissipating into the air until they vanish.
走出过去？绝不！你用指甲在胳膊上留下血痕，向在场众人发誓：你要让这伤痛化为怒火，烧尽伤害你的一切。
Move on from the past? Never! You dig your nails into your arm, drawing blood, and swear to everyone present: you'll turn this pain into burning rage and incinerate everything that has ever hurt you.
你拿起长矛和盾牌。今年的纷争月，你将随大军一同出征，杀死敌人的挚友、烧毁敌人的家乡——唯有「毁灭」能偿还「毁灭」。
You pick up your spear and shield. In this Month of Strife, you will march with the army to slay the enemy's dearest friends and burn their homeland. Destruction can only be repaid by destruction.
「叮！啪！」武器碰撞的声音在校场的天空回荡，是圣城卫队在例行训练。
"Clang! Bang!" The sounds of clashing weapons echo across the training grounds as the Holy City Guards carry out their routine drills.
突刺、撩斩、换边、击手…你打出一套行云流水的攻击，对手的铁剑应声落地。你甩了甩久握木剑的胳膊，旁观的同僚们纷纷鼓掌赞叹。

Thrust, upward slash, change of guard, disarm... You execute a flawless sequence of attacks, and your opponent's iron sword clatters to the ground. As you shake your arm, sore from gripping the wooden sword for far too long, your observing colleagues burst into applause and admiration.
「你的剑术已经大有进步。只要完成最终试炼，圣城卫队长的人选就非你莫属。」剑术教练露出满意的眼神，「对手可是纷争的眷属，会赢吗？」

"Your swordplay has improved tremendously. Once you complete the Final Trial, you'll be the undisputed choice for Captain of the Holy City Guards." The sword instructor's eyes gleamed with approval, "Your opponent will be a Kin of Strife. Think you can win?"
你摇摇头，能在技艺上与你匹敌的人少之又少，唯有自己钻研才是正道。你以木人桩为假想敌出剑，一天结束，被你打坏的木人已堆积如山。

You shake your head, knowing there are very few who can match your skill level. Self-study is the only true path forward. Using wooden dummies as imaginary opponents, you practice your swordplay. By the end of the day, the broken dummies have piled up like a mountain.
你振臂一呼，军中好手们云集响应、自愿帮你喂招。一天结束，被你击倒的对手已排成长龙，你的脸上挂满了汗水和笑容。

With a rallying cry, skilled warriors from the army gathered to volunteer as your sparring partners. By the end of the day, your defeated opponents formed a long line, and your face was covered in sweat and smiles.
安逸的训练终究只是训练，唯有真实的搏杀才能催人向上。你独自提剑出城，扎入被黑潮造物占领的废墟。一天结束，你蹒跚地回到了城门外，狂跳的心脏已变得更加坚韧。

Comfortable training is still just training. Only real combat can drive one forward. You venture out of the city alone with your sword, diving into ruins occupied by Black Tide Creatures. As the day ends, you stagger back to the city gates, your wildly beating heart now stronger and more tenacious.
剑理与数理无异，强悍的肉体仍需头脑操控。你拜访了某位曳石学派贤人，与其交流心得、切磋技巧。一天结束，你大汗淋漓——锻炼思维并不比肉体更加轻松。

The principles of swordsmanship are no different from mathematics. Even the strongest body needs a mind to guide it. You visited a Helkolithist Sage to exchange insights and hone your skills. As the day ends, you're drenched in sweat. Training the mind proves no easier than training the body.
你摇摇头，能在技艺上与你匹敌的人少之又少，唯有自己钻研才是正道。你以木人桩为假想敌出剑，一天结束，被你打坏的木人已堆积如山。

You shake your head, knowing there are very few who can match your skill level. Self-study is the only true path forward. Using wooden dummies as imaginary opponents, you practice your swordplay. By the end of the day, the broken dummies have piled up like a mountain.
你振臂一呼，军中好手们云集响应、自愿帮你喂招。一天结束，被你击倒的对手已排成长龙，你的脸上挂满了汗水和笑容。

With a rallying cry, skilled warriors from the army gathered to volunteer as your sparring partners. By the end of the day, your defeated opponents formed a long line, and your face was covered in sweat and smiles.
安逸的训练终究只是训练，唯有真实的搏杀才能催人向上。你独自提剑出城，扎入被黑潮造物占领的废墟。一天结束，你蹒跚地回到了城门外，狂跳的心脏已变得更加坚韧。

Comfortable training is still just training. Only real combat can drive one forward. You venture out of the city alone with your sword, diving into ruins occupied by Black Tide Creatures. As the day ends, you stagger back to the city gates, your wildly beating heart now stronger and more tenacious.
剑理与数理无异，强悍的肉体仍需头脑操控。你拜访了某位曳石学派贤人，与其交流心得、切磋技巧。一天结束，你大汗淋漓——锻炼思维并不比肉体更加轻松。

The principles of swordsmanship are no different from mathematics. Even the strongest body needs a mind to guide it. You visited a Helkolithist Sage to exchange insights and hone your skills. As the day ends, you're drenched in sweat. Training the mind proves no easier than training the body.
你脑中似有顿悟，像是被光照透的窗。
An epiphany dawns in your mind, like sunlight streaming through a window.
时间来到约定的那天。你拔剑在手，走向如山般高大的强敌，它的青铜面具在阳光照拂下闪耀。公民们纷纷驻足，静观这场史诗级的对决——

The promised day has arrived. With your sword in hand, you approach your formidable foe, towering like a mountain, its bronze mask gleaming in the sunlight. Citizens gather around, bearing witness to this epic confrontation...
诗人与赴死者们常说，冥河的水流平静又湍急。岸这边散落着死而未渡的亡魂，岸那头通往象征新生的花海。当摆渡人载着死者航向彼岸时，河水平静如镜；若是亡魂试图自渡，便会被湍急的水流淹没。

Poets and those facing death often speak of the River of Souls. Its waters were both serene and turbulent. On this shore lie scattered souls of the dead who haven't crossed, while the opposite bank leads to flower fields, symbolizing rebirth. When the ferryman carries the dead toward the other shore, the waters are as calm as a mirror. But should a soul attempt to cross alone, they'd be swallowed by the raging currents.
可死亡的平衡已被打破。不知从何时起，塞纳托斯不再引渡世人。被困于冥滩的第<unbreak>2778</unbreak>天，你决定自救。

The balance of death has been broken. At some point, Thanatos ceased to ferry souls. On the <unbreak>2,778</unbreak>th day of being trapped on the Nethershore, you decide to take matters into your own hands.
身为船长，你见识过东方之海上千米高的疯狗浪。和它相比，冥河不过是大点的澡缸。已死但未死的船员们聚在你身边，等候着命令。只要驶向彼岸，落入塞纳托斯的手掌，你们就能迎来真正的死亡。

As a captain, you've witnessed thousand-meters-high rogue waves in the Eastern Seas. Compared to those, the River of Souls is just an oversized bathtub. The not-entirely-dead crew gather around you, awaiting orders. Once you sail to the other shore and fall into Thanatos's hands, you'll all find your true death.
诸神的旨意往往以需要解读的形式降临。你认为眼下的状况是某种含蓄的拒绝，或许你们仍需等待，直到准备充足的那天……
The will of the gods often manifests in ways that need interpretation. You might see the current situation as a subtle rejection. Perhaps you still need to wait until the day you're truly prepared...
身为水手，你深知水体的危险，好在你的船也在那场海难中「死」掉了。你招呼水手们捡拾散落的甲板碎片，重新拼凑出船体的形状。

As a sailor, you know all too well the dangers of water, but thankfully your ship "died" along with you in that shipwreck. You call out to your fellow sailors to gather the scattered deck pieces, piecing the ship back in shape together.
你们站上船头，折叠的长帆自动被风填满——这就是传说中的幽灵船。平静的水面顿时掀起巨浪，你迎着浪头航行，仿佛向巨龙发起冲锋的勇士。

As you stand at the bow, the folded sails automatically fill with wind. This is the legendary ghost ship. The calm waters suddenly erupt into massive waves, and you sail head-on into them, like a warrior charging towards a giant dragon.
「带上我们！甜美的死亡岂容独享？」冥河中沉沦的亡魂们纷纷伸手，试图将你们的船底凿漏，其中甚至混杂着法吉娜的造物。你和船员们用木桨四处敲击，却难以抵御围攻……

"Take us with you! Why should you alone savor the sweet embrace of death?" The fallen souls in the River of Souls reach out their hands, trying to puncture holes in your ship's hull, and among them are even Phagousa's creations. You and your crew frantically strike with wooden oars, but struggle to fend off the siege...
一阵微风抚平了巨浪，带着安提灵花的气息。手持巨镰的少女自冥河下游缓缓走来，长靴在水面点起涟漪。她的颜色好似薰衣草。

A gentle breeze calmed the towering waves, carrying the scent of Antila flowers. A young girl wielding a giant scythe approached slowly from downstream of the River of Souls, her boots creating ripples on the water's surface. Her color resembles that of lavender.
「抱歉，我来迟了。从今往后，生与死将不再分离。」她抬起手，那股幽香指引你向前。你终于落入了甜蜜的死亡。
"Sorry I'm late. From now on, life and death shall never part." She raises her hand, and that ethereal fragrance guides you forward. At last, you fall into sweet death.
泰坦所用之物往往能继承部分神力。那些失败者之所以会遇上巨浪，是因为它们没有找到正确的船——你如此相信着，带领水手们沿岸搜寻，终于找到了那艘无主的摆渡船。

Objects used by Titans often inherit a portion of their divine power. You firmly believe that those who failed met with giant waves because they hadn't found the right vessel. With this conviction, you led the sailors to search along the coast until finally discovering that ownerless ferry.
操船的流程大同小异。你们离开岸边，很快就逼近了河心。平静的水面顿时掀起巨浪，将你们拍入水中。看来神权并非凡人所能模仿。

The sailing procedure was pretty much the same. You left the shore and quickly approached the middle of the river. The calm water suddenly erupted into massive waves, throwing you all overboard. Seems like divine authority isn't something mortals can imitate.
「来吧，来吧，和我们一同沉入汪洋！」冥河中沉沦的亡魂们纷纷伸手，试图将你们拖入水底，其中甚至混杂着法吉娜的造物。陆续有船员消失在水下，你拼命向前游着，不敢回头……

"Come, come, sink with us into the depths!" The fallen souls in the River of Souls reach out their hands, trying to drag you under the water, and among them are even Phagousa's creations. One by one, crew members vanish beneath the surface as you swim forward desperately, not daring to look back...
一阵微风抚平了巨浪，带着安提灵花的气息。手持巨镰的少女自冥河下游缓缓走来，长靴在水面点起涟漪。她的颜色好似薰衣草。

A gentle breeze calmed the towering waves, carrying the scent of Antila flowers. A young girl wielding a giant scythe approached slowly from downstream of the River of Souls, her boots creating ripples on the water's surface. Her color resembles that of lavender.
「抱歉，我来迟了。从今往后，生与死将不再分离。」她抬起手，那股幽香指引你向前。你终于落入了甜蜜的死亡。
"Sorry I'm late. From now on, life and death shall never part." She raises her hand, and that ethereal fragrance guides you forward. At last, you fall into sweet death.
假以时日，也许你能靠它拼出一艘更大的船。
Given enough time, you might be able to piece together a bigger ship with it.
你是一名铰链猎者，巡海游侠中以智械为宿敌的猎手。你立下誓言，要让帝皇的余孽付出代价。从前如此，今日依然。

You are a Hinge Hunter, a Galaxy Ranger who views Intellitrons as mortal enemies. You have sworn an oath to make the remnants of the Emperor pay for their crimes. That was your mission then, and it remains your mission now.
你驾驶着箭头飞船四处游弋。在一颗坟场星球，你找到了一座智械零件堆成的山——帝皇战争留下了成千上万座坟茔，无论对有机生命还是无机。

You pilot your arrow-shaped ship through the stars. On a graveyard planet, you find a mountain made of Intellitron parts. The Emperor's War left behind thousands of graves, claiming both organic and inorganic lives alike.
一台破损的家政机器人从废墟中爬出。它使用仅剩的两条肢体爬行，显示器闪烁着红光，腰间的围裙表明它曾属于一个人类的家庭。

A mangled domestic robot crawls out from the wreckage. It drags itself along with its only two remaining limbs, display screen blinking red. The apron around its waist is a sign that it once served a human family.
你摸了摸背后的巨锤，眼前的智械会是你复仇的对象吗？
You reach for the giant hammer on your back. Is this Intellitron still the target of your mission?
在战斗的尾声，家政机器人打开翻盖，将冷却液泼在你的脸上。看它的表情，这大概是它压箱底的一击了。
As the battle ends, the domestic robot flips open a cover and splashes coolant right in your face. Judging by its expression, this was probably its final, desperate strike.
「真见鬼，你居然不怕水的吗？」那台智械留下这么句遗言，随后便一命呜呼。
"Darn it, are you actually not afraid of water?" Those are the Intellitron's final words before it shuts down for good.
你合上武器匣，转身离开。游侠不会把剑挥向无法还击的对手，锤子和枪也一样。
You snap your weapon case shut and walk away. A Galaxy Ranger never swings their blade at an opponent who can no longer fight back. The same goes for hammers and guns.
你是一名铰链猎者，巡海游侠中以智械为宿敌的猎手。你立下誓言，要让帝皇的余孽付出代价。从前如此，今日依然。

You are a Hinge Hunter, a Galaxy Ranger who views Intellitrons as mortal enemies. You have sworn an oath to make the remnants of the Emperor pay for their crimes. That was your mission then, and it remains your mission now.
你驾驶着箭头飞船四处游弋。在一座废弃空间站，你找到了一台占据办事大厅的机兵。
You pilot your arrow-shaped ship through the stars. In an abandoned space station, you find a mechanical soldier occupying the main lobby.
它长着足足六条腿，每条腿上都装有敞开的火焰喷射口；它的左臂闪烁着电光，右臂则被替换成了反物质湮灭炮——毫无疑问，这是一台典型的「人类猎杀者」。

It has six legs, each equipped with an open flamethrower. Its left arm crackles with electricity, while its right has been replaced with a Matter Annihilation Cannon. No doubt about it: this is a classic "Human Hunter."
你摸了摸背后的巨锤，眼前的智械会是你复仇的对象吗？
You reach for the giant hammer on your back. Is this Intellitron still the target of your mission?
你用巨锤将那机兵砸了个稀烂，幸存者们从安全室内冲出，欢呼雀跃。或许很快，这座空间站就将不再废弃。
You crush that mechanical soldier to pieces with your giant hammer. Survivors burst out of the safe room, cheering and dancing. Maybe this space station won't be "abandoned" for much longer.
这样的喽啰你已经狩猎了太多，你决定把精力留给更关键的战斗。
You've hunted enough of these small-fry. You decide to save your strength for the fights that actually matter.
你是一名铰链猎者，巡海游侠中以智械为宿敌的猎手。你立下誓言，要让帝皇的余孽付出代价。从前如此，今日依然。

You are a Hinge Hunter, a Galaxy Ranger who views Intellitrons as mortal enemies. You have sworn an oath to make the remnants of the Emperor pay for their crimes. That was your mission then, and it remains your mission now.
你驾驶着箭头飞船四处游弋。在一片恒星系的边缘，你找到了一颗尚在运作的工厂星球。黑色的原油在河流里流淌，巨大的烟囱耸立如山。

You pilot your arrow-shaped ship through the stars. On the edge of a star system, you discover a factory planet that's still in operation. Black oil flows through its rivers, and massive chimneys tower like mountain ranges.
标准作战机器人如罐头般从流水线中生产而出。你攀上齿轮构成的巨塔，塔顶的能源核心明亮如一轮大日——只要摧毁它，就能关停整条产线。

Standard combat robots roll off the assembly line like cans of soup. You scale a massive tower made of gears. At its peak, an energy core glows as bright as the sun. If you take it out, you shut down the whole line.
「侦测到有机污染…」塔的一角站直了身子，那是如山岳般庞大的作战巨构体……
"Organic contamination detected..." A section of the tower suddenly straightens up, revealing itself to be a combat colossus the size of a mountain...
你收起巨锤，齿轮构成的高塔轰然倒塌。至少在数个琥珀纪内，周边的有机生命能睡个好觉了。
You holster your giant hammer as the gear tower comes crashing down. For at least a few Amber Eras, the organic life nearby can finally get a good night's sleep.
仅靠你一人捣毁这颗星球还是太过冒险。你搜集起散落的零件作为证据，驾驶飞船驶向天弓武库寻求支援。
Taking out this whole planet by yourself is a bit too risky. You gather some scattered parts for evidence and set a course for the Skybow Arsenal to call for backup.
你是一位假面愚者。在酒馆的常客中，你并不是笑点最高的那位，但你很享受酒保特调的混合笑话——就像起床后的懒腰般欲罢不能。

You're a Masked Fool. You might not have the sharpest punchlines among the tavern regulars, but you live for the drinksmith's custom-mixed jokes. They're as satisfying as that first big stretch in the morning.
你推开酒馆大门。酒保不在，柜台上只摆着一团尘灵，还有几杯奇怪的混合笑话：其中一杯呈等离子态，冒着蓝色的火焰；另一杯晶莹剔透，闪烁着比喻义的光芒；最后那杯则像是滚烫的黑泥，表面泛着气泡。

You push open the tavern doors. The drinksmith is gone, leaving only a bunch of wispae and a few odd-looking mixed jokes on the counter. One is a blue-flamed plasma, another is crystal clear and shimmers with metaphorical light, and the last is a cup of bubbling, scalding black mud.
看来今天你要自己招待自己了。
Looks like you'll have to help yourself today.
起初，你面不改色，只觉得一丝回甘在口腔中蔓延。而后，你感到一股无名的力量充斥着全身，恨不得下一秒就飞上天把月亮打爆。你燃起来了。

At first, you don't react, just tasting a bit of sweetness. But then, an incredible power surges through you. You feel like you could fly into the sky and punch the moon until it explodes. You're absolutely fired up.
你喝下了比喻义的光芒，身体也在符号界开始发生变化。你不是人，你是一棵苇草，是铁，是一切社会关系的总和——你在众目睽睽下来回变化形态，直到闭店打烊才恢复原样。

You down the metaphorical light, and your body starts shifting within the symbolic realm. You're no longer human. You're a reed, then iron, then the sum of all social relations. You keep changing forms right in front of everyone, only returning to your original self when the bar closes.
你喝下了那杯黑泥…他们真该给这玩意贴个危险标签。不一会儿，你的胃就抛弃了你，而你的面部肌肉则开始扭曲，但不是出于笑意。
You drink the cup of black mud... honestly, this thing needs a warning label. Before long, your stomach starts staging a protest, and your face twists into a grimace that's definitely not a smile.
哦不，看来你摄入了过多的幽默垃圾——我们称之为烂梗。你因玩梗过度陷入了头痛，而且很长一段时间都笑不出来了。
Oh boy, looks like you've had a bit too much bad humor, or what we call "cringe jokes." You've got a massive headache from all the joking, and you won't be laughing again for a long, long time.
你是二维市的一名上班族，用有限的生命换取有限的金钱。经历了本月的第四个关键周后，你终于有机会迎来半天的休息。
You're a desk jockey in Duomension City, trading your finite life for a finite paycheck. After surviving the fourth "crunch week" of the month, you finally get a half-day off.
你漫无目的地在二相乐园街头闲逛，一台冰淇淋车闯入你的眼帘，车后站着一个戴高帽的怪人，像是马戏团长。
You're wandering the streets of Planarcadia when an ice cream truck appears. Standing behind it is a strange guy in a top hat, looking like he just stepped out of a circus.
「假期分割了我们的生活。」那古怪的商贩说道，「当你上学时，四个月是一周期；工作之后，七天是一周期；如果你是个倒霉蛋，就不知要多久才能过一周期了！」

"Vacations are what segment our lives," the strange vendor says. "When you're a student, one segment is four months. When you work, one segment is seven days. And if you're a real unlucky soul, who knows how long a segment lasts!"
「但我可以卖给你这些。」他打开储物箱盖，里面是五颜六色的假期：饱满、晶莹，仿佛能一口咬出甜浆。

"But I can sell you these instead." He flips open a storage chest to reveal a collection of colorful vacations. They're plump and shimmering, looking like they'd burst with sweet nectar if you took a bite.
你摇头拒绝，再也没见过那商贩。月末结薪时，你得到了一笔可观的加班费。
You shake your head and walk away, never to see that vendor again. At the end of the month, you notice a nice little bonus in your paycheck for all that overtime.
你与那商贩扭打作一团。就在你的终结技即将碰到他鼻尖时，商贩和冰淇淋车都倏地消失了。
You get into a brawl with the vendor. But just as your ultimate is about to clock him right in the nose, he and his ice cream truck vanish into thin air.
围观群众纷纷鼓掌叫好，本应属于他的愿力落在了你身上。
The crowd bursts into applause, and the Wishpower that was meant for him ends up going to you instead.
「谢谢惠顾。」高帽人将黄橙色的一块交给你，露出黄橙色的牙齿笑道。
"Thanks for your business," says the man in the top hat. He hands you an orange-yellow chunk, grinning with teeth of the exact same color.
你是二维市的一位普通网民，网络是你的第二个家园，网络账号是你的第二副身躯。这天，你正在赛博世界里冲浪。
You're just another netizen in Duomension City. The web is your second home, and your account is your second body. Today, you're out surfing the cyberworld.
「想要真正地活着吗？」一个匿名账号发来信息，「我们都生活在巨大的阴谋之中：首席执行官是赛博人假扮的，幻月根本不存在，阿哈其实就在我们身边……」

"Want to know what it's like to truly live?" an anonymous account asks. "We're all trapped in a massive conspiracy. The CEO is a cyborg in disguise, the Phantasmoon is a lie, and Aha is actually walking among us..."
「一切的真相我都放在这个网站里了，好自为之。」言毕，一道发光的链接出现在你面前。
"I've put the whole truth on this website. Good luck." With that, a glowing link pops up in front of you.
你点击那个链接，却发现里面根本不是什么真相解密，而是噗噜的热舞视频。成吨的垃圾模因涌进你的脑海…你赤到答辩了。
You click the link, only to find it's not some grand conspiracy reveal. It's just a video of ploos dancing. Tons of trashy memetic content floods your brain... Congratulations, you just got "memed."
算你有警惕性，可惜没用。你试着关闭对话，却发现系统已经被劫持了。终端开始自动播放噗噜的热舞视频，成吨的垃圾模因涌进你的脑海…你赤到答辩了。

Nice try being cautious, but it didn't help. You try to close the window, but your system's been hijacked. Your terminal starts blasting ploo dance videos, and your mind is flooded with trashy memetic content... Congratulations, you just got "memed."
对，没有，毕竟网络绑架可不管你这那的。你等了一会儿，发现终端开始自动播放噗噜的热舞视频，成吨的垃圾模因涌进你的脑海…你赤到答辩了。

Yeah, you didn't click, but cyber-kidnappers don't play by the rules. After a moment, your terminal starts auto-playing ploo dance videos anyway. Trashy memetic content floods your mind... Congratulations, you just got "memed."
你睁开眼，热浪打疼了你的皮肤。你从房屋的废墟中爬起，到处都是烟尘与灰烬，还有火焰，紫色的火焰……
You open your eyes, and a wave of heat stings your skin. You drag yourself out from the ruins of a house, surrounded by smoke, dust, and cinders. And fire... purple fire...
不久前，被称作「界外天魔」的怪物从天而降。怀抱孩子的母亲尖叫着逃离，手握长枪的父亲被拦腰截断。哈托彼亚，你的家园，遭到了入侵。而幻月只是在高空静静地注视着一切，无动于衷。

Not long ago, monsters known as "Demons From Beyond" descended from the sky. Mothers clutching their children fled screaming, while fathers wielding spears were severed at the waist. Ahatopia, your home, was invaded. And yet, the Phantasmoon merely watched from high above in silence, unmoved.
突然，你的指尖触碰到了什么东西。那是一张空白面具，带着似笑非笑的表情。那是幻月游戏的门票。
Suddenly, your fingertips brush against something. It is a blank mask, wearing a smile that isn't quite a smile. It is your ticket to the Phantasmoon Games.
据说面具会主动选择它的主人。你不知道自己为何受到青睐，但它无疑向你揭示了一个未来——你会成为谒者，乃至星神本身。你会拥有力量，以及改变现实的权力。

They say that masks choose their own masters. You don't know why its gaze fell upon you, but this mask has undeniably revealed your future, in which you will become a Supplicant, and perhaps even an Aeon. You will possess might, and with it, the authority to rewrite reality.
「进行唱名吧，成为谒者吧。然后，改变这一切吧。」一个声音从你心底响起。那么，你要如何使用这份力量呢？
"Begin the roll-call. Become a Supplicant. Then, change everything." A voice echoes from the depths of your heart. So, how will you use this power?
你在幻月下静静地宣誓，说出心中所愿。于是，烬土纪元的最后一场幻月游戏开始了……
You quietly take an oath beneath the Phantasmoon, voicing your desires. And so, the final Phantasmoon Games of the Cindearth Age begins...
你睁开眼，鲤鱼踩着祥云从窗外飞过，孩子们手持龙尾制成的风筝线在后面追逐。一只轻脚骑着火箭，把晨报和尘灵一并丢进你的窗户。

You open your eyes. Carp riding auspicious clouds fly past the window, followed by the children with kite strings made of dragon tails in their hands. A lightpaw riding a rocket tosses the morning paper and a wispae right through your window.
自打哈托彼亚进入画中世界以来，已经过了不知多少个春秋。人们在永恒的画卷中追逐、嬉闹，乐此不疲，那仿佛能燃尽天幕的火焰早就被抛之脑后。

Who knows how many years have passed since Ahatopia entered the World in Canvas? People chased one another and frolicked within the eternal scroll, never tiring of the fun. The fire that seemed capable of burning up the sky had long since been cast to the back of their minds.
但笑料终会用尽。为了给停滞的世界增添一丝波澜，人们将夸张或扭曲的愿望尽数加于幻月游戏，谒者们肆意创造新的种族、地点与新闻，又将它们如油彩般随意抹去——这一切只能用两个字来形容：无趣。

But the jokes eventually ran dry. To add a ripple to a stagnant world, people projected their exaggerated and distorted wishes onto the Phantasmoon Games. Supplicants arbitrarily created new races, locations, and news, only to wipe them away like oil paint. All of these can be summed up in one word: boring.
一张空白面具出现在你的脚边，带着似笑非笑的表情。你知道，你的「欢愉」得到了认可，是时候由你来重塑画中的规则了。
A blank mask appears at your feet, wearing a smile that is not quite a smile. You know that your Elation has been acknowledged, and it is time for you to reforge the rules of the World in Canvas.
幻月仍在天边静静地注视，仿佛要见证你会如何使用这份力量。如今这轮幻月，和照拂古人的并无不同。
The Phantasmoon still gazes quietly from the rim of the sky, as if to witness how you will use this power. The Phantasmoon is no different from the one that shone upon the ancients.
于是，画中世界的又一场幻月游戏开始了……
And so, yet another Phantasmoon Games of the World in Canvas begins...
你睁开眼，阳光在玻璃大厦的外墙上反射出光斑，浮空车排成了联通天际的长龙——到上班时间了。你跳出栖居的广告牌，从仅有线稿的公文包中掏出领带与正装。

You open your eyes. Sunlight glints off the glass facades of skyscrapers, while a stream of aerocars stretches into the sky like a long dragon. Time to go to work. You hop out of the billboard you call home, fishing a tie and a suit out of a briefcase that consists of nothing but line art.
身为「诸世界重建计划」打捞出的首批幻造种，你见证了这些高楼拔地而起的过程。公司给了你人权，邀请你加入到这宇宙化的浪潮中。代价嘛，就是幻造种也得上班。

As one of the first batch of imagenae salvaged by the Worlds Reborn Initiative, you witnessed these skyscrapers rising from the ground up. The IPC granted you human rights and invited you to join this tide of universalization. The cost? Well, even imagenae have to clock in for work.
「您的愿力余额已逼近危险线。」蜡笔涂成的电子表在你手上聒噪道。倘若没有足够的愿力维持身躯，你就只能和墙上的涂鸦抢活干。到了那时，你离彻底消失也不远了。

"Your Wishpower balance is nearing the danger line." The digital watch scribbled in crayon on your wrist squawks. If you don't have enough Wishpower to sustain your body, you'll have to compete with the graffiti on the walls for work. By then, you won't be far from disappearing completely.
「咣当！」有什么东西突然从垃圾桶里飞出，砸在了你的后脑勺上。你气愤地回过头，发现那是一张空白面具……
*Clang!* Something suddenly flies out of the trashcan and smacks you right in the back of the head. You spin around in anger, only to discover it's a blank mask...
幻月仍在天边静静地注视，带着一抹傻笑。你明白，有了这份馈赠，你可以随意改写自己的命运，全看你想把它引向何处。

The Phantasmoon gazes quietly from the edge of the sky, wearing a goofy grin. You understand that with this gift, you can rewrite your destiny however you please, and it all depends on where you want to lead it.
于是，重建后的第一场幻月游戏开始了……
And so, the first Phantasmoon Games after the reconstruction begins...
你睁开眼，发现自己正躺在造物学派的培养基里。两个身穿公司制服的人站在玻璃缸外，其中一人看起来比另一人更花哨些。
You open your eyes to find yourself lying in a culture medium of the School of Pure Creation. Two people in IPC uniforms stand outside the glass tank, one looking a bit flashier than the other.
「主管，我向你保证，这次的『幽默机器人』绝对足够幽默。」质朴的研究员用手帕擦汗，「至少比我幽默。」

"Supervisor, I guarantee you, the 'Humorous Robot' is definitely humorous enough this time." The earnest researcher wipes the sweat from their brow with a handkerchief. "More humorous than me, at least."
「既然如此，讲个笑话吧。」主管拍了拍控制面板，「你能听懂我说话，对吗？」
"In that case, tell me a joke." The supervisor pats the control panel. "You can understand me, right?"
「什么东西有粗有细，会让人想跳舞，又会让人流眼泪？答：电线。」
"What comes in thick and thin, makes people want to dance, and makes them cry? Answer: Electric wires."
「我有一个压箱底的笑话，我很想把它讲出来。可惜我现在还没有手，搬不动箱子。」
"I have the best joke up my sleeve. I really want to tell it, but unfortunately, I don't have hands right now... let alone a sleeve."
「我有位朋友，他是个半步离人。他爸爸是步离人，他妈妈也是步离人。直到有次遇上曜青，他失去了下半身。」
"I have a friend who's a half-borisin. His dad is a borisin, his mom is a borisin... but one time he ran into the Yaoqing, and now he's missing his lower half."
「当然能，我又不是路易斯•弗莱明。」你怂肩道。
"Of course I can. I'm not Louis Fleming." You shrug.
「切断能源输送。」主管连忙向研究员下令，「对，把这玩意整个融掉，废料扔进红巨星火化。千万别让路易斯•弗莱明听见。」

"Cut the power supply." The supervisor hurriedly barked orders at the researcher. "Yeah, melt this whole thing down and incinerate the scrap in the red giant star. Just don't let Louis Fleming find out."
我们来讲个故事吧，角色似真似假，叙述者也不可信任的古老寓言。
Let's tell a story. An ancient fable where the characters tread the line between truth and falsehood, and the narrator is wholly unreliable.
在很久很久以前，无常的神明在废墟上种下一朵花，升起月亮将彼时荒芜的土地照耀，在漫长的时间里，生命逐渐复苏，故事也随之生长。

A long, long time ago, a capricious god planted a flower among the ruins and raised the moon to illuminate the once-barren land. Over the long years, life gradually revived, and stories began to bloom.
这天，在花朵绽放、古树扎根的地方，八位相貌各异的客人不期而遇。后人说他们是悲悼伶人，当然，也可以由听故事的你来决定。

On this day, where flowers bloomed and ancient trees took root, eight guests of distinct appearances met unexpectedly. Posterity called them the Mourning Actors. Though of course, that is also for you, the listener, to decide.
Or it could be the Aeons THEMSELVES.
第一个说话的，是位慈眉善目的少年，他冷淡地望着月亮，仿佛早已失去了悲喜。
The first to speak was a boy with a gentle countenance. He gazed coldly at the moon, looking as though he had long since lost the capacity for joy or sorrow.
「我从一位信誉堪忧的剧团长那儿听来讯息，说欢愉的神曾在此处落泪。于是我穿过灵火之海与遗忘的风暴来到这里，以求再现那垂泪瞬间。」

"I heard a rumor from a troupe leader of questionable repute that the Aeon of Elation once shed a tear here. So, I traversed seas of flames and forgetten storms to arrive at this very spot, all in hopes of reproducing that weeping moment."
「可我们只看到一颗变换着面相的月亮。」披着狼皮的男人笑道，「难道要把故事都讲给它听？」
"But all we see is a moon with changing faces." The man draped in a wolf's skin laughed. "Are we supposed to tell it all our stories?"
Perhaps THEY really can hear you.
Might as well, since we're already here.
就这样，八个伶人围坐在了月亮下，将彼此的故事分享，或听闻、或见证、或虚构。
And so, the eight Actors sat together beneath the moonlight, sharing stories with one another. Some heard, some witnessed, some fabricated.
然后，将有一人令祂落泪，以证明，欢愉之主亦有悲悯之心。
And then, there would be one who moves THEM to tears, proving that even the Master of Elation possesses a heart capable of compassion.
「就从我开始吧」，少年闭上眼睛，仿佛在回忆令他苦痛的往昔。
"Let's start with me." The boy closed his eyes, as if recalling his sorrowful past.
「众所周知，宇宙里满是欢愉的痕迹，阿哈创造游戏，并提供奖励，或是宝物，或是秘密，或是…真正的奇迹。」
"It is a well-known fact that the universe is teeming with traces of the Elation. Aha creates games and offers rewards: treasures, secrets, or... genuine miracles."
「比如双面星的永恒竞走」、「翁瓦克的魔王讨伐」、「铅黑星的未来牌局」、「还有颗星星会在听到笑话后改变移动轨迹！」

"Like the Eternal Sprint on Twin-Sided Planet, the Demon Lord Crusade on Vonwacq, the Card Game of the Future on the Pitch-Dark Star, and even a star that changes its trajectory after hearing a joke!"
伶人们此起彼伏地应和，又迅速地安静下去。
The Actors chimed in, voices rising and falling, before swiftly piping down.
「在我的故乡，人们在欢笑时落下的眼泪，会凝结为宝石。所以越幸福的人，也越是富裕。」
"In my homeland, tears shed during laughter crystallize into gemstones. So, the greater one's happiness, the wealthier they become."
「可笑得太多以后，便不再有笑容，人们也愈发贫穷。直到一个濒临破产的少年，看着路边的乞丐发出嘲笑。」
"When there's too much to laugh at, the laughter stops, and the people grow poorer still. That is, until a young man on the verge of bankruptcy laughed at a beggar by the roadside."
Laugh at those weaker than you.
Laugh at those poorer than you.
Laugh at those more miserable than you.
「笑容需要燃料，而世上总有不幸为其燃烧。我为当时的笑声而忏悔，也为无法找寻人人都幸福的结局而哀伤。」

"Smiles require fuel, and there is always misfortune burning in the world to feed them. I repent for the laughter of that moment, and I grieve for my inability to find an ending where everyone embraces happiness."
「于是我来到了这里，希冀从阿哈口中知晓——那个人人都能笑着的世界，是否存在？」
"And so I came here, hoping to hear from Aha's own lips: does that world where everyone can smile truly exist?"
众人在听罢少年的故事后久久沉默，然后，一个口哨打破了僵局。
After listening to the boy's story, everyone fell silent for a long time. Then, a whistle broke the deadlock.
「按座位顺序，现在应该轮到我了？」男人狼皮的兜帽下，是一条条愈合的伤疤。
"Going by the order of our seats, it should be my turn now, right?" Under the man's wolf-skin hood were streaks of healed scars.
「在我的家乡，也有个类似的游戏，说是仪式或许更贴切。」他故作轻浮，眼神里满是愁思。
"Back where I'm from, we have a similar game... though perhaps 'ritual' would be a more fitting description." He feigned a casual air, yet his eyes were filled with melancholy.
「那年冬天，乘着点心船的伶人剧团来到村子里，异星的诡谲演出讲述着绝不重样的英雄史诗和滑稽故事，却也为即将开始的仪式带来几分不详。」

"That winter, a troupe of Actors riding a pastry boat came to the village. Their bizarre otherworldly performances told heroic epics and comical stories, never repeating. Yet they also brought some uncertainty to the upcoming ritual."
I wanna go see the show too!
「别在意那些有的没的，总之，我和挚友受命全副武装，代表村子潜入地下洞穴中狩猎巨狼，幻想着取得众人赞许的目光。」
"Don't sweat the details. Anyway, my best friend and I were armed to the teeth, and infiltrated the cave on behalf of the village to hunt a giant wolf, fantasizing about earning everyone's approval."
「十年一度的狩猎在远方剧团的歌声中开启，只要将恶兽的首级献给神明，便能为村子带来十年和平的时光。」
"The decennial hunt begins amidst the singing of a troupe from afar. Offer the vile beast's head to the deity, and the village shall know ten years of peace."
「在黑暗中，我听见了野兽的嚎叫。它撕扯我的手臂，我的肩膀，哪怕我一度将子弹射向那双眼睛，也无济于事。」
"In the darkness, I heard the wild beast howling. It tore at my arms, my shoulders... even when I fired a bullet straight into its eyes, it was all for naught."
「那时的我几近失去理智，我抛下身为人的一切，啃咬着那无形的怪物，直到挚友的呼唤出现在耳畔。」
"I nearly lost my mind back then. I cast aside my humanity, gnawing on that formless monstrosity... until the call of my best friend came to my ears."
Where was your friend just now?
You're still alive. That's enough to prove...
「我点燃火把，身披狼皮的他，此刻正与怪物的尸骸融为一体。」
"I ignited the torch. He, clad in wolf skin, was becoming one with the monster's corpse."
「那一刻，我看到了真相——巨狼在数百年前就已倒下，它的血肉被抛进森林，骨骼被埋进土里，可唯有魂魄不散，本能仍贪求厮杀。」

"In that moment, I saw the truth. The giant wolf had fallen hundreds of years ago. Its flesh was cast into the forest, its bones buried in the earth... yet its soul remained, its instinct still driven to slaughter."
「于是我们扮作巨狼，以自己的死亡欺骗狼的魂魄，消解它的欲望，生生世世。」
"And so we donned the guise of the giant wolf, deceiving its soul with our own deaths, dissolving its desires. Life after life, generation after generation."
「我割下怪物的头颅，剥下它的皮毛，人们以英雄之名称赞我，毫不过问已然死去的另一人。」
"I severed the monster's head and stripped its hide. People hailed me as a hero, yet never once asked about the other, who was already dead."
This story is just too fantastic.
An immortal monster is indeed terrifying.
「永不止息地同不灭之物缠斗，乃至手刃挚友，这样可悲的循环究竟有何荣耀可言？」
"Endlessly battling the immortal monster, even to the point of killing my best friend... tell me, what glory lies in such a wretched cycle?"
「我乘着剧团的船离开了故乡，又在多年后，再度与那位团长重逢，并从她口中知晓了阿哈垂泪的故事，来到这皎洁的月下。」

"I left my homeland aboard the troupe's ship. Years later, I reunited with the troupe master, and from her lips, I learned the story of Aha shedding a tear, which led me here, beneath this bright, unblemished moon."
粉发少女躺在树边，慵懒地打了个哈欠。
The pink-haired girl lay by the tree, letting out a lazy yawn.
「巧了，就在不久前，我还见过那位剧团长。她站在舞台背后，纸壳裁剪出的演员在她的指挥下歌唱。」
"What a coincidence. I saw that troupe master not too long ago. She was standing backstage, conducting a chorus of singers cut from cardboard."
「唱那亘古的时代，虫皇的诞生。最初的悲悼伶人将贡多拉借给了愚者，又或是被他们盗走？」
"Sing of that ancient era, of the Imperator Insectorum's birth. Did the first Mourning Actors lend their Gondola to the Fools, or was it stolen by them?"
「哎，演那段的时候我分了神，只记得她那点心船，嘿！比蜜糖还要香。」
"Alas, I got distracted during that scene. All I remember is her boat made of desserts. Hey! It smelled sweeter than honey."
I know the rest of the story too.
「罢了罢了」，少女舔舐嘴唇，仍对甜点念念不忘，「这里的气氛太过凝重，不如讲个童话来暖暖场。」
"Well, forget it." The girl licked her lips, mind clearly still lingering on the dessert. "The atmosphere here is way too heavy. How about I tell a fairy tale to lighten the mood?"
「在月亮还未升起的年代，地上曾盘桓着百首的大蛇，它的毒液腐蚀大地，又沿着地平线渗透进夜空。」
"In an era before the moon had risen, a serpent with a hundred heads coiled upon the earth. Its venom corroded the land, seeping along the horizon to permeate the starry sky."
「星星王国派来了最勇猛的骑士，誓要将这害人的魔物讨伐。」
"The Kingdom of Stars sent its most gallant knights, vowing to slay this wicked monster once and for all."
「月亮骑士用月牙砍下它的头颅，蜜蜡骑士融化它的身躯，骑士们各司其职，终于斩断了最后一颗不死头颅。」
"The Lunar Knight severed its head with the crescent, the Wax Knight melted its body... The knights all played their part, finally severing the last immortal head."
「可谁成想，大蛇的残躯死而不僵，它的毒牙刺破了骑士的铠甲，刺破了月亮。」
"But none could have foreseen that the giant serpent's corpse refused to die. Its fangs pierced not only the knight's armor but also the moon itself."
「受伤的月亮骑士从此得了疯病，在月夜下，人也变得愈发癫狂。」
"The wounded Lunar Knight was seized by madness from that day forth, his descent into frenzy fueled by the very moonlight."
「大家请来许多医生，却都没能治愈月亮的顽疾。直到一艘用冰淇淋、甜甜圈还有蛋糕打造的船，径直驶进了月亮。」
"Doctors were summoned, but nobody knew what to do for the sick moon. That is, until a ship crafted from ice cream, donuts, and cake sailed straight into the moon."
「演出的笑声随月光飘荡，山里的、水里的、地下的和天上的精灵，都被它吸引，纷纷跳进湖里，穿过水面的倒影走进月亮的胸膛。」

"The show's laughter, drifting on the moonlight, drew in the sprites of mountain, water, earth, and sky. One after another, they leaped into the lake, passed through the mirror of its surface, and entered the very heart of the moon."
「月亮骑士侧躺在天鹅绒的幕布上，不时哈哈大笑。」
"The Lunar Knight reclines sideways upon the velvet curtain, letting out the occasional guffaw."
Is it that moon in the sky?
「剧团的演出持续了一天一夜，我与精灵们挤在观众席上，不到一半就困得睡着了。」
"The troupe's performance lasted an entire day and night. Packed in among the sprites in the audience, I had succumbed to exhaustion well before the halfway mark."
「待到我睁开眼睛，地上的花儿已长成巨树，剧团也不见影踪。」
"By the time I opened my eyes, the flowers on the ground had grown into towering giants, and the troupe had vanished without a trace."
「我走出了月亮，然后，就来到了你们身旁。」
"I stepped from the moon and found myself right beside you."
「噗——本以为她不敢赴约，结果竟是我迟到了。」吹破泡泡糖的女孩个子不高，无奈溢于言表。
"Pfft... Thought she'd chicken out. Turns out I'm the late one." The girl blew her bubblegum, her petite frame radiating exasperation.
她？你们突然意识到，这里的每个人都见过那口若悬河的剧团长，乘着点心船的怪人。不知不觉间，众人纷纷谈起对她的第一印象。

Her? It dawns on you that everyone here has a story about the silver-tongued troupe master, the odd soul who sailed in on a boat made of desserts. Before long, the room erupts with everyone sharing their first impressions of her.
「她自称是悲悼伶人，却比谁都爱笑」、「每到演出结束，她都会把演员收回故事书里」……
"She claims to be a Mourning Actor, yet she loves to laugh more than anyone," "At the end of every show, she packs up her actors into her storybook"...
「她借了我<unbreak>10000</unbreak>信用点，准确来说，应该是欺诈」，智械女士说。
"She borrowed <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> credits from me. Or, to be precise, conned," stated the Intellitron lady.
Why is this thing different from the others?
没准儿她也借了我的钱…
Maybe she borrowed money from me, too...
「反正也到我了，我把认识她的经历讲讲，权当听个笑话。」女孩信手一挥，投影出一个个斑斓的棋盘。
"Okay, my turn to go. I'll share how I met her. Think of it as a joke." With a casual wave, the girl conjured a series of vibrant game boards into the air.
「一切都源于，我在垃圾堆深处捡到的那盒巴蒂亚死亡象棋，千变万化的棋局暗喻着命运，令我深深地为它着迷。」
"It all started with that box of Bathia Death Chess I scavenged from the depths of the trash. The ever-changing board was a metaphor for destiny itself, and I was utterly captivated."
「我赢下了所有棋手，最终只能同自己对弈，一步步推演它的规律，向着心中的终点前进。」
"I bested every opponent, until I was left to play the game against myself. Piece by piece, I unraveled its laws, advancing toward the end goal I envisioned in my heart."
「然后我得出了答案，当棋手执黑，按照固定的步数前进，将必然在第<unbreak>101</unbreak>手取得胜利。」
"Then I arrived at the answer: As Black, by adhering to a fixed sequence of moves, you are guaranteed to seize absolute victory on the <unbreak>101</unbreak>st move."
Guess that makes you invincible now?
「获得唯一解的巴蒂亚死亡象棋变成了向阿哈祈福的仪式，以乞求在混沌中保持稳定。」
"With its solution narrowed to one, Bathia Death Chess became a rite praying to Aha for stability amidst the chaos."
「我成为了攻略师，不断解开新的游戏和难题。我在看到迷宫时就能想象到终点，在出牌前就看到结局。」
"I became a puzzle-breaker, constantly cracking new games and conundrums. I can envision the finish line the moment I see a labyrinth, and foresee the outcome before the cards are even dealt."
「崇拜者将我奉为最优解，可我只看到——游戏纷纷被我杀死，宇宙变得愈发无趣。」
"Admirers hail me as the optimal solution, yet I witness only the games I kill and a universe growing duller by the day."
「我浑浑噩噩地走在霓虹森林里，却在恍惚间被剧团的铜铃声吸引，走进了光怪陆离的冰淇淋帐篷。」
"I was stumbling through a neon forest in a daze, drawn by the chime of the troupe's bells into a bizarre ice cream tent."
Kinda sounds like a horror story.
「『想参加一场游戏吗？』，坏笑着的女人令我毛骨悚然，『一场有关星神的游戏』。」
"'Care for a game?' The lady's wicked smirk sent shivers down my spine. 'A game about the Aeons.'"
「『若你赢了，{RUBY_B#欢愉之神}游戏之神{RUBY_E#}自能给你答案。若你输了，岂不是证明，人生仍有大把可挑战之物？』」
"'If you win, the {RUBY_B#God of Elation}God of Games{RUBY_E#} will grant you answer. But if you lose... wouldn't that just prove there are still plenty of things in life worth challenging?'"
「我在离开前同她玩了一局，剪刀石头布，人类最古老的游戏之一，结果是——平局。」
"Before my departure, we played a single round of that most ancient of human games: rock, paper, scissors. The result... was a draw."
幻月还未爬升至中天，夜莺的啼鸣随着星辰盘旋。就在第五位伶人即将开口时，砂砾上雨点般的脚步声却打断了她。
The Phantasmoon was still shy of its zenith, and the nightingale's trill spiraled with the stars. Just as the fifth actor was about to speak, a raindrop-patter of footsteps on gravel cut her short.
女人背着沉重的行囊，一袭黑衣几乎同哈托彼亚的夜色融为一体。她自称是返乡的游子，却迷失了故乡的方向。
The woman was burdened by a vast pack, her dark clothes seamless against the dark night of Ahatopia. She declared herself a wanderer come home, yet admits she no longer knew the way.
既然在此邂逅，便也是种缘分，众人邀请女人一同坐下，共享这无比漫长的一夜。
Seeing that this encounter was itself a twist of fate, the group made room and gestured for the woman to join them, to share in the long vigil of the night.
「入乡随俗，趁夜色尚早，不妨听听我这旅人的故事，就当换换口味。」女人微微发笑，让人感到没来由的亲切。
"While you're here... and while the night is young, why not lend an ear to a traveler's tale? Consider it a change of pace." The woman gave a faint smile, one that carried an inexplicable warmth.
「我还记得，故乡是一片苦涩的黑暗，人们为了生存而奔忙，成为野兽的晚餐，或是将野兽变为晚餐，世界就这样如齿轮般啮合，运行。」

"I remember a homeland steeped in bitter dark, where people scurried about for survival, only to become the beasts' dinner, or to make dinner of the beasts. That was the world, turning like a great, grinding machine."
「浑身是伤的我品尝着猎物的滋味，本能的喜悦是我最初的记忆。」
"My body etched with wounds, I savored the taste of my prey. The instinctive thrill of it... that was my first memory."
「可那天，一道美不胜收的光划破了黑暗，而我也被它所吸引，抛下了原始的、本能的欲望，离开故乡。」
"Then, one day, a light of impossible beauty split the dark. I was drawn to it. I left behind the primal hunger, the old instincts... and I left my homeland."
"I came here. To the world of 'humans.'"
「有人将我奉为座上宾，有人将我视作眼中钉，崇拜和憎恶令我迷失方向。」
"Some hail me as a guest of honor, while others view me as a thorn in their side. This adoration and loathing make me lose my way."
「在这里，我不得不为了他人的眼光奔忙，换得金钱，再用金钱去换取曾经唾手可得的——『生存的机会』。」
"Here, I must scramble to meet their expectations, trade it for coins, and use those coins to purchase what was once free for the taking: a 'chance to survive.'"
「我感到疲惫、恐惧，想要逃掉，回到记忆中最初的欢愉。」
"I feel fatigued and terrified. I want to flee, to return to the first, raw elation of my memory."
「可我的灵魂被快乐的世界偷走了一半，回望远方，就连回家的方向也已忘却。」
"But this world of happiness has stolen half my soul. When I look back, the path back has faded from my mind."
No one can go back there.
「是啊，但我仍想要回到故乡，回到母亲的怀抱。我怀念那个没有月亮的世界，怀念巢穴里的温暖，怀念雨滴落在叶片上的声音。」
"Yes. But still, I long to return to my homeland, to Mother's arms. I miss the moonless world, the warmth of the den, the sound of rain on leaves."
「我怀念在原野上的奔跑，风拂过耳间，怀念每一个，仅是活着就已足够的夜晚。」
"I miss running the wild fields, the wind in my ears. I miss every night when the simple fact of being alive was enough."
「我怀念我杀死的最后一头猎物，在疲惫间品尝到的生存的滋味——从那以后，永恒徘徊在灵魂深处的回味。」
"I miss the last beast I brought down, the taste of survival swallowed in my exhaustion, and the aftertaste that has never left me since."
「到我啦！到我啦！」第五位伶人全然不顾当下的气氛，像团活火似的跃动。说真的，她难道不该是假面愚者？
"Me! My turn!" The fifth actor, utterly ignoring the mood, bounced like a living flame. Seriously, shouldn't she be a Masked Fool?
「至少现在我扮演的是悲悼伶人。」少女（存疑）如是回答。
"At least for now, I'm playing a Mourning Actor." The young girl (questionable) replied.
「总之，在别的我追杀过来前，我们还有很多的时间。」
"Anyway, we've got ages before my other selves track us down."
Don't get any blood in my hair.
Fine. As long as you're happy.
「咳咳，故事要从花花博士被花奈咪杀手杀死说起——好吧，让我们把时间再往前快进一些……」
"Ahem. So, the tale begins with Dr. Bloom being murdered by the Hanami Killer... Okay, actually, let's fast-forward a bit..."
「在奇妙的火花花火星上，有张叫做花奈咪的面具。只有最有乐子的少女，才能获得戴上它的资格，她将成为众人目光的焦点，一切笑声的中心。」
"On the wondrous planet of Sparxxraps, there was a mask called Hanami. Only the girl with the most fun can earn the right to wear it, becoming the center of attention and the heart of all laughter."
「可时间一久，花奈咪总会对佩戴者感到厌倦，这时它便会抛弃少女，抵达下一位更有趣的扮演者身边。」
"Yet in time, Hanami always grows bored with its wearer. It then discards its current girl and drifts to the next performer it deems more entertaining."
「靠着不断抛弃无趣的主人，花奈咪成为了火花花火星最欢愉、最受欢迎的女孩。」
"By hopping from one dull host to the next, Hanami became the undisputed girl of mirth and the planet's darling on planet Sparxraps."
「一位邪恶的少女心生嫉妒，她化身为花奈咪杀手，想要毁掉面具，彻底杀死花奈咪。」
"Driven by jealousy, a malevolent young girl takes on the mantle of Hanami Killer, seeking to destroy the mask and finish Hanami once and for all."
「但花奈咪的演技很好，藏在人群中谁也找不到，邪恶的花奈咪杀手杀死了火火博士、兔兔玩偶和小花花，可她们谁都不是花奈咪。」
"But Hanami's acting was top-notch. She blended into the masses where no one could find her. The evil Hanami Killer took out Dr. Boom, Bunny Doll, and Little Flora, but none of them were Hanami."
「一天，花奈咪杀手找上了我，任超可爱的我千般辩驳，她也不肯相信，我早已被花奈咪抛弃。」
"Then, one day, the Hanami Killer came for me. Plead as I might, and I was way too cute about it, she refused to believe I'd already been discarded by Hanami."
「我和她大打出手，趁机逃啊逃啊，逃进了来火花花火星演出的剧团里。」
"We got into a huge fight, and I managed to slip away... I ran and ran, and ended up hiding in a troupe that came to Sparxraps to perform."
「然后我突然发现，我似乎也不知道，自己究竟是谁。」
"And then it hit me... I had no answer. I don't know who I am, either."
「或许从来就没有花奈咪，只是人们都渴望扮演她，才令她得以存在。」
"Perhaps Hanami never existed at all. It was only because people desired to play her role that she came to be."
「为了躲避追杀，我不得不和剧团长签订契约，扮演起悲悼伶人，并遵照与她的约定——老大，你怎么提前下场了，我词儿还没说完呢？！」

"To evade pursuit, I was forced to forge a pact with the troupe master, taking on the role of a Mourning Actor and bound by our agreement... Hey, Boss! You're jumping the gun. I wasn't done with my line yet!"
沿着少女的目光，一艘甜点制成的巨船正缓缓驶出星海，遮蔽住月光，降临于哈托彼亚之上。
Following the girl's gaze, a colossal ship made of desserts slowly sails out from the sea of stars, eclipsing the moon as it settles over Ahatopia.
你是二维市的一名市容维护家，负责让这座城市维持美观。每当幻月游戏举办时，你的工作量就会急剧上升。
You are an Urban Maintenance Specialist in Duomension City, responsible for maintaining the city's visual appeal. Your workload always skyrockets during the Phantasmoon Games.
这天，一艘飞碟划过天际，坠毁在了市中心。你赶到现场，大楼已经变成了满地碎片，一只绿色的欧克正从中飞碟残骸里爬出。

That day, a flying saucer streaked across the sky and crashed into the city center. You rushed to the scene to find the building reduced to scattered debris, and a green orch hauling themself from the wreckage.
「等一下，俺可以补偿你！」欧克连忙摆手，「没什么是俺寻思不出来的，开条件吧！」
"Hold on a sec, I can make it up to ya!" The orch waved frantically. "There ain't nothin' I can't figure out. Name your price!"
「下次，我一定会成功。」临走前，欧克留下这么句话。可别再来一次了。
"Next time, I'll nail it." That was what the orch said before leaving. Please, not again.
你是二维市的一名市容维护家，负责让这座城市维持美观。每当幻月游戏举办时，你的工作量就会急剧上升。
You are an Urban Maintenance Specialist in Duomension City, responsible for maintaining the city's visual appeal. Your workload always skyrockets during the Phantasmoon Games.
这天，一张巨大的黑桃A站在路边，对你挥了挥手。其他人似乎并不能看到它。
One day, a giant Ace of Spades stood by the roadside, waving at you. It seemed like no one else could see it.
「你知道吗，奥塔牌并不是塔奥牌，塔奥牌也不是奥塔牌。」黑桃A凑近了你，它的花色就像一抹笑容，「那么，你想要奥塔牌还是塔奥牌？」
"You know, Towat Cards aren't Tawot Cards, and Tawot Cards aren't Towat Cards." The Ace of Spades leaned in close, its suit curling like a smile. "So, which do you want? Towat or Tawot?"
「我们还会再见的。」扑克牌侧了侧身，从你视野中消失了——它没有厚度。
"We'll meet again." The playing card turned sideways, vanishing from your sight. It was thin as a thought, after all.
在拟造的商店门口，你少见地看到了阮•梅的身影——她静静立在那里，与周遭的街景形成了诡异的和谐。
At the entrance to the simulated store, you catch a rare glimpse of Ruan Mei standing there in perfect stillness, forming an oddly harmonious picture with the bustling street scene around her.
「对于『欢愉』，我的了解远不如其他研究那样深入。」阮•梅转向你，带着一抹异质的微笑，「希望这些『方程』能帮助你学习笑容。」

"My understanding of The Elation is far less profound than my other areas of research." Ruan Mei turns to you, a peculiar smile gracing her lips. "I do hope these Equations will help you learn to smile."
废纸躺在光洁的地板上，你捡起看了看，上面尽是无意义的线条。
You glance at a piece of scrap paper lying on the polished floor. It's full of meaningless lines.
你将废纸扔进印有「可回收」标识的桶中。
You toss the paper scrap into a trashcan marked as Recycling.
你严格遵守了空间站垃圾分类守则，循环再生后的纸张将以全新面貌回到你的视野中。
You strictly adhere to the space station's garbage sorting code. The waste paper will be recycled and returned to you in a different form.
你捡起废纸，再次将它扔入垃圾桶中。
You pick up the paper scrap and toss it into the trashcan again.
垃圾就该回到它本该待着的地方，维护空间站环境人人有责。
Trash should go back to where it belongs. Everyone is responsible for taking care of the space station's environment.
废纸倔强地躺在垃圾桶边上，往来科员那么多，却对此视而不见。
The paper scrap stubbornly stays beside the trashcan. It is ignored despite the number of researchers passing by.
你再次将废纸扔进垃圾桶中。突然，耳边传来阵阵掌声……
You toss the paper scrap once more into the trashcan. Suddenly, you hear bursts of applause...
恭喜啊，年轻人，你是迄今为止唯一一个通过我们科室特聘测试的！
Congratulations, youngster — you are so far the only interviewer who has ever passed the special appointment test for our department.
只有你锲而不舍，一直坚持了下来！欢迎加入我们科室！
You're the only one who stuck it out to the end! Welcome to our department!
两条腿的类人生物满地跑，但像你一样人品出众的实在太稀少啦。
Two-legged humanoid creatures abound in this world, but someone with your outstanding character is a true rarity.
What is the special appointment test?
就是字面意思，一场特殊的科员聘用测试。
In the most literal sense, it's a special test for hiring researchers.
But I didn't put in for the job.
没关系，我们特事特办，事后再补也行。
It doesn't matter. We could just make up later.
「捡垃圾」就是我们科室的面试题，怎么样，我设计的面试环节很巧妙吧，呵呵。
"Picking up trash" was the interview question for our department. Haha — what do you think? I designed a clever interview, didn't I?
我始终认为，细节决定成败。年轻人就得保持谦虚，把姿态放低，这样才能看清脚下的路。
I always believe that the difference between success and failure lies in the details. Young people need to stay humble and put their heads down so they can see the road under their feet.
好了，你回去收拾下东西，明天来我们科室报道吧。

Not interested. I hereby declare my resignation!
How could you turn down such an offer?
Next time, next time I will definitely join the department.
Don't worry about next time, think about this time.
现在的年轻人啊，还是太心浮气躁了点，给你机会你要珍惜啊！

哎，等你想明白了再回来找我吧，这岗位我先给你留着……

破碎的奇物，裂痕周遭有粒子漂浮，折射出不稳定的光，这让你联想到了某种古早的显像管设备，还有一条不知为何流传甚广的神秘规则：「拍一拍就好了」。

After checking that you're not hallucinating, you decide to tell Asta about this.
你仔细地思考了下那条神秘规则，你认为这毫无道理，你决定就此停手。

Wrong! Interfering with colleagues during working hours is prohibited! Pets are no exception! No exception!
温馨提示：佩佩与空间站已签署正式员工合同。
Friendly Reminder: Peppy has signed a formal employment contract with the space station.
恭喜您已激活该设备，激活进度为：<unbreak>10%</unbreak>…<unbreak>20%</unbreak>…<unbreak>99%</unbreak>…哎呀！你访问的权限不见了！
Congratulations, device activated! Progress: <unbreak>10%</unbreak>... <unbreak>20%</unbreak>... <unbreak>99%</unbreak>... Ah! Please check your permissions!
正在识别用户信息…识别成功，已为您解除备用装置的光学迷彩。
Identifying user information... identified. Backup device decloaking successful.
请在该终端附近<color=#dbc291ff>寻找「飞天纸鹤」</color>，以解决权限缺失问题。
<color=#dbc291ff>Find an Origami Crane</color> near this terminal to solve your lack of credentials.
设备激活进度已达<unbreak>99%</unbreak>，请输入最终密码破解权限！
Device activation progress has reached <unbreak>99%</unbreak>, please enter the final password to unlock access!
设备屏幕陡然一黑，随后出现了你熟悉的开机页面。然而你心中并无欣喜，只有繁琐流程带来的无尽疲惫。
The device screen turns stark black, followed by the familiar startup page. However, your heart holds no joy — only the endless exhaustion from following complicated procedures.
你想起旧时代影片中流传出来的神秘数字，它被称为是「宇宙的密码」，也是神秘档案的编号。它背后的故事让你双手颤抖。

You recall a string of mysterious digits that were mentioned in a certain old-era film. It was known as the Code of the Universe, and was also the number of a certain cryptic file. Its backstory causes your hands to tremble, just thinking about it.
你输入后，设备上跳出一行冰冷的红字：<color=#eb4d3dff>「密码错误，请重新输入正确密码。」</color>
You enter it, but all that pops up on the device is a line of cold red text: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Password error. Please enter the correct password."</color>
「<unbreak>9527</unbreak>」，亲切且饱含力量的数字，它曾见证过古早的数据传输时代的辉煌，在它背后埋葬了无数过客的青春。你想了想，决定试试这串数字。

"<unbreak>9527</unbreak>," a kind and powerful string of digits. It has witnessed the glory of the ancient data transmission era, and behind those digits are buried the youthful days of countless many. After mulling it over, you decide to give it a try.
你输入后，设备上只跳出一行冰冷的红字：<color=#eb4d3dff>「密码错误，请重新输入正确密码。」</color>
You enter it, but all that pops up on the device is a line of cold red text: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Password error. Please enter the correct password."</color>
密码输入正确，登陆中…登陆成功！
Password entered correctly, login in progress... Login successful!
恭喜你进入了没有任何文件的虚拟荒原！
Congratulations! You have now entered a virtual wasteland devoid of any documents!
屏幕显示：「预约会议」。字符下方有详细的表格，对应着不同的时间段。
The screen display reads "Schedule a Meeting." There are detailed tables below with corresponding times.
其他会议室都已被订满，只有这间还空着。
All the other meeting rooms are fully booked. This is the only free room.
Male Researcher of the Department of Insight
大家肯来这么危险的地方开会，已经给足你们科室面子了！
The fact that everyone's still willing to meet up in such a dangerous place is a glowing endorsement for your department!
你望着空白的时间段，不知为何手忽然有点痒——
You look for a blank spot, and your hands suddenly begin to feel itchy...
选定时间后，页面弹出了窗口，要求勾选「参会人」，你没有找到退出按钮。
After selecting your time, an interface pops up asking you to select Participants. You cannot find the Exit button.
你决定从科员名单里随意勾选几个，哪怕不是一个科室也没有关系，毕竟跨领域的探索才是未来的研究趋势！
You decide to randomly check a few names from the faculty list, not even caring that they are not from the same department. After all, interdepartmental research is the future of academia!
屏幕上弹出一行大字：「预约成功！」。
A row of characters pops up on the screen: "Booking complete!"
离会议开始的时间尚早，先去其他地方转转吧。
It's still too soon for the meeting to start, so let's take a stroll elsewhere.
会议室的人们正吵个不停，你甚至听不清每个人到底在说什么。
The people in the conference room are so noisy that you can't even hear what anyone's saying.
Male Researcher of the Department of Insight
结果呢？你拿出来的那套方案压根不适用于我们科室！你压根就没考虑过我们的难处！
So? Your solution is in no way appropriate for our department! You've never even given a single thought to our concerns!
Female Researcher of the Department of Implement Arts
你懂得多咯，你来做个适用的方案咯？
Since you know so much, then do you have a plan that is suitable?
Male Researcher of the Department of Implement Arts
这都已经是「第<unbreak>12</unbreak>版」的方案了……
We're already at "Version <unbreak>12</unbreak>" of the plan...
Male Researcher of the Department of Insight
你以为是我故意的啊？还不是你们之前提的都不行啊！这该怎么办？
Do you think that's my fault? Or are we supposed to ignore all of your previous poor suggestions!? What are we going to do about it now!?
Female Researcher Department of Cosmic Geography
炖蛋？什么东西要拿来炖蛋？
Egg custard? What do you need egg custard for?
Male Researcher of the Department of Implement Arts
I'll revise that part in the next version... I'll definitely revise it...
Female Researcher of the Department of Implement Arts
我认为，无尽的修改和返工，就是科研进程中最大的败笔。
You know what I think? Endless revision and doing the same work over and over again is the biggest failure of the research process!
Female Researcher Department of Cosmic Geography
啊？我没有提这个修改需求的呀，你们不要乱讲哦。
What are you looking at me for? This revision business wasn't my idea.
这场争执已经没必要再听下去，因为会议中缺失关键的「调停者」。而你意识到，这将是会议发起人应该承担的责任——
There's no need to keep listening to this debate go back and forth because the key "mediator" is missing. And you realize that the organizer of the meeting assumes this responsibility...
你大步走上前，开始了极致的临场演说
You stride forward, and begin delivering the ultimate impromptu speech.
「我看第1版就挺好的呀？你们自己看是不是符合现在的全部需求？」
"I think the Version 1 is quite satisfactory. You all can see very well for yourselves whether it meets all the current requirements."
纷争止息，正确答案近在眼前，但大家往往会忽视它。你正是抓住了这个思维盲区，才能顺利破题。
The argument abates and the correct answer is within grasp, but everyone seems to ignore it. It is precisely by grasping this blind spot that you're able to successfully crack it.
会议室里忽然安静了起来，在场的众人被<color=#dbc291ff>「第1版」</color>拯救，而你也体验到了助人为乐的快乐。
The conference room draws quiet, and everyone present is roundly saved by <color=#dbc291ff>Version 1</color>. You also get to experience the pleasure of helping others.
桌面上的电子屏显示着清晰的字符：「该会议室预约已满，请更换会议室」。
The display on the desktop clearly reads: "This conference room has been booked out. Please try another room."
你有些懊恼，觉得好像失去了什么…但回想起那次开会经历，你已经领悟了开会的精髓。
You are a little chagrined and feel as if you have lost something. But then you think back to the experience of that meeting before and feel like you've already grasped the essence of meetings.
音频播放器的界面很特殊，你阅读着旁边的文字：「原创音乐大赛已进入海选打榜投票阶段，得票数最高的选手将有机会获得晋级直通车！」

The speaker's interface is quite special, and you read the text beside it: "The Original Music Singing Contest has entered the audition voting stage. The contestant with the highest number of votes will have a chance to enjoy a direct promotion!"
目前排名第一的歌曲名叫：《黑塔女士乃世界之光》，第二名叫：《黑塔情歌》，第三名叫：《黑塔女士发现我一个人做实验》。
The current #1 song is titled "Madam Herta is the Light of the World." #2 is "Herta's Love Song," and #3 is "Busted by Madam Herta Experimenting Alone."
被千篇一律的「黑塔女士」系列曲踩在脚底的那首音乐，反倒是吸引了你的注意力。
There is one track, flooded over by cliché Madam Herta worship tracks, that actually ends up piquing your attention.
You decide to play that song: "Crises."
音乐的洪流倾泻而出，你闭上眼睛欣赏，心神好似遨游到宇宙尽头。
A torrent of music flows out. You close your eyes off to the world and as you enjoy it, your mind seems to swim off to the edge of the universe.
这首歌才代表了真正的音乐艺术，可是它竟然排在最后，你怎能接受这位富有才华的选手就这样被埋没！
This performance represents the true art of music, and yet it was at the bottom of the list. How can you accept that such a talented contestant was just buried away?
Why not give them an upvote?
你选择了「打榜」，然而它的排名却依然垫底。你注意到，原来大家的票数已高达几十票，你的一票看来不会改变它被埋没的宿命。

You choose to upvote, but it's still ranked near the bottom. That's when you notice that the other contestants already have a few dozen votes or so. It's no wonder a single vote won't change this song's destiny of being buried in the bottom rank.
Why not give it ten upvotes?
你注意到，《危机预知》在榜单上从垫底跃升到页面中部，但如果想让它传播到更多人的耳朵里，似乎还差得远呢。
You notice that "Crises" has leaped up from the bottom to the middle of the leaderboard, but it still seems like a tall order to spread it on to even more ears.
无意义的歌词与噪音般的旋律令人恶心，但它们霸占大众的耳朵实在太久…是时候让音乐市场知道什么才是真正的音乐了！你决定——
Meaningless lyrics and noisy melodies are horrid, but they've been in the public's ears and minds for too long... It's time to let the music scene know what real music is all about! You decide...
你感到手指关节有些隐隐作痛，这或许就是「打榜」的副作用吧。这首歌的排名一跃而上，从末端飞向了顶部，甚至力压了《黑塔女士乃世界之光》一票。

You feel a vague pain in your finger joints, which is probably a side effect of clicking "Upvote" so many times. The song jumps up in the rankings, flying from the bottom to the top, even edging out "Madam Herta is the Light of the World" by one vote.
虽然自己的手指关节或许要歇上三两天才会恢复，但这短暂的疼痛却成就了一名真正的艺术家！
Your knuckles may need two or three days of rest to recover, but this temporary pain has brought a true artist to fame!
你仔细地观察了下这份榜单，你发现它只在空间站内流通，你决定就此停手。
You carefully look over the leaderboard, and discover that it only circulates around the space station — so you decide to stop.
你研读榜单规则许久，发现第一名的奖励「黑塔女士签名照」毫无含金量，就算拿到第一也没什么意义，你悻悻收回手。
You pore over the leaderboard rules and discover that the first prize — A Signed Photo of Madam Herta — is worthless. Even if you won, it would be meaningless. You resentfully withdraw your hand.
眼见榜单上全是些毫无营养、只知道吹捧黑塔的歌曲与评论。你认为点开这个页面简直是脏了你的眼。
You come to realize that the whole leaderboard is just spam promoting songs and comments about Madam Herta. You begin to feel dirty merely opening up the page.
你正打算离开，屏幕上却突然出现了一个弹窗…上面写着<color=#dbc291ff>「粉丝奖励」</color>。
Just as you are about to leave, a pop-up window appears on the display... It says <color=#dbc291ff>"Fan Reward."</color>
奇怪的声音不断重复，你追溯声源，仔细聆听——
The strange voice is saying something over and over. You trace it back to the source and listen carefully...
这声音似乎蕴藏着某种深意，但除了疑似「王」的发音外，你听不懂它在说些什么。空间站里有能翻译它的工具吗？
This voice seems to contain some kind of poignant meaning, but all you can make out is the word "King." Are there tools aboard the space station to translate it?
你记得在空间站的某处记载着奇物「不可承受之重」的神奇功效，它能让人迅速掌握一门语言。经过比对，眼前这顶王冠正是神奇的「不可承受之重」。

You recall a record in the space station about how the Curio "Unbearable Weight" can instantly make someone fluent in a language. After careful scrutiny, you conclude this crown before you is none other than the wondrous Unbearable Weight.
Learn the language the strange voice is speaking in
宝贵的学习机会岂能浪费。
Valuable learning opportunities cannot be squandered.
倒也不必这么谨慎，在博识学会重现了以利亚萨拉斯的联觉信标技术之后，宇宙中已经不再有语言的障碍了。有机会的时候就好好使用它吧。
There's no need to be so cautious. Language barriers are a thing of the past ever since the Intelligentsia Guild recreated Elias Salas' Synesthesia Beacon technology. Use it when you have the chance.
崭新的语言涌入你的脑海。你只觉得头昏脑涨，头顶像是压有千斤巨石……
A completely new language floods your synapses. You feel dizzy, and a huge boulder seems to be weighing down on your head...
恭喜，你学会了一门全新的语言！
Congratulations — you've learned a whole new language!
现在你总算明白这件奇物名字的由来了。取名的人一定和你一样，头顶承受了太多不该有的压力……
Now you finally understand the reason behind this Curio's name. Whosoever named it must've also experienced this same crushing weight upon their head...
那怪声的意义在你耳中变得清晰起来——「而你，将加冕为约特伍德的帝皇……」
The meaning of the strange voice became clear inside your head: "And you shall be crowned Emperor of the Tottonids..."
尽管你和约特伍德人素未谋面，但你相信它们一定是这宇宙里最具慧眼的族群。
Despite never having met the Tottonids, you trust they must be in possession of the greatest taste in all the universe.
你注意到这里贴着一张泛黄的留言条：「谁能听懂它在说什么？我权限不够，借不到『不可承受之重』……」
You notice a yellowed note that reads, "Can anyone understand what it is saying? My authorization isn't high enough, so I can't borrow the Unbearable Weight..."
你回到了这里，故事开始的地方。恍惚之间，思绪开始飞旋——
You're back where the story started. In a trance, your thoughts begin to whirl —
你想起一些匆匆别过的面孔与名字，他们在同行的旅途中渐渐消逝……
You remember faces and names that you passed by, gradually disappearing as you journey together...
你想起了自己曾做出的选择，你至今也无法确定它们是否会令你感到后悔……
You remember the choices you made, and how you still have no idea whether or not you will come to regret them...
该踏上新的旅途了。在不远的将来，你坚信自己能找到所有问题的答案。
It's time to embark on a new journey. You are confident you'll find answers to all of your questions in the not-too-distant future.
除开机械运作的声音与少许人员交谈的声音，你好像还听见了别的动静……
Besides the sounds of machinery and a few voices chatting, you seem to hear something else...
声音来自这株…植物？你侧耳屏息，等待它下一次「开口」。
The voice is coming from this... plant? You hold your breath, waiting for it to "speak" again.
哎哟哟，你就是我命中注定的那个人吗？
Ohhh, are you the chosen one for me?
喂！你明显听到我说话了！别装！
Hey! You clearly heard me! Quit pretending!
很好，看来你已经做好了觉悟，太好了……
Good, looks like you've understood me. That's great...
终于有人能听懂我的话了！
Finally, someone who can understand what I'm saying!
Why are you able to talk?
在这么个千奇百怪的世界里，这重要吗？
With all the craziness out there in this world, is that really important?
是这样，我脚下这块土壤缺水缺得厉害。经过那次「大动静」之后，液滴系统罢工了。
That's right. This soil beneath me is bone dry, and after that "big incident," the sprinklers stopped working.
植物需要水，就像人需要吃饭一样。请你找点水来浇浇我吧！不然我会枯萎的……
Plants need water just as people need food to survive. Please, can you find me some water? I'll wither and die otherwise...
千万别用什么刺激性的液体！那样会让我直接「化作春泥」的！
And please, none of that stimulating drink! That muddy liquid would just make me rot!
既然植物都可以说话，那为什么不可以喝咖啡呢？你思来想去，决定让它品尝一下这份苦涩的美味。
If plants can talk, why can't they drink coffee too? You think it over before deciding to let it sample some of this beautiful bitter beverage.
啊停停停！别伤害我！要是喝了这个，空间站就会缺少一株正直善良并拥有独立思考意识的植物啦！
Ah, stop stop stop! Don't hurt me! If I drink this, the space station will no longer have an honest, kind, and conscious plant!
不对不对！这个东西的颜色一看就不是什么普通液体！品尝新饮料的好意我心领了，只要给我最普通的纯净水就行。
No no no! This thing is not a normal color! I appreciate your offer to broaden my tastes, but the simplest pure water will do.
你将纯净水顺着植物的根部倒入，干涩的土壤瞬间将它们全部吸收。
You pour pure water down near the roots of the plant, and the dry soil instantly absorbs it all.
啊——嗝！舒服！痛快！好久没喝得这么爽啦！
Ah... *hiccup*! Ahhh~ Now that's good! I haven't had such a good drink for a very long time!
我虽没有手脚，但还有颗感恩之心。刚喝下去的水还没彻底吸收，没法给你报酬。<color=#dbc291ff>明天</color>再来吧，肯定给你好果子吃！

I may not have any limbs, but I still have a grateful heart that beats its thanks. I can't give you the fruits of your kindness just yet, but come back <color=#dbc291ff>tomorrow</color> and I'll have something fresh for you!
你可别糊弄我啊，我就在这儿等你，一动不动！
Can't trick me — I'll be waiting for you right here. I'm not going anywhere else!
你可算来了，知不知道昨天你走了后，我这儿路过了多少科员？那叫一个数不胜数啊！我听到了好多小道消息！谁都不把我当外人，一个劲儿在我面前讲。
Can you guess how many researchers passed me by yesterday after you left? Way too many to count! I got to hear tons of gossip. I'm an insider for everyone's secret conversations.
哎哟，那叫一个刺激劲爆！这空间站看着人不是很多，但这人与人之间的事儿啊…那叫一个，五彩缤纷！
Wow, now that's a blast! This space station doesn't seem to have many people aboard, but the human interactions are... well, ferociously intense!
I didn't take you to be a gossiper.
我又不能走动，除了听人类说话，也没别的事儿干呀。
I can't even walk, so I've got nothing better to do than listen to humans chatting.
Your ears must be really good.
还行还行，那些家伙说话也大声。不过喝了水之后确实感觉听力水平恢复了不少。
They're alright. Those guys were talking pretty loudly, but in any case — all that water has definitely helped my hearing recover.
那可不？喝了水，皮肤没褶子了，头发都变回嫩绿色了！自然精气神就好了。
Don't you think? With that cool drink, my skin is feeling wrinkle-free and my hair's already turned green again! Natural energy is the best.
总之，多谢你昨天的帮助！喏，这是我许诺给你的东西，别客气，拿着吧！以后没事儿多来看看我，万一又停水呢。
Anyway, thanks for your help yesterday! Well, here's what I promised you. Go on, take it! Come back and check up on me later, just in case the water goes out again.
空间站真是鱼龙混杂，居然有个假面愚者混在科员里，想搞点大事。
This space station really is a mixed bag. There's even a Masked Fool in disguise among the researchers, trying to cook up something big.
空间站真是鱼龙混杂，你知道前阵子保卫科抓住了一个企图修改程序语法的谜语人吗？
This space station really is a mixed bag. Did you know the security team caught a Riddler trying to edit the system syntax?
空间站真是鱼龙混杂，听说有个叫温世齐的，偷偷拿黑塔的终端算力挖琥珀币。
This space station really is a mixed bag. I heard there's a guy named Wen Shiqi who secretly uses Herta's terminal to mine Amber coins.
空间站真是鱼龙混杂，听说前阵子星穹列车又来了，里面有个叫丹恒的小哥长挺帅，有几个科员在打赌谁能追到他呢。
This space station really is a mixed bag. I heard the Astral Express stopped by recently with a handsome passenger named Dan Heng — and all the researchers were betting on who could score him.
空间站真是鱼龙混杂，那天甚至有个虚卒从我面前跑了过去……
This space station really is a mixed bag. A few days back, there was even a Voidranger running past me...
空间站真是鱼龙混杂，听说机械贵族螺丝咕姆过阵子要来访问这里哩。
This space station really is a mixed bag. I heard the mech aristocrat Screwllum is going to pay us a visit soon.
空间站真是鱼龙混杂，可怎么就没有第二株会说话的植物陪陪我呢。
This space station really is a mixed bag. How do we not have any other talking plants to keep me company?
空间站真是鱼龙混杂，我有一次好像听见墙壁在跟我说话。
This space station really is a mixed bag. I thought I could hear the walls talking to me once.
路过此处时，你瞥见几本书摆放在一起，从光洁的封皮上看，像是那种填充书柜的大部头典籍，缺乏翻阅的痕迹。

You glimpse several books together as you pass by. Judging by the glossy covers, they seem to be the kind of thick space-fillers used to make a bookshelf look impressive. They show no signs of having actually been read.
